21.1: Mi qṛib ad kecmen ɣer temdint n Lquds, wwḍen ɣer yiɣil n uzemmur yellan tama n taddart n Bitfaji, Sidna Ɛisa iceggeɛ sin inelmaden-is,
21.2: yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet ɣer taddart yellan ɣer zdat, dinna aț-țafem taɣyult akk-d mmi-s, brut-asen-d, tawim-iyi-ten-id.
21.3: Ma yella win i wen-d-yennan kra, init-as : d Ssid-nneɣ i ten-iḥwaǧen, imiren a sen-d-iserreḥ.
21.4: Ayagi yedṛa-d am akken i t-id yenna nnbi Zakarya di tira iqedsen :
21.5: Init i wat wedrar n Siyun : AA taya ugellid-nwen iteddu-d ɣuṛ-wen s wannuz, irkeb-ed ɣef weɣyul amecṭuḥ mmi-s n teɣyult.
21.6: Inelmaden-nni ṛuḥen, xedmen ayen i sen-d-yenna Sidna Ɛisa.
21.7: Wwin-d taɣyult-nni d mmi-s, sburren-asen llebsa-nsen, dɣa srekben Sidna Ɛisa.
21.8: Aṭas n lɣaci ssan iceṭṭiḍen-nsen deg ubrid, wiyaḍ țṛuẓun-d tiseḍwa si ttjuṛ, țessun-tent ula d nutni deg ubrid.
21.9: Lɣaci yezwaren zdat Sidna Ɛisa d wid i t-id-iḍefṛen, țɛeggiḍen s lfeṛḥ qqaṛen : Ḥusana i mmi-s n Sidna Dawed ! Ițțubarek win i d-yusan s yisem n Sidi Ṛebbi ! Ḥusana deg imukan eɛlayen.
21.10: Mi gekcem Sidna Ɛisa ɣer temdint n Lquds, imezdaɣ meṛṛa nhewwalen, qqaṛen : Anwa-t wagi ?
21.11: Lɣaci-nni țțaran-asen : D Sidna Ɛisa, nnbi-nni n taddart n Naṣaret i d-yusan si tmurt n Jlili !
21.12: Sidna Ɛisa yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ iqedsen, iqecceɛ meṛṛa wid yețțaɣen znuzun dinna deg ufrag n lǧameɛ. Iqleb-asen ṭṭwabel i wid yețbeddilen idrimen akk-d wid yeznuzun itbiren.
21.13: dɣa yenna-yasen : Yura : Axxam-iw ad ițțusemmi d axxam n tẓallit, ma d kunwi terram-t d lɣaṛ n imakaren.
21.14: Di lǧameɛ-nni, qeṛṛben-d ɣuṛ-es iderɣalen d iquḍaren, dɣa yesseḥla ten.
21.15: Lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lɛulama n ccariɛa rfan mi walan leɛǧayeb i gxeddem akk-d warrac ițɛeggiḍen di lǧameɛ : Ḥusana i mmi-s n Sidna Dawed !
21.16: Imiren nnan i Sidna Ɛisa : Tesliḍ d acu i d-qqaṛen ? SSidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Sliɣ ih ! Eɛni ur teɣṛim ara imeslayen-agi yuran di tira iqedsen : Tessufɣeḍ-ed leḥmadi seg imawen n warrac akk-d wid n llufanat iteṭṭḍen .
21.17: Imiren yeǧǧa-ten dinna, yeffeɣ si temdint, iṛuḥ ɣer taddart n Bitanya, dinna i gensa.
21.18: Azekka-nni taṣebḥit mi d-yuɣal ɣer temdint, Sidna Ɛisa yelluẓ ;
21.19: iwala yiwet n tneqleț rrif n webrid, iqeṛṛeb ɣuṛ-es, ur yufi deg-s acemma anagar afriwen ; dɣa yenna-yas : Seg wass-a, ur tețțuɣaleḍ ara a d-tefkeḍ lfakya ! IImiren kan, taneqleț-nni teqquṛ.
21.20: Inelmaden-is mi walan ayagi tɛeǧben, nnan : Amek akka teqquṛ tneqleț-agi deg yiwet n teswiɛt ?
21.21: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : A wen-iniɣ tideț, ma yella tesɛam liman ur tețcukkum ara, aț-țizmirem aț-țxedmem akteṛ n wayen xedmeɣ i tneqleț-agi ! AAț-ținim i wedrar-agi qleɛ iman-ik syagi tḍeggṛeḍ iman-ik ɣer lebḥeṛ, ayagi a d-yedṛu !
21.22: Ayen akk ara tessutrem s liman di tẓallit, a wen-d-ițunefk !
21.23: Sidna Ɛisa yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ ibda yesselmad. Lmuqedmin akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud qeṛṛben ɣuṛ-es nnan-as : Ansi i k-d-tekka tezmert s wayes i txeddmeḍ ayagi ? Anwa i k-d-yefkan tazmert-agi ?
21.24: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : A wen-fkeɣ asteqsi ula d nekk, yiwen kan ; ma tǧawbem-iyi-d, ula d nekk a wen-iniɣ ansi i yi-d-tekka tezmert-agi.
21.25: Aɣḍas n Yeḥya, s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi i d-ikka neɣ s ɣuṛ yemdanen ? DDɣa bdan qqaṛen wway gar-asen : Ma nenna-yas seg igenwan, a ɣ-d-yini acuɣeṛ ihi ur tuminem ara yis,
21.26: ma nenna-yas daɣen seg imdanen, nuggad lɣaci-agi, axaṭer ḥesben akk Yeḥya d nnbi.
21.27: Dɣa nnan-as i Sidna Ɛisa : Ur neẓri ara ! YYerra-yasen : Ihi ula d nekk ur wen-d-qqaṛeɣ ara ansi i yi-d-tekka tezmert s wayes i xeddmeɣ ayagi !
21.28: D acu twalam ? Yiwen wergaz yesɛa sin warraw-is, yenṭeq ɣer umezwaru, yenna-yas : A mmi, ṛuḥ aț-țxedmeḍ ass-agi di tfeṛṛant-iw.
21.29: Yerra-yas : Ur țṛuḥuɣ ara ! MMeɛna yuɣal yendem, iṛuḥ ad ixdem di tfeṛṛant.
21.30: Yenna-yas daɣen i mmi-s wi sin ad iṛuḥ ad ixdem, yerra-yas-d : Ih a baba ad ṛuḥeɣ ! MMeɛna ur iṛuḥ ara.
21.31: Anwa deg sen i gxedmen lebɣi n baba-s ? RRran-as-ed : D amezwaru a Sidi ! SSidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : A wen-d-iniɣ tideț, imekkasen imakaren akk-d yir tilawin a kkun zwiren ɣer tgelda n igenwan !
21.32: Axaṭer Yeḥya yusa-d ɣuṛ-wen yesken-awen-d abrid n tideț, meɛna ur t-tuminem ara ; ma d imekkasen d yir tilawin umnen yis. Yerna ɣas akken twalam ayagi, ur d-tuɣalem ara ɣer webrid teggumam aț-țamnem yis.
21.33: A wen-d-rnuɣ daɣen lemtel nniḍen : yella yiwen umɛellem, yeẓẓa tafeṛṛant, izzi-yas-ed s zzeṛb, yeɣza amkan i tɛeṣṣart n tẓurin, yebna taɛrict i tɛessast, issekra tafeṛṛant-is i ixemmasen, imiren iṛuḥ ɣer lɣeṛba.
21.34: Mi d-yewweḍ lweqt n tẓurin, iceggeɛ iqeddacen-is ɣer ixemmasen nni iwakken a s-d-fken amur-is n lɣella.
21.35: Meɛna ixemmasen-nni ṭṭfen iqeddacen-nni, wa wten-t, wa nɣan-t, wayeḍ ṛejmen-t.
21.36: Iceggeɛ-asen daɣen tarbaɛt nniḍen n iqeddacen yugaren tamezwarut. Meɛna tedṛa yid-sen am imezwura-nni.
21.37: Taggara, iceggeɛ-asen mmi-s, yenna : Ahat imi d mmi a t-qadṛen !
21.38: Lameɛna mi walan mmi-s, ixemmasen-nni nnan wway gar-asen : Ataya win ara iweṛten, kkret a t-nenneɣ iwakken a nawi lweṛt-is.
21.39: Sṭfen-t, ḍeggṛen-t ɣer beṛṛa n tfeṛṛant, dɣa nɣan-t.
21.40: Sidna Ɛisa yenna i lɣaci : Ihi tura, m'ara d-yas bab n tfeṛṛant-nni, d acu ara sen-yexdem i ixemmasen-agi ?
21.41: Rran-as-ed : Ad ineɣ ixemmasen imcumen, ma ț-țafeṛṛant a ț-issekru i ixemmasen nniḍen ara s-d-ifken amur-is di lweqt n lɣella.
21.42: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Leɛmeṛ teɣṛim imeslayen-agi i d-nnant tira iqedsen : Adɣaɣ-nni i ḍeggṛen wid ibennun, d nețța i guɣalen d azṛu alemmas , WWin yeṭṭfen lebni. AA yagi yekka-d s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi, d ayen i ɣ-istɛeǧben .
21.43: Daymi i wen-qqaṛeɣ : Tagelda n igenwan a wen tețwakkes, aț-țețțunefk i leǧnas nniḍen ara d-ifken lɣella.
21.44: Win ara yeɣlin ɣef wusalas-agi ad yerreẓ, daɣen win i ɣef ara d-yeɣli usalas-agi ad yețwamḥeq.
21.45: Mi slan i imeslayen-agi, ifariziyen d lmuqedmin imeqqranen fehmen belli fell-asen i d-iheddeṛ Sidna Ɛisa.
21.46: Meɛna ɣas akken bɣan a t-ṭṭfen, ur zmiren ara axaṭer uggaden lɣaci-nni i t-iḥesben d nnbi.

22.1: Sidna Ɛisa imeslay-asen-d daɣen s lemtel, yenna-yasen : --
22.2: Tagelda n igenwan tcuba ɣer yiwen ugellid i gxedmen tameɣṛa i mmi-s.
22.3: Iceggeɛ iqeddacen-is ad ssiwlen i wid yețwaɛeṛden, meɛna ugin a d-asen.
22.4: Yerna iceggeɛ-asen iqeddacen nniḍen a sen-inin : Heggaɣ imensi, zliɣ izgaren-iw d wakraren-iw, kullec ihegga, aset-ed ɣer tmeɣṛa !
22.5: Meɛna widak-nni ițwaɛeṛḍen ur s-fkin ara azal, yal yiwen yelha d ccɣel-is, wa iṛuḥ ɣer yiger-is, wa ɣer ssuq-is.
22.7: Agellid-nni ikcem-it zzɛaf d ameqqran, dɣa iceggeɛ lɛeskeṛ-is nɣan iqettalen-nni, sseṛɣen tamdint-nsen.
22.8: Imiren yenna i iqeddacen-is : Imensi n tmeɣṛa ihegga, meɛna widak-nni ițwaɛeṛḍen ur t-uklalen ara ;
22.9: ṛuḥet ɣer izenqan, tɛeṛḍem-d ɣer tmeɣṛa wid akk ara tafem deg iberdan.
22.10: Iqeddacen-nni ṛuḥen ɣer izenqan jemɛen-d wid akk ufan, ama d amcum ama d win yelhan, s wakka axxam n tmeɣṛa yeččuṛ-ed d lɣaci.
22.11: Mi d-ikcem ugellid ad iwali inebgawen, iwala yiwen wergaz ur yelsi ara llebsa n tmeɣṛa.
22.12: yenna-yas : Ay amdakkel, amek i d-tkecmeḍ ɣer dagi mbla llebsa n tmeɣṛa yețwaheggan i yinebgawen ? AArgaz-nni yessusem, ur yufi d acu ara s-yini.
22.13: Agellid-nni yefka lameṛ i iqeddacen-is yenna-yasen : Cuddet-as ifassen d iḍaṛṛen, tḍeggṛem-t ɣer ṭṭlam n beṛṛa, anda llan imeṭṭawen d nndama tameqqrant.
22.14: Axaṭer aṭas i gețwaɛerḍen, meɛna drus ara yețwaqeblen.
22.15: Imiren ṛuḥen ifariziyen ad mcawaṛen amek ara d-sseɣlin Sidna Ɛisa deg wawal.
22.16: Ceggɛen-as kra seg inelmaden-nsen akk-d kra si terbaɛt n Hiṛudus, nnan-as : A Sidi, neẓra-k d bab n lḥeqq i telliḍ, tesselmadeḍ iberdan n Ṛebbi s tideț, ur tuggadeḍ ula d yiwen, ur txeddmeḍ ara lxilaf ger yemdanen.
22.17: Ini-yaɣ-d ihi d acu twalaḍ : d leḥlal neɣ d leḥṛam a nxelleṣ tabzert ( leɣṛama ) i ugellid Qayṣar (yestɛemṛen tamurt-nneɣ) ?
22.18: Meɛna Sidna Ɛisa yeẓran ayen i țxemmimen, yenna-yasen : Ay at sin wudmawen ! Acuɣeṛ tebɣam a yi-tjeṛbem ?
22.19: Seknet-iyi-d aṣurdi s wacu țxelliṣen tabzert ! FFkan-as-d aṣurdi n lfeṭṭa.
22.20: Dɣa isteqsa-ten : Udem akk-d tira yellan deg uṣuṛdi-agi, wi ten-ilan ?
22.21: Rran-as : N Qayṣer ! IImiren yenna-yasen : Erret ihi i Qayṣer ayen yellan n Qayṣer, terrem i Ṛebbi ayen yellan n Ṛebbi !
22.22: Mi slan i imeslayen-agi, wehmen, dɣa ṛuḥen ǧǧan-t.
22.23: Ass-nni, isaduqiyen i gellan d imdanen ur nețțamen ara s ḥeggu n lmegtin, usan-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, steqsan-t, nnan-as :
22.24: A Sidi, Sidna Musa yenna-d : ma yella yemmut wergaz d amengur, ilaq gma-s ad yaɣ taǧǧalt-nni iwakken a d-isɛu yid-es dderya ara iweṛten gma-s-nni yemmuten.
22.25: Yuɣ lḥal llan ɣuṛ-nneɣ sebɛa watmaten, amezwaru izewǧen yemmut ur d-yeǧǧi dderya, dɣa gma-s yerra ( yuɣa ) tameṭṭut-nni.
22.26: Akkenni i tedṛa d wis sin, d wis tlata, armi d wis sebɛa.
22.27: Mi mmuten irkulli, temmut ula ț-țameṭṭut-nni ;
22.28: ass n ḥeggu n lmegtin anwa deg-sen ara ț-yesɛun ț-țameṭṭut-is imi i ț-uɣen di sebɛa yid-sen ?
22.29: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Tɣelṭem ! Axaṭer ur tefhimem tira iqedsen, ur tessinem tazmert n Ṛebbi.
22.30: Ass n ḥeggu n lmegtin, irgazen ț-țilawin ur zeggjen ara, meɛna ad uɣalen am lmalayekkat deg igenni.
22.31: Ɣef wayen yeɛnan ḥeggu n lmegtin, ur teɣṛim ara acu i d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi ? :
22.32: D nekk i d Illu n Ibṛahim, n Isḥaq, n Yeɛqub. Sidi Ṛebbi mačči d Ṛebbi n lmegtin, meɛna d Ṛebbi n wid yeddren.
22.33: Mi s-slan, lɣaci qqimen țweḥḥiden deg imeslayen-is !
22.34: Mi slan ifariziyen belli Sidna Ɛisa yeɣleb isaduqiyen deg wawal, nnejmaɛen wway gar-asen.
22.35: Yiwen seg-sen d lɛalem n ccariɛa, isteqsa-t iwakken a t-ijeṛṛeb :
22.36: A Sidi, anwa i d lameṛ ameqqran meṛṛa di ccariɛa ?
22.37: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : -- Aț-țḥemleḍ Illu Sidi Ṛebbi-inek seg wul-ik, s teṛwiḥt-ik, s wayen yellan di tezmert-ik.
22.38: D wagi i d lameṛ yellan d amezwaru yerna d ameqqran akk di ccariɛa.
22.39: Atan wayeḍ yesɛan azal annect umezwaru-agi : Aț-țḥemleḍ lɣiṛ-ik am yiman-ik.
22.40: D sin lumuṛat-agi i d lsas n ccariɛa akk-d lenbiya.
22.41: Mi llan ifariziyen nnejmaɛen, Sidna Ɛisa isteqsa-ten yenna :
22.42: D acu ara d-tinim ɣef Lmasiḥ ? Ansi ara d-yekk, yeɛni anwi i d lejdud-is ? NNnan-as : D mmi-s n Sidna Dawed.
22.43: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Amek ihi i s-isemma Dawed s tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen « Sidi » mi genna :
22.44: Sidi Ṛebbi yenna i Ssid-iw : ṭṭef amkan ɣer tama-w tayeffust, alamma rriɣ iɛdawen-ik seddaw iḍaṛṛen-ik.
22.45: Ma yella ihi Dawed yessawel-as « Sidi » amek ara yili ihi d mmi-s ?
22.46: Yiwen deg-sen ur izmir a s-d yerr awal, seg wass-nni țțaggaden a t-steqsin.

23.1: Imiren Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq ɣer lɣaci d inelmaden-is yenna yasen :
23.2: Lɛulama d ifariziyen sselmaden ccariɛa n Musa.
23.3: Xedmet ayen akk ara wen-d-inin, meɛna ur xeddmet ara wayen xeddmen nutni, axaṭer ayen i d-qqaṛen ur t-xeddmen ara.
23.4: Țcuddun tiɛekkmin ẓẓayen țɛebbin-tent ɣef tuyat n yemdanen, ma d nutni țțagin a ten-ɛiwnen ula s yixef n iḍuḍan-nsen.
23.5: Ayen akk i xeddmen, xeddmen-t iwakken a ten-walin yemdanen, țɛelliqen tiḥerztin ț-țeɣṛisin ɣef yiman-nsen.
23.6: Ḥemmlen ad ṭṭfen imukan imezwura ama di tmeɣṛiwin ama di leǧwameɛ, ḥemmlen m'ara țsellimen fell-asen yemdanen di tejmuyaɛ akk-d leswaq ;
23.7: ḥemmlen daɣen m'ara sen-qqaṛen yemdanen : « a Sidi ».
23.8: Ma d kunwi ɣuṛ-wat a wen qqaṛen : « a Sidi » axaṭer d atmaten i tellam yerna yiwen kan i d Ssid-nwen.
23.9: Ur qqaṛet ula i yiwen di ddunit : « Baba » axaṭer anagar yiwen i d baba-wen, d Baba Ṛebbi yellan deg igenwan.
23.10: Ur qebblet ara aț-țețțusemmim : « imeqqranen » axaṭer anagar yiwen i d ameqqran : d Lmasiḥ !
23.11: Ameqqran deg-wen, d win iqeddcen fell-awen.
23.12: Kra n win issimɣuṛen iman-is a d-yers, ma d win issimẓiyen iman is ad ițwarfed !
23.13: A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ay at sin wudmawen ! AAxaṭer tmeddlem tiwwura n igenwan i yemdanen, ur tkeččmem kunwi, ur tețțaǧǧam ad kecmen wid yebɣan !
23.14: A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ay at sin wudmawen ! Axaṭer tettețțem ayla n tuǧǧal, tesṭuqqutem awal di tẓallit-nwen iwakken a d-tesbegnem iman-nwen telham. Ɣef wayagi, lɛiqab i kkun-ițṛaǧun d ameqqran !
23.15: A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ay at sin udmawen ! Tețnadim timura, tzeggrem lebḥuṛ iwakken a d-rebḥem ɣas ula d yiwen ɣer ddin i tettabaɛem; mi t-id-rnam ɣuṛ-wen, tețțaram-t d win yuklalen ǧahennama akteṛ-nwen !
23.16: A nnger-nwen ay iderɣalen iteṭṭfen afus i wiyaḍ ! Teqqaṛem : « Ma yella yeggul bunadem s lǧameɛ iqedsen, ɣas yeḥnet ulac fell-as ; ma d win ara yegallen s ddheb yellan di lǧameɛ, ur s-ilaq ara ad iḥnet, ilaq ad iṭṭef di limin-ines ! »
23.17: Ay imehbal, ay iderɣalen ! D acu i gesɛan azal, d ddheb neɣ d lǧameɛ i gețțarran ddheb-nni d imqeddes ?
23.18: Teqqaṛem daɣen : « Win ara yegallen s udekkan n iseflawen, ɣas iḥnet ulac fell-as, ma d win ara yegallen s iseflawen nni, ur s-ilaq ara ad iḥnet, ilaq ad iṭṭef di limin-ines.»
23.19: Ay iderɣalen ! Anwa i gesɛan azal, d iseflawen neɣ d udekkan-nni i gerran iseflawen d imqedsen ?
23.20: Win ara yegallen s udekkan n iseflawen, yeggul s udekkan-nni d wayen akk yersen fell-as.
23.21: Win ara yegallen daɣen s lǧameɛ, yeggul s lǧameɛ akk-d Win i gellan deg-s.
23.22: Win ara yegallen s igenwan, yeggul daɣen s igenwan akk-d Sidi Ṛebbi iḥekkmen deg-sen.
23.23: A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ay at sin udmawen ! tețțakem leɛcuṛ ɣef nneɛneɛ, abesbas d lkemmun, lameɛna tețțaǧǧam ɣer deffir lḥeqq, ṛṛeḥma d laman. DD annect-agi i gețṛaǧu deg-wen Sidi Ṛebbi aț-țezwirem deg-sen a ten-txedmem, mbla ma terram deg idis ayen nniḍen.
23.24: Ay iderɣalen iteṭṭfen afus i wiyaḍ ! Tețṣeffim tissit-nwen ɣef yizi, tesseblaɛem alɣem.
23.25: A nnger-wen ay ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ay at sin wudmawen ! Axaṭer tessizdigem taqbuct d uḍebsi s ufella kan, meɛna ɣer daxel-nsen ččuṛen ț-țukeṛdiwin d ṭṭmeɛ.
23.26: Ay afarizi aderɣal ! Ssizdeg uqbel daxel n teqbuct d uḍebsi, iwakken ula s ufella-nsen ad izdigen !
23.27: A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ay at sin udmawen ! TTețțemcabim ɣer iẓekwan isebɣen s lǧir ; s ufella cebḥen, ɣer daxel ččuṛen d iɣsan n lmegtin d rekku.
23.28: Akka ula d kunwi, tețbegginem-d iman-nwen telham ɣer yemdanen, lameɛna zdaxel teččuṛem d leɣruṛ d cceṛ.
23.29: A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ay at sin wudmawen ! Tbennum iẓekwan n lenbiya, tețcebbiḥem iẓekwan n wid iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi,
23.30: teqqaṛem lemmer i nɛac di zzman n lejdud-nneɣ, tili ur neqbil ara a nțekki yid-sen deg ussizel n idammen n lenbiya.
23.31: S wakka tețcehhidem belli kunwi ț-țarwa n wid ineqqen lenbiya
23.32: yerna kunwi tețkemmilem ayen xedmen lejdud-nwen !
23.33: A ccetla n izerman ! Amek ara tmenɛem si lɛiqab n ǧahennama ?
23.34: Daymi ara wen-d-ceggɛeɣ lenbiya, imusnawen akk-d lɛulama. KKra seg-sen a ten-tenɣem, kra a ten-tsemmṛem ɣef wumidag, kra nniḍen a ten-tejlekḍem di leǧwameɛ nwen yerna a ten-tețqehhiṛem si temdint ɣer tayeḍ.
23.35: Ihi, idammen n iḥeqqiyen yuzzlen di lqaɛa, si Habil aḥeqqi mmi-s n Adem armi d Zakarya mmi-s n Birikya, i tenɣam ger lǧameɛ iqedsen d udekkan iseflawen, a d-uɣalen ɣer yiri-nwen.
23.36: A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : ayagi meṛṛa a d-yeɣli ɣef lǧil-agi !
23.37: A tamdint n Lquds ! A tamdint n Lquds ineqqen lenbiya, ireǧǧmen wid i m-d-ițuceggɛen s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi, acḥal n tikkal i bɣiɣ a d-jemɛeɣ arraw-im akken tjemmeɛ tyaziṭ ifṛax-is ddaw wafriwen-is, meɛna tegummaḍ !
23.39: Axaṭer aql-i a wen-iniɣ : ur tețțuɣalem ara a yi-twalim, alamma d ass i deg ara d-tinim : Yețțubarek win i d-yusan s yisem n Sidi Ṛebbi !

24.1: Mi d-iffeɣ si lǧameɛ iqedsen, Sidna Ɛisa iteddu ad iṛuḥ. Inelmaden-is qeṛṛben-d ɣuṛ-es, țwehhin-as iwakken ad yerr ddehn-is ɣer cbaḥa akk-d lebni n lǧameɛ iqedsen.
24.2: Meɛna Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Twalam annect-agi meṛṛa ? A wen-iniɣ tideț : ur d-yețɣimi wezṛu ɣef wayeḍ, kullec ad ihudd.
24.3: Yuli ɣer yiɣil n uzemmur iqqim weḥd-es, inelmaden-is usan-d a t-steqsin nnan-as : Melmi ara d-idṛu wayen i d tenniḍ, amek ara neɛqel ass ameqqran n tuɣalin-ik akk-d taggara n ddunit ?
24.4: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Ɣuṛ-wat win ara wen-ikellxen !
24.5: Axaṭer aṭas n yemdanen ara d-yasen s yisem-iw, a d-inin : «` D nekk i d Lmasiḥ ! » Yerna ad kellxen aṭas n lɣaci.
24.6: Aț-țeslem s ṭradat ț-țegrawliwin, meɛna ɣuṛ-wat a kkun-iffeɣ leɛqel. Ur țțaggadet ara, axaṭer ilaq a d-yedṛu wannect-a, meɛna mazal mačči d nnger n ddunit.
24.7: Agdud ad yennaɣ d wayeḍ, tagelda aț-țeẓdem ɣef tayeḍ, a d-yili laẓ d zzelzlat deg waṭas n imukan.
24.8: Ayagi akk ara yedṛun, ad yili am lqeṛḥ amezwaru n tmeṭṭut iṭṭfen addud.
24.9: Imiren a kkun-fken iwakken aț-țețțuɛetbem, a kkun-nɣen, leǧnas meṛṛa a kkun-keṛhen ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw.
24.10: Aṭas ara yeǧǧen liman-nsen, ad msekṛahen, ad țemyexdaɛen wway gar-asen.
24.11: A d-nnulfun lenbiya n lekdeb, ad ɣuṛṛen aṭas n lɣaci,
24.12: simmal ad yețzad lbaṭel, simmal lmaḥibba n waṭas n yemdanen aț-țenqes.
24.13: Ma d win ara yeṭṭfen di liman-is alamma ț-țaggara, ad ițțusellek.
24.14: Lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ ɣef tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi, ad ițțubecceṛ di ddunit meṛṛa iwakken leǧnas ad slen yis. Imiren ara d-taweḍ taggara n ddunit.
24.15: M'ara twalim deg wemkan iqedsen win iwumi semman lmuṣiba issengaren i ɣef d-ihḍeṛ nnbi Danyel ; ( win ara yeɣṛen taktabt-agi n nnbi Danyel ad ifhem !)
24.16: Imiren, wid ara yilin di tmurt n Yahuda ilaq ad rewlen ɣer idurar,
24.17: win ara yilin s ufella n ssqef, ur ilaq ara ad ikcem ɣer wexxam iwakken a d-iddem lqecc-is,
24.18: win daɣen ara yilin di lexla, ur ilaq ara ad yuɣal ɣer deffir iwakken a d-iddem abeṛnus-is !
24.19: A tawaɣit n tilawin ara yilin s tadist akk-d țid ara yessuṭuḍen deg ussan-nni !
24.20: Dɛut ɣer Ṛebbi iwakken tarewla agi-nwen ur d-tdeṛṛu ara di ccetwa neɣ deg wass n westeɛfu.
24.21: Axaṭer « ad yili yiwen n leɛtab ur d-nelli seg wasmi d-tebda ddunit ar ass-a yerna ur ițțuɣal ara a d-yili ! »
24.22: Lemmer ur issenqes ara Sidi Ṛebbi deg wussan-nni, tili yiwen ur imenneɛ, meɛna ɣef ddemma n wid yextaṛ ara yeṣṣenqes i wussan-agi.
24.23: Imiren ma yenna-yawen-d yiwen : Lmasiḥ atan dagi neɣ atan, dihin, ur țțamnet ara !
24.24: Axaṭer a d-asen wid ara yerren iman-nsen d Lmasiḥ neɣ d lenbiya, ad xedmen lbeṛhanat d leɛǧayeb akk-d licaṛat iwakken ad kelxen ma zemren ula d wid yextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
24.26: ma nnan-awen Lmasiḥ atan deg unezṛuf, ur țṛuḥut ara, neɣ ma nnan-awen walit, atan deg umkan-ihin yeffren, ur țțamnet ara.
24.27: Axaṭer asm'ara d-yas Mmi-s n bunadem, ad yili am tafat n lbeṛeq m'ara d-tfeǧǧeǧ si cceṛq alamma d lɣeṛb.
24.28: Anda yella umuṛḍus ( lǧifa ), dinna ara nnejmaɛen igudar.
24.29: M'ara ɛeddin wussan-nni n leɛtab, iṭij ad inqes, aggur ur d-ițțak ara tiziri-ines, itran a d-ɣlin seg igenni, tizmar n igenwan ad rgagint.
24.30: Imiren a d-iban Mmi-s n bunadem deg igenni, leɛṛac meṛṛa n ddunit ad meǧden, a d wwten deg idmaren-nsen m'ara walin Mmi-s n bunadem deg igenwan, yusa-d ɣef wusigna s tezmert akk-d lɛaḍima tameqqrant.
24.31: A d-iceggeɛ lmalayekkat-is ad berrḥent s ṣṣut n lbuq, a d snejmaɛent wid akk yextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, si yal amkan, seg ixef n ddunit ɣer wayeḍ.
24.32: Meyzet ɣef lemtel n tneqleț : mi lqaqit isegman-is, fsan wafriwen-is, teḥsam yewweḍ-d unebdu !
24.33: Ula d kunwi, m'ara twalim yewweḍ-ed wannect-agi meṛṛa, ḥṣut belli Mmi-s n bunadem ițeddu-d, atan ɣer tewwurt.
24.34: A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : lǧil-agi ur ițɛedday ara alamma ideṛṛu-d wannect agi meṛṛa.
24.35: Igenni d lqaɛa ad fnun, ma d imeslayen-iw ur fennun ara !
24.36: Meɛna ɣef wayen yeɛnan ass neɣ ssaɛa n wannect-agi meṛṛa, yiwen ur ten-issin, ama d lmalayekkat n igenwan, ama d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi, anagar Baba Ṛebbi i geẓran.
24.37: Am akken i tedṛa di zzman n nnbi Nuḥ, akken daɣen ara tedṛu di lweqt n Mmi-s n bunadem.
24.38: Axaṭer deg ussan-nni uqbel a d-neflen waman ɣef ddunit, imdanen llan tețțen, tessen, țemyezwaǧen, zeggjen i warraw-nsen, armi d ass i deg yekcem nnbi Nuḥ ɣer lbabuṛ.
24.39: Yiwen ur ifaq s wacemma armi d-ḥemlen waman i ten-yewwin, snegren-ten akk. AAkken ara tedṛu di lweqt n tuɣalin n Mmi-s n bunadem !
24.40: Imiren, ger sin yergazen ara yilin deg iger, yiwen ad ițwarfed wayeḍ a d-iqqim.
24.41: Ger snat n tilawin yeẓẓaden s tsirt, yiwet aț-țețwarfed tayeḍ a d-teqqim !
24.42: Ɛasset ihi ur ɣefflet ara ! Axaṭer ur teẓrim ara lweqt i deg ara d-yas Ssid-nwen !
24.43: Rret ddehn-nwen ɣer wayagi : lemmer yeẓri bab n wexxam lweqt i deg ara d-yas umakar, tili ad iɛiwez ur iggan ara, iwakken ur t-țțakren ara.
24.44: Daymi ula d kunwi heggit iman-nwen axaṭer di lweqt i ɣef ur tebnim ara, ara d-yas Mmi-s n bunadem.
24.45: Anwa i d aqeddac aɛeqli i ɣef ara yețkel bab n wexxam ? D win ara iwekkel ɣef wat wexxam-is meṛṛa, iwakken a sen-yefk lqut-nsen di lawan.
24.46: Amarezg n uqeddac-agi ara d-yaf bab n wexxam m'ara d-yaweḍ, yelha d ccɣel-nni.
24.47: A wen-iniɣ tideț : a t-yerr d lewkil ɣef wayla-s meṛṛa !
24.48: Meɛna ma yella axeddam-agi diri-t, ad yini deg ul-is : bab n wexxam iɛeṭṭel, mazal ur d-ițas ara ;
24.49: dɣa ad ibdu ad ikkat iqeddacen n wexxam-nni, ad iteț, ad itess nețța d isekṛanen.
24.50: Bab n wexxam a d-yas deg wass i ɣef ur ibni ara uqeddac-nni, di lawan ur yeẓri.
24.51: A t-iqecceɛ, a t-iɛaqeb akken țwaɛaqben at sin udmawen : imiren ara yilin imeṭṭawen d nndama tameqqrant.

25.1: Daymi deg wussan-nni, tagelda n igenwan aț-țecbu ɣer ɛecṛa telmeẓyin i geddmen tiftilin-nsent iwakken ad ṛuḥent ad mmagrent isli.
25.2: Xemsa seg-sent ț-țuḥṛicin, xemsa nniḍen ț-țungifin.
25.3: Mi d-ddment tungifin-nni tiftilin nsent, ur d-wwint ara zzit yid-sent.
25.4: Ma ț-țuḥṛicin-nni, wwint-ed yid-sent tiqbucin n zzit.
25.5: Imi i gɛeṭṭel yesli, tilmeẓyin-nni nuddment dɣa ṭsent.
25.6: Di tlemmast n yiḍ, yiwet n taɣect tɛeggeḍ-ed : Ataya yesli iteddu-d, ffɣemt a t-temmagremt !
25.7: Imiren kan ukint-ed akk telmeẓyin-nni, heggant tiftilin-nsent.
25.8: Tungifin-nni nnant i tuḥṛicin : Fkemt-aɣ-d kra si zzit-nkunt, tiftilin-nneɣ qṛib ad xsint.
25.9: Tuḥṛicin rrant-asent : Ulamek, ur aɣ-d-tkeffu ara i nekkunti d kunemti, ṛuḥemt a d taɣemt i yiman-nkunt ɣer wid yeznuzun.
25.10: Mi ṛuḥent a d-aɣent, isli yewweḍ-ed, tuḥṛicin-nni iheggan iman-nsent kecment yid-es ɣer wexxam n tmeɣṛa, dɣa rran-d tawwurt.
25.11: Mi i d-wwḍent tungifin-nni, bdant țɛeggiḍent : A Sidi, a Sidi ldi-yaɣ-d tawwurt.
25.12: Meɛna nețța yerra-yasent-ed : A kunt-iniɣ tideț : ur kkunt ssineɣ ara !
25.13: Daymi a wen-iniɣ : Ɛasset, imi ur teẓrim ass, ur teẓrim lweqt.
25.14: Ass n tuɣalin n Mmi-s n bunadem ad yili daɣen am yiwen wergaz i gțeddun ad iṛuḥ ɣer lɣeṛba, yesnejmaɛ-ed iqeddacen-is, iwekkel iten ɣef wayen akk yesɛa.
25.15: Ifka i umezwaru xemsmeyya twiztin n ddheb, wi sin yefka-yas mitin, wis tlata yefka-yas meyya ; yefka i yal yiwen s wakken tella tezmert-is, dɣa iṛuḥ.
25.16: Imiren kan, aqeddac-nni iwumi yefka xemsmeyya twiztin, iṛuḥ yetjeṛ yis-sent, irbeḥ-ed xemsmeyya nniḍen.
25.17: Ula d win iwumi yefka mitin, ixdem akken, irbeḥ-ed mitin nniḍen.
25.18: Ma d win iwumi yefka meyya, iṛuḥ yeɣza di lqaɛa, yeffer tiwiztin-nni i s-d-ifka umɛellem-is.
25.19: Mi gɛedda lweqt, yuɣal-ed umɛellem-nni, isnejmaɛ-iten-id iwakken ad imḥasab yid-sen.
25.20: Win akken iwumi yefka xemsmeyya twiztin, yusa-d yewwi-d yid-es xemsmeyya twiztin nniḍen, yenna-yas : A Sidi tefkiḍ-iyi-d xemsmeyya twiztin n ddheb, a tent-ih xemsmeyya nniḍen i d-rebḥeɣ yis-sent.
25.21: Amɛellem-is yenna-yas : D ayen yelhan i txedmeḍ ay aqeddac unṣiḥ, imi deg-ek laman ɣef tɣawsiwin timecṭuḥin, sya d asawen a k-wekkleɣ ɣef timeqqranin ! Ili-k di lfeṛḥ yid-i !
25.22: Aqeddac-nni iwumi yefka mitin twiztin n ddheb, iqeṛṛeb-ed ula d nețța, yenna-yas : A Sidi tefkiḍ-iyi mitin twiztin n ddheb, a tent-ih mitin nniḍen i d-rebḥeɣ yis-sent.
25.23: Amɛellem-is yenna-yas : D ayen yelhan i txedmeḍ, ay aqeddac unṣiḥimi deg-k laman ɣef tɣawsiwin timecṭuḥin, sya d asawen a k-wekkleɣ ɣef timeqqranin ! Ili-k di lfeṛḥ yid-i !
25.24: Iwweḍ-ed win akken iwumi yefka meyya twiztin, yenna yas : A Sidi ẓriɣ-k d argaz iweɛṛen, tmeggreḍ anda ur tezriɛeḍ, tjemmɛeḍ seg wennar ayen ur tesrewteḍ ,
25.25: dɣa uggadeɣ-k, daymi i ṛuḥeɣ ffreɣ deg wakal tiwiztin-nni i yi-tefkiḍ. Atan wayla-k, ddem-it !
25.26: Amɛellem-is yenna-yas : Ay aqeddac amcum, ameɛdaz ! Imi iyi-teẓriḍ meggreɣ-d anda ur zriɛeɣ, jemmɛeɣ-ed daɣen anda ur srewteɣ,
25.27: acuɣeṛ ihi ur tessekraḍ ara idrimin-iw iwakken m'ara d-uɣaleɣ a ten-id-erreɣ s lfayda.
25.28: Imiren amɛellem-nni yumeṛ i iqeddacen-is yenna-yasen : Kkset-as meyya-nni twiztin ternum-tent i win yesɛan ɛecṛa alef n twiztin !
25.29: Axaṭer kra win yesɛan, a s-nernu ad yili di tawant, ma d win ur nesɛi ara, a s-nekkes ula d ayen yesɛa.
25.30: Ma d aqeddac-agi ur nemɛin, ḍeggṛet-eț ɣer ṭṭlam n beṛṛa anda ara yilin imeṭṭawen d nndama tameqqrant.
25.31: Asm'ara d-yas Mmi-s n bunadem di tmanegt-is nețța d lmalayekkat meṛṛa, ad iḥkem di lɛaḍima-s ;
25.32: leǧnas meṛṛa a d-nnejmaɛen zdat-es, a ten-ifṛeq am umeksa iɛeSlen ulli ɣef tɣeṭṭen.
25.33: Ad yerr ulli ɣer uyeffus-is, tiɣeṭṭen ɣer uzelmaḍ-is.
25.34: Imiren agellid ad yini i wid yellan ɣer uyeffus-is : Aset-ed a kunwi iburek Baba, aț-țweṛtem tagelda i wen-ițțuheggan seg wasmi i tebda ddunit.
25.35: Axaṭer lliɣ lluẓeɣ tefkam-iyi ččiɣ, ffudeɣ tefkam-iyi swiɣ, usiɣ-ed d abeṛṛani testeṛḥbem yis-i,
25.36: lliɣ d aɛeryan tesselsem-iyi, d amuḍin telham-d yid-i, lliɣ daɣen d ameḥbus tusam-d teẓram-iyi.
25.37: Imiren iḥeqqiyen a s-d-rren : A Sidi melmi i k-neẓra telluẓeḍ, nefka-yak teččiḍ ? Neɣ neẓra-k teffuḍeḍ nefka-yak teswiḍ ?
25.38: Melmi daɣen i d-tusiḍ d abeṛṛani nesṭeṛḥeb yis-ek, neɣ melmi i k-nwala d aɛeryan, nessels-ik ?
25.39: Melmi i k-neẓra d amuḍin neɣ di lḥebs nusa-d ɣuṛ-ek ?
25.40: Agellid a sen-d-yerr : A wen-iniɣ tideț, yal tikkelt i deg txedmem ayagi i yiwen seg imecṭuḥen-agi yellan d atmaten-iw, i nekk iwumi t-txedmem.
25.41: Imiren ad yini i wid yellan ɣer uẓelmaḍ-is : Beɛdet akkin fell-i a kunwi yețwaneɛlen, ṛuḥet ɣer tmes n dayem yețwaheggan i Cciṭan d wid i t- tebɛen.
25.42: Axaṭer lliɣ lluẓeɣ ur iyi tesseččem ara, ffudeɣ ur iyi-tefkim ara ad sweɣ,
25.43: usiɣ-ed d abeṛṛani ur tesṭerḥbem ara yis-i, lliɣ d aɛeryan ur iyi tesselsem ara, lliɣ daɣen d amuḍin, d ameḥbus, ur d-tusim ara aț-țesteqsim fell-i.
25.44: Imiren ula d nutni a s-d-rren : A Sidi, melmi i k-neẓra telluẓeḍ neɣ teffudeḍ d abeṛṛani neɣ d aɛeryan, d amuḍin neɣ d ameḥbus, ur d-nelhi ara yid-ek ?
25.45: Nețța a sen-d-yerr : A wen-iniɣ tideț : yal tikkelt i deg ur texdimem ara ayagi i yiwen seg imecṭuḥen-agi, i nekk iwumi ur t-texdimem ara.
25.46: Imiren widak-agi ad kecmen ɣer lɛiqab ur nfennu, ma d iḥeqqiyen ad kecmen ɣer tudert n dayem !

26.1: Mi gfukk Sidna Ɛisa imeslayen-agi, yenna i inelmaden-is : --
26.2: Mazal sin wussan i lɛid n Tuffɣa, Mmi-s n bunadem ad ițțuzenz iwakken ad ițuṣemmer ɣef wumidag.
26.3: Dɣa lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud nnejmaɛen deg ufrag n Kayef, i gellan d lmuqeddem ameqqran.
26.4: Msefhamen ad ṭṭfen Sidna Ɛisa s tḥila iwakken a t-nɣen.
26.5: Meɛna nnan : « mačči deg ussan-agi n lɛid n Tuffɣa ara t-neḥbes, neɣ m'ulac ad yekker ccwal ger lɣaci .»
26.6: Mi gella Sidna Ɛisa di taddart n Bitanya, deg wexxam n Semɛun abeṛsi,
26.7: ațaya yiwet n tmeṭṭut tewwi-d tabuqalt yețwaxedmen s wedɣaɣ amellal, teččuṛ d leɛṭeṛ ɣlayen. Mi geqqim Sidna Ɛisa ɣer ṭṭabla, tameṭṭut-nni tusa-d tesmar leɛṭeṛ-nni ɣef wuqeṛṛuy-is.
26.8: Mi walan ayagi, inelmaden iɣaḍ-iten lḥal, nnan : Iwumi lexsaṛa-yagi ?
26.9: Lemmer nezzenz leɛṭeṛ-nni, tili yewwi-d ssuma tameqqrant ara nefṛeq i igellilen !
26.10: Sidna Ɛisa yeẓran wayen nnan wway-gar-asen, yenna-yasen : Acuɣeṛ i tesḥeznem tameṭṭut agi ? D ayen yelhan i yi-texdem !
26.11: Axaṭer aț-țesɛum daymen igellilen yid-wen, meɛna nekk ur țțiliɣ ara daymen yid-wen.
26.12: Mi d-tesmar leɛṭeṛ-agi fell-i, d lǧețța-w i thegga i temḍelt-iw.
26.13: A wen-iniɣ tideț : di yal amkan n ddunit i deg ara ițțubecceṛ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, a d țmektayen tameṭṭut-agi d wayen texdem.
26.14: Imiren Yudas n Qeṛyut, yiwen si tnac-nni inelmaden n Sidna Ɛisa, iṛuḥ ɣer lmuqedmin imeqqranen,
26.15: yenna yasen : Ma wwiɣ-kkun ɣuṛ-es a t-id teṭṭfem, d acu ara yi-tefkem ? FFkan-as tlatin iṣurdiyen n lfeṭṭa.
26.16: Seg imiren, Yudas yețɛassa tagniț i deg ara yizmir ad izzenz Sidna Ɛisa.
26.17: Ass amezwaru n lɛid n weɣṛum mbla iɣes n temtunt , inelmaden usan-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : A Sidi, anda tebɣiḍ a k-nheggi imensi n lɛid n Izimer n leslak ?
26.18: Yerra-yasen : Ṛuḥet ɣer temdint, ɣer leflani, init-as : yenna-yak Ssid-nneɣ, lweqt-iw yewweḍ-ed, deg uxxam-ik ara sɛeddiɣ lɛid n Izimer n leslak nekk d inelmaden-iw.
26.19: Inelmaden-nni xedmen ayen i sen-yenna Sidna Ɛisa, heggan imensi n lɛid n Izimer n leslak.
26.20: Mi d-teɣli tmeddit, Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim ad yečč nețța d inelmaden-is.
26.21: Mi llan tețțen yenna-yasen : A wen-iniɣ tideț : yiwen seg-wen ad iyi-izzenz.
26.22: Mi d-yenna ayagi, ikcem-iten akk leḥzen d ameqqran, bdan qqaṛen as yiwen yiwen : Neɣ mačči d nekk a Sidi ?
26.23: Yerra-yasen : Win igren afus-is yid-i deg uḍebsi, d nețța ara yi-izzenzen.
26.24: Ad yedṛu d Mmi-s n bunadem akken yura fell-as ; mmeɛna a nnger n win ara t-izzenzen, lemmer ur d-ilul ara axiṛ-is.
26.25: Yudas ara t-ixedɛen yenṭeq yenna-yas : Eɛni d nekk a Sidi ? SSidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Atan tenniḍ-t-id !
26.26: Mi llan tețțen, Sidna Ɛisa yeddem-d aɣṛum, iḥmed Ṛebbi, icekkeṛ-it, dɣa yebḍa-t, ifṛeq-it i inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen : Eččet aɣṛum-agi : d lǧețța-w.
26.27: Iddem-ed daɣen taqbuct, iḥmed Ṛebbi, icekkeṛ-it, yefka-yasen-ț, yenna-yasen : Swet akk si teqbuct-agi,
26.28: axaṭer ayagi d idammen-iw, d idammen n lemɛahda ara yazzlen ɣef yizumal n lɣaci ɣef ddemma n leɛfu n ddnubat-nsen.
26.29: A wen-d-iniɣ : ur țțuɣaleɣ ara ad sweɣ seg waman-agi n tẓurin alamma d ass i deg ara ten-sweɣ d ijdiden yid-wen, di tgelda n Baba Ṛebbi.
26.30: Mi ḥemden Sidi Ṛebbi s ccnawi d isefra, ṛuḥen ulin ɣer yiɣil n uzemmur,
26.31: dinna Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Iḍ-agi ad a wen-iliɣ akk d sebba n tuccḍa, axaṭer yura di tira iqedsen ad wwteɣ ameksa, ulli n tqeḍɛit-is ad rewlent ɣer yal tama .
26.32: Meɛna m'ara d-ḥyuɣ si ger lmegtin, ad iyi-tafem zwareɣ ɣer tmurt n Jlili.
26.33: Buṭrus yenṭeq, yenna : Ɣas a sen-tiliḍ d sebba n tuccḍa i wiyaḍ akk, nekk d lmuḥal ad ccḍeɣ.
26.34: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : A k-iniɣ tideț : deg iḍ-agi uqbel ad iskkuɛ uyaziḍ, ad iyi-tnekṛeḍ tlata iberdan.
26.35: Buṭrus yerra-yas : Ɣas lukan d lmut ara mmteɣ yid-ek, d lmuḥal a k-nekkṛeɣ ! UUla d inelmaden nniḍen, nnan-as am nețța.
26.36: Imiren Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ yid-sen ɣer yiwen wemkan ițțusemman Jitsimani, yenna i inelmaden-is : Qqimet dagi, nekk ad ṛuḥeɣ ad dɛuɣ ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
26.37: Yewwi yid-es Buṭrus akk-d sin warraw-nni n Zabadi ; yebda ikcem-it leḥzen d leɣben d ameqqran.
26.38: Dɣa yenna-yasen : Ḥusseɣ s leḥzen n lmut, qqimet dagi, ɛiwzet yid-i !
26.39: Iṛuḥ yeɣli ɣef wudem, ibda yețẓalla yeqqaṛ : A Baba Ṛebbi, ma yella wamek , ssebɛed fell-i leɛtab-agi ! Meɛna akken tebɣiḍ keččini, mačči akken bɣiɣ nekkini.
26.40: Yuɣal-ed ɣer inelmaden-is, yufa-ten-id ṭṭsen, yenna i Buṭrus : Ur tezmirem ara aț-țɛiwzem yid-i ula d yiwet n ssaɛa ?
26.41: Ɛiwzet, ẓallet, iwakken ur tɣellim ara deg ujeṛṛeb ! Axaṭer ṛṛuḥ n wemdan yeǧhed ma d lǧețța ur tezmir ara !
26.42: Ibɛed akkin tikkelt tis snat iwakken ad iẓẓal, yenna : A Baba, ma yella ulamek ara tesbeɛdeḍ fell-i leɛtab-agi , ma ilaq ad iyi-d-yaweḍ ! Ad yedṛu lebɣi-k !
26.43: Mi d-yuɣal, yufa-ten-id daɣen ṭṭsen, iɣleb-iten nuddam.
26.44: Yeǧǧa-ten, issebɛed iman-is daɣen fell-asen, yedɛa tikkelt tis tlata am tikkelt-nni tamezwarut.
26.45: Mi d-yuɣal ɣer inelmaden-is, yufa-ten-id mazal-iten ṭṭsen ; yenna yasen : Lweqt i deg ara yețwasellem Mmi-s n bunadem ɣer ifassen n yemcumen iwweḍ-ed, kunwi mazal ikkun teṭṭsem ?
26.46: Dɣa yenna-yasen : Ekkret fell-awen, ataya iteddu-d win i yi-izzenzen !
26.47: Mazal-it ițmeslay mi d-iwweḍ Yudas yellan d yiwen si tnac-nni inelmaden. Ddan-d yid-es aṭas n lɣaci s iɛekkzan d ijenwiyen, ceggɛen ten-id imeqqranen n lmuqedmin akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud.
26.48: Win akken i t-izzenzen, imsefham yid-sen, yenna-yasen : Win i ɣef ara selmeɣ, d win ara teṭṭfem !
26.49: Imiren, iqeṛṛeb ɣer Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Sslam fell-ak a Sidi ! DDɣa isellem fell-as.
26.50: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ay amdakkel , ayen ɣef i d-tusiḍ a t-txedmeḍ, xdem-it ! DDɣa lɣaci-nni qeṛṛben ɣer Sidna Ɛisa ṭṭfen-t.
26.51: Yiwen seg wid yeddan d Sidna Ɛisa ijbed-ed ajenwi-ines, yewwet aqeddac n lmuqeddem ameqqran, igzem-as-d ameẓẓuɣ-is.
26.52: Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq yenna-yas : Err ajenwi-inek ɣer wemkan-is, axaṭer kra win ara irefden ajenwi, ad immet s ujenwi !
26.53: Eɛni tɣileḍ ur zmireɣ ara ad ssutreɣ i Baba ad iyi-d-iceggeɛ luluf n lmalayekkat ?
26.54: Amek ihi ara țwakemlent tira iqedsen i d-ixebbṛen belli ilaq a d-yedṛu wayagi meṛṛa ?
26.55: Imiren Sidna Ɛisa yenna i lɣaci : Kull ass țțiliɣ yid-wen di lǧameɛ sselmadeɣ, ur iyi-teṭṭifem ara, ass-agi tusam-d ɣuṛ-i s iɛekkzan d ijenwiyen am akken d bu tmegṛaḍ i lliɣ !
26.56: Meɛna annect-agi meṛṛa yedṛa-d iwakken ad țwakemlent tira n lenbiya. IImiren, inelmaden meṛṛa ǧǧan-t, yal yiwen ɣer wanda yerwel.
26.57: Wid yeṭṭfen Sidna Ɛisa wwin-t ɣer Kayef, ameqqran n lmuqedmin, anda i nnejmaɛen lɛulama n ccariɛa d imeqqranen n wegdud.
26.58: Buṭrus iḍfeṛ-it, ikcem ɣer wefrag n lmuqeddem ameqqran, yeqqim akk-d iɛessasen n lǧameɛ iwakken ad iẓer amek ara tefru temsalt.
26.59: Imiren lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d usqamu n imeqqranen n ccariɛa, țnadin inigan ara icehden fell-as s ẓẓuṛ, iwakken ad ḥekmen fell-as s lmut,
26.60: meɛna ur s-d-ufin ara sebba, ɣas akken aṭas i d-icehden fell-as.
26.61: A ten-aya sin yergazen qeṛṛben d nnan : D wagi i d-yennan : « zemreɣ ad huddeɣ lǧameɛ iqedsen n Sidi Ṛebbi, a s-ɛiwdeɣ lebni di tlata wussan.»
26.62: Ameqqran n lmuqedmin ikker, yenna-yas : Ulac ayen ara d-terreḍ ɣef wayen akka i d-ccetkan fell-ak ?
26.63: Sidna Ɛisa yessusem. Dɣa ameqqran n lmuqedmin yenna-yas : Wekkleɣ-ak Sidi Ṛebbi yeddren, m'ur aɣ-d-tenniḍ ma d kečč i d Lmasiḥ, Mmi-s n Sidi Ṛebbi !
26.64: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Tenniḍ-t-id ! Yerna a wen-iniɣ, ssya d asawen : Mmi-s n bunadem aa d iḥkem ɣɣ er uyeffus n Bab n tezmert, a t-twalim iteddu-d ɣef wusigna seg yigenni.
26.65: Imiren ameqqran n lmuqedmin icerreg aqenduṛ-is yenna : Ikfeṛ ! Iwumi neḥwaǧ inigan tura ? Teslam akk d acu i d-yenna ! D acu tennam ?
26.67: Dɣa bdan ssusufen-t, țțaken-as tiyitiwin d ibeqqayen,
26.68: qqaṛen-as : Eɛqel a Lmasiḥ, ini-yaɣ-d anwa i k-iwwten !
26.69: Buṭrus yella yeqqim deg ufrag, tqeṛṛeb-ed ɣuṛ-es yiwet n tqeddact tenna-yas : Ula d kečč telliḍ d Ɛisa ajlili !
26.70: Meɛna yenkeṛ zdat-sen meṛṛa yenna-yas : Ur ẓriɣ ara d acu tebɣiḍ a d tiniḍ !
26.71: Akken ițeddu ɣer tewwurt, twala-t tqeddact nniḍen, tenna i wid akk yellan dinna : Wagi yella akk-d Ɛisa anaṣari !
26.72: Inkeṛ daɣen s limin : Qqaṛeɣ-awen ur ssineɣ ara argaz-agi !
26.73: Taswiɛt kan, wid yellan dinna qeṛṛben daɣen ɣer Buṭrus nnan-as : Mbla ccekk, kečč telliḍ seg-sen, tameslayt-ik tbeggen-ed belli d ajlili i telliḍ !
26.74: Ibda yețgalla irennu : Di leɛmeṛ ur ssineɣ argaz-agi ! IImiren kan yeskkuɛ uyaziḍ.
26.75: Dɣa Buṭrus immekta-d imeslayen-nni i s-d-yenna Sidna Ɛisa : uqbel ad iskkuɛ uyaziḍ, ad iyi-tnekṛeḍ tlata n tikkal . Yeffeɣ ɣer beṛṛa s nndama tameqqrant, iṭṭerḍeq d imeṭṭawen.

27.1: Taṣebḥit, nnejmaɛen-d akk imeqqranen n lmuqedmin akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud, mcawaṛen iwakken ad nɣen Sidna Ɛisa.
27.2: Dɣa urzen-t, wwin-t i Bilaṭus, yellan d lḥakem n Ṛuman yesteɛemṛen tamurt.
27.3: Mi gwala ḥekmen ɣef Sidna Ɛisa, Yudas-nni i t-ixedɛen yendem. DDi nndama-nni-ines tameqqrant, iṛuḥ ɣer imeqqranen n lmuqedmin d imeqqranen n wegdud, yerra-yasen tlatin-nni twiztin n lfeṭṭa, dɣa
27.4: yenna yasen : Denbeɣ, nekk i wen-d-izzenzen amdan aḥeqqi. RRran-as-d : Ur aɣ-d-tewqiɛ ara lmeɛna, wagi d ccɣel-ik.
27.5: Yudas iḍeggeṛ tiwiztin-nni di lǧameɛ iqedsen, imiren iṛuḥ iɛelleq iman-is.
27.6: Imeqqranen n lmuqedmin leqḍen-d tiwiztin-nni n lfeṭṭa, nnan : Ur yeḥlil ara a tent-nerr ɣer usenduq n lǧameɛ iqedsen, imi d lexlaṣ n temgeṛt.
27.7: Mi mcawaṛen d acu ara xedmen s twiztin-nni, msefhamen iwakken ad aɣen iger n yiwen wergaz ixeddmen afexxaṛ, iwakken a t-erren ț-țimeqbeṛt i ibeṛṛaniyen.
27.8: Daymi iger-agi ițțusemma ar ass-a : « Iger n idammen ».
27.9: S wakka i gedṛa wayen i d-yenna nnbi Irmiya : Ddmen-d tlatin n twiztin n lfeṭṭa, d wagi i d azal i s-fkan warraw n wat Isṛail ;
27.10: uɣen-d yis iger ɣer win ixeddmen afexxaṛ, akken i yi-d-yumeṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
27.11: Sidna Ɛisa ibedd zdat lḥakem Bilaṭus. Yesteqsa-t lḥakem-nni yenna-yas : D kečč i d agellid n wat Isṛail ? SSidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Tenniḍ-t-id !
27.12: Lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud sseḍlamen deg-s, ma d nețța ur sen-d-yerri ula d acemma.
27.13: Bilaṭus yenna i Sidna Ɛisa : Eɛni ur tesliḍ ara ayen akk ɣef i d-țcetkin fell-ak ?
27.14: Sidna Ɛisa yessusem, ur as-d yerri ula d yiwen wawal, ayagi d ayen iswehmen lḥakem.
27.15: Lḥakem yennum di mkul lɛid n Tuffɣa ițserriḥ-ed i yiwen umeḥbus i gextaṛ lɣaci.
27.16: Yella yakan yiwen umeḥbus mechuṛen, ițțusemman Barabas.
27.17: Mi d-nnejmaɛen akk lɣaci, Bilaṭus isteqsa-ten : Anwa i tebɣam a s-d-serrḥeɣ : i Barabas neɣ i Ɛisa ițțusemman Lmasiḥ ?
27.18: Axaṭer yeẓra s tismin i s-d-wwin Ɛisa.
27.19: Mi gella Bilaṭus ițcaṛaɛ, tceggeɛ-as-d tmeṭṭut-is, tenna-yas-d : Ur ssekcam ara iman-ik di temsalt n uḥeqqi-agi, axaṭer ass-agi targit urgaɣ fell-as terwi-yi.
27.20: Imeqqranen n lmuqedmin akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud sḥeṛcen-d lɣaci iwakken ad ssutren a d-serrḥen i Barabas, ad nɣen Sidna Ɛisa.
27.21: Lḥakem yenna-yasen : Anwa ger sin-agi iwumi tebɣam ad serrḥeɣ ? RRran-as : I Barabas ! Serreḥ-ed i Barabas !
27.22: Bilaṭus yenna-yasen : D acu ara xedmeɣ ihi i Ɛisa ițțusemman Lmasiḥ ? RRran-as-d akk : Ad ițțusemmeṛ ɣef wumidag !
27.23: Lḥakem yenna : D acu i gexdem n diri ? RRnan țɛeggiḍen : Semmeṛ-it ɣef wumidag !
27.24: Mi gwala lɣaci ugin a s-d ḥessen, yerna ccwal simmal yețțimɣuṛ, Bilaṭus yeddem-ed aman, issared ifassen-is zdat lɣaci, yenna : Nekk ur țekkiɣ ara di tazzla n idammen n uḥeqqi-agi, wagi d ccɣel-nwen.
27.25: Lɣaci meṛṛa nnan-as : Tazzla n idammen-is a d-tuɣal ɣef yirawen-nneɣ d yirawen n warraw-nneɣ.
27.26: Imiren Bilaṭus iserreḥ-ed i Barabas, jelkḍen Sidna Ɛisa, dɣa yefka lameṛ a t-semmṛen ɣef wumidag.
27.27: Iɛsekṛiyen n lḥakem ssufɣen Sidna Ɛisa ɣer ufrag, snejmaɛen-d akk iɛsekṛiyen nniḍen, zzin-as.
27.28: Imiren kksen-as llebsa-s, sselsen as abeṛnus azeggaɣ.
27.29: Zḍan taɛeṣṣabt s isennanen, ssersen-as-ț ɣef wuqeṛṛuy is, fkan-as aɣanim ɣer ufus-is ayeffus. Bdan kennun zdat-es, stehzayen fell-as, qqaṛen-as : Sslam fell-ak ay agellid n wat Isṛail !
27.30: Ssusufen-t, kkaten-t s uɣanim ɣer uqeṛṛuy.
27.31: Mi ɛyan deg ustehzi fell-as, kksen-as abeṛnus-nni, rran-as llebsa-s, wwin-t a t-semmṛen ɣef wumidag.
27.32: Mi d-ffɣen, mlalen-d yiwen wergaz n tmurt n Qiṛwan, isem-is semɛun, ḥettmen fell-as ad ibbib amidag n Sidna Ɛisa.
27.33: Mi wwḍen ɣer yiwen wemkan ițțusemman Gulguṭa, yeɛni « amkan n uxecxuc »,
27.34: fkan-as ad isew ccṛab i deg yexleḍ yiwen uɛeqqaṛ aṛzagan. Iɛreḍ-it, yugi a t-isew.
27.35: Mi t-semmṛen ɣef wumidag, gren tasɣaṛt iwakken ad feṛqen llebsa-ines, s wakka, yedṛa-d wayen yuran di tira iqedsen : feṛqen llebsa-w, gren tasɣart ɣef wuqenduṛ-iw.
27.37: ɛelqen sennig uqeṛṛuy-is talwiḥt i ɣef uran sebba n lmut-is : Wagi d Ɛisa, agellid n wat Isṛail
27.38: Țwasemmṛen yid-es sin imcumen, yiwen ɣer uyeffus-is wayeḍ ɣer uẓelmaḍ-is.
27.40: qqaṛen-as : A win ițhuddun lǧameɛ iqedsen ibennu-t di tlata wussan, sellek iman-ik ma d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi i telliḍ, ers-ed seg umidag-nni.
27.41: Imeqqranen n lmuqedmin, lɛulama n ccariɛa akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud, stehzayen fell-as ula d nutni, qqaṛen :
27.42: Isellek wiyaḍ ur yezmir ad isellek iman-is ! Ma d agellid n wat Isṛail i gella, a d-yers ihi seg umidag iwakken a namen yis.
27.43: Yețkel ɣef Ṛebbi, a t-isellek ihi Ṛebbi ma iḥemmel-it aaxaṭer yenna-d : « Nekk d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi.»
27.44: Ula d imcumen-nni ițțusemmṛen yid-es, regmen-t am wiyaḍ.
27.45: Deg uzzal si tnac armi d țlata n tmeddit, yeɣli-d ṭṭlam ɣef ddunit meṛṛa.
27.46: Ɣef leǧwahi n țlata, Sidna Ɛisa iɛeggeḍ s tɛibṛanit, yenna : Ilya, Ilya, lama sabaqtani ? Yeɛni : Illu-iw, Illu-iw, acuɣeṛ i yi-teǧǧiḍ ?
27.47: Kra seg wid iḥedṛen dinna slan d acu i genna, qqaṛen : Issawal i nnbi Ilyas !
27.48: Imiren kan yiwen seg-sen yuzzel yeddem-ed ameččim n taḍuṭ isselxes-it di lxell, icudd-it ɣef wuɣanim yefka-yas ad isew.
27.49: Wiyaḍ qqaṛen : Anfet-as, a nwali ma yella a d-yas nnbi Ilyas a t-isellek.
27.50: Sidna Ɛisa iɛeggeḍ tikkelt nniḍen, dɣa iffeɣ-it Ṛṛuḥ.
27.51: Imiren kan abeḥnuq n leḥjab yellan di lǧameɛ iqedsen icerreg ɣef sin, seg ixef ufella armi d akessar. Lqaɛa tergagi, idurar ceqqeqen,
27.52: iẓekwan ldin, aṭas seg iḥeqqiyen yemmuten, ḥyan-d
27.53: ffɣen-d seg iẓekwan-nsen. Mi d-iḥya Sidna Ɛisa, kecmen ɣer temdint iqedsen, aṭas n lɣaci iwumi i d-ḍehṛen.
27.54: Lḥakem yellan d aqeṛṛuy ɣef meyya iɛsekṛiyen akk-d iɛsekṛiyen iɛussen Sidna Ɛisa, tekcem-iten tugdi mi walan tergagi lqaɛa d wayen akk yedṛan, nnan : Ț-țideț, argaz-agi d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi !
27.55: Aṭas n tilawin i gellan dinna, țmuqulent-ed si lebɛid. Ț-țiggad-nni i d-yeddan d Sidna Ɛisa si tmurt n Jlili iwakken a s-qedcent.
27.56: Tella gar-asent Meryem tamagdalit, Meryem yemma-s n Yeɛqub d Yusef akk-d d yemma-s n warraw n Zabadi.
27.57: Mi d-tewweḍ tmeddit, yusa-d yiwen umeṛkanti n temdint n Arimati isem-is Yusef, ula d nețța d anelmad n Sidna Ɛisa.
27.58: Iṛuḥ ɣer Bilaṭus yessuter-as lǧețța n Sidna Ɛisa. Bilaṭus yumeṛ ad a s-ț-id-fken.
27.59: Yusef yeddem-ed lǧețța n Sidna Ɛisa, ițțel-iț di lekfen zeddigen,
27.60: issers-iț deg yiwen uẓekka ajdid, i geɣza deg uzṛu. Yeɣleq tawwurt n uẓekka-nni s weblaḍ ameqqran, dɣa iṛuḥ.
27.61: Meryem tamagdalit akk-d Meryem-nni nniḍen, llant dinna qqiment, qublent-ed aẓekka.
27.62: Azekka nni yellan d ass n uheggi n wass n westeɛfu, imeqqranen n lmuqedmin d ifariziyen ṛuḥen ɣer Bilaṭus
27.63: nnan-as : A Sidi, necfa ɣef wayen i d-yenna ukeddab-agi asmi yedder, yenna-d : Ad ɛeddin tlata wussan, a d-ḥyuɣ si ger lmegtin .
27.64: Ceggeɛ iɛessasen ad ɛassen aẓekka-s alamma d ass wis tlata, iwakken inelmaden-is ur d-țasen ara ad akren lǧețța-s, ad inin i wegdud : « iḥya-d si ger lmegtin. » Neɣ m'ulac lekdeb-agi aneggaru ad yaggar amezwaru.
27.65: Bilaṭus yenna-yasen-d : Awit iɛessasen, ṛuḥet ɛasset-ț akken tebɣam.
27.66: Ṛuḥen, zemmemen aken ilaq tawwurt n uẓekka-nni s weblaḍ, imiren sbedden taɛessast zdat-es.

28.1: Mi gɛedda wass n westeɛfu, taṣebḥit n wass amezwaru n dduṛt, Meryem tamagdalit akk-d meryem-nni nniḍen, ṛuḥent a d-ẓuṛent aẓekka n Sidna Ɛisa.
28.2: Deg yiwet n teswiɛt, tergagi lqaɛa ; ataya yiwen n lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi, iṣubb-ed seg igenni, iqeṛṛeb ɣer uẓekka, iswexxeṛ ablaḍ-nni, yeqqim fell-as.
28.3: Ițfeǧǧiǧ am lebṛaq, llebsa-s ț-țamellalt am udfel.
28.4: Iɛessasen yellan dinna, ikcem-iten lxuf d ameqqran, qquṛen amzun mmuten.
28.5: Yenṭeq lmelk ɣer tilawin-nni, yenna-yasent : Kunemti ur țțaggademt ara, axaṭer ẓriɣ ɣef Ɛisa i yețțusemmṛen ɣef wumidag i tețnadimt.
28.6: Ulac-it dagi, iḥya-d si ger lmegtin akken i t-id-yenna. Asemt-ed aț-țwalimt amkan anda akken yeḍleq !
28.7: Azlemt aț-ținimt i inelmaden-is belli yeḥya-d si ger lmegtin. Atan a kkun-yezwir ɣer tmurt n Jlili ; dinna ara t-teẓrem. AAtan nniɣ-akunt-ț-id !
28.8: Imiren kan, ṛuḥent seg uẓekka-nni s lfeṛḥ d ameqqran ɣas akken uggadent. Uzzlent ad awint lexbaṛ i inelmaden n Sidna Ɛisa.
28.9: Ataya Sidna Ɛisa imuger-itent-id, yenna-yasent : Sslam fell-akunt ! QQeṛṛbent, seǧǧdent zdat-es, ssudnent iḍaṛṛen-is.
28.10: Imiren Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasent : Ur țțaggademt ! Ṛuḥemt inimt i watmaten-iw ad ṛuḥen ɣer tmurt n Jlili, dinna ara yi-ẓren.
28.11: Mi țeddunt deg ubrid, kra seg iɛessasen-nni n uẓekka kecmen ɣer temdint, xebbṛen imeqqranen n lmuqedmin ɣef wayen akk yedṛan.
28.12: Mi nnejmaɛen imeqqranen n wegdud akk-d imeqqranen n lmuqedmin, msefhamen ad fken i iɛessasen-nni ssuma tameqqrant n yedrimen,
28.13: nnan-asen : Init belli d inelmaden-is i d-yusan deg yiḍ, ukren lǧețța-s mi nella neṭṭes.
28.14: Ma yella yewweḍ lexbaṛ-agi ɣer lḥakem, d nukkni ara t-iqablen iwakken ur awen-ixeddem ula d acemma.
28.15: Iɛsekṛiyen-nni ṭṭfen idrimen-nni, xedmen ayen akk i sen-d-nnan lmuqedmin. Tamsalt-agi țɛawaden-ț-id wat Isṛail ar ass-a.
28.16: Ḥdac inelmaden-nni ṛuḥen ɣer tmurt n Jlili, ɣer wedrar-nni anda i sen-yenna Sidna Ɛisa ad mlilen.
28.17: Mi t-walan seǧǧden zdat-es, meɛna kra seg-sen mazal țcukkuten.
28.18: Sidna Ɛisa iqeṛṛeb-ed ɣuṛ-sen, yenna-yasen : Tețțunefk-iyi-d tezmert ama di lqaɛa ama deg igenwan.
28.19: Ṛuḥet ɣer tmura meṛṛa n ddunit, slemdet imdanen iwakken ad uɣalen d inelmaden-iw, ad țwaɣedṣen s yisem n Baba Ṛebbi, s yisem n Mmi-s akk-d yisem n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
28.20: Slemdet-asen ad tebɛen ayen akk i wen-slemdeɣ. MMa d nekk ad iliɣ yid-wen yal ass alamma ț-țaggara n ddunit.

1.1: Akka i gebda lexbaṛ n lxiṛ yeɛnan Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, Mmi-s n Ṛebbi.
1.2: Am akken yura di tektabt n nnbi Iceɛya : Ad zzewreɣ zdat-ek amceggeɛ-iw, a k-ifres abrid.
1.3: ?-țaɣect n win yețɛeggiḍen deg unezṛuf : heggit abrid i Sidi Ṛebbi, ssemsawit iberdan-is !
1.4: Iban-ed Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas deg unezṛuf , yesseɣḍas lɣaci deg waman, yeqqaṛ-asen : Beddlet tikli, aset-ed aț-țețwaɣeḍsem iwakken a wen-yeɛfu Sidi Ṛebbi.
1.5: Imezdaɣ meṛṛa n tmurt n Yahuda d wid n temdint n Lquds țṛuḥun-d ɣuṛ-es, țqiṛṛin s ddnubat-nsen zdat lɣaci dɣa Yeḥya yeṣṣeɣḍas-iten deg wasif n Urdun.
1.6: Yelsa llebsa yețwaxedmen s ccɛeṛ n welɣem, yebges tabagust n weglim ɣef wammas-is. Lqut-is d ajṛad akk-d țament n lexla.
1.7: Yețbecciṛ yeqqaṛ : Win ara d-yasen deffir-i yugar iyi, yesɛa tazmert akteṛ-iw ; ur uklaleɣ ara ad knuɣ a s-fsiɣ ula d lexyuḍ n warkasen-is.
1.8: Nekk sseɣḍaseɣ-kkun deg waman, lameɛna nețța a kkun-isseɣḍes s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
1.9: Deg wussan-nni, Sidna Ɛisa yusa-d si taddart n Naṣaret ɣer tmurt n Jlili. Yesseɣḍes-it Yeḥya deg wasif n Urdun.
1.10: Akken i d-iffeɣ seg waman, iwala igenwan ldin, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen iṣubb-ed fell-as s ṣṣifa n tetbirt.
1.11: Yiwet n taɣect tekka-d seg igenwan tenna-d : Kečč d Mmi eɛzizen ; deg-k i gella lfeṛḥ-iw !
1.12: Imiren kan, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yewwi-t ɣer uneẓruf,
1.13: anda i t-ijeṛṛeb Cciṭan ṛebɛin wussan. Yețɛic ger lewḥuc n lɣaba, lmalayekkat qeddcent fell-as.
1.14: Mi gețwaḥbes Yeḥya, Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ ɣer tmurt n Jlili ; yețbecciṛ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi, yeqqaṛ :
1.15: Tageldit n Ṛebbi tqeṛṛeb-ed ! Yewweḍ-ed lweqt-is ! Uɣalet-ed ɣer webrid tamnem s lexbaṛ n lxiṛ !
1.16: Mi gella ileḥḥu rrif n lebḥeṛ n tmurt n Jlili, iwala Semɛun akk-d gma-s Andriyus ṭeggiṛen acebbak ɣer lebḥeṛ, axaṭer d iṣeggaḍen i llan.
1.17: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Ddut-ed yid-i, a kkun-rreɣ d iṣeggaḍen n yemdanen.
1.18: Imiren kan, ǧǧan icebbaken nsen, ddan yid-es.
1.19: Ikemmel abrid-is, iwala Yeɛqub akk-d gma-s Yuḥenna yellan d arraw n Zabadi, qqimen di teflukt-nsen țxiḍin icebbaken.
1.20: Yessawel-asen, imiren kan ǧǧan baba-tsen akk-d ixeddamen-is di teflukt, ddan d Sidna Ɛisa.
1.21: Sidna Ɛisa d inelmaden-is wwḍen ɣer temdint n Kafernaḥum. Deg wass n ssebt yellan d ass n westeɛfu, Sidna Ɛisa yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ yebda yesselmad.
1.22: Lɣaci i s-ițḥessisen wehmen deg uselmed ines axaṭer imeslayen-is sɛan tissas ( lhiba ), mačči am uselmed n lɛulama n ccariɛa.
1.23: Yella di lǧameɛ-nni yiwen n wergaz i gezdeɣ uṛuḥani, yebda yețɛeggiḍ yeqqaṛ :
1.24: D acu tebɣiḍ ɣuṛ-nneɣ a Ɛisa anaṣari ? Tusiḍ-ed a ɣ-tesnegreḍ ? ?riɣ d acu-k, kečč d Imqeddes n Ṛebbi !
1.25: Sidna Ɛisa iɛeggeḍ fell-as yenna : Ssusem ! Effeɣ seg wergaz-agi !
1.26: Aṛuḥani ihucc argaz-nni s lǧehd, yeffeɣ seg-s s leɛyaḍ.
1.27: Lɣaci meṛṛa xelɛen, wa yeqqaṛ i wa : D acu-t wayagi ? D acu-t uselmed-agi ajdid yesɛan lhiba ? Argaz-agi yeḥkem ula ɣef yiṛuḥaniyen yerna țțaɣen-as awal !
1.28: Seg imiren, Sidna Ɛisa yețwassen di tmurt n Jlili meṛṛa.
1.29: Mi d-ffɣen si lǧameɛ, ṛuḥen ɣer wexxam n Semɛun d Andriyus, yedda Yeɛqub d Yuḥenna.
1.30: Taḍeggalt n Semɛun tuḍen, tuɣ-iț tawla ; hedṛen-as fell-as i Sidna Ɛisa.
1.31: Iqeṛṛeb ɣuṛ-es, yeṭṭef-as afus, yeskker-iț-id. Imiren kan teffeɣ-iț tawla-nni, tekker tqeddec-asen.
1.32: Tameddit mi geɣli yiṭij, wwin-as-d aṭas n imuḍan akk-d wid zedɣen iṛuḥaniyen.
1.33: Lɣaci n temdint meṛṛa nnejmaɛen-d zdat tewwurt.
1.34: Sidna Ɛisa yesseḥla aṭas n imuḍan i ghelken yal aṭan ; yessufeɣ aṭas n iṛuḥaniyen yerna ur ten-yețțaǧa ara a d-mmeslayen, axaṭer nutni ẓran d acu-t.
1.35: ?ṣbeḥ zik uqbel ad yali wass, Sidna Ɛisa yeffeɣ ɣer lexla iwakken ad yedɛu ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
1.36: Semɛun d imdukkal-is ffɣen ad nadin fell-as ;
1.37: mi t-ufan, nnan-as : A Sidi, medden akk țnadin fell-ak.
1.38: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Eyyaw a nṛuḥet ɣer tudrin iqeṛben axaṭer ilaq ad beccṛeɣ daɣen dinna. ?ef wannect-agi i d-usiɣ.
1.39: Dɣa iṛuḥ ɣer tmurt n Jlili, yețbecciṛ di leǧwameɛ, yessufuɣ leǧnun.
1.40: Yiwen wergaz ihelken lbeṛs yusa-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, yeɣli ɣef tgecrar, iḥellel-it yenna-yas : A Sidi, ma tebɣiḍ, tzemreḍ a yi-tesseḥluḍ.
1.41: Sidna Ɛisa iɣaḍ-it wergaz-nni, dɣa yeẓẓel afus-is innul-it, yenna yas : Bɣiɣ, ili-k teḥliḍ !
1.42: Imiren kan, yeḥla si lbeṛs-nni, yuɣal yeṣfa.
1.43: Sidna Ɛisa iserreḥ-as ad iṛuḥ, iweṣṣa-t s lḥeṛs yenna-yas :
1.44: Sel-iyi-d mliḥ ! Ur țɛawad i yiwen ayen yedṛan, lameɛna ṛuḥ a k-iẓer lmuqeddem, tawiḍ asfel ɣef ṣeffu-inek akken i t-id-iweṣṣa Musa.
1.45: Meɛna akken kan iṛuḥ, argaz-nni yebda yețberriḥ di mkul amkan, ayen yedṛan yid-es. Daymi Sidna Ɛisa ur yezmir ara a d-isbeggen iman-is di temdint, meɛna yețɣimi di beṛṛa deg imukan iḍeṛfen. Lɣaci țțasen-d ɣuṛ-es si mkul tama.

2.1: Ɛeddan kra wussan, Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal-ed ɣer Kafernaḥum ; yeffeɣ lexbaṛ belli deg wexxam-nni i gella.
2.2: Aṭas n lɣaci i d-innejmaɛen, armi ur d-yeqqim wemkan ula zdat tewwurt . Nețța yețbecciṛ-asen awal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
2.3: A ten-aya ṛebɛa yergazen wwin-d yiwen wukrif i Sidna Ɛisa.
2.4: Akken walan ur zmiren ara a t-ssiwḍen ɣuṛ-es si lɣaci-nni, kkan-d si ssqef, kksen iqermuden sennig wanda yella Sidna Ɛisa, syenna ssadren-d ukrif-nni deg wusu-ines.
2.5: Mi gwala liman-nsen, Sidna Ɛisa yenna i wukrif-nni : ?waɛeffan-ak ddnubat-ik a mmi.
2.6: Llan dinna kra lɛulama qqimen țxemmimen deg ulawen-nsen qqaṛen :
2.7: Amek armi yessaweḍ a d-yini imeslayen-agi ? Wagi d lekfeṛ ! Anwa i gzemren ad yeɛfu ddnubat anagar Sidi Ṛebbi ?
2.8: Imiren kan Sidna Ɛisa yeẓra ayen țxemmimen deg ulawen-nsen, yenna yasen : Acuɣer tețxemmimem akkagi deg ulawen-nwen ?
2.9: D acu i gsehlen a s-t-iniɣ i wukrif-agi : țwaɛfan-ak ddnubat-ik, neɣ kker ddem usu-inek telḥuḍ ?
2.10: Ihi bɣiɣ aț-țeẓrem belli Mmi-s n bunadem yezmer ad yeɛfu ddnubat di ddunit. Yenna i wukrif-nni :
2.11: Kker, ddem usu-inek tṛuḥeḍ ɣer wexxam-ik !
2.12: Imiren kan, yekker yeddem usu-ines, yeffeɣ zdat-nsen irkul. Lɣaci wehmen deg wayen yedṛan, țḥemmiden Sidi Ṛebbi, qqaṛen : Werǧin ( di leɛmeṛ ) neẓri ayagi !
2.13: Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal ɣer rrif n lebḥeṛ. Aṭas n lɣaci i d-ițasen ɣuṛ-es dɣa yesselmad-iten.
2.14: Mi gɛedda, iwala yiwen umekkas yeqqim ițeṭṭef leɣṛama, isem-is Lewwi d mmi-s n ?alfi. Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ddud-d yid-i ! Lewwi yekker, yedda yid-es.
2.15: Mi llan tețțen deg wexxam n Lewwi nețța d inelmaden-is, qqimen-d yid-sen imekkasen akk-d yir imdanen, axaṭer aṭas i t-ittabaɛen.
2.16: Lɛulama d ifariziyen mi t-walan itețț d imekkasen akk-d yir imdanen, nnan i inelmaden-is : Acuɣer Ssid-nwen itețț d imekkasen akk-d imednuben ?
2.17: Mi sen-yesla Sidna Ɛisa, yenna yasen : Mačči d wid iṣeḥḥan i geḥwaǧen ṭṭbib, meɛna d imuḍan. Ur d-usiɣ ara ad ssiwleɣ i iḥeqqiyen, meɛna i imednuben.
2.18: Inelmaden n Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas akk-d ifariziyen llan țțuẓummen. Usan-d ad steqsin Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : Acuɣer inelmaden n Yeḥya d inelmaden n ifariziyen țțuẓummen, ma d inelmaden-ik ur țțuẓummen ara ?
2.19: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Eɛni zemren inebgawen n tmeɣṛa ad uẓummen ma yella yid-sen yesli ? Kra ara yekk yesli yid-sen ur zmiren ara ad uẓummen.
2.20: A d-yas lweqt i deg ara sen yețwakkes yesli, deg wass-nni ad uẓummen.
2.21: Yiwen ur yețxiḍi tafaweț tajdiṭ i uceṭṭiḍ aqdim, neɣ m'ulac tafaweț-nni ara s-nernu aț-țesseɣṛes aceṭṭiḍ-nni aqdim dɣa acerrig-nni ad innerni.
2.22: Yiwen ur ițțačaṛ iyeddiden ( tiyelwin ) iqdimen s ccṛab ajdid, neɣ m'ulac ccṛab-nni ad ifelleq iyeddiden ; ccṛab ad inɣel, iyeddiden-nni ad qqeṛsen. Meɛna ccṛab ajdid ilaq ad immir ɣer iyeddiden ijdiden !
2.23: Yiwen wass n ssebt yellan d ass n westeɛfu , Sidna Ɛisa yezger igran n yirden. Inelmaden-is teddun țekksen tigedrin.
2.24: Ifariziyen nnan-as : Acuɣer xeddmen inelmaden-ik ayen ur nelli ara d leḥlal deg wass n ssebt ?
2.25: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Di leɛmeṛ teɣṛim wayen yexdem ugellid Dawed asmi i ten-yeṭṭef laẓ nețța d irfiqen-is ?
2.26: Yekcem ɣer wexxam n Sidi Ṛebbi deg wussan i deg yella Abyaṭar d lmuqeddem ameqqran, yečča nețța d irfiqen-is tiḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum yețțunefken d lweɛda, ɣas akken aɣṛum-nni i lmuqedmin kan iwumi yeḥlel.
2.27: Yenna-yasen : Ass n westeɛfu yețwaxdem i wemdan, mačči d amdan i gețwaxedmen i wass n westeɛfu.
2.28: Daymi Mmi-s n bunadem yeḥkem ula ɣef wass n westeɛfu.

3.1: Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal ɣer lǧameɛ. Yella dinna yiwen wergaz iwumi yekref ufus.
3.2: Wid yellan dinna țɛassan deg-s ad walin m' ad isseḥlu deg wass n westeɛfu, iwakken ad ccetkin fell-as.
3.3: Sidna Ɛisa yenna i wergaz-nni iwumi yekref ufus : Ekker tbeddeḍ dagi di tlemmast.
3.4: Imiren yenna i wid yețmuqulen : D acu i d-teqqaṛ ccariɛa-nneɣ ɣef wayen yeɛnan ass n westeɛfu ? A nexdem lxiṛ neɣ a nexdem cceṛ ? A nsellek taṛwiḥt n wemdan neɣ a t-neǧǧ ad immet ? Lameɛna nutni ssusmen meṛṛa, ur zmiren ara a d-rren awal.
3.5: Sidna Ɛisa imuqel-iten s wurrif, yerna yeḥzen aṭas fell-asen imi qquṛen wulawen nsen. Yenna i wergaz-nni : ?leq-ed ( eẓẓel-ed ) afus-ik ! Iḍleq-it dɣa yeḥla ufus-is.
3.6: Imiren ifariziyen ffɣen, ṛuḥen ad mcawaṛen nutni d ihiṛudiyen amek ara t-nɣen.
3.7: Sidna Ɛisa ijbed iman-is nețța d inelmaden-is ɣer rrif n lebḥeṛ n tmurt n Jlili. Aṭas n lɣaci i t-id-itebɛen. Usan-d si mkul tama n tmurt n Jlili, si tmurt n Yahuda,
3.8: si temdint n Lquds, si tmurt n Idum, si tmurt akkin i wasif n Urdun, si leǧwahi n temdinin n ?ur akk-d Sidun. Mi slan s wayen ixeddem, aṭas n lɣaci i d-yețțasen ɣuṛ-es.
3.9: Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa inelmaden-is a s-heggin taflukt, akken ur t-iḥeṛṛes ara lɣaci.
3.10: Ladɣa imi yețdawi aṭas n imuḍan, wid akk yuḍnen ẓeddmen fell-as iwakken a t-nnalen.
3.11: Iṛuḥaniyen m'ara t-walin, ɣellin zdat-es qqaṛen-as : « Kečč d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi !»
3.12: Meɛna nețța yețgalla deg-sen iwakken ur d-qqaṛen ara anwa-t.
3.13: Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer yiwet n tiɣilt, yessawel i wid yebɣa dɣa usan-d ɣuṛ-es.
3.14: Yextaṛ tnac deg-sen ad ilin d ṛṛusul ad țeddun daymen yid-es, iwakken a ten-iceggeɛ ad beccṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ,
3.15: a sen-yefk tazmert akken ad ssuffuɣen leǧnun.
3.16: A ten-ah tnac-nni yextaṛ : Semɛun iwumi isemma Buṭrus,
3.17: Yeɛqub akk-d gma-s Yuḥenna yellan d arraw n Zabadi iwumi isemma Buneṛǧes ( yeɛni arraw n ṛṛɛud ).
3.18: Andriyus, Filbas, Bartelmay, Matta, Tuma, Yeɛqub mmi-s n ?alfi, Taddi, Semɛun akenɛani ( awaṭani )
3.19: akk-d Yudas n Qeṛyut, win akken ixedɛen Sidna Ɛisa.
3.20: Imiren, Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal ɣer wexxam. Nnejmaɛen-d daɣen ɣuṛ-es lɣaci ḥeṛsen-t nețța d inelmaden-is armi ur zmiren ara ad ččen.
3.21: Mi gewweḍ lexbaṛ ɣer imawlan is, ṛuḥen-d a t-awin axaṭer ɣilen yedderwec !
3.22: Imusnawen n ccariɛa i d-yusan si temdint n Lquds qqaṛen : D Balzabul iḥekkmen ɣef leǧnun i t-izedɣen , s tezmert-is i gessufuɣ leǧnun !
3.23: Sidna Ɛisa yessawel-asen, ihdeṛ asen s lemtul, yenna-yasen : Amek yezmer Cciṭan ad issufeɣ Cciṭan ?
3.24: Ma yella țnaɣen imezdaɣ n tmurt wway gar-asen, tamurt-nni ur tețdum ara.
3.25: Ma yella yekker ccwal ger wat wexxam, axxam-nni ad yeɣli ur yețbeddad ara.
3.26: Ihi ma yella Cciṭan yețnaɣ d yiman-is tebḍa tgeldit-is, tazmert-is aț-țeɣli dɣa aț-țefnu.
3.27: Yiwen ur izmir ad ikcem ɣer wexxam n wergaz iǧehden iwakken a d-yaker ayla-s, m'ur t-yuriz ara uqbel ! M'ara t-yarez, imiren yezmer ad yaker axxam-is meṛṛa !
3.28: A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : a sen țwasemmḥen i yemdanen meṛṛa ddnubat-nsen d rregmat-nsen,
3.29: ma d win ireggmen Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, d lmuḥal ad yețțusemmeḥ ; ddnub-is ad yeqqim ɣef yir-is i dayem.
3.30: Yenna-d annect-agi axaṭer qqaṛen-as: Izdeɣ-it Cciṭan.
3.31: Wwḍen-d watmaten n Sidna Ɛisa akk-d yemma-s. Qqimen di beṛṛa, ceggɛen ɣuṛ-es a d-yas.
3.32: Nețța yella zdaxel n wexxam yezzi-yas aṭas lɣaci ; nnan-as : A Sidi, yemma-k d wayetma-k akk-d yessetma-k, atnan di beṛṛa țnadin fell-ak.
3.33: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Anta i d yemma, anwi i d aytma ?
3.34: Dɣa imuqel meṛṛa wid i s-d yezzin yenna : Ațah yemma, atnah wayetma.
3.35: Axaṭer win ixeddmen lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi, d win i d gma, i d weltma, i d yemma !

4.1: Sidna Ɛisa yebda daɣen yețbecciṛ rrif n lebḥeṛ n tmurt n Jlili. Imi i d-innejmaɛ ɣuṛ-es waṭas n lɣaci, yuli ɣer teflukt yeqqim. Taflukt-nni tella s ufella n waman, lɣaci yeqqim ɣer lqaɛa, rrif n lebḥeṛ.
4.2: Yebda yesselmad iten s lemtul, yeqqaṛ-asen :
4.3: Selt-iyi-d ! Yiwen ufellaḥ yeffeɣ ad izreɛ.
4.4: Mi gella izerreɛ, ɣlin kra iɛeqqayen deg webrid : ṛuḥen-d igṭat ( ifṛax ) leqḍen-ten.
4.5: Kra iɛeqqayen nniḍen ɣlin ger idɣaɣen anda ulac aṭas n wakal, dɣa mɣin-d imiren, axaṭer tissi n wakal ur lqayet ara.
4.6: Mi d-yuli yiṭij, yezlef imɣan-nni dɣa qquṛen, imi izuṛan-nsen ur lqayit ara.
4.7: Kra iɛeqqayen nniḍen ɣlin ger isennanen ; mi gman isennanen-nni ɣummen-ten dɣa ur d-fkin ara lfakya.
4.8: Kra iɛeqqayen nniḍen ɣlin deg wakal yelhan, mi gman, nnernan fkan-d tigedrin ; ta tefka-d tlatin n tɛeqqayin, tayeḍ sețțin, tayeḍ meyya.
4.9: Yenna-yasen : Win yesɛan imeẓẓuɣen, isel-ed !
4.10: Mi gebɛed ɣef lɣaci, wid i s-d yezzin akk-d tnac-nni inelmaden ssutren-as a sen-yessefhem lemtul i sen d-yewwi.
4.11: Yerra-yasen : Kunwi yețțunefk-awen aț- țissinem sser n tgeldit n Ṛebbi, ma d wiyaḍ sellen i mkul lḥaǧa s lemtul,
4.12: iwakken : ?as țmuqulen ur țwalin ara, ɣas sellen ur fehhmen ara ; m'ulac a d-uɣalen ɣer webrid dɣa Ṛebbi a sen-yeɛfu ddnubat-nsen !
4.13: Yenna-yasen daɣen : M'ur tefhimem ara lmeɛna n lemtel-agi, amek ara tfehmem lemtul nniḍen ?
4.14: Afellaḥ-nni, d win izerrɛen awal n Ṛebbi.
4.15: Kra yemdanen cban iri n webrid anda yețwazreɛ wawal n Ṛebbi. Akken kan i s-slan, yusa-d Cciṭan iqleɛ-ed awal-nni i gețwazerɛen deg ulawen-nsen.
4.16: Wiyaḍ cban akal yeččuṛen d idɣaɣen, akken ara slen i wawal n Ṛebbi, qebblen-t s lfeṛḥ ;
4.17: lameɛna ur t-țțaǧan ara ad yefk izuṛan deg ulawen-nsen, ṭṭfen deg-s kra lweqt kan. Mi d-yewweḍ leɛtab d uqehheṛ ɣef ddemma n wawal n Ṛebbi, țțuɣalen ɣer deffir, țaǧǧan liman-nsen.
4.18: Wiyaḍ țemcabin ɣer wakal yeččuṛen d isennanen, sellen i wawal n Ṛebbi,
4.19: meɛna iɣeblan, ṭṭmeɛ, lerbaḥ akk-d zzhu n ddunit-agi, skuffuren ( țkemmimen ) awal-nni, ur d-yețțawi ara lfayda.
4.20: Wiyaḍ cban akal yelhan anda teɣli zzerriɛa, sellen i wawal n Ṛebbi, qebblen-t, țțaken-d lfayda. Mkul aɛeqqa yeggar-ed wa tlatin, wa sețțin, wa meyya.
4.21: Yenna-yasen daɣen : Eɛni yella win ara iceɛlen taftilt iwakken a ț-yerr seddaw lḥila neɣ seddaw n wusu ? Mačči iwakken a ț-issers s ufella n lmeṣbeḥ ?
4.22: Ulac ayen yeffren ur d-nețban, ulac ayen iɣummen ur d-tețbeggin tafat.
4.23: Smeḥset-ed mliḥ, ma tesɛam imeẓẓuɣen isellen !
4.24: Yerna yenna-yasen : ?adret ɣef wayen tsellem ! Axaṭer akken i tețțektilim i wiyaḍ ara wen-d-ițwaktil i kunwi, yerna a wen-d ițwaktil s zzyada.
4.25: Axaṭer win yesɛan a s-rnun, ma d win ur nesɛi ara a s-yețwakkes ula d ayen yesɛa.
4.26: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen daɣen : Tageldit n Sidi Ṛebbi tețțemcabi ɣer yiwen ufellaḥ i gzerɛen iger.
4.27: Ama yeṭṭes ama ur yeṭṭis, am yiḍ am ass, zzerriɛa tețțemɣay tgemmu, ur yeẓri amek.
4.28: Akal yețțak-ed s yiman-is lɣella. Tazwara d imɣi ad yuɣal ț-țigdert, taggara tigdert-nni aț-țeččaṛ d iɛeqqayen.
4.29: Mi wwan yirden, afellaḥ-nni a d-yas a ten-yemger, axaṭer yewweḍ ed lweqt n tmegra.
4.30: Yenna daɣen : ?er wacu i nezmer a nmettel tageldit n Ṛebbi, neɣ anwa lemtel ara d-nawi fell-as ?
4.31: Ițemcabi ɣer uɛeqqa n uxerḍel. M'ara t-nezreɛ, d nețța i d aɛeqqa amecṭuḥ meṛṛa ger zzerriɛat n ddunit.
4.32: Mi gețwazreɛ, igemmu yețțali alamma yekka-d sennig akk yemɣan n tebḥirt, yeggar ed ifurkawen imeqqranen, ula d igṭaṭ ( ifṛax ) n igenni, țruḥun-d ad ddarin ( ddurqen ) seddaw tili-ines.
4.33: S waṭas n lemtul am wigi i sen ițbecciṛ awal n Ṛebbi, akken i tella lefhama n mkul yiwen.
4.34: Ițmeslay-asen anagar s lemtul, meɛna m'ara yili akk-d inelmaden-is, yessefham-asen kullec.
4.35: Ass-nni kan mi geɣli yiṭij, Sidna Ɛisa yenna i inelmaden-is : Eyyaw a nzegret agummaḍ n lebḥeṛ.
4.36: Mi gerra lɣaci-nni, iṛuḥ yid-sen di teflukt i deg yella. Ddant yid-es kra teflukin nniḍen.
4.37: Tekker-ed yiwet n tbuciḍant, tessalay-ed lemwaji ɣer teflukt tețțacaṛ-iț.
4.38: Sidna Ɛisa yella yeṭṭes di teflukt deffir n inelmaden-is, yessers aqeṛṛuy-is ɣef tsumta. Sakin-t-id nnan-as : A Sidi, eɛni ur ak-tewqiɛ ara ma nemmut ?
4.39: Sidna Ɛisa yekker-ed iɛeggeḍ ɣef waḍu, yenna i lebḥeṛ : Ssers iman-ik ! Ssusem ! Yers waḍu-nni, dɣa tuɣal-ed talwit.
4.40: Yenna i inelmaden-is : Acuɣer i tuggadem akka ? Mazal ur tuminem ara ?
4.41: Meɛna ikcem-iten akk lxuf d ameqqran, qqaṛen wway gar-asen : Anwa-t wagi iwumi țțaɣen awal ula d aḍu d lebḥeṛ ?

5.1: Usan-d seg ugemmaḍ n lebḥeṛ ɣer tmurt n ijiṛaziyen.
5.2: Akken kan i d-yers Sidna Ɛisa si teflukt, ataya yiwen wergaz yezdeɣ uṛuḥani, yeffeɣ-ed si tjebbant iteddu-d ɣuṛ-es.
5.3: Yezdeɣ ger iẓekwan, yiwen ur izmir a t-yarez ula s ssnesla
5.4: axaṭer acḥal d abrid i t-qqnen s ixelxalen n wuzzal deg iḍaṛṛen, s ssnasel deg ifassen, meɛna yesseɣṛas-iten akk, daymi ur yezmir yiwen a t-iṭṭef.
5.5: Iḍ d wass nețța deg uneẓruf, yețɛeggiḍ, ijerreḥ iman-is s iblaḍen.
5.6: Mi gwala Sidna Ɛisa si lebɛid, yuzzel-ed yeɣli ɣef tgecrar zdat-es.
5.7: Iɛeggeḍ s lǧehd : D acu i tebɣiḍ ɣuṛ-i a Ɛisa, a mmi-s n Ṛebbi ɛlayen ? Di leɛnaya-k, ɣef wudem n Ṛebbi ur iyi-țɛețțib ara !
5.8: Axaṭer Sidna Ɛisa yeqqaṛ-as : Effeɣ seg umdan-agi ay aṛuḥani !
5.9: Yesteqsa-t yenna-yas : Isem-ik ? Yerra-yas-d : Isem-iw tarbaɛt, axaṭer deg waṭas yid-nneɣ i nella.
5.10: Dɣa țḥellilen deg-s rennun iwakken ur ten-yessufuɣ ara si tmurt-nni.
5.11: Yuɣ lḥal tella dinna yiwet n tqeḍɛit n yilfan kessen ;
5.12: ḥellelent nnan-as : Di leɛnaya-k, ǧǧaɣ a nekcem deg yilfan-agi .
5.13: Iserreḥ-asen, dɣa ffɣen seg wergaz-nni, kecmen deg ilfan-nni, imiren grarben seg wedrar ɣer lebḥeṛ, llan deg wazal n walfin yid-sen, ɣeṛqen meṛṛa.
5.14: Wid ikessen ilfan-nni rewlen, ssawḍen lexbaṛ ɣer temdint akk-d tudrin dɣa lɣaci ṛuḥen-d ad walin ayen yedṛan.
5.15: Mi d-wwḍen ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, walan win akken tezdeɣ terbaɛt n iṛuḥaniyen yeqqim, yelsa llebsa, yuɣal-ed ɣer leɛqel-is ; imiren ikcem-iten lxuf.
5.16: Wid i gḥeḍren ḥekkun-d i wiyaḍ ayen yedṛan d win yețwazedɣen akk-d țqeḍɛit-nni n yilfan.
5.17: Imiren bdan țḥellilen Sidna Ɛisa ad iffeɣ si tmurt-nsen.
5.18: Akken iteddu Sidna Ɛisa ad yali ɣef teflukt, win akken yellan yețwazdeɣ yețḥellil deg-s yeqqaṛ-as : Di leɛnaya-k eǧǧ-iyi ad dduɣ yid-ek.
5.19: Lameɛna Sidna Ɛisa yugi, yenna-yas : Uɣal ɣer wexxam-ik d leḥbab-ik, teḥkuḍ-asen ayen i k-ixdem Sidi Ṛebbi.
5.20: Iṛuḥ, yebda yețberriḥ di ɛecṛa n temdinin-nni ayen akk i s-yexdem Sidna Ɛisa. Kra win i s-yeslan yetɛeǧǧeb.
5.21: Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal s teflukt ɣer ugemmaḍ n lebḥeṛ. Innejmaɛ-ed daɣen lɣaci ɣuṛ-es mi gella rrif n lebḥeṛ.
5.22: Yiwen seg lecyux n lǧameɛ, isem-is Jayṛus, akken i gwala Sidna Ɛisa, yeɣli ɣer iḍaṛṛen-is,
5.23: ițḥellil deg-s irennu, yeqqaṛ-as : A Sidi, di leɛnaya-k ! Yelli tețmețțat, ddu-d yid-i ssers ifassen-ik fell-as iwakken aț-țeslek, ur tețmețțat ara !
5.24: Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ yid-es. Aṭas n lɣaci i t-itebɛen, ḥerṣen-t si mkul tama.
5.25: Tella dinna yiwet n tmeṭṭut tehlek, tnac iseggasen nețțat tețțazal d idammen.
5.26: Tenɛețțab aṭas ger ifassen n ṭṭeba, texṣeṛ ayen akk i tesɛa, meɛna ur teḥli ara, terna tenṭer akteṛ.
5.27: Mi tesla heddṛen ɣef Sidna Ɛisa , tṛuḥ-ed deffir-es ger lɣaci, tennul ajellab-is.
5.28: Axaṭer teqqaṛ deg iman-is : ma nnuleɣ ulamma d icuḍaḍ n ubeṛnus-is, ad ḥluɣ.
5.29: Imiren kan ḥebsen idammen-nni, tḥulfa ( tḥuss ) i yiman-is teḥla seg waṭan-is.
5.30: Di teswiɛt-nni Sidna Ɛisa iḥuss i yiwet n tezmert teffeɣ seg-s. Yezzi ɣer lɣaci-nni yenna : Anwa i d-innulen ajellab-iw ?
5.31: Inelmaden-is rran-as : Aql-ik ger lɣaci ḥeṛsen-k-id si mkul tama, teqqaṛeḍ anwa i yi-d innulen ?
5.32: Nețța yețmuqul di lɣaci i s-d yezzin iwakken ad iwali tameṭṭut-nni.
5.33: Tameṭṭut-nni, mi twala ayen yedṛan yid-es texleɛ, tețțergigi ; tṛuḥ-ed teɣli ɣer iḍaṛṛen n Sidna Ɛisa tenna-yas akk tideț.
5.34: Yenna-yas : A yell-i, d liman-im i kkem-yesseḥlan ; ṛuḥ di lehna, aql-ikkem teṣfiḍ si lehlak-im.
5.35: Mazal-it yețmeslay, a ten-aya usan-d kra yergazen seg wexxam n Jayṛus ccix-nni n lǧameɛ, nnan-as : Yelli-k temmut, ur țɛețțib ara Sidna Ɛisa.
5.36: Lameɛna Sidna Ɛisa mi gesla i imeslayen-nni, yenna i ccix-nni : Ur țțaggad ara, amen kan !
5.37: Ur yeǧǧi yiwen ad yeddu yid-es anagar Buṭrus, Yeɛqub akk-d gma-s Yuḥenna.
5.38: Mi wwḍen ɣer wexxam n ccix-nni n lǧameɛ, Sidna Ɛisa yufa lɣaci yenhewwal, țrun, țmeǧǧiden.
5.39: Yekcem ɣer wexxam yenna-yasen : Iwacu lehwel d imeṭṭawen-agi ? Taqcict ur temmut ara, teṭṭes kan.
5.40: Stehzayen fell-as. Dɣa yessufeɣ iten akk, yewwi imawlan n teqcict-nni akk-d tlata-nni inelmaden, yekcem ɣer texxamt anda tella teqcict-nni ;
5.41: yeṭṭef afus n teqcict-nni yenna-yas : Talita, qumi ! (Yeɛni : « A taqcict, ekker ! »)
5.42: Imiren kan, tekker-ed teqcict-nni tebda tleḥḥu. Fell-as tnac iseggasen. Wid yellan dinna xelɛen tɛeǧǧben deg wayen walan.
5.43: Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa-ten ur țɛawaden i yiwen ayen yedṛan ; dɣa yenna-yasen : Fket-as aț-țečč.

6.1: Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ syenna ɣer tmurt-is, ddan yid-es inelmaden is.
6.2: Akken i d-yewweḍ wass n westeɛfu, yebda yesselmad di lǧameɛ. Aṭas i gwehmen seg wid i s-isellen, qqaṛen : Ansi i s-d-yekka wayagi ? D acu-ț lefhama-yagi i s-d ițțunefken ? Ansi i s-d-tekka tezmert s wayes ixeddem lbeṛhanat-agi meṛṛa ?
6.3: Mačči d wagi i d aneǧǧaṛ-nni, mmi-s n Meryem, gma-s n Yeɛqub, n Yuses, n Yuda akk-d Semɛun ? Anaɣ yessetma-s gar-aneɣ i țɛicint ? Ayagi yella-yasen d ugur daymi ur uminen ara yis.
6.4: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Anagar di tmurt-is ger imawlan is d wat wexxam-is i gețwaḥqeṛ nnbi.
6.5: Ur yexdim dinna ula d yiwen n lbeṛhan, anagar kra imuḍan i ɣef yessers ifassen-is yesseḥla-ten.
6.6: Yewhem deg-sen imi ugin ad amnen. Dɣa ileḥḥu, yesselmad di tudrin iqeṛben tamdint n Naṣaret.
6.7: Sidna Ɛisa yessawel i tnac-nni inelmaden, iceggeɛ-iten sin sin, yefka yasen tazmert ad ssufɣen iṛuḥaniyen.
6.8: Iweṣṣa-ten, yenna-yasen : Ur țțawit yid-wen acemma i webrid, ama d aɣṛum, ama d agrab ama d aṣurdi deg waggus, anagar aɛekkaz deg ufus.
6.9: Elset irkasen, meɛna ur țțawit ara yid-wen aqenduṛ wis sin.
6.10: Yenna-yasen daɣen : Axxam anda stṛeḥben yis-wen qqimet ɣuṛ-sen alamma tṛuḥem.
6.11: Ma yella wanda ur sṭerḥben ara yis-wen, ur bɣin ara a wen-slen, ṛuḥet syenna, zwit aɣebbaṛ n warkasen-nwen, ddnub i yirawen-nsen.
6.12: Ṛuḥen țbecciṛen i yemdanen iwakken a d-uɣalen ɣer webrid.
6.13: Ssufuɣen aṭas n leǧnun, dehhinen s zzit aṭas n imuḍan, sseḥlayen-ten.
6.14: Yuɣal yisem n Sidna Ɛisa mechuṛ di tmurt meṛṛa, yewweḍ lexbaṛ-is ɣer ugellid Hiṛudus. Kra qqaṛen : D Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas i d-iḥyan si ger lmegtin, daymi i gezmer ad ixdem lbeṛhanat.
6.15: Wiyaḍ qqaṛen : D nnbi Ilyas. Wiyaḍ daɣen qqaṛen-as : D nnbi am lenbiya nniḍen.
6.16: Meɛna mi gesla Hiṛudus s wannect-agi, yeqqaṛ : D Yehya-nni iwumi kkseɣ aqqeṛṛuy, i d-iḥyan !
6.17: Axaṭer d Hiṛudus s yiman-is i gerran Yeḥya ɣer lḥebs yeqqen-it s ssnasel, mi t-ilum imi guɣ Hiṛudyad yellan ț-țameṭṭut n gma-s Filbas.
6.18: Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas yella yeqqaṛ-as : D leḥṛam fell-ak aț-țaɣeḍ tameṭṭut n gma-k !
6.19: Daymi i t-tekṛeh Hiṛudyad, yerna tețqellib amek ara t-tneɣ lameɛna ur s-tufi ara abrid ;
6.20: axaṭer Hiṛudus yețqadaṛ Yeḥya imi i t-iẓra d argaz yeṣfan, d aḥeqqi, daymi i gețḥunnu fell-as. Iḥemmel ad ismeḥses i wawal-is, meɛna m'ara s-isel iɛewweq.
6.21: Ațaya teɣli-yas-d sebba i Hiṛudyad... Ass n lɛid n tlalit-is, Hiṛudus iɛreḍ-ed ɣer imensi imeqqranen n tgelda-s, imeqqranen n lɛeskeṛ akk-d imdebbṛen n tmurt n Jlili.
6.22: Tekcem-ed yelli-s n Hiṛudyad tecḍeḥ, dɣa teɛǧeb-as i Hiṛudus d inebgawen-is. Agellid yenna i teqcict-nni : Ssuter-iyi-d ayen tebɣiḍ a m-t-id fkeɣ.
6.23: Yerna yeggul-as : Ssuter-ed ayen tebɣiḍ a m-t-id fkeɣ, ɣas d azgen di tgelda-w.
6.24: Teffeɣ tenna i yemma-s : D acu ara s-ssutreɣ ? Terra-yas : Ssuter-as aqeṛṛuy n Yeḥya.
6.25: Tekcem ɣer ugellid tenna-yas : Efk-iyi-d tura kan aqeṛṛuy n Yeḥya deg uḍebsi !
6.26: Agellid-nni yeḥzen mačči d kra, lameɛna imi s-yeggul zdat inebgawen is, ur yezmir ara ad iḥnet.
6.27: Iceggeɛ imiren kan yiwen uɛessas, yumeṛ-it a s-d-yawi aqeṛṛuy n Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas. Aɛessas-nni iṛuḥ ɣer lḥebs, ikkes-as aqeṛṛuy i Yeḥya.
6.28: Yewwi-t-id deg uḍebsi, yefka-t i teqcict-nni, ma d nețțat tewwi-t i yemma-s.
6.29: Mi slan s wayagi, inelmaden n Yeḥya usan-d wwin lǧețța-s meḍlen-ț.
6.30: Uɣalen-d inelmaden, nnejmaɛen ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, ḥkan-as ayen akk xedmen d wayen slemden.
6.31: Imi aṭas n lɣaci i gețṛuḥun țțuɣalen-d, ur sɛin ara lweqt ad ččen, dɣa Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Eyyaw a nṛuḥet ɣer wemkan iḍeṛfen iwakken aț-țesteɛfum.
6.32: Rekben di teflukt, ṛuḥen ad stuṛṛfen iman-nsen.
6.33: Aṭas i ten-iwalan mi ṛuḥen, ɛeqlen-ten, imiren uzzlen-d ɣef wuḍar si mkul tamdint. Zwaren-ten ɣer wanda akken i teddun.
6.34: Mi d-yers si teflukt, iwala ayendin n lɣaci ; dɣa ɣaḍen-t imi cban taqeḍɛit n wulli ur nesɛi ameksa. Yebda yesselmad-iten deg waṭas n lecɣal.
6.35: Mi qṛib ad yeɣli wass, usan-d inelmaden-is nnan-as : Amkan-agi yexla yerna iṛuḥ lḥal,
6.36: serreḥ i lɣaci ad ṛuḥen ɣer leɛzayeb ț-țudrin i d-iqeṛben iwakken a d-aɣen ayen ara ččen.
6.37: Yerra-yasen : Fket-asen kunwi ayen ara ččen ! Nutni rran-as : Eɛni tebɣiḍ a nṛuḥ a d-naɣ aɣṛum s wazal n mitin alef iwakken a nessečč annect-agi n lɣaci ?
6.38: Dɣa yenna-yasen : Acḥal n teḥbulin n weɣṛum i tesɛam ? Ṛuḥet aț-țwalim . Mi d-ẓran, nnan-as : ?uṛ-nneɣ xemsa n teḥbulin n weɣṛum d sin iḥewtiwen (iselman ).
6.39: Imiren, Sidna Ɛisa yenna i inelmaden-is ad sɣimen lɣaci ț-țirebbaɛ ɣef leḥcic.
6.40: Qqimen ț-țirebbaɛ n meyya akk d xemsin.
6.41: Yeddem xemsa n teḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum d sin iḥewtiwen, yerfed allen-is ɣer igenni yeḥmed Ṛebbi. Yebḍa aɣṛum-nni, yefka-t i inelmaden a t-feṛqen i lɣaci. Ifṛeq-asen ula d sin-nni iḥewtiwen.
6.43: jemɛen-d tnac iḍellaɛen n weɣṛum akk-d lḥut i d-yegran.
6.44: Wid yeččan si lqut-nni llan di xemsa alef yid-sen.
6.45: Imiren kan, iḥettem ɣef yinelmaden-is ad zegren s teflukt agummaḍ i lebḥeṛ, ad zwiren ɣer temdint n Bitsayda, ma d nețța ad iqqim ad yerr lɣaci.
6.46: Mi gemfaṛaq yid-sen, yuli ɣer wedrar iwakken ad iẓẓall.
6.47: Mi d-tewweḍ tmeddit, taflukt nni tella di tlemmast n lebḥeṛ, ma d Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim weḥd-es di lberr.
6.48: Iwala ṛwan lḥif mi kkaten imeqdafen, axaṭer aḍu yețțara-ten ɣer deffir. Mi qṛib ad yali wass iṛuḥ ɣuṛ-sen, iteddu ɣef waman, yebɣa a sen-iɛeddi.
6.49: Mi t-walan ileḥḥu ɣef waman, nwan-t d lexyal, bdan țɛeggiḍen,
6.50: xelɛen axaṭer țwalin-t akk. Imiren iluɛa-ten yenna-yasen : Ur xellɛet ara, d nekk ; ur țțaggadet ara !
6.51: Akken kan yekcem ɣer teflukt ɣuṛ-sen, yers waḍu-nni.
6.52: Inelmaden dehcen nezzeh, axaṭer ur fhimen ara lbeṛhan-nni n weɣṛum, imi ulawen nsen qquṛen.
6.53: Kemmlen abrid-nsen, ffɣen ɣer tmurt n Jiniṣaret, rsen dinna.
6.54: Mi d-ṣubben si teflukt, lɣaci yeɛqel Sidna Ɛisa imiren kan,
6.55: dɣa uzzlen di mkul amkan n tmurt, bdan țțawin-as-ed imuḍan deg wusu-nsen ɣer yal amkan anda yella.
6.56: Di mkul amkan anda iṛuḥ, ama ț-țaddart ama ț-țamdint neɣ d izuɣaṛ, țțawin-as-ed imuḍan ɣer imukan n tejmaɛin, țḥellilen-t iwakken a ten-yeǧǧ ad nnalen ulamma d icuḍaḍ n ujellab-is. Wid akk i t-ițnalen ḥellun

7.1: Ifariziyen d kra lɛulama n ccariɛa i d-yusan si temdint n Lquds, nnejmaɛen-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa.
7.2: Walan kra seg inelmaden-is tețțen aɣṛum mbla ma ssarden ifassen-nsen, akken tella di lɛadda-nsen.
7.3: Axaṭer ifariziyen akk-d wat Isṛail ur tețțen ara uqbel ad ssirden ifassen-nsen, imi ṭṭfen di lɛadda n lejdud-nsen.
7.4: M'ara d-uɣalen si ssuq, ur tețțen ara alamma uɣen luḍu. ?ṭfen daɣen deg waṭas n lɛaddat nniḍen : tarda n yeqbac, n tbuqalin, akk-d lḥilat meṛṛa n nnḥas.
7.5: Ifariziyen d lɛulama steqsan-t, nnan-as : Acuɣer inelmaden-ik ur ṭṭifen ara di lɛaddat i ɣ-d-ǧǧan lejdud nneɣ, atan tețțen s ifassen yumsen ?
7.6: Yerra-yasen : Ay at sin wudmawen ! Fell-awen i d-yura nnbi Iceɛya mi d-yenna : Lǧil-agi țɛebbiden-iyi s yimi-nsen kan, lameɛna deg ulawen-nsen beɛden fell-i aṭas.
7.7: Aɛebbed-agi i yi-țɛebbiden ur yesɛi ara lqima, imi ayen sselmaden mačči s ɣuṛ-i i d-yekka meɛna d lɛaddat n yemdanen kan.
7.8: Tețțaǧǧam lumuṛat i d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi akken aț-țtebɛem leɛwayed n yemdanen .
7.9: Sidna Ɛisa yenna daɣen : Tețțarram di ṭṭerf lumuṛ n Ṛebbi, iwakken aț-țeṭṭfem di leɛwayed-nwen.
7.10: Axaṭer Musa yenna-d qadeṛ baba-k d yemma-k. Yenna-d daɣen : Win ara ineɛlen baba-s d yemma-s, ad ițwaḥkem fell-as s lmut.
7.11: Ma d kunwi tesselmadem belli yezmer yiwen ad yini i baba-s neɣ i yemma-s : « Ayen s wacu ilaq a kkun-refdeɣ, fkiɣ-t d lqeṛban, ( yeɛni d lweɛda i Ṛebbi ). »
7.12: S wakka tserrḥem-as ur yețɛawan ara imawlan-is.
7.13: Atah wamek i tețbeddilem awal n Ṛebbi s lɛaddat-nwen yerna aṭas n temsalin nniḍen i txeddmem am tigi.
7.14: Yessawel daɣen i lɣaci yenna yasen : Smeḥset-iyi-d akk, tfehmem :
7.15: Mačči d ayen ikečmen ɣer daxel n wemdan ara t-yesneǧsen, meɛna d ayen i d-ițeffɣen seg ul-is.
7.17: Mi geǧǧa lɣaci-nni, yekcem ɣer yiwen wexxam, inelmaden-is ssutren as a sen-d-issefhem lemtel nni.
7.18: Yenna-yasen : Eɛni ula d kunwi ur tefhimem ara ayen bɣiɣ a wen-t-id-iniɣ ? Ur teẓrim ara belli mačči d ayen i gkeččmen ɣer daxel n wemdan i t-yessenǧasen ?
7.19: Axaṭer ayagi ur ikeččem ara ɣer wul-is, meɛna ɣer uɛebbuḍ-is, dɣa ad ițwadeggeṛ ɣer beṛṛa. S wakka, i gesseḥlel Sidna Ɛisa yal lqut.
7.20: Yerna yenna : D ayen i d-ițeffɣen seg wemdan i t-yessenǧasen.
7.21: Axaṭer si zdaxel n wul-is i d-țeffɣen yir ixemmimen : asefsed, tukerḍa, timegṛaḍ,
7.22: zzna, yir ccehwat, cceṛ, tiḥila, lexdeɛ, tismin, lekfeṛ, zzux, d wayen akk yellan d lehbala.
7.23: Ayagi akk ițeffeɣ-ed seg ul n wemdan yessenǧas-it.
7.24: Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ syenna ɣer leǧwahi n temdint n ?ur. Yekcem ɣer yiwen wexxam. Ur yebɣi ara a t-ẓren medden anda yella, lameɛna ur yezmir ara ad iffer fell-asen.
7.25: ?-țideț, akken kan yewweḍ, ațaya yiwet n tmeṭṭut yesɛan yelli-s izdeɣ-iț uṛuḥani ; tesla s Sidna Ɛisa dɣa tusa-d teɣli ɣer idaṛṛen-is.
7.26: Tameṭṭut-agi ț-țagrikit, tusa-d si leǧwahi yellan ger tmurt n Surya d Finisya. Tessuter-as ad issufeɣ aṛuḥani izedɣen yelli-s.
7.27: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Eǧǧ uqbel arrac n wexxam ad ṛwun, axaṭer ur ilaq ara a nḍeggeṛ aɣṛum n warrac i yeqjan imecṭaḥ.
7.28: Terra-yas : Ih a Sidi, meɛna iqjan imecṭaḥ ddaw ṭṭabla, tețțen tifețțitin iɣellin i warrac.
7.29: Imiren yenna-yas : ?ef wawal-agi i d-tenniḍ, ṛuḥ, yelli-m yeffeɣ-iț uṛuḥani.
7.30: Mi tewweḍ ɣer wexxam-is, tufa yelli-s teḍleq ɣef wussu, yeffeɣ-iț uṛuḥani.
7.31: Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ si lǧiha n temdint n ?ur, iɛedda-d ɣef temdint n Sidun, yezger tamurt n ɛecṛa-nni n temdinin i deg llant ɛecṛa temdinin-nni, yewweḍ ɣer lebḥeṛ n Jlili.
7.32: Wwin-as-d yiwen wergaz d aɛeẓẓug, d ameqmaq ; ḥellelen-t iwakken ad issers afus-is fell-as.
7.33: Sidna Ɛisa yewwi-t yid-es, issebɛed-it ɣef lɣaci ; mi gessekcem iḍuḍan-is deg imeẓẓuɣen n wergaz nni, idhen iḍuḍan-is s imetman, yennul-as iles-is yis-sen,
7.34: dɣa yerfed allen-is ɣer igenni, yerra-d nnehta yenna : Effataḥ ! (Yeɛni : eldi )
7.35: Imiren kan, imeẓẓuɣen-is ldin, iles-is iserreḥ, yebda yețmeslay akken ilaq.
7.36: Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa-ten ur țɛawaden i yiwen ayagi ; meɛna simmal yețweṣṣi deg-sen, simmal nutni țberriḥen lexbaṛ.
7.37: Lɣaci wehmen, tɛeǧǧben deg wayen ixeddem, qqaṛen-as : Ayen ixeddem akk igerrez ; yețțarra-d ula ț-țimesliwt i iɛeẓẓugen yessenṭaq-ed ula d igugamen !

8.1: Deg wussan-nni, innejmaɛ-ed daɣen waṭas n lɣaci, ur sɛin ara ayen ara ččen. Sidna Ɛisa yessawel i inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen :
8.2: Tejreḥ tasa-w ɣef lɣaci-agi, tlata wussan aya i qqimen yid-i, yerna ulac ayen ara ččen.
8.3: Ma yella rriɣ-ten ansi i d-kkan i laẓ, ad nezfen deg webrid axaṭer kra deg-sen usan-d si lebɛid.
8.4: Inelmaden-is rran-as-d : Ansi ara ɣ-d-yekk weɣṛum ara ten-yesseṛwun deg wemkan-agi yexlan ?
8.5: Sidna Ɛisa yesteqsa-ten : Acḥal n teḥbulin n weɣṛum i tesɛam ? Rran-as-ed : ?uṛ-nneɣ sebɛa teḥbulin !
8.6: Yenna i lɣaci ad qqimen ɣer lqaɛa. Dɣa yeddem-ed sebɛa teḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum, yeḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi, yebḍa-tent, yefka-tent i inelmaden-is feṛqen-tent i lɣaci.
8.7: Sɛan daɣen kra iselman ( iḥewtiwen ) imecṭaḥ. Yeḥmed daɣen Sidi Ṛebbi, yenna-yasen a ten-feṛqen i lɣaci.
8.8: ?čan armi ṛwan. Rnan sagren-d azal n sebɛa iqecwalen.
8.9: Llan deg wazal n ṛebɛa alaf n yemdanen. Mi fukken lmakla, iserreḥ-asen ad uɣalen ɣer ixxamen-nsen.
8.10: Imiren kan yuli ɣer teflukt nețța d inelmaden-is, ṛuḥen ɣer leǧwahi n Dalmanuta.
8.11: Ṛuḥen-d ifariziyen, bdan țmeslayen d Sidna Ɛisa iwakken a t-jeṛṛben, ssutren-as ad ixdem lbeṛhan ara d-iṣubben seg igenni.
8.12: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-d nnehta, yenna : Acuɣer i yi-d-ssuturen lbeṛhan yemdanen n lǧil-agi ? S tideț aql-i nniɣ-awen : d lmuḥal a s-d-ițunefk lbeṛhan i lǧil-agi !
8.13: Dɣa yeǧǧa-ten, yerkeb daɣen di teflukt iwakken ad izger agummaḍ.
8.14: Inelmaden țțun ur wwin ara aɣṛum anagar yiwet n teḥbult i gellan ɣuṛ-sen di teflukt.
8.15: Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa-ten, yenna-yasen : ?adret iman-nwen ɣef temtunt ( iɣes ) n ifariziyen akk-d win n Hiṛudus.
8.16: Inelmaden qqaṛen wway gar asen : «Yenna-yaɣ-d ayagi imi ur d newwi ara aɣṛum.»
8.17: Mi geẓra ayen țxemmimen, yenna-yasen : Acuɣer tețxemimem ɣef weɣṛum ? Urɛad tfaqem ? Mazal ur tefhimem ara ?
8.18: Eɛni qquṛen wulawen-nwen ? Tesɛam allen ur tețwalim ara, tesɛam imeẓẓuɣen ur tsellem ara ?
8.19: Ur tecfim ara mi bḍiɣ xemsa teḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum i xemsa alaf n yergazen, acḥal n iḍellaɛen n tsigar i tjemɛem ? Rran-as : Tnac iḍellaɛen.
8.20: I wasmi bḍiɣ sebɛa teḥbulin n weɣṛum i ṛebɛa alaf n yemdanen, acḥal n tqecwalin yeččuṛen ț-țisigar i d-tjemɛem ? Nnan-as : Sebɛa n tqecwalin.
8.22: Ewwḍen ɣer temdint n Bitsayda. Wwin-as-d yiwen uderɣal, ḥellelen-t iwakken a t-yennal.
8.23: Sidna Ɛisa yeṭṭef afus i uderɣal-nni, yewwi-t beṛṛa n taddart. Yessers imetman ɣef wallen n uderɣal-nni, yessers ifassen is fell-as yesteqsa-t : Yella kra tețwaliḍ ?
8.24: Yerfed allen-is yenna : ?waliɣ imdanen am akken d ttjuṛ i gleḥḥun.
8.25: Sidna Ɛisa iɛawed issers-as ifassen ɣef wallen, mi gemmuqel uderɣal-nni, yuɣal-it-id yeẓri, ițwali akken ilaq.
8.26: Dɣa Sidna Ɛisa iceggeɛ-it ɣer wexxam-is, yenna-yas : Ur keččem ara ɣer taddart.
8.27: Sidna Ɛisa akk-d inelmaden-is ṛuḥen ɣer tudrin n Qiṣarya n Filibus. Deg webrid, yesteqsa-ten yenna yasen : D acu-yi ɣer lɣaci ?
8.28: Rran-as-d : Kra deg-sen qqaṛen d Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas i telliḍ, wiyaḍ qqaṛen d Sidna Ilyas, ma d wiyaḍ ḥesben-k d yiwen si lenbiya.
8.29: Yerna yesteqsa-ten : I kunwi, d acu-iyi ɣuṛ-wen ? Buṭrus yerra-yas : Keččini d Lmasiḥ. ( yeɛni win yextaṛ Ṛebbi )
8.30: Yumeṛ-iten iwakken ur țɛawaden i yiwen ayagi.
8.31: Sidna Ɛisa yebda yesselmad-iten yeqqaṛ : Mmi-s n bunadem ilaq ad yenɛețțab aṭas ; a t-nekkṛen lecyux d lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d lɛulama n ccariɛa. A t-nɣen, m'ara ɛeddin tlata wussan, a d-iḥyu si ger lmegtin.
8.32: Yenna-yasen-d ayagi ɛinani. Buṭrus ijbed-it weḥd-es, ilumm fell-as.
8.33: Sidna Ɛisa yezzi, imuqel inelmaden-is, yenna i Buṭrus : Wexxeṛ akkin fell-i a Cciṭan ! Ixemmimen-ik mačči n Ṛebbi, meɛna n yemdanen !
8.34: Sidna Ɛisa yessawel i lɣaci akk-d inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen : Ma yella win yebɣan ad iddu yid-i, ur ilaq ara ad ixemmem ɣef yiman-is, meɛna ilaq ad iqbel leɛtab ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw, ad ibbib amidag-is, a yi-d-itbeɛ.
8.35: Axaṭer win yebɣan ad isellek taṛwiḥt-is, a s-tṛuḥ ; ma d win ara yesṛuḥen tarwiḥt-is ɣef ddemma-w akk-d lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, a ț-isellek.
8.36: Ma yella irbeḥ-ed wemdan ddunit meṛṛa, acu n lfayda i gesɛa ma yesṛuḥ tudert-is ?
8.37: D acu ara yefk wemdan iwakken ad icafeɛ taṛwiḥt-is ?
8.38: Ma yella win yessetḥan yis-i akk-d imeslayen-iw ger lǧil-agi amednub, ifesden, ula d Mmi-s n bunadem ad issetḥi yis m'ara d-yas akk-d lmalayekkat iqedsen di lɛaḍima n baba-s.

9.1: Sidna Ɛisa yenna daɣen : -- S tideț a wen-d-iniɣ, kra seg wid yellan dagi, ur țmețțaten ara alamma walan tagelda n Ṛebbi tusa-d s tmanegt tameqqrant.
9.2: Mi ɛeddan sețța wussan, Sidna Ɛisa yewwi yid-es Buṭrus, Yeɛqub d Yuḥenna, ulin ɣer yiwen wedrar ɛlayen. Mi llan dinna weḥḥed-sen, tenbeddal ṣṣifa-s zdat-sen,
