9.3: llebsa-s tuɣal ț-țamellalt tețfeǧǧiǧ, ula d yiwen di ddunit ur izmir a ten yessimlul akken.
9.4: ?ehṛen-asen-d nnbi Ilyas akk-d Sidna Musa, țmeslayen d Sidna Ɛisa.
9.5: Yenṭeq Buṭrus yenna i Sidna Ɛisa : A Sidi, yelha imi nella dagi. A nesbedd tlata iqiḍunen ; yiwen i kečč, wayeḍ i Sidna Musa wayeḍ i Sidna Ilyas.
9.6: Ur yeẓri d acu i d-yeqqaṛ axaṭer tekcem-iten lxelɛa ț-țameqqrant.
9.7: Taswiɛt kan ters-ed yiwet n tagut tɣumm-iten, si tagut-nni tenṭeq-ed yiwet n taɣect tenna-d : Wagi d Mmi ameɛzuz, smeḥsiset as !
9.8: Imiren kan, inelmaden muqlen ɣer mkul tama, ur walan ula d yiwen, anagar Sidna Ɛisa yellan yid-sen.
9.9: Mi d-ṣubben seg udrar, Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa-ten : Ur ḥekkut i yiwen ayen teẓram, alamma yeḥya-d Mmi-s n bunadem si ger lmegtin.
9.10: Uɣen-as awal, d acu kan țemsteqsayen, qqaṛen : Acu i d lmeɛna n ḥeggu si ger lmegtin ?
9.11: Inelmaden steqsan-t nnan-as : Acuɣer lɛulama n ccariɛa qqaṛen-d : ilaq a d-yas uqbel Sidna Ilyas ?
9.12: Yerra-yasen : ?-țideț, a d-yas uqbel Ilyas, iwakken ad iseggem kullec. lameɛna acuɣer yețwakteb ɣef Mmi-s n bunadem belli ilaq ad yenɛețțab aṭas yerna ad yețwaqehheṛ ?
9.13: Aql-i nniɣ-awen : Ilyas yusa-d, xedmen deg-s akken bɣan, am akken yețwakteb fell-as di tira iqedsen.
9.14: Mi d-ṣubben seg udrar, ufan-d lɣaci akk-d lɛulama n ccariɛa zzin i inelmaden nniḍen, țmeslayen yid-sen.
9.15: Mi d-walan Sidna Ɛisa, dehcen, uzzlen ad selmen fell-as.
9.16: Sidna Ɛisa yesteqsa-ten : ?ef wacu i tețmeslayem akka yid-sen ?
9.17: Yiwen wergaz si lɣaci-nni yerra-yas-d : A Sidi, wwiɣ-ak-d mmi axaṭer yesgugem-it uṛuḥani.
9.18: Kra wanda ara t-yeṭṭef, yesseɣlay-it ɣer lqaɛa ; aqcic yessufuɣ-ed tikufta, yețqeṛṛic tuɣmas, yețțuɣal d asemmaḍ. ?elleleɣ inelmaden-ik a t-ssufɣen seg-s meɛna ur zmiren ara.
9.19: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : A lǧil i gxuṣṣ liman ! Ar melmi ara yiliɣ yid-wen ? Ar melmi ara wen-ṣebṛeɣ ? Awit-ed aqcic-agi ! Wwin-as-t-id ;
9.20: akken kan iwala Sidna Ɛisa, aṛuḥani-nni yebda yețhuccu aqcic-nni, yesseɣli-t ɣer lqaɛa yessemṛareɣ-it armi i s-d yessufeɣ tikufta.
9.21: Sidna Ɛisa yesteqsa baba-s n weqcic-nni yenna-yas : Si melmi i d-ideṛṛu yid-es wayagi ? Yerra-yas-d : Seg wasmi yella d amecṭuḥ.
9.22: Acḥal d abrid i t-idemmer uṛuḥani-agi ɣer tmes d waman iwakken a t-ineɣ. Tura, ma yella wayen iwumi tzemreḍ, ḥunn fell-aɣ, ɛiwen-aɣ !
9.23: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Teqqaṛeḍ : ma tzemreḍ... ? Win yețțamnen yezmer i kullec !
9.24: Imiren kan, baba-s n weqcic-nni yenna : Umneɣ ! Meɛna sseǧhed-iyi axaṭer xuṣṣeɣ di liman.
9.25: Sidna Ɛisa mi gwala lɣaci uzzlen-d ɣuṛ-sen, yumeṛ i uṛuḥani-nni, yenna-yas : Ay aṛuḥani ! yesgugumen yesɛuẓẓugen, effeɣ seg weqcic-agi ur țɛawad ara aț-țkecmeḍ deg-s !
9.26: Imiren iɛeggeḍ, ihucc-it nezzeh, dɣa yeffeɣ seg-s. Aqcic-nni yuɣal am lmegget, daymi aṭas i s-yeqqaṛen : « yemmut. »
9.27: Meɛna Sidna Ɛisa yeṭṭef-as afus, isekker-it-id, ibedd.
9.28: Mi kecmen ɣer wexxam, inelmaden-is steqsan-t : Acuɣer ur nezmir ara nukni a nessufeɣ aṛuḥani-nni ?
9.29: Yenna-yasen : Iwakken aț-țessufɣem iṛuḥaniyen am wigi, ilaq aț-țețțuẓumem yerna aț-țețẓallam.
9.30: Ṛuḥen syenna, zegren tamurt n Jlili. Sidna Ɛisa ur yebɣi ara ad ẓren lɣaci anda i gella,
9.31: axaṭer yesselmad inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen : Mmi-s n bunadem ad ițțusellem ger ifassen n yemdanen, a t-nɣen, meɛna tlata wussan mbeɛd lmut-is a d-iḥyu.
9.32: Inelmaden-is ur fhimen ara lmeɛna n wawal-agi, yerna kukran a t-steqsin.
9.33: Mi ewwḍen ɣer temdint n Kafernaḥum. llan deg wexxam, Sidna Ɛisa yesteqsa-ten : ?ef wacu i tețmeslayem deg webrid ?
9.34: Lameɛna ssusmen akken ma llan, axaṭer deg webrid țmesteqsayen anwa i d ameqqran gar-asen.
9.35: Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim, yessawel i tnac-nni inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen : Win yebɣan ad yili d amezwaru, ilaq ad yeqqim d aneggaru, ad yuɣal d aqeddac i mkul yiwen.
9.36: Yeddem-ed yiwen weqcic amecṭuḥ, yesbedd-it zdat-sen dɣa yerfed-it ger ifassen-is, yenna-yasen :
9.37: Win iqeblen aqcic amecṭuḥ am wagi ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw, d nekk i geqbel, win i yi-qeblen mačči d nekk i geqbel lameɛna yeqbel Win i yi-d iceggɛen.
9.38: Yuḥenna yenna i Sidna Ɛisa : A Sidi, nwala yiwen wergaz yessufuɣ leǧnun s yisem-ik ; nugi-yas imi ur iteddu ara yid-nneɣ.
9.39: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Aneft-as, imi ulac win izemren ad ixdem lbeṛhan s yisem-iw, imiren ad yehdeṛ ayen n diri fell-i.
9.40: Win ur nelli ara d aɛdaw-nneɣ, yid-nneɣ i gella.
9.41: Kra win ara wen-d-yefken lkas n waman imi d inelmaden n Lmasiḥ i tellam, a wen-iniɣ s tideț, lxiṛ-is ur s-yețwankaṛ ara .
9.42: Win ara yilin d sebba n tuccḍa i yiwen seg imecṭuḥen-agi yumnen yis-i, axiṛ-as a s-ɛelqen ɣer temgeṛṭ aɣaṛef n tsirt, a t-ḍeggṛen ɣer lebḥeṛ.
9.43: Ma yella d afus-ik i d sebba n tuccḍa, gzem-it ; axiṛ-ak aț-țkecmeḍ ɣer tudert n dayem s yiwen ufus wala aț-țkecmeḍ s sin ifassen ɣer ǧahennama, aț-țețwaḍeggreḍ ɣer tmes ur nxețți.
9.44: [Dinna awekkiw itețțen lǧețțat ur yețmețțat ara, times ur txețți ara maḍi.]
9.45: Ma yella d aḍaṛ-ik i d sebba n tuccḍa, gzem-it ;axiṛ-ak aț-țkecmeḍ ɣer tudert n dayem s yiwen uḍar wala aț-țkecmeḍ s sin iḍaṛṛen ɣer ǧahennama, aț-țețwaḍeggreḍ ɣer tmes ur nxețți.
9.46: [Dinna awekkiw itețțen lǧețțat ur yețmețțat ara, times ur txețți ara maḍi.]
9.47: Daɣen ma yella ț-țiṭ-ik i gellan d sebba n tuccḍa, qleɛ-iț-id ; axiṛ-ak aț-țkecmeḍ ɣer tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi s yiwet n tiṭ, wala aț-țwaḍeggṛeḍ s snat wallen ɣer ǧahennama.
9.48: Dinna awekkiw itețțen lǧețțat ur yețmețțat ara, times ur txețți ara maḍi.
9.49: Axaṭer mkul amdan ilaq ad yețwamelleḥ s tmes.
9.50: Lmelḥ, d ayen yelhan ; meɛna ma tṛuḥ-as lbenna-s, s wacu ara t-tmellḥem ? (51) Sɛut lmelḥ deg yiman-nwen, tɛicem wway gar-awen di lehna.

10.1: Sidna Ɛisa yeṭṭef abrid ɣer tmurt n Yahuda agummaḍ i wasif n Urdun. Nnejmaɛen-d daɣen ɣuṛ-es aṭas n lɣaci. Yebda yesselmad-iten akken yennum.
10.2: Ifariziyen qesden-t-id a t-jeṛṛben. Steqsan-t nnan-as : Yeḥlel i wergaz ad yebru i tmeṭṭut-is neɣ ala ?
10.3: Yerra-yasen : Acu n lameṛ i wen-d-yeǧǧa Musa ?
10.4: Nnan-as : Sidna Musa issereḥ-aɣ a nebru i tmeṭṭut-nneɣ ma nefka-yas leɛqed n berru.
10.5: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : ?ef ddemma n wulawen-nwen yeqquṛen i wen-d-yeǧǧa lameṛ-agi.
10.6: Lameɛna di tazwara, Sidi Ṛebbi ixleq-ed argaz ț-țmeṭṭut .
10.7: Daymi : Argaz ad yeǧǧ baba-s akk-d yemma-s,iwakken ad iɛic ț-țmeṭṭut-is.
10.8: Imiren, di sin yid-sen ad uɣalen d yiwet n lǧețța. S wakka, ur llin ara d sin meɛna ad uɣalen d yiwen.
10.9: Ihi, ur feṛqet ara wayen yesdukkel Ṛebbi.
10.10: Mi llan deg wexxam, steqsan-t daɣen inelmaden-is ɣef wannect-nni.
10.11: Yerra-yasen : Kra win ara yebrun i tmeṭṭut-is yuɣ tayeḍ, ixdeɛ tameṭṭut tamezwarut, yezna.
10.12: Akken daɣen, tameṭṭut ara yebrun i wergaz-is aț-țaɣ wayeḍ, tezna.
10.13: Kra yemdanen wwin-as-d arrac imecṭuḥen iwakken ad yessers ifassen-is fell-asen, meɛna inelmaden țțaran-ten.
10.14: Mi ten-iwala Sidna Ɛisa, yezɛef fell-asen yenna-yasen : Anfet i warrac a d-asen ɣuṛ-i ! Ur ten-țțarrat ara, axaṭer tagelda n Ṛebbi i wid yellan am nutni.
10.15: A wen-iniɣ tideț : kra win ur neqbil ara tagelda n Ṛebbi am weqcic amecṭuḥ, ur ț-ikeččem ara.
10.16: Imiren issuden-iten, yessers ifassen-is fell-asen, dɣa iburek-iten.
10.17: Akken iteddu Sidna Ɛisa ad iṛuḥ, ataya yiwen ilemẓi yeɣli ɣef tgecrar zdat-es, yenna-yas : A ccix yelhan, d acu ilaqen a t-xedmeɣ iwakken ad sɛuɣ tudert n dayem ?
10.18: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Acuɣeṛ i yi-tsemmaḍ « win yelhan » ? Ulac win yelhan, anagar Ṛebbi weḥd-es.
10.19: Tessneḍ ccariɛa n Musa : Ur tneqqeḍ ara, ur tzennuḍ ara, ur tețțakṛeḍ ara, ur tețcehhiḍeḍ ara s ẓẓur, ur txeddɛeḍ ( tețḍuṛuḍ ) ara, aț-țqadṛeḍ baba-k d yemma-k.
10.20: Yerra-yas : A Sidi, ayagi akk xedmeɣ-t seg wasmi lliɣ d ameẓyan.
10.21: Sidna Ɛisa imuqel-it s leḥnana yenna-yas : Txuṣṣ-ik kan yiwet n lḥaǧa : ṛuḥ, zzenz akk ayen tesɛiḍ, tseddqeḍ-t i imeɣban iwakken aț-țesɛuḍ agerruj deg igenni ; imiren as-ed tbeɛ-iyi-d.
10.22: Mi gesla ilemẓi-nni i imeslayen n Sidna Ɛisa, yennuɣna. Iṛuḥ s leḥzen axaṭer yesɛa aṭas n cci.
10.23: Sidna Ɛisa imuqel wid i s-d-izzin, yenna i inelmaden-is : Acḥal i gewɛeṛ i wid yesɛan cci ad kecmen ɣer tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi !
10.24: Inelmaden-is dehcen mi slan imeslayen-agi. Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen daɣen : Acḥal i gewɛeṛ unekcum ɣer tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi a tarwa !
10.25: Ishel-as i welɣem ad iɛeddi di tiṭ n tissegnit wala i umeṛkanti ad ikcem ɣer tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi.
10.26: Ayagi issewhem inelmaden akteṛ, qqaṛen wway gar-asen : Ihi, anwa i gzemren ad ițțusellek ?
10.27: Sidna Ɛisa imuqel-iten, yenna yasen : Ayen yellan d lmuḥal i wemdan yeshel i Sidi Ṛebbi, imi Sidi Ṛebbi yezmer i kullec.
10.28: Buṭrus yenna-yas : Aql-aɣ neǧǧa kullec yerna netbeɛ-ik.
10.29: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : win yeǧǧan axxam-is, ayetma-s, yessetma-s, yemma-s, baba-s, arraw-is, tiferkiwin-is ( akal-is ), ɣef ddemma-w akk-d ddemma n ubecceṛ n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ,
10.30: a s-d-yețțunefk meyya iberdan akteṛ di lweqt-agi : ixxamen, atmaten, tiyestmatin, tiyemmatin, dderya akk-d tferkiwin meɛna s waṭas n uqehheṛ ; di lweqt i d-iteddun a s-d-tețțunefk tudert n dayem.
10.31: Aṭas seg imezwura ara yuɣalen d ineggura, aṭas seg ineggura ara yuɣalen d imezwura.
10.32: Llan leḥḥun iwakken ad alin ɣer temdint n Lquds, Sidna Ɛisa yezwar zdat-nsen. Inelmaden-nni xelɛen, ma d wid i d-itebɛen deffir-sen, ikcem iten lxuf. Sidna Ɛisa yewwi daɣen yid-es tnac-nni n inelmaden, ixebbeṛ- iten s wayen ara yedṛun yid-es.
10.33: Yenna-yasen : Atan a nali ɣer temdint n Lquds, Mmi-s n bunadem ad ițwasellem ger ifassen n lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lɛulama, ad ḥekmen fell-as s lmut, a t-sellmen ger ifassen n ikafriwen.
10.34: Ad ḍsen fell-as, a t-ssusfen, a t-wten s ujelkkaḍ, a t-nɣen, m'ara ɛeddin tlata wussan, a d-iḥyu si ger lmegtin.
10.35: Yeɛqub d Yuḥenna yellan d arraw n Zabadi qeṛṛben ɣer Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : A Sidi, nebɣa a ɣ-txedmeḍ ayen akka ara k-d-nessuter.
10.36: Yenna-yasen : D acu tebɣam a wen-t-xedmeɣ ?
10.37: Nnan-as : Efk-aɣ imukan di lɛaḍima-k, wa ɣer tama-k tayeffust, wa ɣer tama-k taẓelmaṭ.
10.38: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Ur teẓrim ara ayen akka i yi-d tessuturem. Eɛni tzemrem aț-țeswem lkas-agi n lemṛaṛ ara sweɣ ? Neɣ tzemrem a d-tɛeddim seg weɣḍas-agi s wayes ara țwaɣeḍseɣ ?
10.39: Nnan-as : Ih a Sidi, nezmer. Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : ?-țideț, aț-țeswem lkas-agi n lemṛaṛ ara sweɣ, yernu aț-țɛeddim seg weɣḍas s wayes ara țwaɣeḍseɣ.
10.40: Ma yella d ayen yeɛnan imukan ɣer uyeffus-iw neɣ ɣer uzelmaḍ-iw, mačči deg ufus-iw i gella, meɛna ad țțunefken i wid iwumi țwaheggan.
10.41: Mi slan i waya, ɛecṛa n inelmaden nniḍen rfan ɣef Yeɛqub akk-d Yuḥenna.
10.42: Sidna Ɛisa yessawel asen yenna-yasen : Twalam ayen iḍeṛṛun di ddunit : wid nețwali d igelliden akk-d d imeqqranen n yegduden țqehhiṛen lɣaci-nsen yerna ḥekkmen fell-asen s ẓẓur !
10.43: Ur ilaq ara ad yili wannect-a gar-awen. Meɛna win yebɣan ad yili d ameqqran gar-awen ilaq ad yuɣal d aqeddac-nwen.
10.44: Win yebɣan daɣen amkan amezwaru, ilaq ad yili d aqeddac-nwen meṛṛa.
10.45: Axaṭer Mmi-s n bunadem ur d-yusi ara iwakken ad qedcen fell-as wiyaḍ, meɛna d nețța ara iqedcen fell-asen, yerna ad yefk tudert-is d asfel ɣef waṭas n yemdanen.
10.46: Sidna Ɛisa akk-d inelmaden-is wḍen ɣer temdint n Yiriku. Mi d-ffɣen si temdint, ddan-d yid-sen aṭas n lɣaci. Ataya yiwen uderɣal isem-is Baṛtimay mmi-s n Timay, yeqqim ṭṭerf n webrid yessutur tin n Ṛebbi.
10.47: Mi gesla belli d Ɛisa anaṣari i d-iɛeddan, yebda yețɛeggiḍ yeqqaṛ : A Ɛisa, a Mmi-s n Sidna Dawed, ḥunn fell-i !
10.48: Aṭas i gețɛeggiḍen fell-as iwakken ad issusem, meɛna nețța yețsuɣu akteṛ yeqqaṛ : A mmi-s n Sidna Dawed, ḥunn fell-i !
10.49: Sidna Ɛisa iḥbes yenna : Siwlet-as. Ssawlen-as, nnan-as : Ur țțaggad ara, kker fell-ak, atan yessawel-ak-ed.
10.50: Aderɣal-nni iḍeggeṛ abeṛnus-is, ijelleb-ed, yusa-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa.
10.51: Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq ɣuṛ-es yenna-yas : D acu tebɣiḍ a k-t-xedmeɣ ? Aderɣal-nni yenna-yas : A Sidi, bɣiɣ a yi-d-yuɣal yeẓri.
10.52: Dɣa Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ṛuḥ, liman-ik isellek-ik. Imiren kan, yuɣal-it-id yeẓri, yetḍfer Sidna Ɛisa deg webrid.

11.1: Mi qṛib ad awḍen ɣer temdint n Lquds, zdat n tuddar n Bitfaji akk-d Bitanya ɣer tama n yiɣil n uzemmur, Sidna Ɛisa iceggeɛ sin seg inelmaden-is
11.2: yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet ɣer taddart-nni yellan zdat-wen, m'ara tawḍem aț-țafem aɣyul d amecṭuḥ yeqqen, leɛmeṛ yerkeb fell-as ula d yiwen. Fsit-as-ed cced tawim-t-id.
11.3: Ma yella win i wen-d-yennan : « acimi txeddmem ayagi ? » Innit-as : « yeḥwaǧ-it Ssid-nneɣ, taswiɛt kan a wen-t id-yerr. »
11.4: Ṛuḥen inelmaden-nni ufan aɣyul deg webrid yeqqen ɣer tewwurt n yiwen n wexxam, fsin-as ccedd.
11.5: Kra seg wid yellan dinna nnan asen : D acu txeddmem akka ? Acuɣer i d-tserḥem i weɣyul-agi ?
11.6: Rran-asen akken i sen-d-yenna Sidna Ɛisa, dɣa ǧǧan-ten.
11.7: Wwin-d aɣyul-nni i Sidna Ɛisa, ssersen fell-as llebsa-nsen iwakken ad yerkeb fell-as.
11.8: Aṭas i s-ițessun llebsa-nsen deg webrid, ma d wiyaḍ țessun-as tiseḍwa i d-ge?men si lexla.
11.9: Wid yezwaren d wid yettabaɛen țɛeggiḍen : « ?usana, ad yețțubarek win i d-yusan s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi !
11.10: Tețțubarek tgeldit i d-yusan, tageldit n Sidna Dawed baba-tneɣ ! ?usana ( tamanegt ) deg imukan ɛlayen. »
11.11: Sidna Ɛisa yewweḍ ɣer temdint n Lquds, yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ iqedsen. Imuqel ayen akk i gdeṛṛun dina, imiren mi geẓra ifut lḥal, iṛuḥ ɣer taddart n Bitanya nețța d tnac inelmaden-is.
11.12: Azekka-nni akken ffɣen si taddart n Bitanya, Sidna Ɛisa yelluẓ.
11.13: Iwala si lbeɛd tameɣṛust yesɛan iferrawen, iṛuḥ ad iqelleb kra ibakuṛen ara yečč. Mi gqeṛṛeb ɣuṛ-es, yufa deg-s anagar iferrawen, axaṭer mačči d lawan n lexṛif.
11.14: Yenṭeq ɣuṛ-es zdat n inelmaden-is, yenna-yas : Ur tețțuɣaleḍ ara a d-tefkeḍ lfakya !
11.15: Mi wwḍen ɣer temdint n Lquds, Sidna Ɛisa yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ iqedsen, yebda itellif wid yețțaɣen znuzun dinna. Yeqleb ṭṭwabel d ikersiyen n wid ițbeddilen idrimen akk-d wid yeznuzun itbiren.
11.16: Ur yeǧǧi ula d yiwen ad yawi yid-es lḥaǧa ɣer daxel n lǧameɛ.
11.17: Dɣa yesselmed lɣaci s imeslayen-agi : Eɛni ur yețwakteb ara : Axxam-iw ad ițțusemmi d axxam n tẓallit i leǧnas meṛṛa, ma d kunwi terram-t d axxam n imakaren !
11.18: Mi s-slan, lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lɛulama uggaden-t, imiren țnadin amek ara t-nɣen, axaṭer lɣaci meṛṛa wehmen deg uselmed-ines.
11.19: Mi d-yeɣli yiḍ, Sidna Ɛisa d inelmaden-is ffɣen si temdint.
11.20: Azekka-nni ṣṣbeḥ mi d-ɛeddan syenna, inelmaden-is walan tameɣṛust nni teqquṛ armi d iẓuran.
11.21: Buṭrus yemmekta-d ayen iɛeddan, yenna i Sidna Ɛisa : A Sidi, muqel ! Tameɣṛust-nni iwumi tedɛiḍ teqquṛ !
11.22: Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq yenna : A wen-d-iniɣ tideț :
11.23: ma yenna walebɛaḍ i wedrar-agi « qleɛ syenna tḍeggṛeḍ iman-ik ɣer lebḥeṛ» ma yumen ur icukket ara, atan a d-yedṛu wayen i d-yenna.
11.24: Daymi i wen-qqaṛeɣ : kra wayen ara tessutrem i Ṛebbi di tẓallit, amnet belli yewweḍ-ikkun-id yerna a wen-d-ițțunefk.
11.25: M'ara tekkrem aț-țẓallem yili teṭṭfem cceḥna i walebɛaḍ, semmḥet-as, iwakken baba-twen yellan deg igenwan a wen-isemmeḥ ula i kunwi ddnubat nwen.
11.26: [ Meɛna ma yella ur tețsemmiḥem ara i wiyaḍ, baba-twen yellan deg igenwan ur wen-ițsemmiḥ ara ddnubat-nwen daɣen i kunwi. ]
11.27: Uɣalen ɣer temdint n Lquds. Di teswiɛt-nni, Sidna Ɛisa yella itezzi di Lǧameɛ iqedsen ; lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lɛulama akk-d lecyux, qeṛṛben-d ɣuṛ-es
11.28: nnan-as : Ansi i k-d-tekka lḥekma-agi ? Anwa i k-d-yefkan tazmert aț- țxedmeḍ ayagi ?
11.29: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Ula d nekk a kkun-steqsiɣ s yiwen usteqsi kan, ma terram-iyi-d, a wen-d-iniɣ ansi i yi-d-tekka lḥekma s wayes i xeddmeɣ ayagi :
11.30: Anwa i d-iceggɛen Yeḥya ad isseɣḍes deg waman, d Ṛebbi neɣ d imdanen ? Erret-iyi-d !
11.31: Bdan țemcawaṛen wway gar asen qqaṛen : ma nerra-yas : « d Ṛebbi i t-id iceggɛen», a ɣ-d-yini : « acimi ihi ur tuminem ara s Yeḥya ? »
11.32: Ma nenna-d : « d imdanen i t-id iceggɛen... » Uggaden ma nnan-d akken, axaṭer lɣaci umnen akk belli Yeḥya d nnbi.
11.33: Ihi rran-as i Sidna Ɛisa : Ur neẓri ara ! Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Ula d nekk ur wen-d-qqaṛeɣ ara ansi i yi-d-tekka lḥekma s wayes xeddmeɣ ayagi.

12.1: Sidna Ɛisa yebda ițmeslay-asen s lemtul : Yiwen wergaz yeẓẓa tafeṛṛant, izeṛṛeb-iț, yeɣza amkan i tɛeṣṣart n tẓurin yerna yebna taxxamt n tɛessast. Issekra-ț i ixemmasen n tfeṛṛant imiren iṛuḥ ad yinig.
12.2: Mi d-yewweḍ lweqt n tẓurin, iceggeɛ aqeddac-is ɣer ixemmasen-nni iwakken a s-d-fken amur-is.
12.3: Meɛna ṭṭfen aqeddac-nni, wwten-t, qecɛen-t ifassen-is d ilmawen.
12.4: Iceggeɛ-asen aqeddac wis sin , reggmen-t yerna wwten-t ula d nețța ɣer uqeṛṛuy.
12.5: Iceggeɛ-asen aqeddac wis tlata, wagi nɣan-t. Iceggeɛ-asen aṭas iqeddacen nniḍen, kra nɣan-ten kra wten-ten .
12.6: Yeqqim-as-d anagar mmi-s ameɛzuz. Iceggeɛ-it d aneggaru ɣuṛ-sen, yenna : « ahat a t-qadṛen imi d mmi. »
12.7: Meɛna ixemmasen-agi nnan wway gar-asen : « atan win ara iweṛten ! Ekkret a t-nenneɣ iwakken lweṛt nni ad yuɣal d ayla-nneɣ !»
12.8: ?ṭfen-t-id wwten-t armi yemmut, imiren ḍeggṛen-t ɣer beṛṛa n tfeṛṛant.
12.9: D acu ara yexdem tura bab n tfeṛṛant ? A d-yas nețța s yiman-is, ad ineɣ ixemmasen-nni ad yernu ad iwekkel tafeṛṛant-nni i wiyaḍ.
12.10: Eɛni ur teɣṛim ara awal-agi n tira iqedsen ? Adɣaɣ i ḍeggṛen wid ibennun, d nețța i guɣalen d azṛu alemmas yeṭṭfen lebni.
12.11: Ayagi yekka-d s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, yerna ɣer ɣuṛ-nneɣ d ayen i gessewhamen !
12.12: Faqen belli fell-asen i d-yewwi lemtel-agi. Bɣan a t-ṭṭfen imiren, lameɛna uggaden lɣaci ; dɣa ǧǧan-t, ṛuḥen.
12.13: Kra ifariziyen akk-d kra seg wid yellan si terbaɛt n Hiṛudus, ceggɛen ɣer Sidna Ɛisa iwakken a t-id-sseɣlin deg wawal akken a t-ṭṭfen s imeslayen-is.
12.14: Usan-d nnan-as : A Sidi, neẓra belli theddṛeḍ ṣṣeḥ, ur txeddmeḍ ara lxilaf ger yemdanen, tesselmadeḍ abrid n Ṛebbi s tideț. Ini-yaɣ-d : d leḥlal neɣ d leḥṛam fell-aɣ ma nxelleṣ tabzert i wugellid Qayṣer (yesṭeɛmeṛen tamurt-nneɣ) ?
12.15: Sidna Ɛisa ifaq i tḥila-nsen, yenna-yasen : Acuɣer i yi-d-tneddim tifxeț ? Awit-iyi-d aṣurdi iwakken a t-ẓreɣ.
12.16: Fkan-as-d aṣurdi dɣa yenna yasen : Udem-agi d wayen yuran fell-as wi ten-ilan ? Nnan-as : N Qayṣer. Imiren Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen :
12.17: Erret ihi i Qayṣer ayen yellan n Qayṣeṛ, terrem i Ṛebbi ayen yellan n Ṛebbi. Qqimen wehmen deg-s.
12.18: Isaduqiyen yellan d wid ur nețțamen ara s ḥeggu n lmegtin, usan-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa steqsan-t :
12.19: A Sidi, atan wayen i ɣ-d yeǧǧa Sidna Musa di ccariɛa : Ma yella yemmut wergaz yeǧǧa-d tameṭṭut-is, m'ur yesɛi ara dderya, ilaq gma-s ad yerr tameṭṭut-nni iwakken a d-yesɛu dderya i gma-s yemmuten.
12.20: Llan ihi sebɛa watmaten : amezwaru yezweǧ yuɣal yemmut ur d-yeǧǧi ara dderya.
12.21: Wis sin yuɣ taǧǧalt-nni, yemmut ula d nețța mbla ma yeǧǧa-d dderya. Akken daɣen i tedṛa d wis tlata,
12.22: ula d yiwen si sebɛa-nni i gzewǧen yid-es ur d-yeǧǧi dderya. ?er taggara, ula ț-țameṭṭut-nni temmut.
12.23: Asmi ara d-ḥyun lmegtin, anwa si sebɛa watmaten-nni ara ț-yesɛun ț-țameṭṭut-is imi i ț-uɣen di sebɛa yid-sen ?
12.24: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Tɣelṭem ! Ur tefhimem tira iqedsen, ur tessinem tazmert n Ṛebbi.
12.25: Axaṭer ass n ḥeggu n lmegtin, irgazen ț-țlawin ur țemyezwaǧen ara, lameɛna ad ilin am lmalayekkat deg igenwan.
12.26: Ma d ayen yeɛnan ḥeggu n lmegtin, leɛmeṛ ur teɣṛim di tektabt n Musa, mi t-id-iluɛa Sidi Ṛebbi zdat udarnu ireqqen ? Yenna-yas-d : Nekk d Illu n Ibṛahim, d Illu n Isḥaq, d Illu n Yeɛqub.
12.27: Ihi Ṛebbi mačči d Illu n lmegtin i gella, lameɛna d Illu n wid yeddren. S tideț, atan tɣelṭem aṭas.
12.28: Yiwen n umusnaw n ccariɛa mi geẓra Sidna Ɛisa ijaweb akken ilaq, iqeṛṛeb ɣuṛ-es yenna-yas : Anwa i d lameṛ ameqqran di ccariɛa ?
12.29: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Atah lameṛ ameqqran : ?ess-ed ay agdud n Isṛail ! Sidi Ṛebbi-nneɣ d yiwen.
12.30: Ilaq aț-țḥemmleḍ Sidi Ṛebbi s wul-ik, s teṛwiḥt-ik akk, s wayen yellan di tezmert-ik akk-d lɛeqliya-k meṛṛa .
12.31: Atah wis sin : Ilaq aț-țḥemleḍ lɣiṛ-ik am yiman-ik. Ulac lameṛ yugaren wigi.
12.32: Lɛalem-nni yenna-yas : ?-țideț a Sidi ! Ayen i d-tenniḍ d ṣṣeḥ ; Ṛebbi d yiwen ulac wayeḍ.
12.33: Yerna ma nḥemmel-it s wul-nneɣ, s lɛeqliya-nneɣ, akk-d wayen yellan di țezmert-nneɣ meṛṛa, ma nḥemmel daɣen lɣiṛ-nneɣ am yiman-nneɣ, annect-agi axiṛ n iseflawen akk-d lewɛadi.
12.34: Sidna Ɛisa mi t-iwala ijaweb-ed s tmusni, yenna-yas : Ur tebɛideḍ ara ɣef tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi. Ulac win i s-d-yernan asteqsi nniḍen.
12.35: Mi gella Sidna Ɛisa yesselmad di lǧameɛ iqedsen yenna : Amek armi imusnawen n ccariɛa qqaṛen-d belli Lmasiḥ d mmi-s n Sidna Dawed ?
12.36: S Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i d-yenna Dawed s yiman-is : Sidi Ṛebbi yenna-d i Sidi : Qqim ɣer tama-w tayeffust alamma rriɣ iɛdawen-ik seddaw iḍaṛṛen-ik.
12.37: Dawed s yiman-is issawel-as « a Sidi », amek ihi yezmer ad yili d mmi-s ? Aṭas n lɣaci i s-yesmeḥsisen s lfeṛḥ.
12.38: Sidna Ɛisa yesselmad lɣaci yeqqaṛ-asen : ?adret daɣen iman-nwen ɣef yimusnawen n ccariɛa i gḥemmlen ad ḥewwsen s ijellaben iɣezfanen, ḥemmlen daɣen ad selmen fell-asen medden di leswaq ;
12.39: țextiṛin imukan imezwura di leǧwameɛ akk-d imukan lɛali di tmeɣṛiwin, lameɛna
12.40: tețțen ayla n tuǧǧal ; ssiɣzifen taẓallit iwakken a ten-id-walin yemdanen. Lɛiqab-nsen ad yili d ameqqran !
12.41: Sidna Ɛisa yella yeqqim deg umkan iqublen asenduq i deg srusun lewɛadi, yețmuqul amek srusuyen lɣaci lewɛadi-nsen. Aṭas n imeṛkantiyen yeggaren xiṛella n yedrimen.
12.42: Tusa-d yiwet n taǧǧalt tigellilt tessers sin iṣurdiyen yesɛan azal n ṛebɛa twiztin n lfeṭṭa.
12.43: Sidna Ɛisa yessawel i inelmaden-is, yenna yasen : A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : lweɛda i tessers taǧǧalt-agi taẓawalit, tugar akk lewɛadi i ssersen wiyaḍ.
12.44: Axaṭer wiyaḍ seddqen seg wayen sɛan d zzyada, ma d nețțat tseddeq ciṭṭuh-nni s wacu ara tɛic.

13.1: Mi d-iffeɣ Sidna Ɛisa si lǧameɛ iqedsen, yiwen seg inelmaden-is yenna-yas : A Sidi, muqel acḥal yecbeḥ lebni-agi ! Acḥal cebḥen yedɣaɣen-is !
13.2: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Deg wayagi irkul i tețwaliḍ, ur d-yețɣimi yiwen wedɣaɣ ɣef wayeḍ ; kullec ad ihudd.
13.3: Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim deg iɣil uzemmur iqublen lǧameɛ iqedsen. Buṭrus, Yeɛqub, Yuḥenna akk-d Andriyus i gellan yid-es, steqsan-t :
13.4: Ini-yaɣ-d melmi ara d-yedṛu wayagi ; d acu ara ɣ-d-isbeggnen lweqt i deg ara yedṛu wannect-a.
13.5: Imiren, Sidna Ɛisa yebda yețweṣṣi ten : ?uṛ-wat win ara kkun-ikellxen !
13.6: Axaṭer aṭas ara d-yasen s yisem-iw, a wen-d-inin : « D nekk i d Lmasiḥ » ad kellxen i waṭas n lɣaci.
13.7: M'ara teslem s tegrawliwin i d-ideṛṛun di mkul amkan akk-d țid i d-iteddun, ur țțaggadet ara axaṭer ilaq a d-yedṛu wannect-nni, lameɛna mačči ț-țaggara n ddunit i d-yewḍen.
13.8: Agdud a d-yekker ɣer wayeḍ, tageldit aț-țennaɣ ț-țayeḍ, a d-ilint zzelzlat di kra imukan, a d-yili laẓ ; akkagi ara d-yebdu leɛtab di ddunit.
13.9: ?adret ɣef yiman-nwen ; atan a kkun-caṛɛen zdat lɛulama n ccariɛa, a kkun-wten di leǧwameɛ. ?ef ddemma-w, a kkun-sbedden zdat wid i gḥekmen tamurt akk-d igelliden iwakken aț-țilim d inigan-iw zdat-nsen.
13.10: Lameɛna di tazwara ilaq lexbaṛ n lxiṛ ad ițwabecceṛ uqbel i leǧnas meṛṛa.
13.11: M'ara kkun-ẓẓuɣṛen a kkun awin ɣer ccṛeɛ, ur xeddmet ara anezgum ɣef wayen ara tinim ; init-ed kan ayen ara wen-d-yasen di teswiɛt-nni, axaṭer mačči d kunwi ara imeslayen lameɛna d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
13.12: Yiwen ad yefk gma-s ɣer lmut, wayeḍ ad yefk mmi-s ; dderya a d-kkren ɣer imawlan-nsen a ten-ssiwḍen ɣer lmut.
13.13: A kkun-keṛhen irkul ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw. Lameɛna win ara yeṭṭfen alamma ț-țaggara ad ițwasellek.
13.14: Ass m'ara twalim lmuṣiba tameqqrant tella deg umkan anda ur ilaq ara aț-țili, « win ara yeɣṛen ayagi ilaq ad imeyyez ! » ass-nni wid ara yilin di tmurt n Yahuda ad rewlen ɣer idurar ;
13.15: win ara yilin s ufella n ssqef, ur ikeččem ara ɣer wexxam-is iwakken a d-iddem leḥwayeǧ-is.
13.16: Akken daɣen win ara yilin di lexla, ur yețțuɣal ara ɣer deffir iwakken a d-yawi abeṛnus-is.
13.17: A tawaɣit n tilawin ara yilin s tadist akk-d țid ara yeṣṣuṭuḍen deg wussan-nni.
13.18: Dɛut ɣer Ṛebbi iwakken ur d-ideṛṛu ara wannect-nni di ccetwa,
13.19: axaṭer deg wussan-nni, ad yili yiwen n leɛtab ur neẓri seg wasmi i d-texleq ddunit ar ass-a, yerna d ayen ur nețțuɣal a d-yedṛu.
13.20: Lemmer ur yessenqes ara Sidi Ṛebbi kra seg wussan-nni, yiwen ur yezmir ad imneɛ. Meɛna issenqes seg-sen ɣef ddemma n wid yextaṛ.
13.21: Di lweqt-nni ma yenna-yawen walebɛaḍ : « Lmasiḥ atah dagi » neɣ «atan dihin», ur t-țțamnet ara.
13.22: Axaṭer a d-asen wid ara yerren iman-nsen d Lmasiḥ neɣ d lenbiya, ad xeddmen lbeṛhanat akk-d licaṛat, iwakken ad kellxen ma zemren ula d wid yextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
13.23: Atah nniɣ-awen-d annect-agi uqbel a d-yeḍru. --
13.24: M'ara ɛeddin wussan n twaɣit-nni, tafat n yiṭij aț-țenqes, aggur ur d-yețțak ara tiziri-ines,
13.25: itran daɣen a d-ɣlin seg igenni, t inezmarin n igenwan ad rgagint .
13.26: Imiren, ad anwali Mmi-s n bunadem yusa-d s ufella n usigna s tezmert tameqqrant d lɛaḍima.
13.27: A d-iceggeɛ lmalayekkat-is ɣer yal amkan n ddunit, a d-snejmaɛen seg yixfawen n ddunit wid i gextaṛ meṛṛa.
13.28: Meyyzet ihi ɣef lemtel n tmeɣṛust : mi lqaqit isegman-is, fsan, fkan-d iferrawen, teẓram iqeṛṛeb-ed unebdu.
13.29: Akken ula d kunwi, m'ara twalim ayagi meṛṛa yewweḍ-ed, ḥṣut belli yusa-d lweqt, Mmi-s n bunadem atan ɣer tewwurt.
13.30: A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : lǧil-agi ur ițɛeddi ara alamma yedṛa-d wayagi meṛṛa.
13.31: Igenni d lqaɛa ad fnun ma d imeslayen-iw ur fennun ara.
13.32: ?ef wayen yeɛnan ass akk-d lweqt-nni yiwen ur ten-yessin, ama d lmalayekkat deg igenwan ama d Mmi-s n bunadem, anagar Baba Ṛebbi i ten-isnen.
13.33: Ur gganet ara, ɛasset iman-nwen imi ur teẓrim ara melmi ara d-yaweḍ lweqt-nni.
13.34: Ad yili wass-nni am yiwen wergaz ara yinigen ɣer lebɛid, ad iwekkel axxam-is i iqeddacen-is, yal yiwen s ccɣel-is, imiren ad iweṣṣi aɛessas n tewwurt ad iɛiwez.
13.35: Ɛiwzet ihi, axaṭer ur teẓrim ara melmi ara d-yas bab n wexxam, ama tameddit neɣ țnaṣfa n yiḍ, m'ara yeskkuɛ uyaziḍ neɣ taṣebḥit.
13.36: ?adret a kkun-id-yaf teṭṭsem imi ur teẓrim ara melmi ara d-yas.
13.37: Ayen akka i wen-d-nniɣ, nniɣ t-id i mkul yiwen deg-wen : ɛiwzet !

14.1: Qqimen-d sin wussan i Tfaska n izimer n leslak i deg xeddmen aɣṛum mbla tamtunt ( iɣes ). Lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lɛulama, țnadin s tḥila, sebba s wayes ara ḥebbsen Sidna Ɛisa iwakken a t-nɣen.
14.2: Qqaṛen : Ur nezmir ara a t-nessekcem ɣer lḥebs deg wass n lɛid, neɣ m'ulac lɣaci ad sekkren ccwal.
14.3: Sidna Ɛisa yella di taddart n Bitanya, deg wexxam n Semɛun ihelken lbeṛs ; mi qqimen ad ččen, ațaya yiwet n tmeṭṭut tekcem-ed, tewwi-d yid-es taqbuct ițwaxedmen s wezṛu amellal, teččuṛ d leɛṭeṛ yeṣfan ɣlayen. Teṛẓa taqbuct-nni, tesmar-iț ɣef wuqeṛṛuy n Sidna Ɛisa.
14.4: Kra deg-sen zeɛfen nnan : Acuɣer i tessexṣeṛ leɛṭeṛ-agi ?
14.5: Lemmer i t-nezzenz, a d-yawi akteṛ n telt meyya twiztin n lfeṭṭa ara nefṛeq i igellilen ! Dɣa rfan ɣef tmeṭṭut-nni.
14.6: Sidna Ɛisa yenna : Anfet-as acimi i ț-tesnuɣnayem ? Ayen akka i yi-texdem d ayen yelhan !
14.7: Igellilen ad ilin daymen gar-awen, tzemrem a ten-tɛiwnem melmi i wen yehwa ; ma d nekkini ur țɣimiɣ ara daymen yid-wen.
14.8: Ayen tezmer a t-texdem texdem it : tedhen lǧețța-w thegga-ț i temḍelt.
14.9: A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : di mkul amkan n ddunit anda ara yețțubecceṛ lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ, a d-țmektayen tameṭṭut-agi d wayen akka texdem.
14.10: Yudas n Qeṛyut yiwen si tnac inelmaden, iṛuḥ ɣer imeqqranen n lmuqedmin, yemsefham yid-sen amek ara sen yezzenz Sidna Ɛisa.
14.11: Feṛḥen aṭas mi s-slan, ɛuhden-t a s-fken idrimen. Imiren Yudas ițqellib tagniț i deg ara sen-t-yezzenz.
14.12: Ass amenzu n Tfaska n weɣṛum mbla tamtunt ( iɣes ), i deg zellun izimer n leslak, inelmaden nnan i Sidna Ɛisa : Anda tebɣiḍ a nheggi imensi n Tfaska ?
14.13: Iceggeɛ sin seg inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet ɣer temdint, a d-temlilem d yiwen wergaz yewwi-d tacmuxt n waman, tebɛet-eț ɣer wanda ara yekcem,
14.14: init i bab n wexxam-nni : Ssid-nneɣ yenna-yak : « anda-ț texxamt i deg ara ččeɣ imensi n Tfaska n izimer nekk d inelmaden-iw ? »
14.15: A kkun-yessali ɣer yiwet n tɣuṛfeț tameqqrant iwesɛen, kullec yella deg-s. Dinna ara theggim imensi n Tfaska.
14.16: Inelmaden ṛuḥen, mi wwḍen ɣer temdint, ufan kullec akken i sen-t yenna. Dɣa heggan imensi n Tfaska.
14.17: Mi d-teɣli tmeddit, Sidna Ɛisa yusa-d akk-d tnac-nni inelmaden.
14.18: Mi qqimen ad ččen, Sidna Ɛisa yenna yasen : A wen-iniɣ tideț : yiwen seg-wen itețțen yid-i, ad iyi-ixdeɛ.
14.19: Yeɣli-d leḥzen fell-asen, bdan steqsayen-t yiwen yiwen qqaṛen-as : A Sidi, neɣ mačči d nekk ?
14.20: Yenna-yasen : D yiwen seg-wen, yessasnen yid-i talqimt n weɣṛum deg uḍebsi.
14.21: ?-țideț, Mmi-s n bunadem ad iṛuḥ akken yețwakteb fell-as di tira iqedsen ; meɛna a nnger n wergaz-nni ara t-ixedɛen. Axiṛ-as lemmer ur d-ilul ara ɣer ddunit !
14.22: Mi bdan tețțen, Sidna Ɛisa yeddem-d aɣṛum, yeḥmed Ṛebbi, yebḍa-t, ifṛeq-it i inelmaden-is, yenna yasen : ?čet-eț, ayagi d-lǧețța-w.
14.23: Yeddem-ed daɣen lkas n ccṛab, yeḥmed Ṛebbi, yefka-yasen, swan meṛṛa seg-s.
14.24: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Ayagi d idammen n leɛqed amaynut, d idammen-iw ara yazlen ɣef waṭas n yemdanen.
14.25: S tideț nniɣ-awen : ur țuɣaleɣ ara ad sweɣ si lfakya n tẓurin, alamma d ass i deg ara sweɣ ccṛab ajdid di tgelda n Ṛebbi.
14.26: Mi cnan isefra n ?abur, ulin ɣer yiɣil n uzemmur.
14.27: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : A kkun-yewwet akk wugur akken yețwakteb : Ad ewwteɣ ameksa, ulli ad rewlent ɣer mkul lǧiha .
14.28: Yerna-yasen-d : Meɛna m'ara d-ḥyuɣ si ger lmegtin a wen-zwireɣ ɣer tmurt n Jlili.
14.29: Buṭrus yenna-yas : ?as ad ccḍen akk, nekkini ur țeccḍeɣ ara.
14.30: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : A k-d-iniɣ tideț : iḍ-agi uqbel ad yeskkuɛ uyaziḍ snat n tikkal, kečč a i-tnekṛeḍ tlata iberdan.
14.31: Meɛna Buṭrus yenna-yas daɣen : Ad qebleɣ ad dduɣ yid-ek ula ɣer lmut wala a k-nekkṛeɣ. Inelmaden nniḍen nnan-d meṛṛa akken.
14.32: Mi wwḍen ɣer tmazirt n Jitsimani, Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen i inelmaden-is : Qqimet dagi, ma d nekk ad ṛuḥeɣ ad ẓalleɣ.
14.33: Yewwi yid-es Buṭrus, Yeɛqub akk-d Yuḥenna. Yetḥeyyeṛ, tekcem-it tugdi.
14.34: Yenna-yasen : ?usseɣ s leḥzen n lmut ; qqimet dagi, ɛiwzet !
14.35: Issebɛed iman-is fell-asen, iḍeggeṛ iman-is ɣer lqaɛa, yedɛa ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi ma yella wamek ara yessebɛed fell-as taswiɛt-nni n leɛtab.
14.36: Yeqqaṛ-as : A baba, a baba Ṛebbi ! Kečč tzemreḍ i kullec ; ssebɛed fell-i lkas-agi n leɛtab. Lameɛna d lebɣi-k kan ara yedṛun mačči d lebɣi-w.
14.37: Yuɣal-ed ɣer inelmaden-is, yufa-ten-id ṭṭsen. Yenna i Buṭrus : A Semɛun, teṭṭseḍ ? Ur tezmireḍ ara aț-țɛiwzeḍ ula d ssaɛa ?
14.38: Ɛiwzet tẓallem, iwakken ur tɣellim ara deg ujeṛṛeb. Ṛṛuḥ yeǧhed yerna yebɣa, meɛna lǧețța ur tezmir ara, tulwa.
14.39: Issebɛed iman-is daɣen, iɛawed i tẓallit-nni.
14.40: Mi d-yuɣal yufa-ten daɣen ṭsen, iɣleb-iten nuddam. Ur ẓrin d acu ara s-d-erren.
14.41: Yuɣal-ed tikkelt tis tlata yenna yasen : Mazal-ikkun teṭṭsem, testeɛfam ! Dayen tura, tewweḍ-ed teswiɛt-nni ! Mmi-s n bunadem ițusellem ger ifassen n imednuben.
14.42: Kkret fell awen a nṛuḥet ! Win i yi-izzenzen yewweḍ-ed.
14.43: Mazal-it iheddeṛ, mi d-yewweḍ Yudas, yiwen si tnac-nni. Ddan-d yid-es aṭas n lɣaci s iɛekkzan d ijenwiyen, ceggɛen-ten-id lɛulama n ccariɛa, imeqqranen n lmuqedmin akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud.
14.44: Win akken i gzenzen Sidna Ɛisa yemsefham yid-sen, yenna-yasen : Win i ɣef ara selmeɣ, d nețța ; ṭṭfet-eț tefkem-t i iɛessasen a t-awin.
14.45: Akken kan i d-yewweḍ, iqeṛṛeb ed ɣer Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : A Sidi ! Dɣa isellem fell-as.
14.46: Imiren lɣaci mmɣen ɣef Sidna Ɛisa, ṭṭfen-t.
14.47: Yiwen seg wid yellan dinna ijbed-ed ajenwi, yewwet aqeddac n lmuqeddem ameqqran, igzem-as ameẓẓuɣ.
14.48: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Teffɣem-d ɣuṛ-i s ijenwiyen d iɛekzan am akken d amcum i lliɣ ?
14.49: Mkul ass lliɣ yid-wen sselmadeɣ di lǧameɛ, yiwen ur yessers afus-is fell-i. Meɛna ayagi yedṛa-d, iwakken ad nnekmalent tira iqedsen.
14.51: Yiwen ilemẓi yelsan anagar timelḥeft itbeɛ-it. Emmɣen fell-as a t-ṭṭfen,
14.52: meɛna iserreḥ i tmelḥeft-nni, yerwel akken d aɛeryan.
14.53: Wwin Sidna Ɛisa ɣer wexxam n lmuqeddem ameqqran, anda nnejmaɛen imeqqranen n lmuqedmin, lɛulama n ccariɛa akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud.
14.54: Buṭrus itbeɛ-it s lebɛid, armi d azniq n wexxam n lmuqeddem ameqqran. Yeqqim ger iɛessasen, yesseḥmuy ɣer tmes.
14.55: Lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d tejmaɛt n ccṛeɛ, țnadin cchada iṣṣeḥan s wacu ara ḥekmen fell-as s lmut, lameɛna ur ufin ara.
14.56: Aṭas i gcehden fell-as s ẓẓur, lameɛna cchadat-nsen ur ṣṣeḥant ara.
14.57: Kra deg-sen kkren-d ad cehden fell-as s ẓẓur, nnan :
14.58: Nesla-yas mi d-yenna : « ad huddeɣ lǧameɛ-agi iqedsen yebnan s ufus n wemdan ; di tlata wussan, ad bnuɣ wayeḍ ur nețwabennuy ara s ufus n wemdan.»
14.59: Lameɛna ula ɣef wayagi cchadat nsen ur ṣṣeḥant ara.
14.60: Lmuqeddem ameqqran ibedd di tlemmast n tejmaɛt, yesteqsa Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ur d-tețțaraḍ ara awal ? Acu akka i d-qqaṛen yemdanen-agi i d-icehden fell-ak ?
14.61: Sidna Ɛisa yessusem ur d-yerri acemma. Ameqqran n lmuqedmin iɛawed isteqsa-t yenna-yas : Kečč, d Lmasiḥ Mmi-s n Ṛebbi yețțubarken ?
14.62: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : ?-țideț, d nekk ! Yerna aț-țeẓrem Mmi-s n bunadem yeqqim ɣer tama tayeffust n Bab n tezmert ; a t-twalim asmi ara d-yas seg igenwan ɣef wusigna.
14.63: Lmuqeddem ameqqran icerreg aqenduṛ-is yenna : Ur nuḥwaǧ ara inigan nniḍen !
14.64: Teslam akken yekfeṛ ? D acu twalam ? ?ekmen fell-as s lmut akken ma llan.
14.65: Kra seg-sen ssusufen-t, țɣummun-as udem-is, kkaten-t s lbunyat qqaṛen-as : Eɛqel anwa i k-id-yewten ! Iɛessasen-nni wwin-t, kkaten-t s ibeqqayen.
14.66: Buṭrus mazal-it deg ufrag n wexxam n lmuqeddem ameqqran ; ațaya yiwet n tqeddact,
14.67: twala-t yesseḥmay, tmuqel-it nezzeh, tenna yas : Ula d kečč telliḍ akk-d Ɛisa anaṣari.
14.68: Inkeṛ yenna : Ur ẓriɣ, ur fhimeɣ ayen i d-teqqaṛeḍ. Dɣa yeffeɣ, iṛuḥ ɣer wesqif. Imiren kan yeskkuɛ uyaziḍ .
14.69: Twala-t daɣen tqeddact-nni, tenna i wid yellan dinna : Argaz-agi d yiwen seg-sen ! Yenkeṛ tikkelt tis snat.
14.70: Taswiɛt kan, wid yellan dinna nnan daɣen i Buṭrus : Mbla ccekk ula d kečč telliḍ seg-sen, axaṭer d ajlili i telliḍ.
14.71: Yebda yețgalla yeqqaṛ : A yi-inɛel Ṛebbi ma skaddbeɣ ! Ur ssineɣ ara argaz-agi i ɣef tețmeslayem.
14.72: Imiren kan yeskkuɛ uyaziḍ tikkelt tis snat, imiren Buṭrus yemmekta-d awal i s-d-yenna Sidna Ɛisa : « uqbel ad yeskuɛ uyaziḍ tikkelt tis snat, a yi-tnekkṛeḍ tlata iberdan. » Dɣa yeṭṭerḍeq d imeṭṭawen.

15.1: ?ṣbeḥ zik, lmuqedmin imeqqranen ruḥen mcawaṛen akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud, lɛulama n ccariɛa akk dusqamu n ccṛeɛ. Urzen Sidna Ɛisa, wwin-t sellmen-t i Bilaṭus.
15.2: Bilaṭus yesteqsa-t yenna yas : D kečč i d agellid n wat Isṛail ? Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Tenniḍ-t-id.
15.3: Lmuqedmin imeqqranen ccetkan fell-as ɣef waṭas n temsalin.
15.4: Bilaṭus yerna yesteqsa-t : Ur d-tețțaraḍ ara awal ? Ur tesliḍ ara ayen akk s wayes i d-țcetkin fell-ak ?
15.5: Meɛna Sidna Ɛisa ur d-yerri acemma ; Bilaṭus yewhem deg-s.
15.6: Di mkul lɛid, Bilaṭus ițserriḥ-ed i yiwen umeḥbus, win ara s-ssutren lɣaci.
15.7: Yella yiwen umeḥbus isem-is Barabas, yețwaḥbes nețța akk-d imcewwlen nniḍen ɣef ddemma n ccwal i d-yeskker, yerna yenɣa tamgeṛṭ.
15.8: Lɣaci ulin ɣer Bilaṭus iwakken a s-ssutren ayen yennum ixeddem-asen-t.
15.9: Bilaṭus yerra-yasen-d : Tebɣam a wen-d-serrḥeɣ i ugellid n wat Isṛail ?
15.10: Axaṭer ifaq belli s tismin i s-t-id-wwin lmuqedmin imeqqranen.
15.11: Lameɛna lmuqedmin imeqqranen sḥeṛcen lɣaci iwakken ad inin i Bilaṭus: « d Barabas iwumi ara d-tserrḥeḍ. »
15.12: Bilaṭus yenna-yasen daɣen : D acu tebɣam ad xedmeɣ s win iwumi teqqaṛem agellid n wat Isṛail ?
15.14: Bilaṭus yenna-yasen : D acu i gexdem n diri ? Rnan țɛeggiḍen akteṛ : ?emmeṛ-it ɣef wumidag !
15.15: Imi i gebɣa Bilaṭus ad yeddu di lebɣi i lɣaci, iserreḥ-ed i Barabas, ma d Sidna Ɛisa yefka lameṛ a t-ewten s ujelkkaḍ, syenna a t-semmṛen ɣef wumidag.
15.16: Lɛeskeṛ wwin Sidna Ɛisa ɣer wefrag n lbeṛj, ssawlen-d i terbaɛt nsen.
15.17: Sburren-as abeṛnus azeggaɣ, xedmen-d taɛeṣṣabt s isennanen ssersen-ț ɣef wuqeṛṛuy-is.
15.18: Stehzayen fell-as qqaṛen-as : Azul fell-ak, ay agellid n wat Isṛail !
15.19: Kkaten-t s uɣanim ɣer uqeṛṛuy, ssusufen-t, kerfen tigecrar iwakken ad seǧǧden zdat-es.
15.20: Mi stehzan fell-as, kksen-as abeṛnus-nni azeggaɣ, rran-as lqecc-is, imiren wwin-t ɣer beṛṛa iwakken a t-ṣemmṛen ɣef lluḥ.
15.21: Iɛedda-d syenna yiwen umsebrid i d-yuɣalen si lexla, isem-is Semɛun n Qiṛwan, baba-s n Alexandrus akk-d Rufus ; ḥeṛsen-t lɛeskeṛ iwakken ad ibbib amidag n Sidna Ɛisa.
15.22: ?ẓuɣṛen Sidna Ɛisa armi d yiwen n wemkan ițțusemman Gulguṭa, yeɛni « tiɣilt n uqeṛṛuy.»
15.23: Fkan-as ad isew ccṛab ixelḍen s uselɣaɣ n lmuṛ, lameɛna yugi a t-isew.
15.24: Semmṛen-t ɣef lluḥ, gren tasɣaṛt iwakken ad feṛqen llebsa-s.
15.25: Aț-țili d țesɛa n ṣṣbeḥ mi t-ṣemmṛen ɣef wumidag.
15.26: Uran sebba ɣef wacu i t-semmṛen : « Wagi d agellid n wat Isṛail.»
15.27: Semmṛen daɣen sin yemcumen, yiwen ɣer uyeffus-is wayeḍ ɣer uẓelmaḍ-is.
15.28: S wakka, yețwakemmel wayen yuran di tira iqedsen : Seddan-t di lehṣab n yemcumen.
15.29: Kra n wid yețɛeddayen syenna reggmen-t, țhuzzun iqeṛṛay-nsen, qqaṛen-as : Hey ! a win yețhuddun lǧameɛ iqedsen, ibennu-t di tlata wussan,
15.30: sellek iman-ik ! ers-ed seg umidag- ik !
15.31: Ula d imeqqranen n lmuqedmin d lɛulama n ccariɛa țaḍsan fell-as, qqaṛen gar-asen : Isellek wiyaḍ, ur yezmir ad isellek iman-is.
15.32: A d-iṣubb ihi tura seg umidag, Lmasiḥ... Agellid n wat Isṛail ! A nwali iwakken a namen. Ula d wid ițțuṣemmṛen yid-es reggmen-t.
15.33: Aț-țili d leǧwahi n tnac mi d yeɣli ṭṭlam ɣef ddunit meṛṛa, armi d tlata n tmeddit.
15.34: ?ef tlata n tmeddit, Sidna Ɛisa iɛeggeḍ s ṣṣut ɛlayen : Eluwa, Eluwa, Lama sabaqtani ? Yeɛni : Illu-iw ! Illu-iw ! acuɣer i yi teǧǧiḍ ?
15.35: Kra seg wid yellan dinna slan-as, nnan : Slet-as, atan yessawal i Sidna Ilyas !
15.36: Yiwen seg-sen iṛuḥ yesselxes-ed ameččim n taḍuṭ di lxell, icudd-it ɣer tɣanimt, imekken-as-t iwakken ad isew, yenna : Aṛǧut a nwali ma yella a d-yas Sidna Ilyas a t-id-iṣṣub seg umidag !
15.37: Meɛna Sidna Ɛisa iɛeggeḍ imiren kan, dɣa yessufeɣ taṛwiḥt.
15.38: Leḥjab n wemkan iqedsen n lǧameɛ, icerreg ɣef sin seg yixef ufella, armi d ixef n wadda.
15.39: Yiwen umeqqran n lɛeskeṛ ibedd zdat Sidna Ɛisa ; mi gwala amek i gessufeɣ taṛwiḥt, yenna : ?-țideț, argaz-agi d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi !
15.40: Kra tilawin țmuqulent si lebɛid. Llant gar-asent Meryem tamagdalit, Meryem yemma-s n Yeɛqub ameẓyan, n Yuses akk-d Salumi.
15.41: Llant daɣen tilawin-nni meṛṛa i t-ittabaɛen, i s-iqeddcen mi gella di tmurt n Jlili akk-d waṭas n tilawin nniḍen i d-yeddan yid-es ɣer temdint n Lquds.
15.42: Mi d-teɣli tmeddit, yewweḍ-ed Yusef n temdint n Arimati, yellan d argaz mucaɛen aṭas di tejmaɛt n ccṛeɛ ; ula d nețța yessaram a d-tass tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi.
15.43: ?-țameddit n wass i deg țheggin iman-nsen i wass n westeɛfu, daymi Yusef ur ikukra ara ad iṛuḥ ɣer Bilaṭus iwakken ad issuter lǧețța n Sidna Ɛisa.
15.44: Mi gesla s Sidna Ɛisa yemmut, Bilaṭus yewhem. Yessawel i umeqqran n meyya iɛsekṛiwen, isteqsa-t ma yella aṭas aya segmi yemmut.
15.45: Mi s-d-yerra lexbaṛ, Bilaṭus iserreḥ-as i Yusef ad yawi lǧețța n Sidna Ɛisa.
15.46: Yusef iṛuḥ yuɣ-ed lekfen, iṣubb-ed lǧețța n Sidna Ɛisa, ikfen-it, yewwi-t issers-it deg yiwen uẓekka yeɣzan deg wezṛu am lɣaṛ, imiren yessegrareb azṛu ɣef yimi uẓekka-nni.
15.47: Meryem tamagdalit d Meryem yemma-s n Yeɛqub, țmuqulent iwakken ad ẓren-t anda i t-ssersen.

16.1: Mi gɛedda wass n westeɛfu, Meryem tamagdalit d Meryem yemma-s n Yeɛqub d Salumi uɣent-ed leɛṭeṛ iwakken ad dehnent lǧețța n Sidna Ɛisa.
16.2: Ass amezwaru n dduṛt, ṣṣbeḥ zik mi d-yecṛeq yiṭij, ṛuḥent ɣer uẓekka.
16.3: Qqaṛent wway gar-asent : Anwa ara ɣ-yekksen azṛu-nni ɣef yimi uẓekka ?
16.4: Mi refdent allen-nsent, walant azṛu-nni ameqqran yegrareb akkin.
16.5: Kecment ɣer daxel uẓekka , walant yiwen ilemẓi yeqqim ɣer lǧiha tayeffust, yelsa llebsa tamellalt ; dehcent.
16.6: Yenna-yasent : Ur xellɛemt ara ! Tețnadimt ɣef Ɛisa anaṣari win yețwasemmṛen ɣef wumidag ? Ulac-it dagi, yeḥya-d si ger lmegtin. Muqlemt, atan wemkan anda i t-ssersen.
16.7: Ṛuḥemt tura, inimt-asen i inelmaden-is akk-d Buṭrus : atan yezwar ɣer tmurt n Jlili ; dinna ara t-teẓrem akken i wen-t-yenna.
16.8: Ffɣent-ed seg uẓekka-nni, rewlent s tergagit d lxelɛa, iffeɣ-itent leɛqel, daymi ur ɛawdent i yiwen ayen yedṛan.
16.9: Sidna Ɛisa yeḥya-d si ger lmegtin ass amezwaru n dduṛt, ass i d-yernan ɣef wass n westeɛfu. Di tazwara isbeggen-ed iman-is i Meryem tamagdalit, seg i d-issufeɣ sebɛa n leǧnun.
16.10: Wid akk iteddun d Sidna Ɛisa, mazal-iten di leḥzen d imeṭṭawen, mi d-tewwi Meryem lexbaṛ i inelmaden.
16.11: Mi slan yis yeḥya-d si ger lmegtin yerna twala-t, ur ț-uminen ara.
16.12: Yesbeggen-ed iman-is s ṣṣifa nniḍen, i sin seg inelmaden iteddun ɣer lexla.
16.13: Uɣalen-d xebbṛen inelmaden nniḍen, lameɛna ula d nutni ur ten uminen ara.
16.14: Yesbeggen-ed iman-is i ḥdac-nni inelmaden mi llan tețțen. Ilumm-iten ɣef lqella n liman-nsen d wulawen nsen yeqquṛen, imi ur uminen ara wid akk i t-yeẓran yeḥya-d.
16.15: Dɣa yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet beccṛet di ddunit meṛṛa, lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i yemdanen di mkul amkan.
16.16: Win ara yamnen, ara yețwaɣeḍsen, ad ițțusellek ; ma d win ur nețțamen ara, ur yețwasellak ara.
16.17: Atnah lbeṛhanat ara xeddmen wid yețțamnen yis-i : S yisem-iw ad ssufuɣen leǧnun, ad heddṛen timeslayin nniḍen,
16.18: ɣas ṭṭfen izerman neɣ swan ssem, ur sen-ixeddem acemma ; ad srusun ifassen-nsen ɣef yimuḍan a ten sseḥlun.
16.19: Mi gekfa yid-sen ameslay, Sidna Ɛisa yețwarfed ɣer igenni, yeqqim ɣer uyeffus n Sidi Ṛebbi.
16.20: Inelmaden ṛuḥen ad beccṛen di mkul amkan ; Sidi Ṛebbi yețțili yid sen, yețbeggin-ed s waṭas lbeṛhanat, tideț n wayen țbecciṛen.

1.1: Imi aṭas i gebdan tira ɣef wayen yedṛan gar-aneɣ,
1.2: akken i ɣ-t-id ɛawden wid yellan d inigan si tazwara, iwalan kullec s wallen-nsen ; uɣalen d iqeddacen n wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
1.3: Steqsaɣ ula d nekk akken ilaq ɣef wayen akk yedṛan seg wass amezwaru, ufiɣ d ayen yelhan a k-t-id aruɣ a Tawfilus,
1.4: iwakken aț-țissineḍ tideț ɣef wayen i tesliḍ meṛṛa.
1.5: Di zzman n Hiṛudus, agellid n tmurt n Yahuda, yella yiwen n lmuqeddem si tejmaɛt n Abya, isem-is Zakarya. Tameṭṭut-is Ilicaba, seg izuṛan n Haṛun.
1.6: D iḥeqqiyen i llan i sin, ḥerzen yerna ḍuɛen awal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
1.7: Ur sɛin ara dderya, meqqṛit i sin di leɛmeṛ yerna Ilicaba ț-țiɛiqeṛt.
1.8: Mi d-tewweḍ nnuba n leqdic n wedrum n Zakarya di lǧameɛ iqedsen
1.9: akken i tella di lɛadda n lmuqedmin, gren tasɣaṛt, tṣaḥ-ed Zakarya iwakken ad ikcem ɣer wemkan iqedsen ad isseṛɣ lebxuṛ.
1.10: Mi gella isseṛɣay lebxuṛ di lǧameɛ, lɣaci meṛṛa yeqqimen di beṛṛa deɛɛun ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
1.11: Iḍheṛ-as-d yiwen lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi, ibedd ɣer tama tayeffust n udekkan-nni anda sseṛɣayen lebxuṛ.
1.12: Mi t-iwala Zakarya, yedhec ikcem-it lxuf.
1.13: Lmelk-nni yenna yas -ed : Ur țțagad ara a Zakarya, ayen i tessutreḍ ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi yețwaqbel. Tameṭṭut-ik Ilicaba ad a k-d-tesɛu aqcic, a s-tsemmiḍ Yeḥya.
1.14: Aț-țfeṛḥeḍ yis, a k-yili d sebba n sseɛd ; imdanen meṛṛa ad feṛḥen s tlalit-is.
1.15: Ad yesɛu ccan d ameqqran ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, a d-iččaṛ d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen si tɛebbuṭ n yemma-s, ur itess ccṛab, ur itess ayen nniḍen isekkṛen.
1.16: A d-yerr aṭas n wat Isṛail ɣer webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi.
1.17: Ad ilḥu s leɛnaya n Sidi Ṛebbi, s ṛṛuḥ ț-țezmert n nnbi Ilyas. Ad issemlil imawlan d warraw-nsen, a d-yerr wid ijehlen ɣer webrid n iḥeqqiyen, akken ad iheggi i Sidi Ṛebbi agdud ara t-iḍuɛen.
1.18: Zakarya yenna i lmelk : Amek ara ɛeqleɣ belli ayen akka i d-tenniḍ ț-țideț ? Nekk d amɣaṛ, ula ț-țameṭṭut-iw meqqṛet di leɛmeṛ !
1.19: Lmelk-nni yerra-yas-d : Nekk d Jebrayil, d aqeddac n Sidi Ṛebbi ; usiɣ-ed s ɣuṛ-es iwakken a k-d-awiɣ lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ.
1.20: Lameɛna imi ur tumineḍ ara s yimeslayen-iw atan aț-țeggugmeḍ, ur d-ițeffeɣ ara wawal seg yimi-k alamma d asmi ara d-yedṛu wannect-agi. Meɛna ḥṣu belli ayen akka i k-d-nniɣ ad yedṛu deg wass-is.
1.21: Lɣaci-nni yețṛaǧun Zakarya deg ufrag, wehmen acuɣeṛ iɛeṭṭel deg umkan iqedsen n lǧameɛ.
1.22: Mi d-iffeɣ, yeggugem, ur izmir ara a d-yessufeɣ awal ; lɣaci-nni fehmen belli iweḥḥa-yas-ed kra Sidi Ṛebbi. Yebda ițwehhi-yasen-d s ifassen-is, yeqqim d agugam.
1.23: Mi kfan wussan n lxedma-s di lǧameɛ, Zakarya yuɣal ɣer wexxam-is.
1.24: Ɛeddan kra n wussan, tameṭṭut-is Ilicaba terfed tadist ; dɣa tesseḥjeb iman-is xemsa wagguren, teqqaṛ :
1.25: Atan Sidi Ṛebbi yerra-d ddehn-is ɣuṛ-i, ikkes-iyi lɛib zdat yemdanen.
1.26: Aggur wis sețța, Sidi Ṛebbi iceggeɛ-d lmelk Jebrayil ɣer taddart n Naṣaret, di tmurt n Jlili.
1.27: Iceggeɛ-it-id ɣer yiwet n tlemẓit i gexḍeb yiwen wergaz isem-is Yusef, yellan seg izuṛan n Sidna Dawed. Tilemẓit-agi isem-is Meryem.
1.28: Ikcem lmelk ɣuṛ-es yenna-yas : Sslam fell-am a tin iburek Sidi Ṛebbi ! Sidi Ṛebbi yella yid-em.
1.29: Meryem tedhec, tenna : D acu i d lmeɛna n imeslayen agi ?
1.30: Lmelk yenna-yas : Ur țțaggad ara a Meryem ! S ṛṛeḥma-s tameqqrant, Sidi Ṛebbi yextaṛ-ikem.
1.31: Atan aț-țrefdeḍ tadist, a d-tesɛuḍ aqcic, semmi-yas Ɛisa, (yeɛni : « Amsellek »)
1.32: Ad yesɛu ccan d ameqqran, ad ițțusemmi Mmi-s n Sidi Ṛebbi ɛlayen. Sidi Ṛebbi a t-yerr d agellid akken i t-yella Sidna Dawed, yiwen si lejdud-is.
1.33: Ad iḥkem ɣef tarwa n Yeɛqub i dayem, tageldit-is ur tfennu ara.
1.34: Meryem tenna i lmelk-nni : Amek ara d-idṛu yid-i wayagi nekk ur nezwiǧ ara ?
1.35: Lmelk yerra-yas : Atan a d-yers fell-am Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ; tazmert n Sidi Ṛebbi ɛlayen a kem-tɣumm am tili, daymi aqcic-agi imqeddes ara d-ilalen ad ițțsemmi « Mmi-s n Ṛebbi ».
1.36: Ilicaba i m-ițțilin, ula d nețțat ațan s tadist a d-tesɛu aqcic ɣas akken meqqṛet di leɛmeṛ. Tin akken iwumi semman tiɛiqeṛt, ațan deg waggur wis sețța,
1.37: imi ulac wayen iwumi ur izmir Sidi Ṛebbi.
1.38: Meryem tenna : Aql-i ț-țaqeddact n Sidi Ṛebbi, ad idṛu yid-i wayen i d-tenniḍ. Imiren Lmelk-nni yeǧǧa-ț, iṛuḥ.
1.39: Deg wussan-nni, Meryem tekker tṛuḥ s lemɣawla ɣer yiwet n taddart yellan deg idurar n tmurt n Yahuda.
1.40: Tekcem ɣer wexxam n Zakarya, tsellem ɣef Ilicaba.
1.41: Akken i tesla Ilicaba i sslam n Meryem, yefrawes llufan yellan di tɛebbuṭ-is ; imiren teččuṛ d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen,
1.42: tɛeggeḍ tenna : A Meryem, tețțubarkeḍ ger tilawin meṛṛa, ițțubarek daɣen win yellan di tɛebbuṭ-im.
1.43: D acu-yi, iwakken a d-terzef ɣuṛ-i yemma-s n Ssid-iw ?
1.44: Akken kan i sliɣ i sslam-im, llufan yellan di tɛebbuṭ-iw yefrawes s lfeṛḥ.
1.45: ?-țaseɛdit kemm yumnen s wayen i m-d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi !
1.46: Meryem tenna : Taṛwiḥt-iw teḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi,
1.47: ul-iw yeččuṛ d lfeṛḥ imi d nețța i d amsellek-iw,
1.48: axaṭer iwala-yi-d nekk taqeddact-is tameɣbunt ur nesɛi azal. Sya d asawen si lǧil ɣer lǧil a yi-qqaṛen : « ț-țaseɛdit »,
1.49: imi Sidi Ṛebbi Bab n tezmert, yexdem yis-i ayen issewhamen. Isem-is d imqeddes.
1.50: Ṛṛeḥma-s tețdum si lǧil ɣer lǧil ɣef wid akk i t-iḍuɛen.
1.51: Isken-ed tazmert n yiɣil-is, isseɛṛeq iberdan i wid yețzuxxun ;
1.52: yessers-ed imeqqranen seg imukan eɛlayen, yerfed wid yețwaḥeqṛen ;
1.53: yesseṛwa-yasen leṛẓaq i wid yelluẓen, ma d imeṛkantiyen yerra-ten ifassen d ilmawen.
1.54: Isellek tarwa n wat Isṛail yellan d iqeddacen-is, ur ițțu ara Ṛṛeḥma-s,
1.55: i gewɛed i Sidna Ibṛahim d warraw-is i dayem akken i t-yenna i lejdud-nneɣ.
1.56: Meryem teqqim ɣer Ilicaba azal n tlata wagguren d wamek i tuɣal ɣer taddart-is.
1.57: Yewweḍ-ed lweqt i deg ara d-tarew Ilicaba, tesɛa-d aqcic.
1.58: Imawlan-is d lǧiran-is feṛḥen aṭas mi slan s ṛṛehma i d-issers fell-as Sidi Ṛebbi.
1.59: Mi wwḍen tmanya n wussan ɣef weqcic-nni, usan-d a s-sḍehṛen, bɣan a s-semmin s yisem n baba-s : Zakarya.
1.60: Dɣa tenṭeq-ed yemma-s tenna-yasen : Xaṭi ! A s-nsemmi Yeḥya !
1.61: Nnan-as : Ula d yiwen deg wedrum-nwen ur yesɛi isem-agi.
1.62: Steqsan baba-s s uwehhi amek yebɣa ad isemmi i mmi-s.
1.63: Issuter asen-d talwiḥt, yura-yasen-d deg-s : « Yeḥya i d isem-is ». Dɣa wehmen meṛṛa.
1.64: Imiren kan iserreḥ yiles-is, yebda iheddeṛ, yețḥemmid Ṛebbi ițcekkiṛ-it.
1.65: Imezdaɣ n lǧiha-nni meṛṛa wehmen, tɛeǧǧben. Deg idurar n tmurt n Yahuda țmeslayen akk ɣef wayen yedṛan.
1.66: Wid akk yeslan imeslayen-nni, ḥerzen-ten deg wulawen-nsen, qqaṛen : d acu ara d-iffeɣ weqcic-agi ? Axaṭer s tideț afus n Sidi Ṛebbi yella fell-as.
1.67: Zakarya, baba-s n weqcic-nni, iččuṛ d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, icar-ed s imeslayen-agi :
1.68: Ad ițțubarek Sidi Ṛebbi, Illu n wat Isṛail imi d-yerra ddehn-is ɣer wegdud-is iwakken a t-isellek.
1.69: Yefka-yaɣ-d yiwen wemsellek d ameqqran seg izuṛan n Sidna Dawed aqeddac-is,
1.70: am akken i t-id-ixebbeṛ Sidi Ṛebbi si zzman iɛeddan, seg yimi n lenbiya iqedsen :
1.71: Ad yili d amsellek ara ɣ-imenɛen seg yiɛdawen-nneɣ, si ger ifassen n wid akk i ɣ-ikeṛhen.
1.72: Isbeggen ṛṛeḥma-s i lejdud-nneɣ, yemmekta-d lemɛahda-s iqedsen
1.73: i gefka i jeddi-tneɣ Sidna Ibṛahim.
1.74: M'ara nețțusellek seg ufus n yeɛdawen-nneɣ, a neɛbed Sidi Ṛebbi mbla lxuf,
1.75: s lḥeqq, s ṭṭaɛa d wannuz deg wussan n ddunit-nneɣ meṛṛa.
1.76: Ma d kečč a mmi, aț-țețțusemmiḍ d nnbi n Sidi Ṛebbi eɛlayen axaṭer aț-țedduḍ zdat-es iwakken aț-țheggiḍ iberdan-is,
1.77: aț-țesfehmeḍ agdud-is ɣef leslak n Sidi Ṛebbi s leɛfu n ddnubat-nsen.
1.78: Axaṭer Ṛebbi-nneɣ d aḥnin, s Ṛṛeḥma-ines a d-icṛeq fell-aɣ tafat-is am tin n yiṭij seg yigenwan.
1.79: Tafat-is a d-tecṛeq ɣef wid yellan di ṭṭlam n lmut, ad aɣ-yawi deg webrid n lehna.
1.80: Aqcic-nni ițțimɣuṛ yețnerni di leɛqel. Iɛac deg unezṛuf armi d ass i deg i d-ibeggen iman-is i wat Isṛail.

2.1: Deg ussan-nni, yeffeɣ-ed yiwen n lqanun s ɣuṛ Qayṣeṛ ameqqran ; yefka lameṛ ad țțujerrden imezdaɣ meṛṛa yellan di tmura-ines.
2.2: Ajerred-agi amezwaru yedṛa asmi yella Kirinyus d lḥakem n tmurt n Surya.
2.3: Imdanen meṛṛa ṛuḥen ad țțujerden mkul yiwen di taddart n lejdud-is.
2.4: Yusef yellan seg izuṛan n Sidna Dawed, yuli ula d nețța si taddart n Naṣaret n tmurt n Jlili ɣer Bitelḥem, taddart n lejdud-is yellan di tmurt n Yahuda.
2.5: Iṛuḥ ad ițțujerred nețța ț-țxedibt-is Meryem yellan s tadist.
2.6: Mi ten-yuɣ lḥal dinna, yewweḍ-d lweqt i deg ara terbu ( tarew ) Meryem.
2.7: Tesɛa-d mmi-s amenzu, tețțel-it, tessegen-it di lmedwed, imi ur ufin ara amkan deg wexxam n yemsafren.
2.8: Di tmurt-nni, llan imeksawen ițnusun di lexlawi, țɛassan lmal-nsen deg yiḍ.
2.9: Ataya lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi iḍheṛ-asen-d, tamanegt n Sidi Ṛebbi tecceɛceɛ tezzi-yasen-d, ikcem-iten lxuf d ameqqran.
2.10: Lmelk yenna-yasen : Ur țțagadet ! Aql-i wwiɣ-awen-d lexbaṛ lxiṛ ara isfeṛḥen wugdud meṛṛa.
2.11: Ass-agi di taddart n Sidna Dawed, ilul-awen-d yiwen wemsellek, d nețța i d Lmasiḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi !
2.12: Atan wamek ara t-tɛeqlem : aț-țafem llufan yețțel, yeṭṭes di lmedwed.
2.13: Imiren kan, ț-țirebbaɛ n lmalayekkat i d-yernan ɣer lmelk nni, cennunt țḥemmident Sidi Ṛebbi, qqaṛent :
2.14: Lḥemd i Sidi Ṛebbi deg imukan eɛlayen, lehna di ddunit ɣef yemdanen eɛzizen fell-as.
2.15: Akken uɣalent lmalayekkat-nni ɣer yigenni, imeksawen nnan wway gar-asen : Kkret a nṛuḥet ɣer Bitelḥem, a nẓer ayen i gedṛan, d wayen akka s wayes i ɣ-d-ixebbeṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
2.16: Imiren kan ṛuḥen, ufan dinna Meryem d Yusef akk-d llufan-nni yeṭṭes di lmedwed.
2.17: Mi walan aqcic-nni, ḥkan-d wayen i sen-d-yenna lmelk fell-as.
2.18: Wid akk yeslan s wayen i d-ḥkan imeksawen-nni, dehcen.
2.19: Meryem teḥrez imeslayen-nni deg wul-is, tețxemmim fell-asen.
2.20: Mi uɣalen imeksawen-nni, țḥemmiden țcekkiṛen Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef wayen slan d wayen ẓran, imi ufan kullec akken i sen-d-ițțuxebbeṛ.
2.21: Yewweḍ-ed wass wis tmanya i deg ara s-sḍehṛen i weqcic-nni ; semman-as Ɛisa, isem-nni i s-yefka lmelk uqbel ad yili di tɛebbuṭ n yemma-s.
2.22: Asmi wwḍen ṛebɛin wussan ɣef tlalit n weqcic-nni, Yusef d Meryem wwin-t ɣer temdint n Lquds iwakken ad ițțuqeddem i Sidi Ṛebbi,
2.23: akken yura di ccariɛa n Sidna Musa : yal aqcic amenzu, ilaq ad ițțuqeddem i Sidi Ṛebbi.
2.24: Yerna ṛuḥen iwakken ad fken d asfel snat n tmilliwin neɣ sin yetbiren imeẓyanen akken yella di ccariɛa n Sidna Musa.
2.25: Di temdint n Lquds yella yiwen wergaz isem-is Semɛun. Argaz-agi d aḥeqqi, iḍuɛ Sidi Ṛebbi, yețṛaǧu amsellek n wat Isṛail, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yețțili yid-es.
2.26: Iweḥḥa-yas-ed belli ur ițmețțat ara alamma yeẓra Lmasiḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi.
2.27: Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi iwelleh Semɛun ad iṛuḥ ɣer lǧameɛ iqedsen.Atnaya kecmen-d Yusef d Meryem, wwin-d llufan-nni iwakken ad xedmen wayen i d-tenna ccariɛa n Musa fell-as.
2.28: Semɛun yeṭṭef aqcic-nni ger ifassen-is, iḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi yenna :
2.29: Tura a Sidi Ṛebbi ɣas ad mmteɣ aql-i di lehna imi amsellek i ɣ-tweɛdeḍ,
2.31: win akken i theggaḍ i leǧnas meṛṛa,
2.32: d nețța ara yessalin ccan n wat Isṛail agdud-ik, ara yilin ț-țafat ara d-icceɛceɛen ula ɣef leǧnas nniḍen.
2.33: Baba-s d yemma-s n weqcic-nni tɛeǧǧben ɣef wayen i d-qqaṛen fell-as.
2.34: Semɛun iburek-iten, yenna i Meryem, yemma-s n weqcic-nni : Atan weqcic-agi ad yili i kra seg wat Isṛail d sebba n tuccḍa, ma d wiyaḍ a ten-id-yerr ɣer webrid. ?ef ddemma-s ara yili lxilaf ger yemdanen ;
2.35: s wakka ara d-banen ixemmimen n diri deg wulawen, ma d kemm aț-țejreḥ tasa-m, am akken tețwet s ujenwi.
2.36: Tella daɣen yiwet n tmeṭṭut isem-is ?anna, meqqṛet di leɛmeṛ, ula d nețțat si lenbiya, d yelli-s n Fanwil n wedrum n Azir. Seg wasmi i tedda ț-țislit, tɛac d wergaz is sebɛa n yiseggasen
2.37: dɣa teǧǧel. Di leɛmeṛ-is ṛebɛa utmanyin n yiseggasen. Am yiḍ am ass ur teṭṭixiṛ si lǧameɛ iqedsen, tɛebbed Sidi Ṛebbi, tețțuẓum, tețẓalla.
2.38: Ula d nețțat tewweḍ-ed di teswiɛt-nni, teḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi, theddeṛ ɣef weqcic-nni i wid akk yețṛaǧun leslak n temdint n Lquds.
2.39: Mi fukken imawlan n Ɛisa ayen akk i d-tenna ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi, uɣalen ɣer taddart-nsen Naṣaret yellan di tmurt n Jlili.
2.40: Aqcic-nni yețțimɣuṛ yețnerni di tmusni, lbaṛaka n Sidi Ṛebbi tella fell-as.
2.41: Imawlan n Sidna Ɛisa țṛuḥun mkul aseggas ɣer temdint n Lquds iwakken ad sɛeddin Tafaska n izimer n leslak.
2.42: Asmi yesɛa Ɛisa tnac yiseggasen, yedda akk-d imawlan-is ɣer temdint n Lquds, akken tella di lɛadda n lɛid.
2.43: Mi tɛedda Tafaska, lɣaci țțuɣalen ɣer yexxamen-nsen, ma d Ɛisa yeqqim di temdint Lquds, imawlan-is ur d-wwin ara s lexbaṛ,
2.44: ɣilen yedda-d ț-țerbaɛt nniḍen. Lḥan ass kamel dɣa bdan țqelliben fell-as. Steqsan wid akk i sen-yețțilin d wid meṛṛa ssnen,
2.45: lameɛna ur t-ufin ara. Uɣalen ɣer temdint n Lquds iwakken ad qellben fell-as.
2.46: Ass wis tlata, ufan-t di lǧameɛ iqedsen yeqqim ger lecyux, ismeḥsis asen, isteqsay-iten.
2.47: Wid akk i s isellen wehmen di lefhama-s d wayen i d-ițarra i yesteqsiyen-nsen.
2.48: Mi t-walan imawlan-is, qqimen wehmen, dɣa tenna-yas yemma-s : A mmi, acuɣeṛ i ɣ-txedmeḍ akka ? Nekk d baba-k neṛwa aḥebbeṛ, acḥal i nqelleb fell-ak !
2.49: Nețța yenna-yasen : Acuɣeṛ i tețqellibem fell-i ? Eɛni ur teẓrim ara ilaq-iyi ad xedmeɣ lecɣal n baba ?
2.50: Lameɛna nutni ur fhimen ara ayen i sen-d-yenna.
2.51: Ɛisa yedda d imawlan-is ɣer temdint n Naṣaret, yețțaɣ-asen awal. Yemma-s teḥrez annect-agi meṛṛa deg wul-is.
2.52: Ɛisa ițțimɣuṛ, yetɛeqqil ; eɛziz ɣer Ṛebbi, eɛziz ɣer yemdanen.

3.1: Deg wuseggas wis xemseṭṭac n tgeldit n Qayṣer Tibeṛyus, llan ṛebɛa lḥekkam di tmurt n Falisṭin. Bunṭus Bilaṭus d lḥakem n tmurt n Yahuda, Hiṛudus Antifas yeḥkem ɣef tmurt n Jlili, Filbas gma-s n Hiṛudus, ɣef tmura n Iturya akk-d Tṛaxunit, ma d Lisanyas yeḥkem ɣef tmurt n Abilan.
3.2: Di lweqt-nni, ?ennan akk-d Qayif llan d lmuqedmin imeqqranen. Awal n Sidi Ṛebbi ițwaxebbeṛ-as-ed i Yeḥya, mmi-s n Zakarya, deg unezṛuf.
3.3: Iṛuḥ ițnadi timura i d-izzin i wasif n Urdun, yețberriḥ yeqqaṛ : Beddlet tikli, uɣalet-ed ɣer webrid, aset-ed aț-țețwaɣeḍsem iwakken Sidi Ṛebbi a wen-isemmeḥ ddnubat-nwen !
3.4: Akken i d-ițțuxebeṛ di tektabt n nnbi Iceɛya : ?-țaɣect n win ițɛeggiḍen deg wunezṛuf : Heggit abrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, ssemsawit iberdan-is !
3.5: Iɣezṛan, idurar ț-țɣaltin ad uɣalen d izuɣaṛ ! Iberdan iɛewjen ad țțuseggmen, wid ixesṛen ad qeɛden .
3.6: Imdanen meṛṛa ad ẓren leslak n Sidi Ṛebbi.
3.7: Yeḥya yeqqaṛ i lɣaci i d-ițțasen iwakken ad țwaɣeḍsen deg waman : A ccetla n yizerman, anwa i kkun-isfaqen belli tzemrem aț- țrewlem i lɛiqab i d-iteddun ?
3.8: Deg wayen akk txeddmem, sbeggnet-ed belli ṣfan wulawen nwen ! Ur qqaṛet ara kan deg yiman-nwen : jeddi-tneɣ d Sidna Ibṛahim, axaṭer a wen-iniɣ : seg idɣaɣen-agi, Sidi Ṛebbi yezmer a d-issufeɣ dderya i Ibṛahim.
3.9: Ațan ihi tcaquṛt thegga ɣer izuṛan n ttjuṛ, yal ttejṛa ur d-nețțak ara lfakya lɛali, aț-țețwagzem, aț-țețwaḍeggeṛ ɣer tmes.
3.10: Lɣaci steqsan-t nnan-as : D acu i ɣ-ilaqen a t-nexdem ihi ?
3.11: Yerra-yasen : Win yesɛan sin iqendyaṛ ad yefk yiwen i win ur nesɛi ara ; win yesɛan ayen ara yečč, ad yefk i win ur nesɛi ara.
3.12: Usan-d ula d imekkasen itețțen ayla n medden iwakken ad țwaɣeḍsen deg wasif, nnan-as : A Sidi, i nukkni yellan d imekkasen n tebzert ( leɣṛama ) d acu ara nexdem ?
3.13: Yenna-yasen : Ur țnadit ara sennig wayen i d-yenna lqanun.
3.14: Iɛeskṛiwen daɣen steqsan-t : I nukkni, d acu ara nexdem ? Yerra-yasen : Ur xeddmet ara lbaṭel, ur țțaṭṭafet ara tajɛelt, setqenɛet kan s lexlaṣ nwen.
3.15: Yuɣ lḥal lɣaci meṛṛa llan țṛaǧun qqaṛen deg ulawen-nsen : Ahat d nețța i d Lmasiḥ !
3.16: Yeḥya yenna-yasen : Nekk sseɣḍaseɣ-kkun deg waman, meɛna a d-yas win yesɛan tazmert akteṛ-iw ; ur uklaleɣ ara ad fsiɣ ula d lexyuḍ n warkasen-is. Nețța a kkun-isseɣḍes s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ț-țmes.
3.17: Yeṭṭef tazzart deg wufus-is, ad yessizdeg tirect deg wennar-is, a d-ijmeɛ irden ɣer yikufan, ma d alim a t-isseṛɣ di tmes ur nxețți.
3.18: Yeḥya ițbecciṛ i lɣaci lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, inehhu-ten s waṭas n yimeslayen nniḍen.
3.19: Yesseḍlem ula d agellid Hiṛudus, yeqqaṛ-as : mačči d lḥeqq fell-ak aț-țaɣeḍ Hiṛudyad tameṭṭut n gma-k ! Ilumm-it daɣen ɣef lecɣal nniḍen n diri i gxeddem.
3.20: Hiṛudus ikemmel di txeṣṣarin-is, yessekcem Yeḥya ɣer lḥebs !
3.21: Mi țwaɣeḍsen lɣaci deg waman, Sidna Ɛisa yețwaɣḍes ula d nețța. Akken i gdeɛɛu ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, igenni yeldi-d,
3.22: Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yers-ed fell-as s ṣṣifa icuban titbirt. Yiwet n taɣect tekka-d seg yigenni tenna-d : Kečč, d mmi eɛzizen, deg-k i gella lfeṛḥ-iw.
3.23: Mi gebda Sidna Ɛisa aselmed, ad yili yesɛa tlatin iseggasen di leɛmeṛ-is. ?er yemdanen yella : d mmi-s n Yusef atnan lejdud-is : Heli,
3.38: Inuc, Cit, Adem illan d mmi-s n Ṛebbi.

4.1: Mi d- yuɣal Sidna Ɛisa seg wasif n Urdun, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yewwi-t ɣer unezṛuf.
4.2: Ṛebɛin wussan ur yečči, Cciṭan yețjeṛṛib deg-s. Mi ɛeddan wussan-nni, yuɣal illuẓ.
4.3: Cciṭan yenna-yas : Ma d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi i telliḍ, ini-yas i wedɣaɣ-agi a d-yuɣal d aɣṛum.
4.4: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Yura di tektabt iqedsen : amdan ur yețɛic ara s weɣṛum kan meɛna s mkul awal i d-ițțasen s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
4.5: Yuɣal Cciṭan yewwi-t ɣer yiwen wemkan eɛlayen, deg yiwet n teswiɛt yesken-as-ed akk tigeldiwin n ddunit,
4.6: yenna-yas : Ad a k-d-fkeɣ lḥekma d ccan n ddewlat-agi meṛṛa, axaṭer țțunefkent iyi-d. Zemreɣ a tent-fkeɣ i win i yi-ihwan ;
4.7: ma tseǧǧdeḍ zdat-i ad uɣalent akk d ayla-k.
4.8: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Yura : Anagar Sidi Ṛebbi Illu-inek ara tɛebdeḍ, i nețța kan iwumi ara tseǧǧdeḍ.
4.9: Cciṭan yewwi-t daɣen ɣer temdint n Lquds, yessers-it ɣef yixef n lǧameɛ iqedsen, yenna-yas : Ma d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi i telliḍ, ḍeggeṛ iman-ik d akessar,
4.10: axaṭer yura : Ad yefk lameṛ i lmalayekkat-is iwakken ad ḥarbent fell-ak,
4.11: yerna a k-awint ger ifassen-nsent, ad ḥadrent iḍaṛṛen-ik ɣef wedɣaɣ.
4.12: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Yura daɣen : Ur țjeṛṛib ara Sidi Ṛebbi, Illu-inek.
4.13: Mi i t-ijeṛṛeb s waṭas n tḥila ur s-yufi ara abrid, Iblis yeṭṭaxeṛ fell-as alamma ț-țikkelt nniḍen.
4.14: Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal ɣer tmurt n Jlili yeččuṛ ț-țazmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, slan yis di mkul tama n tmurt-agi.
4.15: Ikeččem ɣer leǧwameɛ n wat Isṛail yesselmad, imdanen meṛṛa țcekkiṛen-t.
4.16: Iṛuḥ ɣer taddart n Naṣaret anda yețțuṛebba ; akken innum, ikcem ɣer lǧameɛ deg wass n westeɛfu.
4.17: Mi gekker a d-iɣeṛ, fkan-as-d taktabt n nnbi Iceɛya, yeldi-ț, yufa amkan anda yura :
4.18: Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi yers-ed fell-i, axaṭer yextaṛ-iyi iwakken ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i yimeɣban, ad beccṛeɣ i yimeḥbas tilelli, iwakken a d-rreɣ iẓri i yiderɣalen , a d kkseɣ lḥif ɣef wid ițwaḍelmen,
4.19: ad beccṛeɣ ɣef wuseggas i deg ara d-issers Sidi Ṛebbi ṛṛeḥma ines .
4.20: Ijmeɛ taktabt-nni, yerra-ț i uqeddac, imiren yeqqim. Wid akk yellan di lǧameɛ ččan-t s wallen.
4.21: Dɣa yenna-yasen : Ayen i wen-d-ɣṛiɣ akka, atan yedṛa-d gar-awen ass-agi !
4.22: Wehmen atas, tɛeǧǧben deg yimeslayen i d-ițeffɣen seg yimi-s, qqaṛen : Amek ? Mačči d mmi-s n Yusef wagi ?
4.23: Dɣa yenna-yasen : ?riɣ belli a yi-d-tinim lemtel-agi : « A ṭṭbib sseḥlu iman-ik,» neɣ « xdem dagi di tmurt-ik ayen i nesla txedmeḍ-t di temdint n Kafernaḥum.»
4.24: Yenna-yasen daɣen : S tideț a wen-iniɣ : ulac nnbi yețwaqeblen di tmurt-is.
4.25: A wen-iniɣ tideț : Di zzman n nnbi Ilyas, tlata yiseggasen d wezgen ur d-tewwit lehwa dɣa yeɣli-d laẓ d ameqqran ɣef tmurt meṛṛa. Deg wussan-nni, aṭas n tuǧǧal i gellan di tmurt n wat Isṛail.
4.26: ?as akken, Sidi Ṛebbi ur iceggeɛ ara nnbi Ilyas ɣer yiwet deg-sent, anagar ɣ er yiwet n taǧǧalt yellan di taddart n ?urfat di tmurt n Sidun .
4.27: Llan daɣen aṭas n wid ihelken lbeṛs di tmurt n wat Isṛail di zzman n nnbi Ilyaceɛ , meɛna ula d yiwen deg-sen ur iḥli anagar Neɛman n tmurt n Surya.
4.28: Mi slan imeslayen-agi, lɣaci meṛṛa yellan di lǧameɛ yenɣa-ten lɣecc.
4.29: Kkren ɣuṛ-es, ssufɣen-t si taddart, ssawḍen-t armi d ixef n wedrar i ɣef tebna taddart-nsen iwakken a t-ssegrirben d akessar ;
4.31: Sidna Ɛisa iṣubb ɣer tamdint n Kafernaḥum, illan n at Jlili, anda yesselmad lɣaci deg wass n westeɛfu.
4.32: Imdanen wehmen aṭas deg wuselmed-ines axaṭer imeslayen-is sɛan tissas.
4.33: Di lǧameɛ, yella yiwen wergaz izdeɣ-it uṛuḥani, iɛeggeḍ s lǧehd n taɣect-is :
4.34: D acu i tebɣiḍ ɣuṛ-nneɣ a Ɛisa Anaṣari ? Tusiḍ-ed iwakken ad aɣ tesnegreḍ ? ?riɣ d acu-k , kečč d Imqeddes n Ṛebbi !
4.35: Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq ɣuṛ-es yenna-yas : Ssusem ! Effeɣ seg wergaz-agi ! Aṛuḥani iḍeggeṛ argaz-nni ɣer lqaɛa di tlemmast-nsen, dɣa iffeɣ seg-s mbla ma iḍuṛṛ-it.
4.36: Lɣaci ikcem-iten akk lxuf, qqaṛen wway gar-asen : D acu-ten yimeslayen-agi ? Yesɛa tazmert s wayes iḥekkem ula ɣef leǧnun ! Akken kan ara sen-yefk lameṛ ad ffɣen !
4.37: Di yal tama n tmurt slan s lexbaṛ n Sidna Ɛisa.
4.38: Iffeɣ-ed si lǧameɛ, yerra ɣer wexxam n Semɛun. Yuɣ lḥal taḍeggalt n Semɛun tuɣ-iț tawla ț-țameqqrant, ḥellelen Sidna Ɛisa iwakken a ț-yesseḥlu.
4.39: Yekna ɣuṛ-es, yumeṛ i tawla aț-țeffeɣ seg-s, dɣa teffeɣ-iț ; imiren kan tekker teqdec-asen-d.
4.40: Tameddit mi geɣli yiṭij, kra n win yesɛan amuḍin n mkul aṭan, yewwi-yas-t-id. Mkul win i ɣef yessers afus-is yeḥla ! Yesseḥla-ten meṛṛa !
4.41: Llan daɣen leǧnun i d-ițeffɣen seg waṭas n yemdanen, țɛeggiḍen qqaṛen : « Kečč d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi ! » Lameɛna Sidna Ɛisa ițɛeggiḍ fell- asen, ur ten-ițțaga ara a d-hedṛen, axaṭer nutni ẓran d nețța i d Lmasiḥ.
4.42: Mi guli wass, iffeɣ si temdint, yerra ɣer yiwen wemkan yexlan. Aṭas n lɣaci ṛuḥen țqelliben fell-as. Mi t-ufan, ḥellelen-t iwakken ad yeqqim ɣuṛ-sen, ur ițṛuḥu ara.
4.43: Lameɛna nețța yenna-yasen : Ilaq-iyi ad ṛuḥeɣ ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n tgeldit n Ṛebbi i temdinin nniḍen ! ?ef wayagi i d țțuceggɛeɣ !
4.44: Imiren iṛuḥ ițbecciṛ di leǧwameɛ n tmurt n Yahuda.

5.1: Yiwen wass, Sidna Ɛisa yella ɣef rrif n lebḥeṛ n Jiniṣaret. Lɣaci meṛṛa zzin-as-d, mčuččaɛen-d akken ad slen i wawal n Ṛebbi.
5.2: Iwala snat n teflukin rrif n lebḥeṛ, iḥewwaten rsen-d iwakken ad ssirden icebbaken nsen.
5.3: Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer yiwet si teflukin-nni, tin yellan n Semɛun, yenna-yas ad ibɛed acemma ɣef rrif. Yeqqim , yebda yesselmad-ed lɣaci syenna.
5.4: Mi gfukk aselmed yenna i Semɛun : Sbeɛdet taflukt ɣer wemkan lqayen, tḍeggṛem icebbaken-nwen aț-țṣeggdem.
5.5: Semɛun yenna-yas : A Sidi, iḍ kamel nukni d aṣeggeḍ ur d-neṭṭif acemma ; lameɛna ɣef wawal-ik a nexdem akken i d-tenniḍ, a nḍeggeṛ icebbaken.
5.6: Mi xedmen akken i sen-yenna Sidna Ɛisa, ṭṭfen-d aṭas n iselman ( lḥut ), armi qṛib ad qeṛsen icebbaken nsen.
5.7: Ssawalen, țwehhin i yemdukkal nsen yellan di teflukt nniḍen a d-asen a ten-ɛiwnen. Mi d-usan, ččuṛen snat-nni n teflukin armi qṛib ad ɣeṛqent.
5.8: Semɛun-Buṭrus, mi gwala ayagi, yuɣal ɣef tgecrar zdat Sidna Ɛisa, yenna-yas : Beɛɛed fell-i a Sidi axaṭer d amednub i lliɣ.
5.9: Ikcem-it lxuf nețța d wid yellan yid-es, dehcen imi i d-ṭṭfen annect-nni n yiselman.
5.10: Ula d Yeɛqub akk-d Yuḥenna, arraw n Zabadi yellan d imdukkal n Semɛun wehmen. Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq ɣer Semɛun yenna-yas : Ur țțagad ara, sya d asawen mačči d iselman ara d-țṣeggideḍ, meɛna d imdanen.
5.11: Imiren rran-d tiflukin-nsen ɣer rrif, ǧǧan kullec dinna, ddan d Sidna Ɛisa.
5.12: Mi gella Sidna Ɛisa deg yiwet n taddart n at Jlili, yusa-d yiwen wergaz ihelken lbeṛs, mi gwala Sidna Ɛisa, yuzzel ɣuṛ-es yeɣli ɣer iḍaṛṛen-is, yenna-yas : A Sidi, ma tebɣiḍ, tzemreḍ a yi-tesseḥluḍ.
5.13: Sidna Ɛisa issers afus-is fell-as, yenna-yas : Bɣiɣ ! Ili-k teḥliḍ ! Imiren kan, argaz-nni ikkes-as lbeṛs, yeṣfa weglim-is.
5.14: Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa-t ur iqqaṛ i yiwen ayen yedṛan yid-es. Yenna-yas : Ṛuḥ ɣer lmuqeddem a k-iwali, tefkeḍ lweɛda ɣef ṣeffu-inek, akken yura di ccariɛa n Musa. Lweɛda-nni a sen-tili d țbut ɣef ḥellu-inek.
5.15: Simmal ițwassen Sidna Ɛisa, simmal țnejmaɛen-d ɣuṛ-es lɣaci iwakken ad slen i wawal-is yerna a ten-isseḥlu si lehlakat-nsen ;
5.16: meɛna nețța iṭeṛṛif iman-is, ițṛuḥu ɣer yimukan yexlan iwakken ad iẓẓall.
5.17: Yiwen wass Sidna Ɛisa yella yesselmad. Llan dinna ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, usan-d si tuddar n at Jlili, n at Yahuda akk ț-țemdint n Lquds, qqimen smeḥsisen-as. Tazmert n Sidi Ṛebbi yellan yid-es tesseḥlay imuḍan.
5.18: Atnaya kra n yemdanen wwin-d yiwen wukrif akken deg wusu-ines. ?qelliben amek ara t-skecmen iwakken a t-ssersen zdat Sidna Ɛisa.
5.19: Imi aṭas n lɣaci i gellan, ur ufin ara ansi ara t-sɛeddin ; ulin ɣef ssqef, kksen kra n iqermuden, ṣubben-t-id s wusu-ines ɣer tlemmast n lɣaci, zdat Sidna Ɛisa.
5.20: Mi gwala liman-nsen, yenna i umuḍin-nni : Ay argaz, țwaɛeffan-ak ddnubat ik !
5.21: Lɛulama akk-d ifariziyen bdan țxemmimen qqaṛen : Amek yezmer a d-yini imeslayen agi ? Wagi d lekfeṛ ! Anwa i gzemren ad iɛfu ddnubat anagar Sidi Ṛebbi ?
5.22: Sidna Ɛisa yeẓran ayen i țxemmimen, yenna-yasen : Acuɣeṛ tețxemmimem akka deg ulawen-nwen ?
5.23: D acu i gsehlen a s-t-iniɣ ? « ?waɛeffan-ak ddnubat-ik» neɣ « ekker telḥuḍ ? »
5.24: Ilaq-awen aț-țeẓrem belli Mmi-s n bunadem yesɛa tazmert ad yeɛfu ddnubat di ddunit-agi ! Yezzi ɣer wukrif-nni, yenna-yas : Kker ddem usu-inek tuɣaleḍ ɣer wexxam-ik !
5.25: Imiren kan ukrif-nni yekker zdat-sen, yeddem usu i deg yeḍleq, yuɣal ɣer wexxam-is, ițḥemmid Sidi Ṛebbi.
5.26: Wehmen meṛṛa lɣaci, țḥemmiden Sidi Ṛebbi, ikcem-iten lxuf qqaṛen : Ass-agi neẓra ayen werǧin neẓri !
5.27: Mi geffeɣ Sidna Ɛisa, iwala yiwen umekkas isem-is Lewwi yeqqim di texxamt anda țxelliṣen tabzert ( leɣṛama ), iqeṛṛeb ɣuṛ-es yenna-yas : Ddu yid-i.
5.28: Lewwi yekker, yeǧǧa kullec yedda yid-es.
5.29: Lewwi yeɛṛeḍ Sidna Ɛisa ɣer wexxam-is, ihegga-yas imensi. Aṭas n yimekkasen d yemdanen nniḍen i geqqimen yid-sen ad ččen.
5.30: Ifariziyen d lɛulama n ukabar-nsen iɣaḍ-iten lḥal, nnan i yinelmaden is : Acuɣeṛ i tețțem, tessem akk-d imekkasen imakaren d imednuben ?
5.31: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Mačči d wid iṣeḥḥan i geḥwaǧen ṭṭbib, i t-iḥwaǧen d imuḍan.
5.32: Ur d-usiɣ ara ad ssiwleɣ i iḥeqqiyen, usiɣ-ed ɣer yimednuben iwakken a d-uɣalen ɣer webrid.
5.33: Nnan-as daɣen : Inelmaden n Yeḥya d wid n ifariziyen țțuẓummen acḥal d abrid yerna țẓallan, ma d inelmaden-ik tețțen tessen.
5.34: Sidna Ɛisa yenna yasen : Eɛni tzemrem a sen-tinim i yinebgawen n yesli ad uẓummen ass n tmeɣṛa ? Ur tezmirem ara !
5.35: Ad asen wussan i deg ara sen-ițwakkes yesli, ass-nni ad uẓummen.
5.36: Yerna-yasen-d lemtel-agi : Yiwen ur d-itekkes tafaweț si llebsa tajdiṭ iwakken a ț-ixiḍ ɣef llebsa taqdimt , neɣ m'ulac llebsa-nni tajdiṭ aț-țcerreg ; tafaweț-nni tajdiṭ ur d-țezgay ara ɣef llebsa-nni taqdimt.
5.37: Daɣen yiwen ur ismaray ccṛab ajdid ɣer yiyeddiden iqdimen , neɣ m'ulac ccṛab-nni ajdid ad icerreg iyeddiden nni ; ur d-ițɣimi ccṛab ur d-țɣimin iyeddiden.
5.38: Ihi ccṛab ajdid, ilaq a t-nesmir ɣer iyeddiden ijdiden.
5.39: Akken daɣen win yennumen d ccṛab aqdim ur issutur ara ajdid axaṭer yeqqaṛ « d aqdim i gelhan. »

6.1: Yiwen wass, Sidna Ɛisa akk-d inelmaden-is zegren igran n yirden deg wass n westeɛfu. Tekksen d tigedrin, țḥukkun-tent ger ifassen nsen, tețțen-tent.
6.2: Kra n ifariziyen nnan-asen : Acuɣeṛ i txeddmem ayen ur neḥlil deg wass n westeɛfu ?
6.3: Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Ur teɣṛim ara ayen yexdem ugellid Dawed asmi yelluẓ nețța d imdukkal-is,
6.4: d wamek i gekcem ɣer wexxam iqedsen anda keččmen anagar lmuqedmin ! Iddem-ed aɣṛum n lweɛda, yečča yerna yefka i wid yellan yid-es ɣas akken aɣṛum-nni i lmuqedmin kan iwumi yeḥlel !
6.5: Sidna Ɛisa yerna-yasen-d : Mmi-s n bunadem, d nețța i gḥekkmen ɣef wass n westeɛfu !
6.6: Ass n westeɛfu nniḍen, Sidna Ɛisa yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ, yebda yesselmad. Yella dinna yiwen wergaz iwumi yekref ufus ayeffus.
6.7: Lɛulama n ccariɛa d ifariziyen țɛassan Sidna Ɛisa, ad ẓren ma ad isseḥlu deg wass n westeɛfu iwakken a s-d-afen sebba s wacu ara ccetkin fell-as.
6.8: Lameɛna Sidna Ɛisa yessnen ixemmimen-nsen, yekker yenna i wergaz-nni iwumi yekref ufus : Ekker tbeddeḍ dagi di tlemmast n lɣaci. Argaz-nni yekker ibedd.
6.9: Sidna Ɛisa yenna : A kkun-steqsiɣ : d acu yellan d leḥlal deg wass n westeɛfu, a nexdem lxiṛ neɣ a nexdem cceṛ ? A nsellek amdan neɣ a t-neǧǧ ad immet ?
6.10: Yerfed allen-is ɣer wid akk i s-d-yezzin , dɣa yenna i wergaz nni : Eḍleq afus-ik ! Ukrif-nni yeḍleq afus-is, yeḥla.
6.11: Nutni yenɣa-ten lɣecc, bdan țemcawaṛen wway gar-asen amek ara xedmen i Sidna Ɛisa.
6.12: Deg ussan-nni, Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer wedrar akken ad iẓẓall. Yeqqim iḍ kamel nețța ideɛɛu ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
6.13: Mi yuli wass, yessawel i yinelmaden is, yextaṛ seg-sen tnac iwumi isemma « ṛṛusul» yeɛni « imceggɛen.»
6.14: Yella Semɛun iwumi isemma Buṭrus akk-d gma-s Andriyus, Yeɛqub, Yuḥenna, Filbas, Bartelmay,
6.15: Matta, ?uma, Yeɛqub mmi-s n ?alfi, Semɛun iwumi qqaṛen awaṭani,
6.16: Yahuda mmi-s n Yeɛqub d Yudas n taddart n Qeṛyut win yuɣalen d axeddaɛ.
6.17: Sidna Ɛisa iṣubb-ed yid-sen seg wedrar, ḥebsen di luḍa anda nnejmaɛen aṭas n yinelmaden-is d waṭas n lɣaci i d-yusan si tmurt n Yahuda, si temdint n Lquds, si temdinin n ?ur akk-d Sidun yellan rrif n lebḥeṛ.
6.18: Usan-d iwakken ad slen i wawal-is yerna a ten-isseḥlu si lehlakat-nsen ; wid akk zedɣen leǧnun, ḥlan.
6.19: Lɣaci meṛṛa țqelliben a t-nalen ( a t-massen ) axaṭer tețțeffeɣ-ed seg-s tezmert i ten-isseḥlayen akk.
6.20: Sidna Ɛisa yerfed allen-is ɣer inelmaden-is yenna : Amarezg-nwen kunwi yellan d iẓawaliyen, tagelda n Sidi Ṛebbi d ayla-nwen.
6.21: Amarezg-nwen kunwi yelluẓen tura, a d-yas wass i deg ara teṛwum. Amarezg-nwen kunwi yețrun tura, a d-yas wass i deg ara tilim di lfeṛḥ.
6.22: D iseɛdiyen ara tilim m'ara kkun-keṛhen yemdanen, m'ara kkun-qecɛen, m'ara kkun-regmen, ad rren isem-nwen amzun d lɛaṛ ɣef ddemma n Mmi-s n bunadem.
6.23: Ass-nni ilit di lfeṛḥ, friwset s lfeṛḥ axaṭer d ṛṛezq ameqqran i kkun-ițṛaǧun deg igenni ! Imi akka i xedmen lejdud-nsen i lenbiya.
6.24: Ma d kunwi ay imeṛkantiyen, a tawaɣit-nwen axaṭer rrbeḥ-nwen tesɛam-t tura.
6.25: A tawaɣit-nwen kunwi yeṛwan tura, aț-țuɣalem aț-țellaẓem. A tawaɣit-nwen kunwi yețțaḍṣan tura axaṭer aț-țilim di leḥzen d yimeṭṭawen.
6.26: A tawaɣit nwen asm'ara kkun-cekkṛen yemdanen, axaṭer akka i xedmen lejdud-nsen i lenbiya n lekdeb.
6.27: Ma d nekk a wen-iniɣ i kunwi i d-ițḥessisen : ḥemmlet iɛdawen-nwen, xedmet lxiṛ i wid i kkun-ikeṛhen.
6.28: Barket wid i kkun-ineɛlen, dɛut s lxiṛ i wid i kkun-iḍelmen.
6.29: Ma yewwet-ik yiwen ɣer lḥenk, sendi-yas lḥenk nniḍen. Ma yekkes-ak yiwen abeṛnus-ik, anef-as ad yernu ula d aqenduṛ-ik.
6.30: Efk-as ayen yuḥwaj i win i k-id-yessutren ; win i k-ikksen kra, ur țṛaǧu ara a k-t-id-yerr.
6.31: Xedmet i wiyaḍ ayen i tebɣam a wen-t xedmen i kunwi.
6.32: Ma yella tḥemmlem kan wid i kkun-iḥemmlen, d acu n lxiṛ i txedmem ? Ula d imcumen ḥemmlen wid i ten-iḥemmlen.
6.33: Ma yella txeddmem lxiṛ i wid kan i wen ixeddmen lxiṛ, d acu n lxiṛ i txedmem ? Ula d imcumen xeddmen akka.
6.34: Ma yella tṛeṭṭlem i wid kan i teẓram a wen-d-rren, d acu i trebḥem ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi ? Imcumen daɣen ṛeṭṭlen i imddukal-nsen iwakken ad afen aṛeṭṭal ula d nutni.
6.35: Lameɛna kunwi : ḥemmlet iɛdawen-nwen, xedmet lxiṛ, ṛeḍlet mbla ṭṭmeɛ, akka ara tesɛum lfayda tameqqrant, ara tilim d arraw n Sidi Ṛebbi ɛlayen. Axaṭer Ṛebbi d aḥnin ula ɣef yemcumen akk-d wid inekkṛen lxiṛ.
6.36: Iḥninet, sɛut ṛṛeḥma akken i ț-isɛa Baba-twen.
6.37: Ur țḥasabet ara wiyaḍ iwakken Sidi Ṛebbi ur kkun-ițḥasab ara. Ur ḥekkmet ara ɣef wiyaḍ iwakken Sidi Ṛebbi ur iḥekkem ara fell-awen. Semmḥet i wiyaḍ iwakken a wen isameḥ Sidi Ṛebbi.
6.38: Seddqet, a wen d-yuɣal s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi. Ma tseddqem mbla lkil, a wen-d yuɣal s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi mbla lkil ; axaṭer a wen-d-ițwaktal s lkil s wacu tektalem.
6.39: Yewwi-yasen-d lemtel nniḍen, yenna-yasen : Aderɣal ur izmir ara ad iṭṭef afus i uderɣal nniḍen, neɣ m'ulac ad grirben i sin ɣer yeɣzeṛ ;
6.40: anelmad werǧin yugar ccix-is, lameɛna anelmad ara yawḍen am ccix-is di tmusni, ad yili am nețța.
6.41: Acuɣeṛ tețwaliḍ axeclaw yellan di tiṭ n gma-k ur tețwaliḍ ara tigejdit yellan di tiṭ-ik ?
6.42: Amek ara tiniḍ i gma-k : eǧǧ-iyi ad kkseɣ axeclaw yellan di tiṭ-ik kečč ur neẓri tigejdit yellan di tiṭ-ik ? A bu sin wudmawen, ekkes uqbel tigejdit yellan di tiṭ-ik, imiren aț-țwaliḍ amek ara tekkseḍ axeclaw yellan di tiṭ n gma-k.
6.43: Ulac ttejṛa lɛali i d-ițțaken lfakya n diri. Ulac daɣen ttejṛa n diri i d-ițțaken lfakya lɛali.
6.44: Ihi mkul ttejṛa, tețwaɛqal s lfakya-ines. Ur d-ntekkes ara lexṛif seg isennanen, ur d-ntekkes ara daɣen tiẓurin seg inijel.
6.45: Argaz yelhan issufuɣ-ed ayen yelhan seg wugerruj yellan deg wul-is, ma d amcum d ayen n diri yellan deg ul-is i d-issufuɣ. Axaṭer d ayen yellan deg wul n wemdan i d-ițeffɣen seg imi-s.
6.46: Acuɣer i yi-d-tessawalem « A Sidi, a Sidi », ur txeddmem ara ayen i wen-d-qqaṛeɣ ?
6.47: A wen-d-iniɣ ar wuɣuṛ ițemcabi wemdan i d-ițțasen ɣuṛ-i, isellen i wawal-iw yerna yeṭṭafaṛ-it :
6.48: ițemcabi ɣer yiwen n wemdan yebnan axxam. Yeɣza, yeɣza deg wakal iwakken ad issers lsas-is ɣef wezṛu ; iḥmel-ed wasif, infel-ed ɣef wexxam-nni, meɛna ur t-issenhezz ara imi lsas-is yerṣa, yebna ɣef wezṛu akken ilaq.
6.49: Ma d win isellen i wawal-iw ur netbiɛ ara ayen i d-nniɣ, ițemcabi ɣer wemdan yebnan axxam ɣef ṛṛmel mbla lsas : iḥmel-ed wasif, infel-ed ɣef wexxam-nni, imiren kan yeɣli , lexsaṛa-s ț-țameqqrant !

7.1: Mi gekfa awal zdat widak i s-d-ismeḥsisen, yekcem ɣer temdint n Kafernaḥum.
7.2: Yiwen lqebṭan aṛumani yesɛa aqeddac i gḥemmel aṭas ; aqeddac-agi yuḍen, ițmețțat.
7.3: Mi gesla s Sidna Ɛisa, iceggeɛ ɣuṛ-es kra seg yimeqqranen n wat Isṛail iwakken a d-yas ad isseḥlu aqeddac-is.
7.4: Mi wwḍen ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, ḥellelen-t nnan-as : A Sidi ! Yuklal a s-txedmeḍ lxiṛ agi,
7.5: axaṭer iḥemmel agdud nneɣ ; d nețța i gebnan lǧameɛ-nneɣ.
7.6: Sidna Ɛisa yedda yid-sen. Mi qṛib ad yaweḍ ɣer wexxam, lqebṭan-nni iceggeɛ imdukkal-is a s-inin : A Sidi, ur țɛețțib ara iman-ik, ur uklaleɣ ara a d-tkecmeḍ axxam-iw.
7.7: Nekk s yiman-iw daɣen walaɣ ur uklaleɣ ara a n-aseɣ ɣuṛ-ek ; ini-d kan yiwen wawal, aqeddac-iw ad iḥlu.
7.8: Axaṭer sɛiɣ wid i gṭebbiṛen fell-i, sɛiɣ daɣen lɛeskeṛ seddaw lḥekma-w. Ad iniɣ i yiwen ṛuḥ ad iṛuḥ ; i wayeḍ as-ed, a d-yas ; ad iniɣ i wqeddac-iw xdem ayagi, a t-ixdem.
7.9: Mi gesla Sidna Ɛisa i yimeslayen-agi, itɛeǧǧeb deg-sen. Yezzi ɣer lɣaci yeddan yid-es, yenna-yasen : A wen-d-iniɣ : di tmurt n wat Isṛail meṛṛa ur ufiɣ ara liman yecban wagi.
7.10: Widak-nni i d-ițwaceggɛen, mi uɣalen ɣer wexxam ufan aqeddac-nni yeḥla.
7.11: Azekka-nni, Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ ɣer yiwet n taddart isem-is Naɛim. Ddan yid-es inelmaden-is d waṭas n lɣaci.
7.12: Mi gewweḍ ɣer tewwurt n taddart, atnaya lɣaci wwin-d lmegget a t-meḍlen, d mmi-s n yiwet n taǧǧalt, anagar nețța i tesɛa. Aṭas n imezdaɣ n taddart-nni i d-iddan yid-es.
7.13: Mi ț-iwala Sidna Ɛisa, tɣaḍ-it, yenna-yas : Ur țru ara !
7.14: Iqeṛṛeb ɣer usenduq n lmegget nni, iḍleq afus-is innul-it, dɣa widak i t-irefden ḥebsen. Yenna : Ay aqcic ! Ekker !
7.15: Dɣa lmegget-nni ikker-ed, yebda iheddeṛ. Sidna Ɛisa yerra aqcic-nni i yemma-s.
7.16: Ikcem-iten akk lxuf, bdan țḥemmiden Ṛebbi qqaṛen : « Sidi Ṛebbi yerra-d ddehn-is ɣer wegdud is, nnbi ameqqran ikker-ed gar-aneɣ. »
7.17: Slan s wannect-agi di tmurt n Yahuda meṛṛa akk ț-țmura i s-d izzin.
7.18: Inelmaden n Yeḥya xebbṛen-t ɣef wayen akk yedṛan.
7.19: Yeḥya iceggeɛ sin seg yinelmaden-is ɣer Sidna Ɛisa iwakken a s-inin ma d nețța i d win akken ara d-yasen, neɣ ilaq ad ṛǧun wayeḍ.
7.20: Ewwḍen ɣer Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : Iceggeɛ-aɣ-ed ɣuṛ-ek Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas iwakken a k-nesteqsi ma d kečč i d win akken ara d-yasen neɣ ilaq a neṛǧu wayeḍ.
7.21: Di teswiɛt-nni ufan Sidna Ɛisa isseḥla aṭas n yemdanen si lehlakat nsen d leɛyubat-nsen, issufeɣ leǧnun seg wid yețwamelken, yerra-d iẓri i waṭas n yiderɣalen.
7.22: Sidna Ɛisa yenna i yinelmaden n Yeḥya : Ṛuḥet erret lexbaṛ i Yeḥya ɣef wayen teẓram d wayen teslam : iderɣalen țwalin, wid ikerfen teddun, wid ihelken lbeṛs ṣeffun, iɛeẓẓugen sellen, lmegtin ḥeggun-d, le xbaṛ n lxiṛ ițwabecceṛ i yigellilen .
7.23: D aseɛdi win iwumi ur țțiliɣ ara d ugur.
7.24: Mi ṛuḥen inelmaden-nni i d-iceggeɛ Yeḥya, Sidna Ɛisa yebda iheddeṛ i lɣaci ɣef Yeḥya yenna : D acu i tṛuḥem a d-teẓrem deg unezṛuf ? D aɣanim yețhuzzu waḍu ?
7.25: D acu i tṛuḥem a d-teẓrem ? D amdan yelsan llebsa ifazen ? Wid yețlusun llebsa ifazen, yețɛicin di rrbeḥ atnan di lebṛuj n yigelliden !
7.26: Anwa i tṛuḥem a t-id-teẓrem ihi ? D nnbi ? A wen-d-iniɣ ... yugar nnbi !
7.27: Yeḥya d win i ɣef yura di tira iqedsen : Atan ad zzewreɣ amceggeɛ-inu zdat-ek iwakken a k-iheggi abrid.
7.28: Nniɣ-awen, ulac di ddunit amdan yugaren Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas. Lameɛna amecṭuḥ maḍi di tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi, d ameqqran fell-as.
7.29: Lɣaci meṛṛa mi slan i Yeḥya, setɛeṛfen s lḥeqq n Sidi Ṛebbi, qeblen ad țwaɣeḍsen deg waman, llan gar-asen ula d imekkasen n tebzert ( n leɣṛama ).
7.30: Ma d ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ur qbilen ara ayen i sen yebɣa Sidi Ṛebbi, ugin a ten yesseɣḍes Yeḥya.
7.31: ?er wacu ara metleɣ imdanen n lǧil-agi ? ?er wuɣuṛ i țemcabin ?
7.32: ?emcabin ɣer warrac yeqqimen di tejmaɛt, țemsawalen wway gar-asen qqaṛen : Newwet-awen-d ajewwaq ur tecḍiḥem ara, nerna newwi-yawen-d acewwiq n leḥzen ur trum ara.
7.33: Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas yusa-d ur itețț aɣṛum ur itess ccṛab, teqqaṛem ițwamlek.
7.34: Mmi-s n bunadem yusa-d itețț itess, teqqaṛem : ițxemmim kan ad yečč ad isew, d amdakkul n yimekkasen akk-d yemcumen.
7.35: Lameɛna lḥeqq n Sidi Ṛebbi ɛeqlen-t warraw-is, nutni qeblen-t.
7.36: Yiwen ufarizi yusa-d ad iɛṛrḍ Sidna Ɛisa ad yečč ɣuṛ-es. Idda yid-es, ikcem ɣer wexxam-is, yeqqim ad yečč.
7.37: Di taddart-nni tella yiwet n tmeṭṭut yellan d yir tameṭṭut ; mi tesla s Sidna Ɛisa yella deg wexxam n wufarizi-nni, tekcem tewwi yid-es tabuqalt n leɛṭer.
7.38: Tekka-d deffir Sidna Ɛisa, teɣli ɣer idaṛṛen-is tețru. Tessebzeg (tesselxes) iḍaṛṛen n Sidna Ɛisa s yimeṭṭawen-is, tesfeḍ-iten s ucebbub-is, tessudun-iten yerna tdehhin-iten s leɛṭeṛ-nni.
7.39: Afarizi-nni mi gwala annect-nni, ixemmem deg iman-is yenna : Lemmer argaz-agi d nnbi i gella, yili yeɛqel belli tameṭṭut-agi i t-ițnalen d yir tameṭṭut i tella.
7.40: Sidna Ɛisa yenna i ufarizi-nni : A Semɛun ! Bɣiɣ a k-d-iniɣ yiwen wawal ! Afarizi yerra-yas-d : Ini-d a Sidi !
7.41: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Illa yiwen umeṛkanti issekray idrimen. Ițțalas i sin yergazen, yiwen yețțalas-as xemsmeyyat alef, wayeḍ xemsin.
7.42: Imi ur sɛin ara i sin s wacu ara xelṣen, isemmeḥ-asen. Anwa deg-sen ara t-iḥemmlen akteṛ ?
7.43: Semɛun afarizi yerra-yas : Ahat d win iwumi i gsumeḥ ṭṭlaba tameqqrant. Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Tesɛiḍ lḥeqq !
7.44: Dɣa iwehha ɣer tmeṭṭut-nni, yenna i Semɛun : Twalaḍ tameṭṭut-agi ? Kecmeɣ-d ɣer wexxam-ik, ur iyi-d-tefkiḍ ara aman ad ssirdeɣ iḍaṛṛen-iw, nețțat tessared-iten s yimeṭṭawen-is terna tesfeḍ-iten s ucebbub-is.
7.45: Kečč ur d-tselmeḍ ara fell-i, nețțat segmi i d-tekcem tessudun deg iḍaṛṛen-iw.
7.46: Kečč ur tedhineḍ ara aqeṛṛuy-iw ula s zzit, ma d nețțat tesmar-ed leɛṭeṛ ɣef yiḍaṛṛen-iw.
7.47: A k-iniɣ : ddnubat-is meṛṛa țwaɛfan as daymi i d-tbeggen leḥmala tameqqrant. Ma d win iwumi yețwaɛfa ciṭuḥ, leḥmala-ines ț-țamecṭuḥt.
7.48: Sidna Ɛisa yenna i tmeṭṭut-nni : Atan țwaɛeffan-am ddnubat-im !
7.49: Inebgawen nniḍen bdan qqaṛen deg yiman-nsen : « d acu-t wergaz-agi i gessawḍen iman-is ad yeɛfu ula d ddnubat ? »
7.50: Sidna Ɛisa yenna i tmeṭṭut-nni : Imi tumneḍ yis-i tețțusellkeḍ, ṛuḥ di lehna.
