10.15: Sṣut-nni inṭeq-ed tikkelt tis snat yenna-yas-d : Ayen iḥseb Sidi Ṛebbi d leḥlal, ur k-id-iṣaḥ ara a t-tḥesbeḍ d leḥṛam !
10.16: Ayagi, iweḥḥa-yas-t-id Sidi Ṛebbi tlata n tikkal ; imiren kan, lḥaǧa-nni tețwarfed ɣer igenni.
10.17: Akken mazal Buṭrus yețxemmim ɣef lmeɛna n uweḥḥi-nni, wwḍen-d yergazen-nni i d-iceggeɛ Kurnilyus steqsayen ɣef wexxam n Semɛun.
10.18: Mi d-wwḍen ɣer tewwurt, ssawlen, steqsan ma deg wexxam-nni i gețțili Semɛun iwumi qqaṛen Butṛus.
10.19: Mazal Buṭrus ițxemmim ɣef wuweḥḥi-nni, mi s-d-yenna Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen : Atnaya tlata yergazen țnadin fell-ak.
10.20: Ur țkukru ara, kker, ddu yid-sen axaṭer d nekk i ten-id iceggɛen.
10.21: Butṛus iṣubb-ed ɣuṛ-sen, yenna yasen : Aql-i ! D nekk i d Buṭrus ! D acu akka i kkun-id-yewwin ɣuṛ-i ?
10.22: Nutni rran-as : D lqebṭan-nneɣ Kurnilyus, i ɣ-d iceggɛen ɣuṛ-ek ! D argaz țcekkiṛen akk wat Isṛail yerna ḥemmlen-t axaṭer d amdan aḥeqqi iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi. Ibedd-ed ɣuṛ-es lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi yenna-yas-d a d-iceggeɛ ɣuṛ-ek, a d-taseḍ ɣer wexxam-is iwakken ad isel i wayen i tesɛiḍ a s-t-id-tiniḍ.
10.23: Buṭrus issekcem-iten ad nsen ɣuṛ-es. Azekka-nni ikker yedda yid-sen nețța d kra n watmaten n Jafa.
10.24: Sellazekka-nni, wwḍen ɣer temdint n Qiṣarya. Kurnilyus yețṛaǧu ten deg wexxam-is nețța d leḥbab-is akk-d imawlan-is i d-yeɛṛeḍ.
10.25: Akken iteddu Butṛus ad yekcem, immuger-it-id Kurnilyus ɣer tewwurt n wefrag, yeɣli ɣer idaṛṛen-is, yekna zdat-es iwakken ad isṭerḥeb yis s leqdeṛ ameqqran.
10.26: Meɛna Butṛus issekker-it-id yenna-yas : Kker fell-ak ! D amdan am kečč i lliɣ.
10.27: Leḥḥun, țmeslayen armi kecmen ɣer wexxam, yufa dinna aṭas n yemdanen i gennejmaɛen.
10.28: Buṭrus yenna-yasen : Yak teẓram d leḥṛam i wemdan n wat Isṛail ad ixaleḍ abeṛṛani neɣ ad ikcem ɣer wexxam-is. Lameɛna Sidi Ṛebbi yessefhem-iyi-d belli ur ilaq ara a d-nini ɣef walebɛaḍ belli ur zeddig ara neɣ ur iṣfi ara ;
10.29: daymi i qebleɣ a d-aseɣ mi yi-d-tessawlem. Init-iyi-d tura sebba ɣef wacu i d-tceggɛem ɣuṛ-i.
10.30: Kurnilyus yerra-yas : Ṛebɛa wussan aya, leǧwahi n tlata n tmeddit, lliɣ deɛɛuɣ ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi deg wexxam-iw ; ataya ibedd-ed zdat-i yiwen wergaz s llebsa yețfeǧǧiǧen,
10.31: yenna-yi-d : « A Kurnilyus ! Sidi Ṛebbi yeqbel taẓallit-ik akk-d lewɛadi i tețțakeḍ i igellilen.
10.32: Ceggeɛ ɣer temdint n Jafa ɣerSemɛun ițusemman Butṛus iwakken a d-yas ; a t-tafeḍ ɣer yiwen i gxeddmen igelman, ula d nețța isem-is Semɛun ; axxam-is yezga-d ɣef rrif n lebḥeṛ.
10.33: Imiren ceggɛeɣ-en ɣuṛ-ek ; tanemmirt-ik imi d-tusiḍ. Tura ihi aql-aɣ akk dagi zdat Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken a nsel s ɣuṛ-ek, ayen akk i k-d-yumeṛ Sidi Ṛebbi a ɣ-t-id-tiniḍ.
10.34: Butṛus yebda ameslay yenna : Armi ț-țura i fehmeɣ belli ț-țideț, Sidi Ṛebbi ur ixeddem ara lxilaf ger yemdanen.
10.35: Lameɛna di mkul lǧens, yal amdan i t-yețḍuɛun, ixeddmen ayen yellan d lḥeqq, iɛǧeb-as i Ṛebbi i gellan d Illu n yemdanen meṛṛa ; teslam belli iceggeɛ-ed awal-is i wat Isṛail, ibecceṛ-asen-d lehna s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
10.37: Ahat teslam s wayen yedṛan di tmurt n Yahuda meṛṛa ; yebda-d si tmurt n Jlili seg wasmi ițbecciṛ Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas, aɣḍas n waman.
10.38: Teslam s Ɛisa Anaṣari amek i t-iččuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi s tezmert akk-d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, amek i gteddu seg umkan ɣer wayeḍ, ixeddem lxiṛ, amek isseḥlay wid akk i gemlek Cciṭan, axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi ițțili yid-es.
10.39: Aql-aɣ d inigan n wayen akk i gexdem di tmurt n wat Isṛail ț-țemdint n Lquds anda i t-nɣan mi t-semmṛen ɣef wumidag,
10.40: meɛna ass wis tlata Sidi Ṛebbi isseḥya-t-id si ger lmegtin ; yefka-yas tazmert s wayes i d-isbeggen iman-is,
10.41: mačči i yemdanen meṛṛa meɛna i nukkni kan i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi a nili d inagan-is ; nukkni yeččan, yeswan yid-es mi d-iḥya si ger lmegtin.
10.42: Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa-yaɣ a nbecceṛ i yemdanen meṛṛa, belli d nețța i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken ad iḥaseb wid yeddren akk-d wid yemmuten.
10.43: Lenbiya akk cehden-d fell-as belli kra n win ara yamnen yis, a s-țwaɛeffun ddnubat-is s yisem-is.
10.44: Urɛad ifuk Buṭrus ameslay mi d-yers Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ɣef wid akk yellan dinna, i gesmeḥsisen i wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
10.45: Wid i geddan d Butṛus, yellan d at Isṛail yumnen s Lmasiḥ, dehcen, wehmen imi d-yețțunefk Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ula i wid ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail.
10.46: Axaṭer sellen-asen heddṛen yerna țḥemmiden Sidi Ṛebbi s tutlayin ur nețwassen ara. Dɣa Butṛus yenna :
10.47: Eɛni nezmer a nḥeṛṛem seg weɣḍas deg waman wid iwumi i d-yețțunefk Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen am nukkni ?
10.48: Dɣa Yefka lameṛ ad țwaɣeḍsen s yisem n Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ; imiren ḥellelen-t ad yeqqim yid-sen kra n wussan.

11.1: Ṛṛusul d watmaten yellan di tmurt n Yahuda slan belli ula d leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail qeblen awal n Ṛebbi.
11.2: Mi guɣal Butṛus ɣer temdint n Lquds, at Isṛail yumnen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ur ten-iɛǧib ara lḥal ; lummen fell-as, nnan-as :
11.3: Amek armi tkecmeḍ ɣer wexxam n wid ur neḍhiṛ ara yerna teččiḍ yid-sen ?
11.4: Dɣa Butṛus yebda a sen-d-iḥekku ayen akk yedṛan, yenna-yasen :
11.5: Mi lliɣ di temdint n Jafa, lliɣ deɛɛuɣ ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi ; taswiɛt kan, iṛuḥ leɛqel-iw, iweḥḥa-yi-d Sidi Ṛebbi , walaɣ taẓeṛbit tameqqrant tcudd si ṛebɛa n tɣemmaṛ, tețṣubbu-d seg igenni, tewweḍ-ed armi d ɣuṛ-i.
11.6: Reṣṣaɣ allen-iw fell-as, walaɣ deg-s mkul ṣṣifa n lewḥuc at ṛebɛa idaṛṛen d wid iteddun ɣef wuɛebbuḍ akk-d yefṛax n igenni n mkul ṣṣenf.
11.7: Dɣa sliɣ i yiwen n ṣṣut i yi-d iqqaṛen : a Buṭrus ! Ekker, ezlu teččeḍ !
11.8: Lameɛna nniɣ-as : ala a Sidi ! Leɛmeṛ yekcim ɣer yimi-w wayen iḥeṛmen neɣ wayen ur neṣfi.
11.9: Tikkelt tis snat, ṣṣut-nni i d-yusan seg igenni yenna-yi-d : ayen iḥseb Sidi Ṛebbi d leḥlal, ur k-id iṣaḥ ara a t-tḥesbeḍ d leḥṛam !
11.10: Ayagi yedṛa-d tlata n tikkal, dɣa kullec ițwarfed ɣer igenni.
11.11: Imiren kan wwḍen-d tlata yergazen ɣer wexxam i deg lliɣ, țwaceggɛen-d ɣuṛ-i si temdint n Qiṣarya.
11.12: Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yenna-yi-d : ddu kan yid-sen ur țțaggad ara. Wwiɣ yid-i sețța watmaten-agi i tețwalim, dɣa nṛuḥ.
11.13: Nekcem ɣer wexxam n Kurnilyus, yeḥka-yaɣ-d ayen i s yenna lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi i d ibedden ɣuṛ-es, mi s-yenna : ceggeɛ ɣer temdint n Jafa a d-awin Semɛun ițusemman Butṛus,
11.14: a k-d-yini amek ara tețwasellkeḍ kečč d wat wexxam-ik.
11.15: Mi bdiɣ ameslay, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yers-ed fell-asen, akken i d-yers fell-aɣ ass amezwaru.
11.16: Imiren mmektaɣ-ed awal-nni i d-yenna Sidna Ɛisa : « Yeḥya isseɣḍas deg aman, lameɛna kunwi aț-țețwaɣeḍsem di Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen. »
11.17: Ihi imi sen-d yefka Sidi Ṛebbi tikci am nukkni yumnen s Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, d acu-yi nekk iwakken ad xalfeɣ lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi ?
11.18: Mi slan i wannect-nni, yethedden wul-nsen, ḥemden Ṛebbi nnan : A neḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi i geldin abrid n țțuba ula i wat leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, iwakken ad sɛun tudert !
11.19: Asmi gemmut Stifan, yekker uqehheṛ i gessemfaṛaqen inelmaden ɣer mkul amkan ; ṛuḥen armi ț-țamurt n Finisya, armi ț-țigzirt n Qubṛus ț-țemdint n Antyuc, țbecciṛen awal n Ṛebbi i wat Isṛail kan ;
11.20: lameɛna llan gar-asen kra n yergazen n tegzirt n Qubṛus akk-d kra nniḍen n temdint n Qiṛwan, usan-d ɣer temdint n Antyuc, țmeslayen i iyunaniyen, țbecciṛen-asen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ yeɛnan Sidna Ɛisa.
11.21: Tazmert n Sidi Ṛebbi tețțili yid-sen ; aṭas n yemdanen i gumnen beddlen tikli, tebɛen abrid n Sidna Ɛisa.
11.22: Mi gewweḍ lexbaṛ-agi ɣer tejmaɛt n watmaten n temdint n Lquds, ceggɛen Barnabas armi d Antyuc.
11.23: Mi gewweḍ, iwala ayen i texdem dinna ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi dɣa yeččuṛ d lfeṛḥ. Yenha-ten akk iwakken ad ṭṭfen seg wul di liman sɛan di Lmasiḥ.
11.24: Axaṭer Barnabas d argaz ixeddmen lxiṛ, iččuṛ d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen akk-d liman. S wakka, aṭas n yemdanen i d-yernan ɣer Sidna Ɛisa.
11.25: Barnabas iṛuḥ ɣer temdint n Sars iwakken ad inadi ɣef Caɛul.
11.26: Mi t-yufa, yewwi-t-id yid-es ɣer temdint n Antyuc. Di tejmaɛt-nni, sɛeddan aseggas kamel, xeddmen s tdukli, sselmaden aṭas n yemdanen. Di temdint n Antyuc ițțusemman inelmaden n Sidna Ɛisa tikkelt tamezwarut : « imasiḥiyen »
11.27: Deg ussan-nni, ṣubben-d kra n lenbiya si temdint n Lquds ɣer temdint n Antyuc.
11.28: Yiwen seg-sen isem-is Agabus, ikker icar-ed s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen belli a d-yeɣli laẓ d ameqqran di ddunit meṛṛa ; ț-țideț, laẓ-agi yeɣli-d di zzman n ugellid ameqqran : Kludyus
11.29: Inelmaden n temdint n Antyuc, msefhamen belli mkul yiwen deg-sen a d-yefk ayen iwumi yezmer, iwakken ad ɛiwnen atmaten izedɣen di tmurt n Yahuda.
11.30: D ayen i xedmen ; ceggɛen Barnabas d Caɛul ad awin i imeqqranen n tejmaɛin n tmurt n Yahuda, ayen akk i d-jemɛen.

12.1: Di lweqt-nni, agellid Hiṛudus yebda ițqehhiṛ inelmaden n tejmaɛt yellan di temdint n Lquds.
12.2: Yefka lameṛ, ad nɣen s usekkin Yeɛqub gma-s n Yuḥenna.
12.3: Mi gwala d ayen isfeṛḥen at Isṛail, yerna daɣen isseḥbes Butṛus, deg wussan n lɛid n leslak.
12.4: Mi t-id-ṭṭfen, rran-t ɣer lḥebs. Isbedd-as taɛessast n ṛebɛa trebbaɛ n lɛeskeṛ, mkul tarbaɛt deg-s ṛebɛa iɛeskṛiwen ; yebɣa a t-icaṛeɛ zdat lɣaci meṛṛa, m'ara tɛeddi Tfaska n yizimer.
12.5: Butṛus ihi yella di lḥebs ; ma ț-țajmaɛt n watmaten tezga di tẓallit, tdeɛɛu fell-as ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
12.6: Iḍ-nni uqbel a t-icaṛeɛ Hiṛudus, Butṛus ițwarzen s snat snasel, yella iṭṭes ger sin iɛeskṛiwen , wiyaḍ ɛussen tawwurt n lḥebs.
12.7: Taswiɛt kan, ataya lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi iḍheṛ-as-d ; yiwet n tafat tameqqrant tceɛceɛ-ed di lḥebs-nni. Lmelk-nni yennul idis n Buṭrus, issendekwal-it-id yenna-yas : Ɣiwel Kker ! Imiren kan, qqeṛsent snasel-nni ɣlint-ed seg ifassen-is.
12.8: Lmelk-nni yenna-yas : Els-ed arkasen-ik tbeggseḍ ɣef yiman-ik ! Buṭrus ixdem akken i s-d-yenna, lmelk yenna-yas-d daɣen : Sburr-ed abeṛnus-ik tettebɛeḍ-iyi-d !
12.9: Butṛus ikker itbeɛ-it ; ur ifaq ara belli lmelk nni ț-țideț iḍheṛ-as-ed, inwa d aweḥḥi n Sidi Ṛebbi.
12.10: Ɛeddan zdat tɛessast tamezwarut, rnan tis snat, wwḍen ɣer tewwurt n wuzzal yessufuɣen ɣer temdint, teldi weḥd-es ; ffɣen ɛeddan deg yiwet n tezniqt, imiren lmelk yexfa ger wallen n Buṭrus.
12.11: Mi d-yufa iman-is di beṛṛa, ifaq belli ț-țideț, Sidi Ṛebbi iceggeɛ-d lmelk-is, isellek-it-id seg-ufus n Hiṛudus akk-d lbaṭel i bɣan a s-t xedmen wat Isṛail.
12.12: Mi gefhem lḥala i deg yella, ikker iṛuḥ ɣer wexxam n Meryem yemma-s n Yuḥenna iwumi qqaṛen daɣen Maṛqus, nnejmaɛen dinna waṭas n watmaten, deɛɛun ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
12.13: Mi gesqeṛbeb di tewwurt n beṛṛa, tusa-d yiwet n tqeddact isem-is Rudya, tqeṛṛeb ɣer tewwurt aț-țesmeḥses ;
12.14: mi teɛqel taɣect n Buṭrus, di lfeṛḥ-nni i deg tella ur teldi ara tawwurt, tuzzel aț-țissiweḍ lexbaṛ belli Butṛus atan ibedd zdat tewwurt.
12.15: Nnan-as : Waqila iffeɣ-ikem leɛqel ! Lameɛna teṭṭef deg wayen i d tenna.
12.16: Nnan-as : Ahat d lexyal-is ihi ! Llan țemsteqsayen, ma d Butṛus mazal-it isqeṛbub-ed ; mi d-ldin tawwurt wehmen mi t-walan.
12.17: Buṭrus iwehha-yasen s ufus-is ad ssusmen, yeḥka-yasen amek i t-id issufeɣ Sidi Ṛebbi si lḥebs, yenna yasen : Sṣiwḍet lexbaṛ-agi i Yeɛqub d watmaten. Dɣa iṛuḥ ibeddel amkan.
12.18: Mi guli wass, lɛeskeṛ iɛussen Butṛus tqelqen, țmesteqsayen amek i geffeɣ si lḥebs, anwa i t-yessufɣen ?
12.19: Hiṛudus iceggeɛ a t-id-qellben, meɛna ur t-ufin ara. Yebḥet iɛessasen-nni, dɣa yefka lameṛ a ten-nɣen ; imiren iṛuḥ si tmurt n Yahuda ɣer tmurt n Qiṣarya, anda yesɛedda kra n wussan.
12.20: Hiṛudus yerfa ɣef yimezdaɣ n temdinin n Sur akk d Sidun, lameɛna nutni mcawaṛen, msefhamen akk-d Blastus yellan d lewkil-is ; dɣa ceggɛen wid ara s-issutren lehna, axaṭer tamurt-nsen tețɛic seg wayen i d-itekken si tmurt n ugellid Hiṛudus.
12.21: Yewweḍ-ed wass i deg ara d-yini Hiṛudus lxeṭba i lɣaci. Mi d-yewweḍ wass n temlilit, Hiṛudus yelsa llebsa n ugellid, yuli ɣer wemkan n lxeṭba ad immeslay i lɣaci.
12.22: Mi gebda ameslay, lɣaci meṛṛa qqaṛen : D Ṛebbi i d-ițmeslayen, mačči d amdan !
12.23: Imiren kan lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi yesseɣli-d fell-as aṭan, axaṭer yeqbel a t-ḥesben yemdanen am Ṛebbi, iceggeɛ-as-d abeɛɛuc i t-yeččan dɣa yemmut ;
12.24: ma d awal n Sidi Ṛebbi țbecciṛen-t, yewweḍ ɣer mkul amkan.
12.25: Barnabas akk-d Caɛul mi fukken lxedma-nsen di temdint n Lquds uɣalen, wwin yid-sen Yuḥenna ițusemman Maṛqus.

13.1: Di tejmaɛt n temdint n Antyuc llan lenbiya d lɛulama : Barnabas, Semɛun ițusemman Aberkan, Lusyus n temdint n Qiṛwan, Manahen i d-ițțuṛebban d Hiṛudus Antibas, akk-d Caɛul.
13.2: Yiwen wass atmaten nnejmaɛen iwakken ad uẓummen yerna ad dɛun ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi. Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yenna-yasen-d : Swejdet-iyi-d Barnabas akk-d Caɛul i ccɣel-nni iwumi i ten-heggaɣ.
13.3: Mi ẓummen, ssersen ifassen-nsen fell-asen, rnan dɛan ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, dɣa ǧǧan-ten ad ṛuḥen.
13.4: Barnabas akk-d Caɛul i gceggeɛ Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, ṣubben ɣer lmeṛṣa n Slukya ; syenna rekben di lbabuṛ ɣer tegzirt n Qubṛus.
13.5: Mi wwḍen ɣer lmeṛṣa n Salamin, beccṛen awal n Ṛebbi di leǧwameɛ n wat Isṛail ; Yuḥenna yella yid-sen, yețɛawan-iten.
13.6: Mi zegren akk tigzirt-nni, wwḍen ɣer temdint n Bafus, mlalen-d d yiwen useḥḥar n wat Isṛail i gețțarran iman-is d nnbi, isem-is Barɛisa.
13.7: Ițțili ɣer lḥakem Serjyus Bulus, yellan d argaz ifehmen. Serjyus iceggeɛ ɣer Barnabas d Caɛul, axaṭer yebɣa ad isel i wawal n Ṛebbi.
13.8: Meɛna Ilimas aseḥḥar-nni, ( akkagi i gețwaṭerjem yisem-is s tyunanit ) yețxaṣam-iten, yețnadi ad isseɛṛeq abrid n liman i lḥakem-nni.
13.9: Caɛul, ițusemman daɣen Bulus, yeččuṛen d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, issers allen-is fell-as,
13.10: yenna-yas : A mmi-s n Cciṭan yeččuṛen ț-țiḥila d lexdeɛ ! Ay aɛdaw n lḥeqq ! Ar melmi ara tesseɛwajeḍ akka iberdan n lewqam n Sidi Ṛebbi ?
13.11: Tura atan ufus n Sidi Ṛebbi fell-ak : aț-țedderɣleḍ, aț-țeqqimeḍ kra n wussan ur tețwaliḍ ara tafat n yiṭij. Imiren kan, Ilimas idderɣel, yeɣli-d fell-as ṭṭlam ; yeqqim isferfud, ițnadi anwa ara s-yeṭṭfen afus.
13.12: Lḥakem-nni mi gwala ayen yedṛan, itɛeǧǧeb deg wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi dɣa yumen.
13.13: Bulus d yeṛfiqen-is zegren tigzirt n Qubṛus, wwḍen ɣer temdint n Bafus, syenna rekben di lbabuṛ iwakken ad zegren ɣer temdint n Barja yellan di tmurt n Bamfilya.
13.14: Mi wwḍen ɣer dinna, Yuḥenna yeǧǧa-ten yuɣal ɣer temdint n Lquds ; ma d nutni kemmlen abrid-nsen si temdint n Barja, wwḍen ɣer temdint n Antyuc yellan di tmurt n Bisidya. Deg wass n westeɛfu, i deg țnejmaɛen wat Isṛail di leǧwameɛ, kecmen ɣer lǧameɛ, qqimen.
13.15: Mi d-ɣṛan tiktabin n Sidna Musa akk-d Lenbiya, imeqqranen n lǧameɛ nni nnan-asen : Ay atmaten, ma yella tesɛam kra n wawal s wayes ara tenhum lɣaci-agi, ɛeddit-ed aț-țhedṛem !
13.16: Bulus ikker-ed, iwehha-yasen s ufus-is, yenna : Ay at Isṛail ! A kunwi iḍuɛen Ṛebbi, ḥesset-iyi-d !
13.17: Sidi Ṛebbi Illu n wat Isṛail, yextaṛ lejdud-nneɣ, yessefti-ten mi llan di tmurt n Maṣeṛ, yessufeɣ iten id s tezmert-is tameqqrant.
13.18: Iḥuder-iten azal n ṛebɛin iseggasen deg unezṛuf n Sinay.
13.19: Issenger sebɛa leǧnas di tmurt n Kenɛan, iwakken a sen-yefk tamurt-nni i lejdud-nneɣ.
13.21: Dɣa ssutren i Sidi Ṛebbi a sen-d-yefk agellid ; yefka-yasen-d Caɛul, mmi-s n Qic n wedrum n Benyamin, yuɣal d agellid fell-asen azal n ṛebɛin iseggasen.
13.22: Lameɛna Sidi Ṛebbi yekkes leḥkum i Caɛul, yerra Sidna Dawed d agellid deg umkan-is. Atan wayen i d-yenna fell-as : Ufiɣ Dawed, mmi-s n Yassa, d argaz yellan akken i t-yebɣa wul-iw, ara ixedmen lebɣi-w.
13.23: Tura, si dderya n Sidna Dawed i d-ifka Sidi Ṛebbi amsellek i wat Isṛail akken i t-id-yewɛed ; amsellek-agi d Ɛisa.
13.24: Uqbel a d-yas Sidna Ɛisa, Yeḥya ibecceṛ țțuba s weɣḍas n waman i wegdud n wat Isṛail.
13.25: Uqbel a t-ṭṭfen ɣer lḥebs iwakken a t-nɣen, Yeḥya yenna i lɣaci : Nekk ur lliɣ ara d win akken i tɣilem ; lameɛna a d-yas deffir-i yiwen, ur uklaleɣ ara ad fsiɣ ula d lexyuḍ n warkasen-is.
13.26: Ay atmaten ! Ay arraw n Sidna Ibṛahim d wid akk ițțaggaden Sidi Ṛebbi ! I nukkni iwumi i d-ițțuceggeɛ wawal-agi n leslak.
13.27: Axaṭer imezdaɣ n temdint n Lquds d imeqqranen-nsen, ur fhimen ara d acu-t Ɛisa-agi, ur fhimen ara daɣen imeslayen i d qqaṛen di tektabt n lenbiya mkul ass n westeɛfu ; lameɛna xedmen akken i gura di tira iqedsen, mi ḥekmen ɣef Sidna Ɛisa s lmut.
13.28: Ɣas akken ur s-d-ufin ara sebba s wayes ara ḥekmen fell-as s lmut, ssutren i Bilaṭus ad yefk lameṛ iwakken a t-semmṛen ɣef lluḥ.
13.29: Mi gedṛa wayen akk ițwaketben fell-as, ṣubben-t-id seg umidag, rran-t ɣer uẓekka.
13.30: Lameɛna Sidi Ṛebbi isseḥya-t-id si ger lmegtin.
13.31: Acḥal wussan nețța ițbeggin-ed iman-is i widak-nni i d-yeddan yid-es si tmurt n Jlili armi ț-țamdint n Lquds ; tura d nutni i d inigan-is zdat n yemdanen meṛṛa.
13.32: Daymi, nukkni tura newwi yawen-d lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ. Ayen akken i gewɛed Sidi Ṛebbi i lejdud nneɣ, yedṛa-d tura gar-aneɣ, nukkni yellan d dderya-nsen.
13.33: Mi d-yesseḥya Sidi Ṛebbi Sidna Ɛisa, akken yura di Sabur wis-sin : Kečč d mmi, d nekk i k-id-yefkan ɣer ddunit ass-a !
13.34: Ihi Sidi Ṛebbi isseḥya-t-id si ger lmegtin iwakken ur irekku ara, akken i t-id-yenna di tira iqedsen : Si Dawed ara wen-d-fkeɣ lbaṛakat yeṣfan, lbaṛakat n tideț i wen weɛdeɣ. +
13.35: Yura daɣen : Ur tețțaǧǧaḍ ara ameɛzuz-ik ad yerku zdaxel n uẓekka .
13.36: Di lweqt-is, Sidna Dawed yexdem lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi ; mi gemmut, yețwamḍel ger lejdud-is, tura lǧețța-s terka deg uẓekka.
13.37: Lameɛna win i d-yesseḥya Sidi Ṛebbi, ur t-yeǧǧi ara ad yerku deg uẓekka.
13.38: Ilaq ihi aț-țeẓrem ay atmaten, belli s yisem-is i wen-d-ițțubecceṛ leɛfu n ddnubat.
13.39: Kra n win yumnen yis, a s-țwasemmḥen ddnubat-is, ddnubat-nni i ɣef ur tezmirem ara aț-țețwasemmḥem s ccariɛa n Musa.
13.40: Ihi ɣuṛ-wat a d-yedṛu yid-wen wayen i d-nnan lenbiya :
13.41: Ay imdanen yeččuṛen d zzux, iḥeqqṛen wiyaḍ, dehcet, tenfum syagi ! Axaṭer atan ad xedmeɣ di zzman-nwen yiwet lḥaǧa s wayes ur tețțamnem ara ma yella ḥkan awen-ț-id.
13.42: Mi kkren ad ffɣen si lǧameɛ, ḥellelen Bulus d Barnabas iwakken a d-uɣalen ass n ssebt i d-iteddun a d-rnun a d-mmeslayen ɣef wannect nni.
13.43: Mi mfaṛaqen, aṭas n wat Isṛail akk-d wid i gkecmen ddin-nsen, tebɛen-d Bulus akk-d Barnabas i sen-ițmeslayen, i ten-inehhun ad ṭṭfen di ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi.
13.44: Ass n westeɛfu nniḍen, qṛib tamdint meṛṛa i d-innejmaɛen iwakken ad slen i wawal n Ṛebbi.
13.45: Mi walan annect-nni n lɣaci, at Isṛail usmen, sseɛwajen s rregmat ayen i d-yeqqaṛ Bulus.
13.46: Lameɛna Bulus d Barnabas nnan-asen ɛinani : I kunwi d imezwura iwumi ilaq ad ițțubecceṛ wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi, meɛna imi ur t-teqbilem ara, tḥusbem iman-nwen ur tuklalem ara tudert n dayem, ihi a nezzi ɣer wid ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail.
13.47: Axaṭer atah wayen i d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi : Sbeddeɣ-k aț-țiliḍ ț-țafat i leǧnas, aț-țessiwḍeḍ leslak alamma d ixfawen n ddunit.
13.48: Leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail feṛḥen mi slan s wannect-agi, țḥemmiden awal n Ṛebbi ; wid akk yețțuheggan i tudert n dayem umnen.
13.49: Awal n Sidi Ṛebbi yețțubecceṛ di mkul amkan n tmurt.
13.50: Lameɛna at Isṛail sḥeṛcen imeqqranen n temdint akk-d d kra n tilawin timeṛkantiyin i gettabaɛen ddin n wat Isṛail ; sekkren-d aqehheṛ ameqqran ɣef Bulus d Barnabas, ssufɣen-ten si tmurt-nsen.
13.51: Bulus d Barnabas zwin aɣebbaṛ n iḍaṛṛen-nsen , ṛuḥen ɣer temdint n Ikunyum.
13.52: Ma d inelmaden ijdiden, ččuṛen d lfeṛḥ akk-d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.

14.1: Di temdint n Ikunyum, Bulus d Barnabas kecmen daɣen ɣer lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail, beccṛen-asen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ ; aṭas n Iyunaniyen akk-d wat Isṛail i gumnen.
14.2: Lameɛna kra seg wat Isṛail i gugin ad amnen, ɛemṛen-asen aqeṛṛuy i wat n leǧnas niḍen sḥeṛcen-ten iwakken ad xedmen lbaṭel i watmaten ;
14.3: ɣas akken, Bulus d Barnabas ɛeṭṭlen di temdint n Ikunyum , țeklen ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi, heddṛen s țțbut mbla akukru ɣef ṛṛeḥma-ines. Sidi Ṛebbi ițbeggin-ed s lbeṛhanat d licaṛat belli ayen țbecciṛen ț-țideț.
14.4: Imezdaɣ n temdint mfaṛaqen : kra deg-sen tebɛen at Isṛail, ma d wiyaḍ ddan d ṛṛusul.
14.5: At Isṛail d iyunaniyen akk-d imeqqranen-nsen ɛewlen ad xedmen lbaṭel i ṛṛusul, bɣan a ten nɣen s weṛjam.
14.6: Bulus d Barnabas mi ten-yewweḍ lexbaṛ, beddlen amkan ṛuḥen ɣer tmurt n Likawnya, ɣer temdinin n Listra, d Derba akk-d tudrin i sent-id yezzin ;
14.7: țbecciṛen dinna lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi.
14.8: Di temdint n Listra, yella yiwen wergaz ikerfen seg-wasmi i d-ilul, di leɛmeṛ-is ur yelḥi.
14.9: Yesmeḥsis i wayen i d-yeqqaṛ Bulus ; Bulus iṛeṣṣa allen-is fell-as, iwala belli yesɛa liman iwakken ad yeḥlu,
14.10: dɣa yenṭeq ɣur-es s ṣṣut ɛlayen yenna-yas : Ekker, bedd ɣef yidaṛṛen-ik ! Imiren kan yekker, yebda ițeddu.
14.11: Mi walan ayen yexdem Bulus, lɣaci n tmurt n Likawnya țɛeggiḍen s tutlayt nsen : Iṛebbiten ṣubben-d ɣuṛ-nneɣ s ṣṣifa n yemdanen !
14.12: Semman-as i Barnabas « SSus », ma d Bulus « Hermas » axaṭer d nețța i d-ițmeslayen.
14.13: Lmuqeddem n lǧameɛ n SSus yellan ɣer tewwurt n temdint, yewwi-d izgaren akk-d ijeǧǧigen zdat tewwura n lǧameɛ ; yebɣa a ten-yezlu d asfel nețța d lɣaci i Bulus akk-d Barnabas.
14.14: Ṛṛusul mi slan s wannect nni cerrgen llebsa-nsen, uzzlen ɣer tlemmast n lɣaci, țɛeggiḍen :
14.15: Ay irgazen, acuɣeṛ i txeddmem akka ? Nukni d imdanen kan i nella am kunwi ! D lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i wen-d newwi iwakken aț-țeṭṭixṛem i leɛbada n wayen ur nesɛi lmeɛna ; aț-tebɛem abrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, Bab n tudert i d-ixelqen igenni d lqaɛa, lebḥeṛ d wayen akk yellan deg-s.
14.16: Ɣas akken di zzmanat iɛeddan yeǧǧa imdanen n leǧnas meṛṛa ad tebɛen abrid i sen-yehwan ;
14.17: nețța yețbeggin-ed iman-is s lxiṛat i gxeddem : d nețța i wen-d-ițțaken ageffur ( lehwa ), d nețța i wen-d ițțaken lɣellat di lweqt-nsent, d nețța daɣen i wen-d-ițakken tamɛict-nwen, ula d ulawen-nwen d nețța i ten issefṛaḥen.
14.18: Ɣas akken ṛṛusul nnan asen imeslayen-agi, s lḥif ameqqran i ḥebsen lɣaci-nni iwakken ur sen zellun ara asfel.
14.19: Dɣa usan-d kra seg wat Isṛail si temdinin n Antyuc akk-d Ikunyum, sekkren ccwal ger lɣaci, sḥeṛcen-ten ad ṛejmen Bulus iwakken a t-nɣen. Mi t-ṛejmen, zzuɣṛen-t ɣer beṛṛa n temdint, axaṭer ɣilen yemmut.
14.20: Lameɛna nnejmaɛen-d ɣuṛ-es inelmaden, ṭṭfen-as afus, yuɣal yekker yekcem ɣer temdint. Azekka-nni, nețța d Barnabas ṛuḥen ɣer temdint n Derba.
14.21: Mi beccṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ di temdint-nni n Derba, aṭas inelmaden i d-yernan ; dɣa uɣalen ɣer temdinin n Listra, Ikunyum d Antyuc
14.22: iwakken ad sǧehden ulawen n inelmaden. Nehhun-ten ad ṭṭfen di liman, qqaṛen-asen : S waṭas n leɛtab ara nekcem ɣer ddewla n Sidi Ṛebbi.
14.23: Sbedden imḍebbṛen di mkul tajmaɛt ; mi uẓamen, rnan dɛan ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, ǧǧan-ten seddaw leɛnaya n Sidi Ṛebbi s wayes umnen.
14.24: Zegren si tmurt n Bisidya, wwḍen-d ɣer tmurt n Bamfilya,
14.25: beccṛen awal n Ṛebbi di temdint n Barja, imiren ṣubben-d ɣer temdint n Aṭalya.
14.26: Syenna rekben lbabuṛ, uɣalen ɣer temdint n Antyuc ansi i ten wekklen i Ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef cceɣl-nni xedmen.
14.27: Mi wwḍen, snejmaɛen-d atmaten, ḥkan-asen ayen akk i gexdem Sidi Ṛebbi yis-sen, d wamek i d-wwin ɣer webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi at leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail.
14.28: Sɛeddan aṭas n wussan akk-d inelmaden.

15.1: Kra n yemdanen i d-yusan si tmurt n Yahuda ɣer temdint n Antyuc, bɣan ad slemden atmaten, qqaṛen-asen : Ma yella ur teḍhiṛem ara am akken i d-tenna ccariɛa n Musa, ur tezmirem ara aț-țețwasellkem
15.2: Bulus d Barnabas ur qbilen ara ayen i sselmaden yergazen-agi i d-yusan si tmurt n Yahuda dɣa yekker lxilaf ameqqran gar-asen. Ceggɛen Bulus d Barnabas akk-d kra seg-sen, ad alin ɣer ṛṛusul akk-d imeqqranen yellan di temdint n Lquds iwakken ad msefhamen ɣef temsalt-agi n ṭṭhaṛa.
15.3: Tajmaɛt-nni n watmaten n temdint n Antyuc tɛawen-iten deg wayen ara ḥwiǧen deg webrid-nsen ; dɣa ṛuḥen, ɛeddan si tmura n Finisya akk-d Samarya, ḥekkun di mkul amkan amek umnen s Sidna Ɛisa leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail. Mi slan i wannect-agi, feṛḥen aṭas watmaten.
15.4: Mi wwḍen ɣer temdint n Lquds, tesṭerḥeb yis-sen tejmaɛt n watmaten d ṛṛusul akk-d imeqqranen n tejmaɛt ; nutni ḥkan-asen lecɣal imeqqranen i gexdem Sidi Ṛebbi gar-asen.
15.5: Kra si terbaɛt n ifariziyen i gumnen s Sidna Ɛisa kkren-d nnan : Ilaq aț-ḍehhṛem i watmaten ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail yerna a sen tamṛem ad tebɛen ccariɛa n Sidna Musa.
15.6: Dɣa ṛṛusul akk-d imeqqranen n tejmaɛt nnejmaɛen iwakken ad frun taluft-agi.
15.7: Mi ketṛen deg wawal, ikker-ed Butṛus yenna-yasen : Ay atmaten, teẓram belli Sidi Ṛebbi yextaṛ-iyi-d gar-awen seg wass amezwaru iwakken ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, akken ad amnen.
15.8: Sidi Ṛebbi yessnen ulawen, ibeggen-ed belli iqbel-iten imi i sen-yefka Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen am akken i ɣ-t-id-yefka i nukkni ;
15.9: ur yexdim ara lxilaf gar-aɣ d yid-sen, imi i gṣeffa ulawen-nsen s liman ula d nutni.
15.10: Ihi tura acuɣeṛ i tețjeṛṛibem Sidi Ṛebbi, mi tebɣam aț-țessersem ɣef tuyat n wid yumnen azaglu ur nerfid nukkni, ur rfiden lejdud-nneɣ ;
15.11: lameɛna s ṛṛeḥma n Sidna Ɛisa swayes i numen, i nețțusellek am akken țțusellken ula d nutni.
15.12: Akken ma llan di tejmaɛt ssusmen, dɣa smeḥsisen i Bulus d Barnabas i d-iḥekkun licaṛat d leɛǧayeb i gexdem Sidi Ṛebbi yis-sen ger leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail.
15.13: Mi kfan ameslay, inṭeq Yeɛqub yenna-d : Ay atmaten, ḥesset-iyi-d : Tura
15.14: Semɛun yeḥka-d amek i d-ixtaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi si ger leǧnas si tazwara, lumma ara yeddun s yisem-is.
15.15: S wakka, yedṛa-d wayen i d nnan lenbiya am akken yura di tektabt iqedsen :
15.16: Deg ussan-nni, a d-uɣaleɣ a s-ɛiwdeɣ lebni i wexxam n Dawed ; axxam-nni yeɣlin, ad sbeddeɣ leḥyuḍ-is ihudden,
15.17: iwakken ayen i d-iqqimen seg imdanen akk-d leǧnas meṛṛa i geslan s yisem-iw, ad nadin ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi.
15.18: Akka i d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi i gxeddmen lecɣal-agi i d-ihegga si zik.
15.19: Ihi a wen-d-iniɣ : lemmer ufiɣ, ur nrennu ara aɣilif i wid ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, i gumnen s Sidna Ɛisa.
15.20: Lameɛna a sen-naru tabṛaț iwakken ad ṭṭixṛen ɣef wučči n weksum immezlen i lmeṣnuɛat d ssadat. Ad ttixṛen daɣen i yir tikli, i wučči n lmal immurḍsen akk-d tissit n idammen,
15.21: axaṭer si zzman aqdim llan yemdanen ițbecciṛen ccariɛa n Musa di mkul tamdint, yerna mkul ass n westeɛfu qqaṛen taktabt-is di leǧwameɛ n wat Isṛail.
15.22: Ihi ṛṛusul, imeqqranen n tejmaɛt akk-d watmaten meṛṛa walan belli d ṛṛay yelhan ma yella xtaṛen-d kra n watmaten si gar-asen, iwakken a ten-ceggɛen ɣer temdint n Antyuc nutni d Bulus akk-d Barnabas. Xtaṛen Yuda, ițusemman Barsaba akk-d Silas ; d irgazen i țqadaṛen watmaten.
15.23: Fkan asen tabṛaț i deg uran : Ay atmaten ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, i gzedɣen di temdinin n Antyuc, n Surya akk-d Silisya, țsellimen-d fell-awen ṛṛusul akk-d imeqqranen n tejmaɛt akk-d watmaten n temdint n Lquds.
15.24: Nesla belli kra n watmaten-nneɣ ṛuḥen-d ɣuṛ-wen mbla ma nefka-yasen lameṛ, rwin-kkun s yimeslayen-nsen, skecmen-awen ccekk.
15.25: Tura mi nemcawaṛ, neqsed s yiwen ṛṛay a d-nextiṛ kra n watmaten, ara wen-nceggeɛ nutni d watmaten nneɣ eɛzizen Bulus d Barnabas ;
15.26: nutni i gsebblen tudert nsen ɣef yisem n Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ. +
15.27: Nceggeɛ-awen ihi Yuda akk-d Silas ara wen-d-yeṣṣiwḍen s yiman nsen imeslayen-agi :
15.28: Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen akk-d nukkni, nwala d ayen yelhan m'ur nḥettem ara fell-awen ayen nniḍen sennig wayen ilaqen,
15.29: yeɛni aț-țettixṛem i wučči n iseflawen yemmezlen i lmeṣnuɛat, i tissit n idammen, i lmal yemmuṛdsen d zzna. D ayen yelhan ma tḥudrem iman-nwen ɣef wannect-agi. Qqimet di lehna.
15.30: Imiren wid-nni yețwaxtaṛen ǧǧan atmaten di lehna, ṛuḥen ɣer temdint n Antyuc. Dinna jemɛen-d atmaten, fkan-asen tabṛaț-nni.
15.31: Mi ț-id-ɣṛan, feṛḥen aṭas s lewṣayat yellan deg-s d yimeslayen i ten-isǧehden.
15.32: Yuda d Silas iwumi yețțunefk a d-țxebbiṛen s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, nhan atmaten-nni, sǧehden-ten s waṭas n yimeslayen.
15.33: Mi sɛeddan dinna kra n wussan, serrḥen-asen watmaten ad uɣalen di lehna ɣer wid i ten-id-iceggɛen ;
15.34: ma d Silas iɛǧeb-as lḥal yebɣa ad yernu kra n wussan dinna.
15.35: Bulus d Barnabas qqimen di temdint-agi n Antyuc , sselmaden, țbecciṛen awal n Sidi Ṛebbi nutni d waṭas n watmaten nniḍen.
15.36: Mi ɛeddan kra n wussan, Bulus yenna-yas i Barnabas : Eyya a nuɣal a nesteqsi ɣef watmaten yellan di temdinin anda nbecceṛ awal n Sidi Ṛebbi, iwakken a nẓer amek i țilin.
15.37: Barnabas yebɣa ad yawi yid-sen Yuḥenna ițusemman Maṛqus,
15.38: lameɛna Bulus ur yeqbil ara ad awin yid-sen win akken i ten yeǧǧan di tmurt n Bamfilya, yerna ur ten-iɛawen ara di ccɣel-nsen.
15.39: Ikker yiwen lxilaf gar-asen armi mfaṛaqen. Barnabas yewwi yid-es Maṛqus, rekben di lbabuṛ ɣer tegzirt n Qubṛus,
15.40: ma d Bulus yextaṛ Silas ad iddu yid-es. Atmaten n tejmaɛt wekklen-t i ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi, dɣa iṛuḥ.
15.41: Yekka-d nețța d Silas si tmura n Surya akk-d Silisya, isseǧhad tijmaɛin n watmaten.

16.1: Bulus d Silas wwḍen ɣer temdinin n Derba d Listra ; ufan dinna yiwen unelmad isem-is Timuti, baba-s d ayunani, ma d yemma-s n wat Isṛail, nețțat daɣen tumen s Lmasiḥ.
16.2: Atmaten yellan di temdint n Listra ț-țemdint n Ikunyum ḥemmlen-t yerna țcekkiṛen-t.
16.3: Bulus yebɣa ad yawi yid-es Timuti, daymi i s-iḍehheṛ ɣef ddemma n wat Isṛail yellan dinna, axaṭer ẓran akk belli baba-s d ayunani.
16.4: Di yal tamdint i deg ɛeddan, țxebbiṛen atmaten s lewṣayat yellan di tebṛaț i d-fkan ṛṛusul d imeqqranen n temdint n Lquds, nehhun-ten ad tebɛen lewṣayat-agi.
16.5: Tijmaɛin n watmaten țimɣuṛent di liman, leḥsab n widak yumnen s Lmasiḥ yețnerni kull ass.
16.6: Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ur sen-iserreḥ ara ad ṛuḥen ad beccṛen awal n Sidi Ṛebbi di tmurt n Asya, dɣa zegren timura n Frijya d Galasya.
16.7: Mi wwḍen ɣer tmurt n Misya, ɛeṛden ad ṛuḥen ɣer tmurt n Bitinya ; lameɛna Ṛṛuḥ n Sidna Ɛisa ur sen-iserreḥ ara daɣen ad ṛuḥen ɣer dinna.
16.8: Ɛeddan si tmurt n Misya, ṣubben ɣer temdint n Truwas.
16.9: Deg iḍ, iweḥḥa-yas-ed Ṛebbi i Bulus, iwala yiwen umezdaɣ n Masidunya ibedd-ed ɣuṛ-es, ițḥellil-it ad iɛeddi ɣuṛ-sen ɣer tmurt n Masidunya a ten-iɛiwen.
16.10: Mbeɛd ayen i s-d-iweḥḥa Sidi Ṛebbi i Bulus, nennuda amek ara nṛuḥ ɣer tmurt n Masidunya, axaṭer nefhem belli d Sidi Ṛebbi i ɣ-d yessawlen iwakken a nbecceṛ Lexbeṛ n lxiṛ di tmurt-nni.
16.11: Mi nerkeb di lbabuṛ si temdint n Truwas, nṛuḥ qbala ɣer tegzirt n Samutras. Azekka-nni nkemmel ɣer temdint n Nabulis.
16.12: Syenna nṛuḥ ɣer temdint n Filibus, illan țamdint tamezwarut n Masidunya i gesteɛmeṛ Ṛuman ; nesɛedda kra n wussan dinna.
16.13: Ass n westeɛfu, neffeɣ si temdint nṛuḥ ɣer rrif n wasif, nɣil a naf amkan anda țnejmaɛen i tẓallit. Nufa dinna kra n tilawin nnejmaɛent, neqqim iwakken a nemmeslay yid sent.
16.14: Tella dinna yiwet n tmeṭṭut isem-is Lidya n temdint n Tyatir, teznuzu lkețțan azeggaɣ ɣlayen ; ț-țameṭṭut iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi. M'akken i d-tesmeḥsis, Sidi Ṛebbi yeldi-yas ul-is iwakken aț-țerr ddehn is ɣer wayen i d-yeqqaṛ Bulus.
16.15: Mi tețwaɣḍes deg waman nețțat d wat wexxam-is, teɛṛeḍ-aɣ, tenna-d : ma twalam umneɣ seg ul-iw s Sidi Ṛebbi, eyyaw aț-țesɛeddim kra n wussan deg wexxam-iw. Dɣa teḥreṣ-aɣ iwakken a nekcem.
16.16: Yiwen wass mi nteddu ɣer wemkan-nni n tẓallit, temmuger-aɣ-d yiwet n tqeddact ițwamelken, ț- țaderwict, tețțawi-d aṭas n lfayda i yemɛellmen i ɣef txeddem.
16.17: Tettabaɛ-aɣ-d nekk d Bulus, tețɛeggiḍ teqqaṛ : Imdanen-agi d iqeddacen n Ṛebbi ɛlayen, țbecciṛen-awen abrid n leslak.
16.18: Acḥal n wussan nețțat tettabaɛ deg-nneɣ, yuɣal Bulus yeɛya deg-s, yezzi ɣuṛ-es, yenna i uṛuḥani i ț-imelken : Umṛeɣ-k s yisem n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, effeɣ si tmeṭṭut-agi ! Imiren kan, yeffeɣ-it uṛuḥani-nni.
16.19: Imɛellmen-is mi walan dayen ur sen-d-tețțawi ara lfayda, ṭṭfen Bulus d Silas, zzuɣṛen-ten ɣer wezniq n temdint anda țnejmaɛen lɣaci zdat lḥukkam.
16.20: Wwin-ten ɣer lḥakem n tmurt n Ṛuman nnan : Imdanen-agi-nni n wat Isṛail cewwlen tamdint-nneɣ.
16.21: Sselmaden lɛaddat ur nezmir a tent-neqbel neɣ a tent-netbeɛ nukkni yellan d iṛumaniyen.
16.22: Lɣaci kkren-d ɣuṛ-sen s leɛyaḍ, dɣa lḥukkam n Ṛuman umṛen a sen-cerrgen llebsa-nsen, a ten wwten s ujelkkaḍ ( s ucelliṭ ).
16.23: Mi sen-sseṛwan tiyitiwin, rran-ten ɣer lḥebs, umṛen i wɛessas n lḥebs a ten-iɛas akken ilaq.
16.24: Akken i t-yewweḍ lameṛ-agi, aɛessas-nni yerra-ten ɣer lḥebs yellan seddaw tmurt, yerna yurez-asen idaṛṛen s snasel.
16.25: Di țnaṣfa n yiḍ, Bulus d Silas deɛɛun ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, cennun, țḥemmiden-t, imeḥbas nniḍen smeḥsisen-asen.
16.26: Taswiɛt kan, tezlez tmurt armi yenhezz ula d lsas n lḥebs ; imiren kan ldint tewwura n lḥebs, snasel icudden imeḥbas meṛṛa qelɛent-ed.
16.27: Aɛessas-nni ikker-ed ; mi gwala tiwwura n lḥebs ldint, ijbed-ed asekkin is iwakken ad ineɣ iman-is ; yenwa rewlen imeḥbas-nni.
16.28: Lameɛna Bulus iɛeggeḍ s lǧehd is, yenna-yas : Eḥbes ! Ḥader aț-țenɣeḍ iman ik ! Aql-aɣ akk dagi.
16.29: Dɣa aɛessas yumeṛ a s-d-ceɛlen tafat, yuzzel ɣer daxel n lḥebs ; yeɣli ɣer idaṛṛen n Bulus d Silas, ițergigi.
16.30: Yessufeɣ-iten-id si lḥebs, yenna yasen : A ssyad-i, d acu i glaqen a t xedmeɣ iwakken ad țțusellkeɣ ?
16.31: Rran-as : Amen s Sidna Ɛisa, aț-țețusellkeḍ s kečč s wat wexxam-ik.
16.32: Dɣa beccṛen-as awal n Sidi Ṛebbi i nețța d wat wexxam-is meṛṛa.
16.33: Deg yiḍ-nni kan, aɛessas-nni yewwi-ten anda ara sen-yessired lejruḥ-nsen ; imiren-nni sɣeḍsen-t deg aman s nețța s twacult-is.
16.34: Yuɣal nețța d Bulus d Silas ɣer wexxam-is, issers-asen-d ad ččen. Yefṛeḥ aṭas nețța d wat wexxam-is imi umnen s Sidi Ṛebbi.
16.35: Akken yuli wass, lḥukkam n Ṛuman ceggɛen wid ara yinin i uɛessas n lḥebs : Serreḥ-asen i imeḥbas-nni !
16.36: Aɛessas ixebbeṛ Bulus yenna yas : Lḥukkam umṛen-iyi-d a wen serrḥeɣ ; tura tzemrem aț-țefɣem, ṛuḥet di lehna !
16.37: Lameɛna Bulus yenna-yas : Amek ! Ewten-aɣ zdat medden s ujelkaḍ ( s ucelliḍ ) mbla ma nɛedda di ccṛeɛ nukni yellan d iṛumaniyen yerna skecmen-aɣ ɣer lḥebs tura bɣan a ɣ-ssufɣen s tuffra ? Awah ! A d-asen nutni s yiman-nsen a ɣ-serrḥen.
16.38: Wid-nni i d-ițțuceggɛen ssawḍen imeslayen-nni i lḥukkam n Ṛuman. Lḥukkam ikcem-iten lxuf mi slan belli Bulus d Silas d iṛumaniyen i llan. Usan-d ḍelben deg-sen ssmaḥ, serrḥen-asen si lḥebs,
16.40: Mi ffɣen si lḥebs, Bulus d Silas ṛuḥen ɣer wexxam n Lidya, anda nnejmaɛen d watmaten, nhan-ten, imiren ṛuḥen.

17.1: Bulus d Silas ɛeddan si temdinin n Anfibulis akk-d Abulunis, wwḍen ɣer temdint n Tiṣalunik anda sɛan wat Isṛail lǧameɛ.
17.2: Akken yennum, Bulus yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ ; tlata smanat, mkul ass n westeɛfu, ițmeslay yid-sen ɣef wawal n Ṛebbi.
17.3: Issefham-asen, ițbeggin-asen-d di Tira belli Lmasiḥ ilaq ad yeɛteb yerna a d-yeḥyu si ger lmegtin, iqqaṛ-asen : Ɛisa-yagi ɣef i wen-d-hedṛeɣ, d nețța i d Lmasiḥ.
17.4: Kra deg-sen umnen ; aṭas n iyunaniyen iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi d waṭas n tilawin n laṣel i geddan daɣen d Bulus akk-d Silas.
17.5: Lameɛna at Isṛail usmen, dɣa wwin yid-sen kra n yergazen n diri ițmenṭaṛen deg iberdan, sekkren ccwal ger lɣaci, cewwlen tamdint meṛṛa, zeḍmen ɣer wexxam n Yazun, qellben ɣef Bulus d Silas iwakken a ten-caṛɛen zdat lɣaci.
17.6: Imi ur ten-ufin ara, zuɣṛen-d Yazun d kra n watmaten ɣer lḥukkam n temdint, bdan țɛeggiḍen : D irgazen-agi i gerwin ddunit, atan usan-d armi d ɣuṛ-nneɣ,
17.7: Yazun isṭerḥeb yis-sen. Xulfen lumuṛ n Qayṣer, qqaṛen belli yella ugellid nniḍen ițusemman Ɛisa.
17.8: S yimeslayen-agi, sḥeṛcen lɣaci akk-d lḥakem n temdint.
17.9: Ugin a sen-serrḥen i Yazun d watmaten nniḍen armi xellṣen lexṭiya.
17.10: Mi d-yewweḍ yiḍ, atmaten srewlen Bulus d Silas ɣer temdint n Biri. Mi wwḍen, kecmen ɣer lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail.
17.11: Lɣaci n dinna sṭerḥben yis-sen axiṛ n wid n temdint n Tiṣalunik , qeblen awal n Ṛebbi s wul yeṣfan. Kull ass țnadin di Tira iqedsen iwakken ad walin ma yella ț-țideț, yella di tira wayen i d-qqaṛen.
17.12: Aṭas seg-sen i gumnen ; ger iyunaniyen, aṭas n tilawin n laṣel d yergazen nniḍen i gumnen daɣen.
17.13: Lameɛna mi slan wat Isṛail n Tiṣalunik belli Bulus ițbecciṛ awal n Ṛebbi di temdint n Biri, uzzlen-d ad rwin lɣaci, a ten-cewwlen.
17.14: Dɣa atmaten srewlen imiren Bulus ɣer lǧiha n lebḥeṛ, ma d Silas d Timuti qqimen di temdint n Biri.
17.15: Widak yewwin Bulus, ssawḍen-t armi ț-țamdint n Atinya, syenna uɣalen-d ɣer temdint n Biri. Iweṣṣa-ten Bulus ad inin i Silas d Timuti, ur țɛeṭṭilen ara a t-leḥqen.
17.16: M'akken i gețṛaǧu Silas akk-d Timuti di temdint n Atinya, Bulus iɣaḍ-it lḥal mi gwala tamdint-nni teččuṛ d lmeṣnuɛat i țɛebbiden imezdaɣ-is.
17.17: Di lǧameɛ, yebda ițmeslay d wat Isṛail akk-d iyunaniyen iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi. Ițmeslay daɣen akk-d wid i d-ițemlili kull ass di tejmaɛt n temdint.
17.18: Kra n lɛulama yețfelsifen, yeɛni wid ițekkin di tejmaɛt n Ibikur akk-d Stuwis, bdan țmeslayen yid-es. Kra qqaṛen : D acu i gebɣa ad yini bu lehduṛ agi ? Wiyaḍ qqaṛen : Waqila yețbecciṛ iṛebbiten ibeṛṛaniyen ! Axaṭer Bulus yella ițbecciṛ-asen ɣef Sidna Ɛisa akk-d ḥeggu n lmegtin.
17.19: Dɣa wwin-t yid-sen ɣeryiwen wemkan n ccṛeɛ n temdint-nni iwumi qqaṛen Laryufaj, nnan-as : Nezmer a nẓer d acu-t uselmed agi ajdid i ɣ-d-tewwiḍ ?
17.20: Axaṭer nesla-yak tețmeslayeḍ-ed ɣef temsalin yessewhamen. Nebɣa a nissin lmeɛna-nsent.
17.21: Imezdaɣ n temdint n Atinya akk-d ibeṛṛaniyen i gzedɣen dinna, ḥemmlen ad sɛeddin lweqt-nsen anagar deg umeslay d usmeḥses i lexbaṛat ijdiden i d-ițeffɣen.
17.22: Bulus ibedd di tlemmast n Laryufaj yenna : Ay irgazen n temdint n Atinya, ẓriɣ-kkun tẓewṛem yerna tettabaɛem ddin di mkul ḥaǧa;
17.23: axaṭer ḥewwseɣ akk tamdint-nwen, walaɣ lmeṣnuɛat akk i tɛebdem ; ufiɣ daɣen yiwen n idebder anda yura : « I Ṛebbi-nni ur nețwassen ara. » Win akken i tɛebbdem mbla ma tessnem-t, d nețța i wen-țbecciṛeɣ.
17.24: D nețța i d-ixelqen ddunit d wayen yellan deg-s, d Bab igenwan d lqaɛa, ur yezdiɣ ara di leǧwameɛ i bnan ifassen n yemdanen.
17.25: Ur yeḥwaǧ ara ad xedmen fell-as yemdanen am akken yella wayen i t-ixuṣṣen, nețța i d-ițțaken i yemdanen meṛṛa tudert, ṛṛuḥ d wayen akk yellan.
17.26: Seg yiwen wemdan i d-ixleq akk leǧnas, yeɛmeṛ yis-sen ddunit ; yefka-yasen lewqat i tudert-nsen akk-d tilisa i tmura-nsen.
17.27: Sidi Ṛebbi ixdem annect-agi meṛṛa iwakken ad nadin fell-as ; ahat a t-afen s usferfed, nețța ur nebɛid ara ɣef mkul yiwen deg-nneɣ.
17.28: Yis i nesɛa tudert, i nteddu, i nețțili ; d ayen i d-nnan daɣen kra seg imedyazen-nwen : « ula d nukkni, darraw-is ! »
17.29: Ihi imi nella d arraw n Sidi Ṛebbi, ur ilaq ara a nɣil belli Ṛebbi yețțemcabi ɣer lmeṣnuɛ n ddheb, neɣ n lfeṭṭa, neɣ n wezṛu yețwanejṛen s ufus ț-țmusni n wemdan.
17.30: Sidi Ṛebbi isemmeḥ-asen i yemdanen asmi akken ur t-ssinen ara; tura issawel-asen-d akk di mkul amkan iwakken ad beddlen tikli, a d-uɣalen ɣuṛ-es.
17.31: Axaṭer yextaṛ ass i deg ara iḥaseb imdanen s lḥeqq, s wemdan i gextaṛ yerna yefka-yaɣ-d akk țțbut mi t-id-isseḥya si ger lmegtin.
17.32: Mi slan iheddeṛ-ed ɣef ḥeggu n lmegtin, kra țmesxiṛen, wiyaḍ qqaṛen-as : A k-nḥess ɣef wannect-agi tikkelt nniḍen...
17.34: Ɣas akken aṭas i gețmesxiṛen, llan kra deg-sen umnen, ddan yid-es . Yella gar-asen Dunisus i gțekkin di tejmaɛt n Laryufaj, yiwet n tmeṭṭut isem-is Damaris akk-d wiyaḍ.

18.1: Bulus iṛuḥ si temdint n Atinya ɣer temdint n Kurintus.
18.2: Yufa dinna yiwen wergaz n wat Isṛail, isem-is Akilas, laṣel-is n tmurt n Tqenṭert ; yewweḍ-ed deg ussan-nni kan si tmurt n Selyan nețța ț-țmeṭṭut-is Brisila, axaṭer Qayṣer Kludyus yumeṛ i wat Isṛail meṛṛa ad ffɣen si temdint n Ṛuma.
18.3: Imi Brisila d Akilas xeddmen iqiḍunen am Bulus, yeqqim ɣuṛ-sen xeddmen s tdukli.
18.4: Mkul ass n westeɛfu, Bulus ițmeslay di lǧameɛ, ițbecciṛ i wat Isṛail akk-d iyunaniyen ttabaɛen ddin n wat Isṛail, iwakken ad amnen.
18.5: Mi d-usan Silas d Timuti si tmurt n Masidunya, Bulus yuɣal ițțelhay kan d ubecceṛ n wawal n Ṛebbi, ițbeggin ed i wat Isṛail belli d Ɛisa i d Lmasiḥ.
18.6: Imi i t-xulfen yerna regmen-t, Bulus yezwi icuḍaḍ-is, yenna-yasen : Cfut ur teqbilem ara leslak-agi, ddnub i yirawen-nwen ! Nekk ayen i yi-d-yewwi lḥal xedmeɣ-t. Ihi sya d asawen, ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer wat leǧnas ur nelli ara seg warraw n wat Isṛail.
18.7: Mi d-iffeɣ syenna, ikcem ɣer wexxam n Tit Justus, i gellan d amdan iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi ; axxam-is yezga-d tama n lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail.
18.8: Krisbus, ameqqran n lǧameɛ yumen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ nețța d wat wexxam-is meṛṛa ; aṭas n wat kurintus daɣen i gumnen mi slan s wayen i d-yenna Bulus, dɣa țwaɣeḍsen deg waman.
18.9: Yiwen n yiḍ, Sidi Ṛebbi iweḥḥa yas-ed di targit i Bulus yenna-yas-d : Ur țțaggad ara, kemmel ehdeṛ ur țsusum ara !
18.10: Axaṭer aqli-n yid-ek ! Yiwen ur izmir ad issers afus-is fell-ak iwakken a k-yexdem cceṛ, axaṭer aṭas i gellan d ayla-w di temdint-agi.
18.11: Bulus yeqqim aseggas d sețța wagguren ger wat kurintus, isselmad asen awal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
18.12: Di lweqt-nni i deg yella Galyun d lḥakem ɣef tmurt n Lakaya, at Isṛail msefhamen, ddukklen ɣef Bulus, wwin-t ɣer wexxam n ccṛeɛ, nnan :
18.13: Argaz-agi issamaṛ lɣaci ad ɛebden Ṛebbi s webrid ixulfen ccariɛa.
18.14: Mi gekker Bulus ad ihdeṛ, inṭeq Galyun yenna i wat Isṛail : Lemmer d lbaṭel neɣ d ayen n diri i gexdem, zemreɣ a wen ḥesseɣ am akken yella di lqanun ay at Isṛail ;
18.15: meɛna imi d amjadel ɣef yimeslayen, ɣef yismawen akk-d ccariɛa n Musa, ayagi d ccɣel-nwen ! Ur bɣiɣ ara ad ḥekmeɣ ɣef wannect-a.
18.17: Dɣa lɣaci mmɣen ɣef Sustin, ameqqran n lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail, ewten-t zdat wexxam n ccṛeɛ , Galyun ur s-tewqiɛ ara lmeɛna.
18.18: Bulus yerna aṭas n wussan di temdint n Kurintus ; syenna yeǧǧa atmaten di lehna, yerkeb lbabuṛ ɣer tmurt n Surya ; Brisila d Akilas ddan yid-es. Uqbel ad iṛuḥ si lmeṛṣa n temdint n Senkriya, iseṭṭel aqeṛṛuy-is axaṭer yefka lemɛahda i Sidi Ṛebbi.
18.19: Mi wwḍen ɣer temdint n Ifasus, mfaṛaqen : Bulus yeǧǧa iṛfiqen-is Akilas d Brisila, ma d nețța ikcem ɣer lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail, ițmeslay yid-sen.
18.20: Ḥellelen-t ad yernu kra wussan yid-sen, lameɛna ur yeqbil ara.
18.21: Yenna-yasen : A d-uɣaleɣ ɣuṛ-wen ma yebɣa Ṛebbi.
18.22: Yerkeb di lbabuṛ si temdint n Ifasus ɣer temdint n Qiṣarya ; syenna iṛuḥ a d-iẓer tajmaɛt n watmaten yellan di temdint n Lquds ; imiren iṣubb ɣer temdint n Antyuc.
18.23: Mi gesɛedda kra n wussan di temdint n Antyuc, yuɣal yeṭṭef abrid ɣer tmura n Galasya d Frijya, di mkul amkan yesseǧhad inelmaden di Liman.
18.24: Di lweqt-nni, yiwen wergaz n wat Isṛail yețțusemman Abulus, ilulen di temdint n Skandriya yellan di tmurt n Maṣeṛ, yusa-d ɣer temdint n Ifasus ; yezweṛ deg wawal yerna yessen mliḥ tira iqedsen.
18.25: Argaz-agi yelmed abrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, iǧhed di liman, ițbecciṛ, yesselmad s teḥqiq ayen i d-qqaṛent tira iqedsen ɣef Ɛisa Lmasiḥ , ɣas akken d aɣḍas n Yeḥya kan i gessen.
18.26: Yebda ițmeslay ɛinani di lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail. Akilas d Brisila mi s-slan wwin-t yid-sen, sfehmen-as tideț n webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi akken tella.
18.27: Imi i gebɣa Abulus ad iɛeddi ɣer tmurt n Akaya, atmaten kksen-as akukru, uran tabṛaț i inelmaden n temdint n Kurintus iwakken ad stṛeḥben yis. Mi gewweḍ ɣer dinna, s ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi iɛawen aṭas widak yumnen ;
18.28: axaṭer yețṛuẓu ɛinani awal n lecyux n wat Isṛail zdat lɣaci meṛṛa ; yerna ițbeggin-ed s tira iqedsen belli d Ɛisa i d Lmasiḥ.

19.2: Yers-ed fell-awen Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen asmi i tumnem ? Rran-as : Leɛmeṛ nesli s Ṛṛuḥ-agi iqedsen.
19.3: Yenna-yasen : Anwa aɣḍas i-s-tețwaɣeḍsem ihi ? Rran-as : S weɣḍas n Yeḥya.
19.4: Bulus yenna-yasen : Yeḥya yesseɣḍes wid akk iqeblen ad beddlen tikli, yeqqaṛ i wegdud ad amnen s win ara d-yasen deffir-es, yeɛni s Sidna Ɛisa.
19.5: Mi slan i yimeslayen-agi, țwaɣeḍsen s yisem n Sidna Ɛisa.
19.6: Akken yessers Bulus ifassen-is fell-asen, ikcem-iten Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, bdan heddṛen s tutlayin ur nețwassen ara, yerna țcaren-d ayen i sen-d-yusan s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
19.7: Imdanen-agi ad ilin di tnac yid-sen.
19.8: Dɣa Bulus ikcem ɣer lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail. Azal n tlata wagguren ițmeslay yid-sen, ițqenniɛ-iten iwakken ad amnen s wayen yeɛnan tagelda n Sidi Ṛebbi.
19.9: Lameɛna kra deg-sen yeqquṛ wul-nsen ugin ad amnen, rnan kkaten deg webrid n Sidna Ɛisa zdat lɣaci. Mi gwala annect-agi, Bulus iṭṭaxeṛ-asen, yewwi yid-es inelmaden, isselmad-iten kull ass deg wexxam n yiwen wergaz isem-is Tiranus.
19.10: Yeqqim dinna sin iseggasen armi imezdaɣ meṛṛa n tmurt n Asya, ama d at Isṛail ama d iyunaniyen, slan i wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
19.11: Sidi Ṛebbi ixeddem lbeṛhanat imeqqranen s ifassen n Bulus ;
19.12: lɣaci wwḍen armi srusun ɣef yimuḍan ula ț-țimucwaṛin neɣ iceṭṭiḍen yennulen Bulus, dɣa imuḍan ḥellun, wid akk yețțumelken țeffɣen ten leǧnun.
19.13: Kra iseḥḥaren n wat Isṛail, ileḥḥun seg wemkan ɣer wayeḍ, ɛerden ad ssuffɣen leǧnun seg wid yețwamelken, qqaṛen-asen : S yisem n Sidna Ɛisa, win akken i gețbecciṛ Bulus, effɣet seg-es !
19.14: Widak ixeddmen annect-agi llan di sebɛa yid-sen, d arraw n Ciba yellan d yiwen si lmuqedmin imeqqranen n at Isṛail.
19.15: Lǧen-nni yerra-yasen-d : Ɛisa ssneɣ-t, ssneɣ daɣen anwa i d Bulus, ma d kunwi d acu-kkun ?
19.16: Argaz-nni i gezdeɣ lǧen, izḍem fell-asen yekkat-iten armi rewlen seg wexxam d iɛeryanen, yerna jerḥen.
19.17: At Isṛail akk-d iyunaniyen meṛṛa izedɣen tamdint n Ifasus slan s wayagi, ikcem-iten meṛṛa lxuf, ḥemmden isem n Sidna Ɛisa.
19.18: Aṭas seg wid i gumnen, usan-d ad qiṛṛen zdat wiyaḍ, ḥkan-d ayen xedmen.
19.19: Aṭas seg wid yellan xeddmen ssḥur, wwin-d tiktabin-nsen s wayes xeddmen ssḥur, sseṛɣen-tent zdat medden. Ufan belli azal n xemsin alef n twiztin i d ssuma-nsent.
19.20: S wakka i gewweḍ wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi ɣer mkul amkan, ițnerni s tezmert n Sidi Ṛebbi.
19.21: Mi gɛedda wayagi akk, Bulus yeqsed ad iṛuḥ ɣer temdint n Lquds, ad iɛeddi si tmura n Masidunya akk-d Akaya ; ixemmem deg iman-is yenna : « M'ara awḍeɣ ɣer dinna, ilaq-iyi daɣen ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer temdint n Ṛuma.»
19.22: Iceggeɛ ɣer tmurt n Masidunya sin seg imɛawnen-is, Timuti d Irastus ; ma d nețța yerna kra n wussan di tmurt n Asya.
19.23: Di lweqt-nni, ɣef ddemma n webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi ikker ccwal d ameqqran di temdint n Ifasus.
19.24: Yella yiwen uḥeddad isem-is Dimitriyus, iṣenneɛ s lfeṭṭa leǧwameɛ imecṭaḥ i d-yețmettilen lǧameɛ n Artimis, yesserbeḥ aṭas ixeddamen-is.
19.25: Isnejmaɛ-iten nutni d wid i gxeddmen lfeṭṭa am nețța, yenna yasen : Ay atmaten ! Teẓram belli rrbeḥ-nneɣ itekk-ed si lxedma-agi ;
19.26: teẓram yerna teslam daɣen ɣef Bulus-agi issamnen aṭas n lɣaci di temdint n Ifasus d waṭas n tmura n Asya. Yessamen lɣaci, yewwi-ten d webrid-is mi sen-iqqaṛ : « Iṛebbiten agi ițwaxedmen s ifassen n wemdan mačči d iṛebbiten n tideț » ;
19.27: ur nuggad ara kan aț-țeɣli ṣṣenɛa-nneɣ, lameɛna nuggad ad sseɣlin lqima i lǧameɛ n Artimis tameqqrant, taṛebbiț-nneɣ, qṛib a s-kksen lɛaḍima s wayes tețwaɛbed di tmurt n Asya d ddunit meṛṛa.
19.28: Mi slan i lehduṛ-agi, ikcem-iten wurrif, bdan țɛeggiḍen : Ț-țameqqrant Artimis, taṛebbiț n at Ifasus !
19.29: Tețțucewwel akk temdint, lɣaci uzzlen ɣer wexxam n umezgun, seddan yid-sen Gayus akk-d Aristark yellan d imasiduniyen, d iṛfiqen n Bulus, ițṣafaṛen yid-es.
19.30: Bulus yebɣa ad ikcem di tlemmast n lɣaci-nni, lameɛna ugin-as inelmaden.
19.31: Ula d kra n lḥukkam imeqqranen n tmurt n Asya yellan d imdukkal-is, ceggɛen ɣuṛ-es iwakken a t-ḥellelen ur ițṛuḥ ara ɣer wexxam n umezgun.
19.32: Anejmaɛ-nni yexṛeb, kra țɛeggiḍen akka, wiyaḍ akken nniḍen yerna aṭas deg-sen ur ẓrin ara acu i d sebba n unejmaɛ-nni.
19.33: At Isṛail sbedden-d Alixandru ad immeslay i lɣaci. Iwehha-yasen ufus-is ad ssusmen, iwakken a d-ihdeṛ,
19.34: lameɛna mi t-ɛeqlen n wat Isṛail i gella, bdan țɛeggiḍen meṛṛa ɣef tikkelt azal n snat sswayeɛ : Ț-țameqqrant Artimis n at Ifasus !
19.35: Lameɛna lamin n temdint ihedden lɣaci, yenna-yasen : Ay at Ifasus, anwa ur neẓri ara belli tamdint n Ifasus ț-țaɛessast n lǧameɛ Artimis tameqqrant akk-d lmeṣnuɛ-ines i d-iɣlin seg igenni ?
19.36: Imi ayagi yiwen ur yezmir a t-yenkeṛ, ilaq ihi aț-țhennim iman-nwen, ur xeddmet acemma s tuffɣa n leɛqel !
19.37: Axaṭer irgazen-agi i d-tewwim ur ukiren lǧameɛ, ur rgimen Artimis taṛebbiț-nneɣ.
19.38: Ihi ma yella Dimitriyus d imdukkal-is sɛan sebba n uccetki ɣef yiwen, llan wussan n ccṛeɛ am akken llan lḥukkam ara ten-icaṛɛen , ad ṛuḥen ad ccetkin fell-asen.
19.39: Ma yella wayen nniḍen i tessuturem deg-sen, ad ḥekmen fell-asen deg unejmaɛ zdat lḥukkam.
19.40: Atan nuggad ad ccetkin fell-aɣ ɣef wayen yedṛan ass-agi imi ulac sebba ara nefk ɣef wunejmaɛ-agi. Mi gfukk ameslay, iserreḥ i lɣaci, yefra unejmaɛ.

20.1: Mi tethedden lḥala ifuk ccwal, imiren Bulus isnejmaɛ-ed inelmaden, yenha-ten, dɣa yeǧǧa-ten di lehna, yeṭṭef abrid ɣer tmurt n Masidunya.
20.2: Mi gezger tamurt n Masidunya, inehhu inelmaden, isseǧhad-iten s waṭas yimeslayen ; syenna ikemmel abrid ɣer tmurt n iyunaniyen anda yeqqim tlata wagguren.
20.3: Mi gțeddu ad yerkeb di lbabuṛ ɣer tmurt n Surya, yesla belli at Isṛail mcawaṛen iwakken a t-xedɛen ; dɣa ibeddel ṛṛay, iṭṭef abrid ad yuɣal ɣer tmurt n Masidunya.
20.4: Ddan yid-es : Subatir, mmi-s n Birus si temdint n Biri ; Arisṭark akk-d Skundus n temdint n Tiṣalunik, Gayus n temdint n Derba ; yedda daɣen Timuti, Tucik akk-d Trufim n tmurt n Asya.
20.5: Wigi zwaren ɣer zdat, eṛǧan-aɣ di temdint n Truwas,
20.6: ma d nukni mi gɛedda Lɛid n weɣṛum mbla iɣes ( tamtunt ), nerkeb lbabuṛ si temdint n Filibus ; xemsa wussan mbeɛd, nelḥeq-iten ɣer temdint n Truwas, anda nesɛedda sebɛa wussan.
20.7: Ass amezwaru n dduṛt nennejmaɛ a nebḍu aɣṛum iwakken ad nemekti Lmasiḥ, Bulus ițmeslay nețța d inelmaden. Imi ilaq ad iṛuḥ azekka-nni, ikemmel yid-sen awal armi i gneṣṣef yiḍ ;
20.8: taɣuṛfeț anda i nennejmaɛ, ceɛlent deg-s aṭas n teftilin.
20.9: Yiwen ilemẓi, isem-is Utikus, yella yeqqim ɣef yiri n ṭṭaq. Imi i gɛeṭṭel Bulus deg umeslay, Utikus yewwi-t nuddam ; yeɣli-d si leɛli wis tlata armi d lqaɛa, mi t-id-refden, ufan-t yemmut.
20.10: Bulus iṣubb-ed, yekna ɣuṛ-es, iddem-it ger iɣallen-is yenna : Ur țțaggadet ara, mazal deg-s taṛwiḥt, idder.
20.11: Syenna yuɣal yuli ar tɣuṛfeț, yebḍa aɣṛum ; mi ččan, ikemmel yid-sen ameslay armi d lefjer, dɣa iṛuḥ.
20.12: Ilemẓi-nni, wwin-t yedder ; dɣa yers-ed lfeṛḥ deg ulawen-nsen.
20.13: Nukni nerkeb lbabuṛ, nezwar Bulus ɣer temdint n Assus anda ara nemyagar yid-es axaṭer yebɣa ad iṛuḥ ɣef wuḍaṛ.
20.14: Mi i ɣ-d-yelḥeq di temdint n Assus, yerkeb yid-nneɣ di lbabuṛ ɣer temdint n Mitilan ;
20.15: syenna nkemmel abrid di lebḥeṛ, newweḍ azekka-nni zdat temdint n Ciyu, sellazekka-nni newweḍ ɣer temdint n Samus ; ass wis ṛebɛa newweḍ ɣer temdint n Mili.
20.16: Bulus yebɣa ad iɛeddi rrif n temdint n Ifasus mbla ma yeḥbes, iwakken ur isṛuḥuy ara lweqt di tmurt n Asya. Ițɣawal iwakken ma yella wamek, ad yaweḍ ɣer temdint n Lquds ass n lɛid n wass wis xemsin.
20.17: Si temdint n Mili, Bulus iceggeɛ ɣer imeqqranen n tejmaɛt n temdint n Ifasus iwakken a d-asen.
20.18: Mi d-wwḍen ɣuṛ-es, yenna-yasen : Tesnem si zik tikli-inu yid-wen seg wass amezwaru mi d-kecmeɣ tamurt n Asya.
20.19: Qedceɣ ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi s wannuz d imeṭṭawen ger iɣeblan d lemḥayen i yi-sseṛwan wat Isṛail.
20.20: Țbecciṛeɣ-awen rniɣ slemdeɣ kkun ama zdat lɣaci ama deg ixxamen-nwen, mbla ma ffreɣ acemma seg wayen i kkun-inefɛen.
20.21: Țbecciṛeɣ i wat Isṛail d iyunaniyen a d-uɣalen ɣer webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi yerna ad amnen s Sidna Ɛisa.
20.22: Tura, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen iḥṛes-iyi ad ṭṭfeɣ abrid ɣer temdint n Lquds, ur ẓriɣ ara d acu ara yedṛun yid-i.
20.23: Si temdint ɣer tayeḍ, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ițxebbiṛ-iyi-d belli țṛaǧun-iyi leḥbus d wussan n ddiq.
20.24: Lameɛna tudert-iw ur s-fkiɣ ara lqima, ur ț-ḥsibeɣ ara eɛzizet fell-i ; a wi yufan kan ad kemmleɣ tikli-inu akk-d Ṛebbi, ad xedmeɣ s lfeṛḥ ayen i yi-d-ifka Sidna Ɛisa, iwakken ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi.
20.25: Tura ẓriɣ belli ur tețțuɣalem ara aț-țeẓrem udem-iw, kunwi iwumi beccṛeɣ tageldit n Sidi Ṛebbi.
20.26: Daymi i wen-d-qqaṛeɣ ass-agi, ma yella yiwen yeffeɣ i webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, ddnub i yiri-s,
20.27: imi i wen-beccṛeɣ ayen akk yellan di leqsed n Sidi Ṛebbi, ur ffireɣ ula d acemma fell-awen.
20.28: Ɛasset ɣef yiman-nwen, ɛasset ɣef tqeḍɛit ɣef i kkun-iwekkel Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen. Ilit d iɛessasen ɣef tejmaɛt n Ṛebbi i d-iḥerr s idammen n Mmi-s.
20.29: Sriɣ belli m'ara ṛuḥeɣ, a d-kecmen gar-awen wuccanen iweɛṛen, wid ur nețsamaḥ ara i tqeḍɛit ;
20.30: a d-kkren daɣen gar-awen yergazen ara islemden leḥwayeǧ iɛewjen iwakken ad jebden inelmaden ɣuṛ-sen.
20.31: Ɣuṛ-wat ihi, ɛasset iman-nwen ! Mmektit-ed belli azal n tlata iseggasen, ur ḥbiseɣ am yiḍ am ass, nehhuɣ mkul yiwen seg-wen s imeṭṭawen.
20.32: Tura a kkun-ǧǧeɣ ger ifassen n Sidi Ṛebbi d ṛṛeḥma n wawal-is; D nețța i gzemren a kkun-isseǧhed, a wen-d-yefk lweṛt i kunwi akk yellan d ayla-s.
20.33: Ur ḍmiɛeɣ, ama d ddheb ama d idrimen neɣ leḥwayeǧ n yiwen deg-wen.
20.34: Teẓram s yiman-nwen belli s ifassen-iw i xeddmeɣ iwakken ad ɛeyyceɣ iman-iw akk-d wid yellan yid-i.
20.35: Di mkul lḥaǧa, ssekneɣ-awen amek ara txedmem iwakken aț-țɛiwnem wid ur nezmir ara. Mmektit-ed imeslayen n Sidna Ɛisa mi d-yenna : « Win ițseddiqen ițțubarek akteṛ n win iteṭṭfen ssadaqa ».
20.36: Mbeɛd imeslayen-agi, yuɣal ɣef tgecrar, yedɛa ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi yid-sen.
20.37: Sṭeṛḍqen s imeṭṭawen, ṭṭfen-t ger iɣallen-nsen, selmen akk fell-as ;
20.38: ḥeznen aṭas imi i sen-d-yenna : « Ur tețțuɣalem ara aț-țeẓrem udem- iw. » Syenna ddan yid-es armi d lbabuṛ.

21.1: Mi nemfaṛaq yid-sen, nerkeb lbabuṛ nṛuḥ qbala ɣer temdint n Kus, azekka-nni ɣer temdint n Ṛudus ; syenna nkemmel abrid ɣer temdint n Batara.
21.2: Mi nufa lbabuṛ ara izegren ɣer tmurt n Finisya, nerkeb deg-s nṛuḥ.
21.3: Mi nqubel tigzirt n Qubṛus, neǧǧa-ț ɣer tama tazelmaṭ, nkemmel abrid nneɣ ɣer tmurt n Surya, newweḍ ɣer temdint n Sur imi dinna ara yessers lbabuṛ sselɛa-s.
21.4: Mi nufa dinna inelmaden, nesɛedda sebɛa wussan yid-sen ; s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, inelmaden-nni nnan-as i Bulus : Ur țțali ara ɣer temdint n Lquds.
21.5: Mi ɛeddan wussan-nni, nekker a nṛuḥ, ddan yid-nneɣ armi neffeɣ i temdint, nutni ț-țilawin-nsen d warraw-nsen. Mi newweḍ ɣer rrif n lebḥeṛ nuɣal ɣef tgecrar, nedɛa ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
21.6: Mi nemsalam yid-sen, nerkeb di lbabuṛ nṛuḥ ; nutni uɣalen ɣer yexxamen-nsen,
21.7: nukkni nkemmel abrid s lbabuṛ si temdint n Sur armi ț-țamdint n Bṭulimays, neẓra dinna atmaten, neqqim yid-sen yiwen wass.
21.8: Azekka-nni nṛuḥ, newweḍ ɣer Qiṣarya ; nekcem ɣer wexxam n Filbas, win ițbecciṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, nețța yellan d yiwen si sebɛa-nni ițwaxtaṛen di temdint n Lquds ; neqqim ɣuṛ-es.
21.9: Filbas-nni, ɣuṛ-es ṛebɛa yessi-s urɛad zwiǧent, țxebbiṛent-ed s wayen i tent-id-ițțasen s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
21.10: Ɛeddan kra n wussan, mi d yewweḍ yiwen seg watmaten isem-is Agabus, ula d nețța ițxebbiṛ-ed s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, iṣubb-ed si tmurt n Yahuda, yusa-d ɣuṛ-nneɣ.
21.11: Iddem tabagust n Bulus, icudd idaṛṛen-is d ifassen-is, yenna : Atan wayen i d-iqqaṛ Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen : akka ara cidden wat Isṛail di temdint n Lquds bab n tbagust-agi, a t-sellmen ger ifassen n ikafriwen.
21.12: Mi nesla annect-agi, nukkni d watmaten n Sizari nḥellel Bulus iwakken ur ițțali ara ɣer temdint n Lquds.
21.13: Dɣa Bulus yerra-yasen : Acu i kkun-yuɣen mi tețrum akka armi tgezmem tasa-w ? Nekk qebleɣ mačči kan ad țwacuddeɣ, lameɛna qebleɣ ula d lmut di temdint n Lquds ɣef ddemma n yisem n Sidna Ɛisa.
21.14: Imi yugi ad yaɣ awal-nneɣ, ur nketteṛ ara fell-as lehduṛ nenna : A neǧǧ lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi ad yedṛu !
21.15: Akken ɛeddan wussan-nni, nhegga iman-nneɣ a nali ɣer temdint n Lquds.
21.16: Kra inelmaden n Qiṣarya ddan yid-nneɣ, wwin-aɣ ɣer yiwen wergaz wuɣuṛ ara nili, isem-is Mansun, n tegzirt n Qubṛus, d yiwen seg inelmaden imezwura.
21.17: Mi newweḍ ɣer temdint n Lquds, sṭreḥben yis-nneɣ watmaten s lfeṛḥ.
21.18: Azekka-nni, yedda yid-nneɣ Bulus ɣer wexxam n Yeɛqub anda nnejmaɛen imeqqranen n tejmaɛt.
21.19: Mi gsellem fell-asen, Bulus yeḥka-yasen ayen akk ixdem yis Sidi Ṛebbi ger leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail.
21.20: Mi slan ayagi, ḥemmden Sidi Ṛebbi nnan-as : Twalaḍ a gma-tneɣ acḥal n luluf n wat Isṛail i gumnen s Sidna Ɛisa yerna ṭṭfen akk di ccariɛa n Musa.
21.21: Atan slan wat Isṛail n temdint n Lquds belli tesselmadeḍ i wat Isṛail yellan ger leǧnas ad ǧǧen ccariɛa n Musa ; slan daɣen teqqaṛeḍ asen : « ur seḍhaṛet ara i warrac nwen, ur ttabaɛet ara leɛwayed i ɣ-d-ǧǧan lejdud ».
21.22: Acu ara nexdem tura ? Mbla ccekk ad slen belli tusiḍ-ed ;
21.23: ihi exdem ayen ara k-d-nini : llan gar-aneɣ ṛebɛa yergazen i gefkan lemɛahda i Sidi Ṛebbi,
21.24: awi-ten yid-ek, ssizdeg iman-ik yid-sen, seṛṛef fell-asen iwakken ad seṭṭlen iqeṛṛay-nsen ; s wakkagi ad ẓren belli ayen akk slan fell-ak d lekdeb yerna ad walin mazal teṭṭfeḍ di ccariɛa n Musa.
21.25: Ma d at leǧnas i gumnen s Sidna Ɛisa, nura-yasen : Ad ṭṭixṛen i wučči n weksum ițțunefken d asfel i lmeṣnuɛat d ssadat, i tissit n idammen, i lmal yemmuṛḍsen akk-d yir tikli.
21.26: Azekka-nni, Bulus yewwi yid-es ṛebɛa yergazen-nni, issazdeg iman-is yid-sen, ikcem yid-sen ɣer wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen iwakken ad ixebbeṛ lmuqeddem ɣef lweqt i deg ara fakken wussan n uzizdeg-nsen, yeɛni ass i deg ara yefk mkul yiwen seg-sen lweɛda-ines.
21.27: Mi qṛib ad fakken sebɛa wussan-nni n usizdeg, at Isṛail n tmurt n Asya walan Bulus di lǧameɛ iqedsen. Sekkren ccwal ger lɣaci dɣa ṭṭfen-t.
21.28: Bdan țɛeggiḍen : Ay at Isṛail, ɛiwnet-aɣ ! Atah wergaz-nni ițbecciṛen di mkul amkan i yemdanen meṛṛa. Iheddeṛ ayen n diri ɣef wegdud-nneɣ, ɣef wemkan-agi iqedsen, isselmad ayen ur teqbil ara ccariɛa-nneɣ, yewwi-d iyunaniyen ɣer lǧameɛ, issenǧes amkan-agi iqedsen !
21.29: Nnan-d ayagi axaṭer walan yid-es Trufim di temdint, ɣilen issekcem-it ɣer daxel n lǧameɛ iqedsen.
21.30: Ikker ccwal di temdint meṛṛa ; uzzlen-d yemdanen si mkul tama. Sṭfen Bulus, zzuɣṛen-t beṛṛa n wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen, sekkṛen-d tiwwura.
21.31: Mi țeddun lɣaci a t-nɣen, yewweḍ lexbaṛ ɣer lqebṭan n lɛeskeṛ n Ṛuman tamdint n Lquds meṛṛa tenhewwal.
21.32: Imiren kan yessawel i ifesyanen d lɛeskeṛ-nsen, uzzlen ɣer lɣaci. Mi walan lqebṭan akk-d lɛeskeṛ-is, ttaxṛen-as i Bulus.
21.33: Dɣa lqebṭan iqeṛṛeb ɣer Bulus, yefka lameṛ a t-ṭṭfen, a t-cudden s snat snasel ; dɣa isteqsa anwa-t, d acu i gexdem.
21.34: Meɛna lɣaci-nni, kra țɛeggiḍen akka, wiyaḍ akken nniḍen. Imi ur ifhim ara wayen i s-d-nnan si leɛyaḍ-nni, yumeṛ a t-awin ɣer lbeṛj.
21.35: Mi gewweḍ Bulus ɣer tseddaṛin, refden-t lɛeskeṛ iwakken a t-sellken si ger ifassen n lɣaci.
21.36: Axaṭer lɣaci-nni ttabaɛen-t țɛeggiḍen : « Enɣ-it ! Enɣ-it !... »
21.37: Mi qṛib a t-skecmen ɣer zdaxel n lbeṛj, Bulus yenna-yas i lqebṭan : Semmeḥ-iyi, zemreɣ a k-d-iniɣ yiwen n wawal ? Yerra-yas : Tessneḍ aț-țhedṛeḍ tayunanit ?
21.38: Mačči d kečč i d amaṣri-nni i gsekkren ccwal ussan-agi iɛeddan, i gessufɣen yid-es ṛebɛa alaf n iqettalen ɣer lxali ?
21.39: Bulus yenna-yas : Xaṭi ! Nekk n wat Isṛail, luleɣ di temdint n Sars yellan di tmurt n Silisya ; d amezdaɣ n temdint mechuṛen. Di leɛnaya-k serreḥ-iyi ad hedṛeɣ i lɣaci-yagi.
21.40: Lqebṭan iɛemmed-as, dɣa Bulus ibedd ɣef tseddaṛin, iwehha i lɣaci s ufus-is, dɣa ssusmen. Yenṭeq s tɛibṛanit, yenna-yasen :

22.1: Ay atmaten akken ma tellam dagi meẓẓi meqqeṛ, semḥesset ed tura a wen-d-iniɣ ayen s wayes ara dafɛeɣ ɣef yiman-iw !
22.2: Mi slan iheddeṛ-asen-d s tɛibṛanit, ssusmen meṛṛa iwakken a s-slen. Dɣa yenna :
22.3: Nekk n wat Isṛail, ț-țideț luleɣ di temdint n Sars n tmurt n Silisya, lameɛna țțuṛebbaɣ di temdint-agi n Lquds. Lliɣ d anelmad n ccix Gamalyel s yiman-is ; yesselmed-iyi akken ilaq amek ara tebɛeɣ ccariɛa i d-ǧǧan lejdud-nneɣ. Ttabaɛeɣ seg ul-iw abrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, am kunwi ass-agi.
22.4: Qehṛeɣ armi d lmut wid ittabaɛen abrid-agi ajdid n Sidna Ɛisa, am yergazen am tlawin, țțawiɣ-ten-id ɣer leḥbus țwarzen.
22.5: Lmuqeddem ameqqran ț-țejmaɛt n lɛuqal atnan d inigan ma bɣan a d-cehden ; d nutni s yiman-nsen i yi-d-yefkan tibṛatin i watmaten n Dimecq, syenna a d-awiɣ țwarzen ɣer temdint n Lquds, wid akk yumnen s webrid-agi, iwakken a ten-ɛaqben.
22.6: Lliɣ tedduɣ deg webrid, qṛib ad awḍeɣ ɣer temdint n Dimecq. Aț-țili d țnaṣfa n wass, taswiɛt kan, yiwet n tafat tameqqrant tewwet-ed seg igenni, tețfeǧǧiǧ, tezzi-yi-d.
22.7: Ɣliɣ ɣer lqaɛa, sliɣ i yiwen n ṣṣut i yi-d-iqqaṛen : Caɛul, a Caɛul, acuɣeṛ i yi tețqehhiṛeḍ ?
22.8: Nniɣ-as : Anwa-k, a Sidi ? Yenna-yi-d : Nekk d Ɛisa Anaṣari, win akken i tețqehhiṛeḍ.
22.9: Wid yellan yid-i walan tafat-nni, lameɛna ur slin ara i ṣṣut i yi-d iheddṛen, dɣa nniɣ : Acu i tebɣiḍ a t-xedmeɣ a Sidi ?
22.10: Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yi-d : Ekker, ṛuḥ ɣer Dimecq, dinna ara k-d-inin ayen akk ilaqen a t-txedmeḍ.
22.11: Imi iyi-tesderɣel tafat-nni s ufeǧǧeǧ-ines, d imdukkal-iw i yi ṭṭfen afus armi wwḍeɣ ɣer Dimecq.
22.12: Yella dinna yiwen wergaz isem-is Ananyas, d argaz iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi, yerna yettabaɛ ccariɛa ; at Isṛail meṛṛa izedɣen di temdint n Dimecq țcehhiden fell-as s lxiṛ.
22.13: Yusa-d ɣuṛ-i yenna-yi-d : A Caɛul a gma, Sidi Ṛebbi yerra-yak-d iẓri ! Di teswiɛt-nni, yuɣal-iyi-d yezṛi, dɣa walaɣ-t.
22.14: Ananyas yenna-yi-d : Sidi Ṛebbi n lejdud-nneɣ yextaṛ ik aț-țissineḍ lebɣi-ines, aț-țwaliḍ s wallen-ik win yellan d Aḥeqqi, aț-țesleḍ imeslayen seg yimi-is .
22.15: axaṭer aț-țuɣaleḍ d inigi-ines zdat yemdanen meṛṛa ɣef wayen akk i teẓriḍ d wayen iwumi tesliḍ.
22.16: Tura d acu i tețṛaǧuḍ ? Kker aț-tețwaɣeḍseḍ, aț-țizdigeḍ seg ddnubat-ik m'ara tedɛuḍ s yisem-is.
22.17: Asmi uɣaleɣ ɣer temdint n Lquds, yiwen n wass lliɣ țẓallaɣ deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen, iweḥḥa-yi-d Sidi Ṛebbi,
22.18: walaɣ Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yi-d : Ffeɣ s lemɣawla si temdint n Lquds, axaṭer ur qebblen ara ayen s wayes ara tcehdeḍ fell-i.
22.19: Nniɣ : A Sidi, ssnen-iyi ! Sran s yiman nsen belli ttabaɛeɣ si lǧameɛ ɣer wayeḍ wid yumnen yis-ek iwakken a ten-erreɣ ɣer lḥebs ad țewten.
22.20: Ula d Stifan inigi-inek, mi ssuzlen idammen-is lliɣ dinna, qebleɣ at nɣen yerna ɛusseɣ leḥwayeǧ n wid i t-yenɣan.
22.21: Dɣa Sidi Ṛebbi yenna-yi-d : Ṛuḥ a k-ceggɛeɣ ɣer lebɛid ɣer wat leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail.
22.22: Smeḥsisen-as armi d awal-agi imiren ɛeggḍen nnan : Ekkset si ddunit argaz am wagi ! Ur t-țaǧǧat ara ad yidir !
22.23: Țɛeggiḍen, ṭeggiṛen leḥwayeǧ nsen, ssafagen aɣebbaṛ ɣer igenni.
22.24: Lqebṭan n Ṛuman yumeṛ ad skecmen Bulus ɣer lbeṛj, a t-ewten s ujelkkaḍ ( s ucelliṭ ) iwakken ad issinen sebba ɣef wacu țɛeggiḍen fell-as.
22.25: Mi t-cudden s tɣeggadin, Bulus yenna i lqebṭan yellan dinna : Eɛni iserreḥ-awen lqanun aț țewtem aṛumani s ujelkkaḍ uqbel ad iɛeddi di ccṛeɛ ?
22.26: Ɣef yimeslayen-agi, lqebṭan-nni iṛuḥ ɣer wemdebbar ameqqran yenna-yas : Ḥader aț-țewteḍ argaz-agi ! D aṛumani !
22.27: Amdebbar ameqqran mi d-yusa ɣer Bulus, yenna-yas : Ț-țideț kečč d aṛumani ? Ih, d aṛumani i lliɣ !
22.28: Amdebbar ameqqran yenna : Nekk aṭas n yedrimen i fkiɣ iwakken ad uɣaleɣ d aṛumani. Bulus yerra-yas : Nekk, seg wasmi i d-luleɣ i rseɣ di lekwaɣeḍ d aṛumani.
22.29: Imiren widak i d-ikkren a t wten, ṭṭaxṛen-as. Lqebṭan ameqqran s yiman-is yuggad mi geẓra Bulus d aṛumani yerna icudd-it.
22.30: Azekka-nni, imi i gebɣa ad yissin wemdebbar ameqqran ɣef wacu i d-ccetkan fell-as wat Isṛail, iserreḥ i Bulus, yumeṛ i lmuqedmin akk-d usqamu n ccṛeɛ ad nnejmaɛen. Dɣa yewwi-d Bulus isbedd-it-id zdat-nsen.

23.2: Lmuqeddem ameqqran Ananyas yumeṛ i wid yellan zdat-es, a t-wten ɣer yimi.
23.3: Dɣa Bulus yenna : A k-id-iwet Ṛebbi a bu sin wudmawen ! Teqqimeḍ aț-țḥekmeḍ fell-i s ccariɛa, lameɛna kečč s yiman-ik txulfeḍ-ț imi tumreḍ ad iyi wten.
23.4: Widak yellan zdat-es nnan-as : Tregmeḍ lmuqeddem ameqqran n Ṛebbi !
23.5: Bulus yenna-yasen : Ur ẓriɣ ara ay atmaten belli d nețța i d lmuqeddem ameqqran, axaṭer yura di ccariɛa : Ur țekkes ara leqdeṛ ɣef lḥakem n wegdud-ik.
23.6: Bulus, mi gwala deg unejmaɛ-nni azgen deg-sen d isaduqiyen, azgen nniḍen d ifariziyen, iɛeggeḍ gar-asen, yenna : Ay atmaten, nekk d afarizi, d mmi-s n ufarizi ; ɣef ddemma n usirem i nesɛa di ḥeggu n lmegtin i d-beddeɣ ɣer ccṛeɛ ass-agi !
23.7: Mi d-yenna ayagi, ikker umennuɣ ger ifariziyen d isaduqiyen ; dɣa yebḍa unejmaɛ-nni.
23.8: Axaṭer isaduqiyen qqaṛen ulac ḥeggu, ulac lmalayekkat, ulac leṛwaḥ ; ma d ifariziyen, nutni umnen s wannect agi.
23.9: Ikker umennuɣ gar-asen ; kra n lɛulama n ccariɛa n tejmaɛt n ifariziyen kkren iwakken ad ḥudden Bulus, nnan : Ur nufi ara ayen n diri deg wemdan-agi. Yezmer lḥal ihdeṛ-as-d Ṛebbi neɣ lmelk !
23.10: Imi ițțimɣuṛ umenɣi, lqebṭan ameqqran yugad ad feṛqen Bulus d iftaten. Yumeṛ i lɛeskeṛ ad ṛuḥen a t-id-kksen si tlemmast-nsen, a t awin ɣer lbeṛj.
23.11: Azekka-nni deg iḍ, Sidna Ɛisa iḍheṛ-as-d i Bulus yenna-yas : Ur țțaggad ara, axaṭer am akken tcehdeḍ fell-i di temdint n Lquds, ilaq daɣen aț-țcehdeḍ fell-i di temdint n Ṛuma.
23.12: Mi guli wass, at Isṛail xedmen tiḥileț, msefhamen, gullen ur ččin ur swin alamma nɣan Bulus.
23.13: Wid akk i s-ixedmen taxazabit agi, llan akteṛ n ṛebɛin yid-sen.
23.14: Ṛuḥen ad ẓren imeqqranen d lmuqedmin akk-d lɛuqal nnan asen : Neggul s limin ameqqran, ur nečči acemma alamma nenɣa Bulus.
23.15: Tura ihi, init-as i lqebṭan ameqqran a t-id-yawi ɣer unejmaɛ n ccṛeɛ zdat-wen, amzun tebɣam a s-tɛiwdem abeḥḥet ; ma d nukkni, a nheggi iman-nneɣ a t-nenɣ uqbel a d-yaweḍ ɣer dagi.
23.16: Lameɛna mmi-s n weltma-s n Bulus imi gesla s tḥileț-nni i s heggan, iṛuḥ ɣer lbeṛj anda yețwaḥbes Bulus, a s-yessiweḍ lexbaṛ.
23.17: Bulus yessawel-ed i yiwen si lfesyanat, yenna-yas : Awi aqcic-agi ɣer lqebṭan ameqqran, axaṭer yesɛa awal ara s-yini.
23.18: Lfesyan yewwi yid-es aqcic-nni ɣer lqebṭan ameqqran, yenna-yas : Bulus ameḥbus-nni yessawel iyi-d iḥellel-iyi iwakken a k-d-awiɣ aqcic-agi, yesɛa awal ara k-d-yini.
23.19: Lqebṭan ameqqran iddem aqcic-nni seg ufus, ɛezlen iman-nsen ɣer ṭṭeṛf ; yenna-yas : D acu i tebɣiḍ a yi-t-id-tiniḍ ?
23.20: Yerra-yas : At Isṛail msefhamen a k-d ḍelben aț-țawiḍ Bulus azekka ɣer zdat unejmaɛ n ccṛeɛ, ufan-d sebba a s-ɛiwden abeḥḥet ɣef temsalt-is.
23.21: Ur țțaɣ ara awal-nsen, axaṭer akteṛ n ṛebɛin deg-sen ḥeyylen-as, gullen s limin ameqqran ur tețțen ur tessen alamma nɣan-t. Tura heggan iman-nsen, țṛaǧun anagar lebɣi-k.
23.22: Amdebbar ameqqran iserreḥ-as i weqcic-nni ad iṛuḥ, yenna-yas : Ur qqaṛ i yiwen belli tessaweḍed iyi-d lexbaṛ-agi.
23.23: Yuɣal issawel i sin lfesyanat, yenna-yasen : Heggit mitin iɛeskṛiwen, sebɛin yemnayen akk-d mitin iɛeskṛiwen i gteddun s imezṛagen, ad ṛuḥen ɣef tesɛa n yiḍ ɣer Qiṣarya.
23.24: Heggit daɣen iɛewdiwen iwakken ad ssiwḍen Bulus di laman ɣer lḥakem Filiks.
23.26: « Nekk Kludyus Lizyas i lḥakem ameqqran Filiks, sslam fell-ak !
23.27: At Isṛail ṭṭfen argaz-agi teddun a t-nɣen, mi wwḍeɣ nekk d lɛeskeṛ-iw, sellkeɣ-t-id si ger ifassen-nsen. Imi sliɣ laṣel-is d aṛumani,
23.28: bɣiɣ ad ẓreɣ sebba ɣef wacu ccetkan fell-as ; wwiɣ-t ɣer zdat unejmaɛ nsen.
23.29: Ufiɣ belli sebba ɣef wacu i ccetkan fell-as, d ayen yeɛnan ccariɛa-nsen, lameɛna ur ixdim acemma yuklalen lmut neɣ lḥebs.
23.30: Mi sliɣ ḥeyylen-as wat Isṛail, ceggɛeɣ-t-in ɣuṛ-ek. Ma d ixṣimen-is nniɣ-asen a n-ṛuḥen ɣuṛ-ek ad ccetkin fell-as. Sǧiɣ-k di lehna !
23.31: Akken i ten-d-yewweḍ lameṛ, iɛeskṛiwen wwin Bulus deg yiḍ ɣer temdint n Antibatris.
23.32: Azekka-nni uɣalen ɣer lbeṛj, ǧǧan imnayen ad kemmlen abrid yid-es.
23.33: Mi wwḍen ɣer temdint n Qiṣarya, wwin Bulus ɣer lḥakem Filiks, rnan fkan-as tabṛaț-nni.
23.34: Lḥakem yeɣṛa tabṛaț-nni, isteqsa anta i ț-țamurt n Bulus. Mi gesla si tmurt n Silisya i gella,
23.35: yenna-yas : M'ara d-awḍen yexṣimen iccetkan fell-ak, a k-sleɣ . Dɣa yumeṛ a t-ɛassen di lbeṛj n Hiṛudus. At Isṛail cccetkan ɣef Bulus

24.1: Mi ɛeddan xemsa wussan, lmuqeddem ameqqran Ananyas iṣubb-ed ɣer Qiṣarya nețța d kra n lɛuqal n wat Isṛail akk-d yiwen ubugaṭu isem-is Tertulus ; usan-d ɣer lḥakem ad ccetkin ɣef Bulus.
24.2: Mi d-ssawlen i Bulus, Tertulus yebda accetki fell-as s yimeslayen agi :
24.3: A lḥakem ameqqran ! S uḍebbaṛ-ik yelhan i d-yers lxiṛ d lehna ɣef tmurt-agi ! Ɣef wayagi, a Filiks ameqqran, ncekkeṛ-ik meṛṛa di mkul amkan ;
24.4: lameɛna iwakken ur k-nețɛeṭṭil ara aṭas, di leɛnaya-k semḥess-ed i kra n yimeslayen-agi ara k-d-nini :
24.5: Argaz-agi d țerka, iskker ccwal ger wat Isṛail n ddunit meṛṛa, d nețța i d ameqqran n tejmaɛt n inaṣariyen.
24.6: Yeɛṛed ad issenǧes ula d lǧameɛ iqedsen. Mi t-neṭṭef, nebɣa a neḥkem fell-as s ccariɛa-nneɣ,
24.7: lameɛna yewweḍ-ed lqebṭan ameqqran Lizyas, ikkes-aɣ-t s ddreɛ si ger ifassen-nneɣ,
24.8: yerna yumeṛ i wid iccetkan fell-as a d-asen ad ccetkin ɣuṛ-ek. Tura tzemreḍ s yiman-ik a t-tbeḥteḍ, iwakken aț-țesleḍ seg yimi-s wayen akk i ɣef neccetka fell-as.
24.9: At Isṛail yellan dinna, cehden akk belli akka i gella lḥal.
24.10: Mi i s-iwehha lḥakem i Bulus iwakken a d-ihdeṛ, Bulus yenna : Sriɣ aṭas iseggasen aya i telliḍ d lḥakem ɣef wegdud-agi ; ihi s laman ara d-qeddmeɣ tamsalt-iw zdat-ek.
24.11: Ur wwiḍen ara tnac wussan segmi uliɣ ɣer temdint n Lquds iwakken ad ɛebdeɣ Ṛebbi, tzemreḍ aț-țesteqsiḍ s yiman-ik.
24.12: Ulac win i yi-d-yufan deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen țemjadaleɣ nekk d walebɛaḍ, ulac daɣen win i yi-d-yufan di leǧwameɛ n wat Isṛail neɣ di temdint sekkreɣ ccwal ger lɣaci.
24.13: Ur zmiren ara a d-awin țțbut n wayen akka i ɣef d-ccetkan fell-i.
24.14: Zemreɣ a d-iniɣ zdat-ek a lḥakem Filiks : Ṛebbi i ɛebbdeɣ, d win akken ɛebden lejdud-iw ; s tideț umneɣ s webrid-agi ajdid i ɣef d-qqaṛen : « ixulef abrid-nsen » ; lameɛna umneɣ s wayen akk yuran di ccariɛa n Musa akk-d lenbiya.
24.15: Sɛiɣ asirem ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi -- am akken i t-sɛan ula d nutni -- belli a d-ḥyun yemdanen meṛṛa ama d iḥeqqiyen ama d wid ixedmen cceṛ.
24.16: Daymi țɛassaɣ iman-iw kull ass, iwakken ad sɛuɣ ul yeṣfan zdat Ṛebbi akk-d yemdanen.
24.17: Acḥal n iseggasen, nekk ɛaceɣ di lɣeṛba ; usiɣ-ed iwakken a d-awiɣ kra n yedrimen i d-jemɛeɣ d lemɛawna i igellilen n tmurt-iw yerna wwiɣ-ed daɣen lweɛdat i Sidi Ṛebbi.
24.18: Atan wamek i yi-d-ufan deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen : ufan-iyi-d akken kan i ssezdegeɣ iman-iw akken i d-tenna ccariɛa; ur iyi-d zzin imdanen ur yelli ccwal
24.19: yerna d at Isṛail n tmurt n Asya i gellan dinna, d nutni i glaq ad bedden zdat-ek ma sɛan kra ɣef wacu ara ccetkin fell-i.
24.20: Neɣ m'ulac wid yellan dagi, a d-inin d acu ufan deg-i n diri mi beddeɣ zdat unejmaɛ-nsen n ccṛeɛ ;
24.21: anagar ma yella ɣef wawal-nni i d-nniɣ s leɛyaḍ gar-asen : « imi umneɣ s ḥeggu n lmegtin, i d-beddeɣ ass-agi ɣer ccṛeɛ zdat-wen ! »
24.22: Filiks yesnen akken ilaq abrid n Lmasiḥ, yenna-yasen : Uɣalet-ed m'ara d-yaweḍ lqebṭan Lizyas, imiren ad ẓreɣ tamsalt-nwen.
24.23: Yefka lameṛ i yiwen n lfesyan ad iɛass Bulus, lameɛna a s-yeǧǧ kra n țesriḥ, yerna ad yeǧǧ imdukkal-is a d-reSSun fell-ass.
24.24: Mi ɛeddan kra wussan, yusa-d Filiks akk-d țmeṭṭut-is Drusila, nețțat yellan n wat Isṛail, iceggeɛ a d-awin Bulus, iwakken a sen-d-ihdeṛ ɣef wayen yeɛnan liman di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
24.25: Mi gebda Bulus iheddeṛ ɣef lḥeqq, ɣef wamek ilaq ad iḥkem wemdan deg iman-is, ɣef wass n lḥisab i d-iteddun, Filiks ikcem-it lxuf, yenna-yas : Dayen, tzemreḍ aț-țṛuḥeḍ tura. M'ara d-stifeɣ, a k-d-ssiwleɣ.
24.26: Imi i geḍmeɛ di Bulus a s-yefk idrimen, si teswiɛt ɣer tayeḍ issawal-as-ed iwakken ad ihdeṛ yid-es.
24.27: Ɛeddan sin n iseggasen ; dɣa Bursyus Fistus yuɣal d lḥakem deg wemkan n Filiks. Filiks-nni imi i gebɣa ad iɛǧeb i wat Isṛail, yeǧǧa Bulus di lḥebs.

25.1: Mi ɛeddan tlata wussan segmi yuɣal d lḥakem, Fistus yuli si temdint n Qiṣarya ɣer temdint n Lquds.
25.2: Dɣa lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d imeqqranen n wat Isṛail, ccetkan ɣuṛ-es ɣef Bulus.
25.3: Ssutren i Fistus a sen-ixdem lemziya, a sen-d-yawi Bulus ɣer temdint n Lquds, nutni heggan-as-d taxazabit iwakken a t-nɣen deg webrid.
25.4: Lameɛna Fistus yerra-yasen : Bulus ițwaḥbes di Qiṣarya, nekk s yiman-iw qṛib ad uɣaleɣ ɣer dinna.
25.5: Xtiṛet-ed si gar-awen wid ara yeddun yid-i ; ma yella kra n wayen n diri i gexdem wergaz-agi, ad ccetkin fell-as.
25.6: Fistus isɛedda azal n tmanya neɣ ɛecṛa wussan gar-asen, taggara yuɣal ɣer Qiṣarya. Azekka-nni, iṭṭef amkan ɣef wukersi n ccṛeɛ, iceggeɛ a d-awin Bulus.
25.7: Mi d-yewweḍ Bulus, at Isṛail i d-yusan si temdint n Lquds zzin-as, gren-d fell-as lbaṭel, lameɛna ur zmiren ara a d-tebten wayen i d qqaṛen.
25.8: Bulus iḥudd iman-is yenna : Ur ɛuṣaɣ ccariɛa n wat Isṛail, ur skecmeɣ leḥṛam ɣer lǧameɛ iqedsen, ur xulfeɣ Qayṣer.
25.9: Imi gebɣa ad issefṛeḥ at Isṛail, Fistus yenna i Bulus : Tebɣiḍ aț-țaliḍ ɣer temdint n Lquds iwakken aț-țɛeddiḍ di ccṛeɛ dinna zdat-i ?
25.10: Lameɛna Bulus yenna : Ɣer ccṛeɛ n Qayṣer i beddeɣ, ɣuṛ-es ara țțucaṛɛeɣ. Ur xdimeɣ ula d acemma i gḍuṛṛen at Isṛail, akken teẓriḍ kečč s yiman-ik.
25.11: Ma yella xedmeɣ lbaṭel neɣ ayen yuklalen lmut, ur țțaggadeɣ ara ad mmteɣ. Lameɛna ma yella lecɣal-agi ɣef i d-ccetkan fell-i ur seḥḥan ara, yiwen ur izmir a yi-isellem ger ifassen-nsen. Ad rẓeɣ ccṛeɛ ɣer Qayṣer !
25.12: Mi gemcawaṛ Fistus nețța ț-țejmaɛt-nni n ccṛeɛ, yenna i Bulus : Tessutreḍ-ed ccṛeɛ n Qayṣer, aț-țețțucarɛeḍ zdat Qayṣer !
25.13: Mi ɛeddan kra wussan, agellid Aɣribas akk-d weltma-s Birinis, usan-d ɣer Qiṣarya ad sellmen ɣef lḥakem Fistus.
25.14: Imi qqimen dinna kra wussan, Fistus iḥka-yas i ugellid-nni taqsiṭ n Bulus, yenna-yas : Yella yiwen wergaz i geǧǧa Filiks dagi d ameḥbus.
25.15: Mi lliɣ di temdint n Lquds, ccetkan fell-as imeqqranen n lmuqedmin d lɛuqal n wat Isṛail ; ssutren-iyi-d ad ḥekmeɣ fell-as.
25.16: Nniɣ-asen mačči di lɛadda n iṛumaniyen ad ḥekmen ɣef wemdan uqbel a t-semqabalen nețța d wid i d-iccetkan fell-as, iwakken ad yaf abrid amek ara idafeɛ ɣef yiman-is.
25.17: Ihi usan-d ɣer dagi. Ur ɛeṭṭleɣ ara, azekka-nni fkiɣ lameṛ a d-awin argaz-nni iwakken a t-sɛeddiɣ di ccṛeɛ ;
25.18: wid iccetkan fell-as ur d-nnin acemma seg wayen țrajuɣ a t-id-inin.
25.19: Țemjadalen anagar ɣef ddin akk-d yiwen ițusemman Ɛisa. Ɛisa-agi yemmut, meɛna Bulus yeqqaṛ-ed yedder.
25.20: Imi ur ẓriɣ ara acu ara xedmeɣ di temsalt-agi, nniɣ-as i Bulus ma yebɣa ad iṛuḥ ɣer temdint n Lquds iwakken ad ițțucaṛeɛ dinna,
25.21: lameɛna yerẓa ccṛeɛ iwakken ad ițțucaṛeɛ zdat Qayṣer ; dɣa fkiɣ lameṛ a t-ɛassen alamma d ass i deg ara t-ceggɛeɣ ɣer Qayṣer.S
25.22: Agellid Aɣribas yenna i Fistus : Bɣiɣ ula d nekk ad sleɣ i wergaz-agi. Fistus yenna-yas : Azekka a s-tesleḍ !
25.23: Azekka-nni agellid Aɣribas d weltma-s Birinis usan-d, cebbḥen-d iman-nsen, ṭṭfen amkan deg wexxam n ccṛeɛ nutni d lqebṭanat akk-d imeqqranen n temdint ; lḥakem Fistus yefka lameṛ a d-skecmen Bulus,
25.24: dɣa yenna : Ay agellid Aɣribas akk-d kunwi i gḥedṛen dagi ! Argaz-agi, d win akken i ɣef d-ccetkan wat Isṛail ama di temdint n Lquds ama dagi ; țɛeggiḍen qqaṛen : « ilaq ad immet »!
25.25: Ma d nekk, idheṛ-iyi-d lḥal ur ixdim ula d acemma yuklalen lmut ; imi nețța s yiman-is yerẓa ccṛeɛ ɣer Qayṣer, qebleɣ a s-t-ceggɛeɣ.
25.26: Ur ufiɣ ula d yiwet n sebba iseḥḥan i ɣef ara ketbeɣ fell-as i Qayṣer ; daymi i t-id-sbeddeɣ zdat wen, ula zdat-ek ay agellid Aɣribas, iwakken m'ara t-beḥten ad yili wayen ara ketbeɣ fell-as.
25.27: Axaṭer walaɣ mačči d ṣṣwab ma ceggɛeɣ yiwen umeḥbus ɣer temdint n Ṛuma mbla ma fkiɣ-asen sebba s wayes i d ccetkan fell-as.

26.1: Aɣribas yenna i Bulus : -- Atan ɣuṛ-ek wawal, tzemreḍ aț-țdafɛeḍ ɣef yiman-ik. Bulus yerfed afus-is iwakken ad idafeɛ ɣef yiman-is, yenna :
26.2: Feṛḥeɣ aṭas ay agellid Aɣribas imi zdat-ek ara ɛeddiɣ di ccṛeɛ ass-agi ɣef wayen akk i ccetkan fell-i wat Isṛail,
26.3: axaṭer tesneḍ akken ilaq leɛwayed akk-d yimeslayen-nsen ; di leɛnaya-k ihi semḥess-iyi-d s leɛqel.
26.4: At Isṛail ssnen tikli-inu si temẓi-w, axaṭer țțuṛebbaɣ di temdint n Lquds ger warraw n tmurt-iw.
26.5: Ssnen-iyi si zik ma bɣan ad cehden fell-i. Lliɣ d afarizi, tebɛeɣ leqwanen iweɛṛen yeɛnan ddin-nneɣ di tejmaɛt n ifariziyen.
26.6: Beddeɣ ass-agi di ccṛeɛ axaṭer ssarmeɣ aț-țwakmel lemɛahda-nni i gefka Sidi Ṛebbi i lejdud-nneɣ.
26.7: Tnac leɛṛac-nneɣ i gɛebden Ṛebbi am yiḍ am ass, țṛaǧun a d-taweḍ lemɛahda-agi i ssaramen. Ɣef wusirem-agi i ccetkan wat Isṛail fell-i.
26.8: Ay agellid Aɣribas, acuɣeṛ i tɣilem d lmuḥal a d-isseḥyu Sidi Ṛebbi lmegtin ?
26.9: Ma d nekkini, di tazwara ɛeṛdeɣ ad xaṣmeɣ s wayen yellan di tezmert-iw, isem-agi n Ɛisa Anaṣari ;
26.10: d ayen i xedmeɣ di temdint n Lquds, rriɣ aṭas imasiḥiyen ɣer lḥebs, yerna d lmuqedmin imeqqranen i yi-d-yefkan țesriḥ-agi. M'ara ḥekkmen fell-asen s lmut, nekkini qebbleɣ ;
26.11: qehṛeɣ-ten acḥal d abrid si lǧameɛ ɣer wayeḍ, ḥeṛseɣ-ten ad ṭṭixṛen i webrid-agi n Ɛisa ; deg urrif-iw ameqqran, țṛuḥeɣ armi ț-țimdinin tibeṛṛaniyin iwakken a ten-qehhṛeɣ.
26.12: Ɣef wannect-nni lmuqedmin imeqqranen fkan-iyi tazmert s wayes ṛuḥeɣ ɣer temdint n Dimecq.
26.13: Taswiɛt kan di țnaṣfa wass ay agellid, walaɣ deg webrid yiwet n tafat i d-yekkan seg igenni, tețfeǧǧiǧ akteṛ n yiṭij, tezzi-yi-d i nekk akk-d wid yellan yid-i,
26.14: neɣli akk ɣer lqaɛa. Sliɣ i ṣṣut i d-iqqaṛen s tmeslayt taɛibṛanit : A Caɛul, a Caɛul ! Acuɣeṛ i yi tețqehhiṛeḍ ? Yewɛeṛ fell-ak aț-țɛaṣiḍ inezlan.
26.15: Rriɣ-as : Anwa-k a Sidi ? Yenna-yi-d : Nekkini d Ɛisa-nni i tețqehhiṛeḍ ;
26.16: kker fell-ak, bedd ɣef yidaṛṛen-ik, ḍehṛeɣ-ak-d iwakken a k-rreɣ d aqeddac-iw, d inigi ɣef wayen twalaḍ ass-agi d wayen ara k-d-sekneɣ sya d asawen.
26.17: Xtaṛeɣ-k-id si ger wat Isṛail akk-d leǧnas nniḍen uɣuṛ ara k ceggɛeɣ. A sen-teldiḍ allen
26.18: iwakken a d ffɣen si ṭṭlam ɣer tafat, si tezmert n Cciṭan ɣer tezmert n Ṛebbi, ad amnen yis-i, iwakken a sen-neɛfuɣ ddnubat-nsen, ad sɛun amkan ger wid i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
26.19: Daymi, ay agellid Aɣribas, ur ɛuṣaɣ ara aweḥḥi i yi-d-yusan seg igenni.
26.20: Bdiɣ abecceṛ di temdint n Dimecq akk-d ț-țemdint n Lquds, beccṛeɣ daɣen di tmurt n Yahuda meṛṛa, di taggara, beccṛeɣ i wat leǧnas ur nelli ara seg wat Isṛail, nhiɣ-ten ad tuben, a d-uɣalen ɣer webrid n Ṛebbi, ad xedmen lecɣal i d-ițbegginen belli tuben s wul-nsen.
26.21: Ɣef wannect-agi i yi-ṭṭfen wat Isṛail deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen, ɛeṛden ad iyi-nɣen.
26.22: Lameɛna s lemɛawna n Sidi Ṛebbi, ddreɣ armi d ass-a, țbecciṛeɣ i yemdanen meṛṛa, ama d ameɣbun ama d ameṛkanti ; yerna ayen i d-qqaṛeɣ, d ayen akken i ɣef d-caren lenbiya akk-d Sidna Musa :
26.23: yeɛni Lmasiḥ ad iɛteb, d nețța i d amezwaru ara d-iḥyun si ger lmegtin, ad ibecceṛ tafat i wegdud n wat Isṛail akk-d leǧnas nniḍen.
26.24: Akken yella Bulus yețdafaɛ ɣef yiman-is, Fistus yenṭeq-ed s leɛyaḍ, yenna : Iffeɣ-ik leɛqel a Bulus ! Lketṛa n tmusni-inek tessufeɣ-ak leɛqel !
26.25: Bulus yerra-yas : Ur iyi-iffiɣ ara leɛqel a Fistus ameqqran ! Ayen akka i d-qqaṛeɣ d imeslayen n tideț yesɛan ṣṣwab.
26.26: Ula d agellid Aɣribas, yeɛlem s wayagi ; daymi i d-mmeslayeɣ zdat-es ɛinani, imi mačči s tuffra i gedṛa wannect-a.
26.27: Ay agellid, tumneḍ s wayen i d-nnan lenbiya ? Sriɣ tumneḍ yis-sen !
26.28: Aɣribas yenna i Bulus : Lemmer a yi-d ternuḍ kra yimeslayen ahat ad iyi-tqenɛeḍ ad uɣaleɣ d amasiḥi !
26.29: Bulus yenna-yas : A wi-yufan a Ṛebbi, mačči d keččini kan, lameɛna ula d wid akk i yi-d-ismeḥsisen ass-agi, aț-țuɣalem am nekk tura neɣ deg ussan i d-iteddun, ḥaca snasel-agi i yi cudden !
26.30: Dɣa agellid Aɣribas, lḥakem Fistus, Birinis d wid akk yeqqimen yid-sen, kkren-d.
26.31: Mi kkren ad ṛuḥen, nnan wway gar-asen : Argaz-agi ur ixdim ula d acemma yuklalen lmut neɣ lḥebs.
26.32: Aɣribas yenna i Fistus : Argaz-agi izmer ad ițțuserreḥ lemmer ur yerẓi ara ccṛeɛ ɣer Qayṣer.

27.1: Mi fkan lameṛ a nerkeb lbabuṛ ɣer tmurt n Selyan, ǧǧan Bulus akk-d kra n imeḥbas nniḍen i yiwen ufesyan n terbaɛt n Qayṣer, isem-is Xulyus.
27.2: Nerkeb deg yiwen lbabuṛ n temdint n Adramit, ara iṛuḥen rrif n tmura n Asya ; nṛuḥ, yedda yid-nneɣ Aristaṛk yellan d amasiduni n temdint n Tiṣalunik.
27.3: Azekka-nni, newweḍ ɣer temdint n Sidun , Xulyus yețqadaṛen Bulus, ixdem-as lemziya, iserreḥ-as ad iṛuḥ ɣer imdukkal-is iwakken a s-d-fken ayen yeḥwaǧ.
27.4: Mi neqleɛ syenna, nɛedda rrif rrif n tegzirt n Qubṛus axaṭer iṣbeḥ-aɣ-d waḍu iǧehden si zdat.
27.5: Nezger lebḥeṛ n Silisya akk-d Bamfilya, newweḍ ɣer lmeṛṣa n Mira yellan di tmurt n Lizya.
27.6: Afesyan-nni yufa dinna lbabuṛ n Skandriya ara iṛuḥen ɣer tmurt n Selyan, isserkeb-aɣ deg-s.
27.7: Lbabuṛ nni yewwi-yaɣ kra n wussan s țțawil ; armi neṛwa leɛtab i newweḍ ɣer tama n temdint n Knidus, imi ur aɣ-yeǧǧi ara waḍu a nqeṛṛeb, nɛedda rrif n tegzirt n Kritus, ɣer tama n Salmuni.
27.8: Nkemmel rrif rrif s leɛtab, armi newweḍ ɣer yiwen wemkan isem-is « Lemraṣi icebḥen », zdat temdint n Lazaya.
27.9: Nesṛuḥ aṭas n lweqt, lweqt n usafer di lebḥeṛ yuɣal yewɛeṛ aṭas, imi ass i deg țțuẓummen wat Isṛail di taggara n lexṛif iɛedda.
27.10: Daymi i sen-iɛeggen Bulus yenna-yasen : Ay atmaten, ẓriɣ belli tikkelt-agi ma nkemmel aṣafeṛ-nneɣ, a d-tili lexsaṛa mačči kan i lbabuṛ d sselɛa yellan deg-s, lameɛna tezmer aț-țeglu ula yis-nneɣ.
27.11: Afesyan-nni aṛumani yuɣ awal i bab n lbabuṛ akk-d win i t-inehṛen wala ad yaɣ awal i Bulus.
27.12: Imi lmeṛṣa-nni ur telhi ara iwakken ad sɛeddin deg-s ccetwa, azgen ameqqran n ibeḥriyen bɣan ad ṛuḥen, iwakken ma yella wamek, ad awḍen ɣer lmeṛṣa n Finikus yellan di tegzirt n Kritus ; lmeṛṣa-yagi tqubel lǧiha taɣeṛbit, bɣan ad sɛeddin deg-s ccetwa.
27.13: Akken i d-yekker yiwen ubeḥri xfifen, ɣilen ad awḍen ɣer leqsed nsen. Refden amextaf n lbabuṛ, ṛuḥen rrif rrif n tegzirt n Kritus.
27.14: Lameɛna ur tɛeṭṭel ara tekker-ed yiwet n tbuciḍant iwumi qqaṛen Erakilun i d-ikkan seg idurar n tegzirt-nni.
27.15: Imi lbabuṛ ur s-izmir ara i tbuciḍant-nni, neǧǧa-t a t-yawi waḍu ɣer wanda i s-yehwa,
