27.16: nɛedda seddaw yiwet n tegzirt tamecṭuḥt yeddurin ɣef waḍu, isem-is Kluda. Mi ɣ-teɣli teflukt-nni n leslak, s leɛtab ameqqran i ț-id-nessuli ɣer lbabuṛ.
27.17: Imi nuggad a ɣ-yawi waḍu ɣer leryuf iweɛṛen n tmurt n Libya, ncudd lbabuṛ s imurar ; nerna nṣubb-ed lbac-nni s wayes i t-yețțawi waḍu, neǧǧa iman-nneɣ a ɣ-yawi ɣer wanda yebɣa.
27.18: Azekka-nni, imi mazal lebḥeṛ yenhewwal, nessenqes kra n sselɛa yellan deg-s nḍeggeṛ-iț ɣer lebḥeṛ.
27.19: Ass wis tlata, ixeddamen n lbabuṛ rnan ḍeggṛen sselɛa-nni i d-iqqimen.
27.20: Acḥal n wussan ur d-iban yiṭij ur d-banen itran, lebḥeṛ mazal-it yerwi, ur numin ara a nțwasellek.
27.21: Aṭas wussan i neqqim mbla lmakla ; dɣa Bulus ibedd-ed gar-asen yenna : Ay irgazen, lemmer i yi-tuɣem awal m'akken i wen-d-nniɣ : a neqqim axiṛ di lmeṛṣa n Kritus, tili ur d-tdeṛṛu ara lexsaṛa akk-d lxuf-agi !
27.22: Tura ur țțagadet ara, sǧehdet iman-nwen axaṭer ula d yiwen deg-wen ur ițmețțat ; ur d-tețțili lexsaṛa anagar lbabuṛ-agi ara iɣeṛqen.
27.23: Iḍ iɛeddan, Sidi Ṛebbi i ɛebbdeɣ iceggeɛ-ed yiwen lmelk ibedd-ed ɣuṛ-i
27.24: yenna-yi-d : « a Bulus, ur țțaggad ara ! Ilaq aț-țbeddeḍ zdat Qayṣer, atan Sidi Ṛebbi a kkun isellek s kečč s wid yellan yid-ek ».
27.25: Sewṛet ihi ay atmaten ! Țekleɣ ɣef Ṛebbi ad idṛu am akken i d-yenna ;
27.26: mbla ccekk ihi a ɣ-ḍeggṛent lemwaji ɣer yiwet n tegzirt.
27.27: Iḍ wis ṛbeɛṭac, mazal aḍu yețhuccu-yaɣ ițțawi-yaɣ akkin akka ɣef lebḥeṛ Agrakal ; di țnaṣfa n yiḍ, ibeḥṛiyen ḥussen belli ur bɛiden ara ɣef lberr.
27.28: Ktalen lqaɛ n lebḥeṛ s wemrar, ufan llant
27.29: Imi uggaden lbabuṛ a t-id-iḥaz kra seddaw-as, ḍeggṛen ṛebɛa imextafen ɣer deffir n lbabuṛ, tqelqen melmi ara yali wass.
27.30: Lameɛna ixeddamen n lbabuṛ țqelliben ad rewlen ; ṣubben taflukt n leslak ɣer lebḥeṛ, steɛmilen am akken d amextaf ara ḍeggṛen ɣer zdat lbabuṛ.
27.31: Dɣa Bulus yenna i lqebṭan d lɛeskeṛ-is : M'ur qqimen ara yergazen-agi di lbabuṛ, ur tezmirem ara aț-țmenɛem ! S
27.32: Imiren lɛeskeṛ gezmen imurar n teflukt, ǧǧan-ț aț-țeɣli ɣer lebḥeṛ.
27.33: Weqbel ad yali wass, Bulus inha-ten akk ad ččen cwiṭ n lqut, yenna : Ass-agi d ass wis ṛbeɛṭac ur teɛṛiḍem lqut.
27.34: Tura nhiɣ-kkun ihi aț-țeččem iwakken aț-țețțusellkem, ula d yiwen deg-wen ur s-ițṛuḥ wenẓad seg uqeṛṛuy.
27.35: Mi d-yenna ayagi, iddem-ed aɣṛum, iḥmed Ṛebbi zdat-sen meṛṛa, yebḍa-t, yebda itețț.
27.38: Mi ččan armi ṛwan, ḍeggṛen ɣer lebḥeṛ ticekkaṛin n yirden, iwakken ad yifsus lbabuṛ.
27.39: Mi guli wass, ur eɛqilen ara maḍi tamurt-nni anda wwḍen. Lameɛna walan yiwen wemkan iqeṛben, iban-ed deg-s ṛṛmel, bɣan ad rren lbabuṛ ɣer dinna ma yella wamek.
27.40: Fsin imurar i imextafen bran asen ɣer lebḥeṛ, fsin daɣen imurar i imeqdafen s wacu nehṛen lbabuṛ ; dɣa ssulin yiwen ubeḥnuq yellan ɣer zdat n lbabuṛ iwakken a ten-yawi waḍu ɣer rrif n lebḥeṛ.
27.41: Lameɛna wwḍen ɣer yiwen wemkan n ṛṛmel iwumi d-izzi lebḥeṛ ; rran ɣer dinna lbabuṛ-nni, lǧiha n zdat teḥṣel di ṛṛmel teḥbes ma d lǧiha n deffir tebda tețṛuẓu si lqewwa n lemwaji.
27.42: Lɛeskeṛ bɣan ad nɣen imeḥbas-nni axaṭer uggaden a sen-rewlen s lɛum.
27.43: Lqebṭan-nni i gebɣan ad isellek Bulus, ur ten-yeǧǧi ara ad xedmen lebɣi-nsen. Yefka lameṛ i wid yessnen ad ɛummen, ad ḍeggṛen iman-nsen d imezwura ɣer waman iwakken ad awḍen ɣer rrif.
27.44: Ma d wiyaḍ a ten-tebɛen, ad ṭṭfen di telwiḥin neɣ deg iceqfan n lbabuṛ. S wakka, wwḍen meṛṛa ɣer rrif n lebḥeṛ di laman.

28.1: Mi d-nemneɛ si lebḥeṛ, nesla belli tigzirt-nni isem-is Malṭa.
28.2: Imezdaɣ-is setṛeḥben yis-nneɣ, xedmen-aɣ lxiṛ d ameqqran ; ceɛlen times axaṭer yekkat ugeffur ( lehwa ), yerna d asemmiḍ.
28.3: Bulus ijmeɛ-ed kra n yesɣaṛen a ten-iger ɣer tmes, si leḥmu-nni n tmes yeffeɣ-ed yiwen n wezrem yenṭed deg ufus-is.
28.4: Lɣaci mi walan azrem-nni yeckenṭeḍ deg ufus-is, qqaṛen wway gar-asen : « Argaz-agi iban d bu tmegṛaḍ, axaṭer ɣas akken yemneɛ-ed si lebḥeṛ, Sidi Ṛebbi yellan d Bab n lḥeqq ur t-yețțaǧa ara ad yidir. »
28.5: Lameɛna Bulus yezwi azrem-nni ɣer tmes, ur t-yuɣ ula d acemma ;
28.6: lɣaci-nni țṛaǧun a t-walin ibzeg neɣ ad yemmet imiren kan. Ɛussen-t, mi walan ur t-yuɣ wacemma, beddlen ṛṛay, ḥesben-t d yiwen seg iṛebbiten s wayes țțamnen.
28.7: Di leǧwahi-nni i gezdeɣ Bubliyus lḥakem ameqqran n tegzirt-nni ; yesɛa aṭas n wakal, yesṭerḥeb yis-nneɣ, yerna yessens-aɣ ɣuṛ-es tlata wussan.
28.8: Deg ussan-nni, baba-s n Bubliyus yella deg usu yehlek, tuɣ-it tawla yerna tuzzel tɛebbuṭ-is. Bulus iṛuḥ ɣuṛ-es, issers ifassen-is fell-as, yedɛa ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi dɣa yeḥla.
28.9: Mi slan yis imuḍan n tegzirt-nni usan-d ɣuṛ-es isseḥla-ten ula d nutni.
28.10: Ɣef wayagi, qudṛen-aɣ aṭas ; mi nekker a nṛuḥ, fkan-aɣ-d ayen akk neḥwaǧ i webrid.
28.11: Mi ɛeddan tlata waguren, nerkeb yiwen lbabuṛ n temdint n Skandriya iwumi qqaṛen Dyuskuṛ, isɛeddan ccetwa di tegzirt-nni ;
28.12: newweḍ ɣer temdint n Sirakuz, anda neqqim tlata wussan.
28.13: Syenna nkemmel rrif rrif n lebḥeṛ armi ț-țamdint n Ṛejyu, azekka-nni yekker-ed yiwen n waḍu i d-yekkan seg usamer, sin wussan mbeɛd, newweḍ ɣer temdint n Buzul.
28.14: Nufa dinna atmaten i ɣ iḥellelen a neqqim yid-sen sebɛa wussan, syenna nkemmel abrid ɣer temdint n Ṛuma.
28.15: Mi slan yis-nneɣ watmaten n temdint n Ṛuma, usan-d armi d ssuq n Abyus akk-d wemkan yețțusemman « Tlata Țbernat » iwakken a ɣ-d-mmagren. Mi ten iwala Bulus, yefṛeḥ yeḥmed Ṛebbi yerna yuɣal-it-id lǧehd.
28.16: Mi newweḍ ɣer temdint n Ṛuma, serrḥen-as i Bulus ad izdeɣ deg yiwen wexxam, nețța d yiwen uɛeskṛi i t yețɛassan.
28.17: Mi ɛeddan tlata wussan, Bulus yessawel i imeqqranen n wat Isṛail. Mi d-nnejmaɛen, Bulus yenna yasen : Ay atmaten, ɣas akken ur xdimeɣ acemma i gxulfen agdud d leɛwayed n lejdud-nneɣ, ṭṭfen-iyi ɣer lḥebs di temdint n Lquds, sellmen-iyi ger ifassen n lɛeskeṛ n Ṛuman.
28.18: Mi yi-beḥten, bɣan ad iyi serrḥen axaṭer ur ufin ara deg-i sebba s wayes ara ḥekmen fell-i s lmut.
28.19: Imi ur qbilen ara wat Isṛail ad iyi-d-serrḥen iṛumaniyen, iḥettem-iyi lḥal ad rẓeɣ ccṛeɛ ɣer Qayṣer ; lameɛna mačči d acetki i bɣiɣ ad ccetkiɣ ɣef wegdud-iw.
28.20: Daymi i bɣiɣ a kkun-ẓreɣ, ad mmeslayeɣ yid-wen axaṭer ɣef ddemma n usirem n wat Isṛail i țwarzeɣ s snasel-agi.
28.21: Imeqqranen n wat Isṛail nnan-as : Ur d-neṭṭif ula d yiwet n tebṛaț si tmurt n Yahuda ɣef wayen yeɛnan tamsalt-ik, ula d yiwen seg watmaten ur d-yusi ad iccetki neɣ a ɣ-d-yini ayen n diri fell-ak.
28.22: Lameɛna nebɣa a nsel s ɣuṛ-ek ayen akka s wacu i tumneḍ, ma d ayen yeɛnan tajmaɛt-agi seg i d-tekkiḍ, neẓra belli di yal amkan tețmagar-ed uguren.
28.23: Dɣa msefhamen ɣef wass nniḍen i deg ara mlilen. Mi d yewweḍ wass-nni, usan-d deg waṭas yid-sen ɣer wexxam n Bulus. Si ṣṣbeḥ armi ț-țameddit, Bulus yețbecciṛ-asen ɣef tgeldit n Ṛebbi s ccariɛa n Musa ț-țektabin n lenbiya, yețqellib a ten-iqenneɛ iwakken ad amnen s Sidna Ɛisa.
28.24: Kra umnen s wayen i d-yenna, ma d wiyaḍ ugin ad amnen.
28.25: Mi țeddun ad ṛuḥen mazal lxilaf gar-asen, dɣa Bulus yerna-yasen imeslayen-agi : Ț-țideț ayen i d-yenna Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i lejdud-nwen s yimi n nnbi Iceɛya
28.26: mi d-yenna : Ṛuḥ ɣer wegdud-agi tiniḍ-asen : ɣas aț-țeslem s imeẓẓuɣen-nwen ur tfehmem ara ; aț-țemmuqlem s wallen-nwen ur tețwalim ara,
28.27: imi ul n wegdud-agi yuɣal d azṛu ; qeflen imeẓẓuɣen-nsen, qemcen allen-nsen ; ur bɣin ara ad walin s wallen-nsen, d slen s imeẓẓuɣen-nsen, ad fehmen s wul-nsen, iwakken a d-uɣalen ɣuṛ-i ad beddlen tikli akken a ten-sseḥluɣ !
28.28: Atan ihi tura leslak n Sidi Ṛebbi ad ițțunefk i leǧnas nniḍenur nelli ara n wat Isṛail axaṭer nutni a s-semḥessen yerna a t-qeblen.
28.29: Mi d-yenna Bulus ayagi, ffɣen-d imeqqranen n wat Isṛail, leḥḥun țemjadalen wway gar-asen.
28.30: Bulus yeqqim sin iseggasen deg wexxam-nni i gekra. Isṭerḥib s kra n win i d-yețțasen a t-iẓer.
28.31: Yețbecciṛ tageldit n Ṛebbi s tlelli, isselmad-asen ayen akk yeɛnan Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, ulac win i t-iḥebsen.

1.1: Nekk Bulus, yellan d aqeddac n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, țwaxtaṛeɣ ad iliɣ d ṛṛasul, iwakken ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi.
1.2: Lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ i d-yewɛed Sidi Ṛebbi si zik s yimi n lenbiya di tira iqedsen,
1.3: d ayen yeɛnan Mmi-s, Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ i d-ilulen d amdan seg wedrum n Dawed,
1.4: yețțusemma d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi s tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, s ḥeggu-ines si ger lmegtin.
1.5: Yis i ɣ-ixdem Sidi Ṛebbi lemziya a nili d imceggɛen, iwakken a d-nawi s yisem-is imdanen n leǧnas meṛṛa ad amnen yis yerna ad aɣen awal-is.
1.6: Yessawel-awen-d ula i kunwi yellan ger leǧnas-agi, iwakken aț-țilim d ayla n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
1.7: I wid akk yellan di temdint n Ṛuma, i gḥemmel Sidi Ṛebbi, iwumi i d-yessawel ad ilin d ayla-s : ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a wen-d-țțunefkent s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ akk-d Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
1.8: Di tazwara, ad ḥemdeɣ Sidi Ṛebbi fell-awen meṛṛa s yisem n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, axaṭer yeffeɣ lexbaṛ di ddunit meṛṛa belli tumnem s Lmasiḥ.
1.9: Sidi Ṛebbi i ɛebbdeɣ seg ul-iw, i ɣef qeddceɣ imi țbecciṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ yeɛnan Mmi-s, yeẓra belli țțadreɣ-kkun-id dima m'ara deɛɛuɣ ɣuṛ-es.
1.10: Ssutureɣ mkul ass i Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken ma yebɣa, ad afeɣ abrid amek ara n-aseɣ ɣuṛ-wen.
1.11: Acḥal i bɣiɣ a kkun-ẓreɣ, akken a kkun-slemdeɣ ɣef kra n tukciwin i d-ițțak Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen iwakken aț țǧehdem ;
1.12: yerna m'ara n-awḍeɣ ɣuṛ-wen, a nemseǧhad wway gar aneɣ ; kunwi s liman-nwen, nekk s liman-inu, imi yiwen n liman i ɣ-isdukklen.
1.13: Ay atmaten, bɣiɣ aț-țeẓrem belli acḥal n tikkal i ɛerḍeɣ a n-aseɣ ɣuṛ-wen, iwakken lxedma inu a wen-d-teglu s kra n lfayda, am akken i d-tewwi lfayda i leǧnas nniḍen ; meɛna ar tura mazal țmagareɣ-ed uguren.
1.14: Ilaq-iyi ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer yemdanen n ddunit meṛṛa, ɣer leǧnas itqeddmen akk-d wid ur netqeddem ara, ɣer wid yeɣṛan d wid ur neɣṛi ara.
1.15: Daymi i bɣiɣ ad beccṛeɣ daɣen lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ, i kunwi yellan di temdint n Ṛuma.
1.16: Ur ssetḥaɣ ara s lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ, axaṭer ț-țazmert n Sidi Ṛebbi i leslak n kra win yumnen yis ; di tazwara i wat Isṛail, a d-ḍefṛen leǧnas nniḍen.
1.17: Lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ ibeggen-ed amek i gețțarra Sidi Ṛebbi imdanen d iḥeqqiyen s liman, axaṭer s liman kan i nezmer a nuɣal d iḥeqqiyen si tazwara alamma ț-țaggara. Akken yura di tira iqedsen : Aḥeqqi ad yidir s liman.
1.18: Sidi Ṛebbi ițbeggin-ed urrif-is seg igenni ɣef ddnub d cceṛ n yemdanen i gețɣummun lḥeqq s lbaṭel ;
1.19: axaṭer ayen akk i glaqen a t-issinen ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi, ẓran-t ; d Ṛebbi s yiman-is i sen-t-id isbeggnen.
1.20: Seg wasmi i d-yexleq ddunit, ayen akk yeffren ɣef wallen, nețwali-t di lecɣal-is ; nezmer a neɛqel belli d nețța kan i d Ṛebbi yesɛan tazmert ur nfennu ; daymi wigi ulac fell-asen ssmaḥ.
1.21: ?as akken ẓran yella Ṛebbi, ur setɛeṛfen ara yis ; ur t-ḥmiden, ur t-ckiṛen, lameɛna țkemmilen deg yir ixemmimen-nsen armi iɣumm ṭṭlam ulawen-nsen.
1.22: ?țaran iman-nsen d lɛuqal armi uɣalen d imejhal.
1.23: Beddlen lɛaḍima n Sidi Ṛebbi yeddren s lmeṣnuɛat yesɛan ṣṣifa n wemdan ifennun, ṣṣifa n leḍyuṛ, n lewḥuc yesɛan ṛebɛa iḍaṛṛen, d wayen akk ileḥḥun ɣef wuɛebbuḍ ;
1.24: daymi i ten-yeǧǧa Sidi Ṛebbi tebɛen lebɣi n wulawen-nsen, xeddmen ticmatin, ṣṣawḍen armi kksen lḥeṛma ɣef yiman-nsen.
1.25: Beddlen tideț n Sidi Ṛebbi s lekdeb, ɛebbden ayen yețwaxelqen, ǧǧan win i d-ixelqen kullec, nețța i gețțubarken i dayem ; Amin !
1.26: ?-țagi i d sebba i ɣef ten-yeǧǧa Sidi Ṛebbi di lɛaṛ n ccehwat-nsen ; tilawin țbeddilent irgazen s tilawin.
1.27: Ula d irgazen țțaǧan tilawin, ițenkkar uḥaṛuq wway gar-asen, țemyexdamen lɛaṛ ; d wagi i d lexlaṣ i yuklalen ɣef tidderɣelt-nsen.
1.28: Imi ugin ad issinen Ṛebbi, Sidi Ṛebbi yeǧǧa-ten di lɛeqliya-nsen iɛewjen iwakken ad xedmen ayen ur nlaq ara.
1.29: ?čuṛen d lbaṭel akk-d wayen n diri : d ṭṭmeɛ, d cceṛ, ț-țismin ; d at tmegṛaḍ, d at ccwal, d at tḥila, d at tiḥeṛci, d iqeṛṛaḍen.
1.30: Wa yekkat deg wa, d iɛdawen n Ṛebbi, ur țneḥcamen ara, d imzuxiyen, d ikeddaben ; snulfuyen-d cceṛ, țɛaṣin lwaldin-nsen.
1.31: Ur sɛin lefhama, ur sɛin laman, ulac deg wulawen-nsen ṛṛeḥma neɣ leḥnana.
1.32: ?as akken ẓran lḥisab n Sidi Ṛebbi yețṛaǧu wid ixeddmen annect-agi yerna uklalen lmut, țkemmilen di tikli-nsen yerna feṛḥen s wid ixeddmen am nutni.

2.1: Ulac fell-ak ssmaḥ a win ițḥasaben wiyaḍ, axaṭer akken tebɣuḍ tiliḍ, mi tețḥasabeḍ wiyaḍ, d iman-ik i tḥusbeḍ, imi kečč i ten-ițḥasaben txeddmeḍ am nutni.
2.2: Neẓra belli Sidi Ṛebbi iḥekkem s lḥeqq ɣef wid ixeddmen lecɣal-agi.
2.3: I kečč i gețḥasaben wid ixeddmen lecɣal-agi, ma txeddmeḍ am nutni, tɣileḍ aț-țmenɛeḍ i lḥisab n Sidi Ṛebbi ?
2.4: Eɛni tḥeqṛeḍ leḥnana d ṣṣbeṛ i gesɛa Sidi Ṛebbi mbla ceḥḥa ? Ur teẓriḍ ara belli iṣebber-ak s leḥnana-s iwakken aț-țbeddleḍ tikli ?
2.5: Lameɛna kečč yesɣaṛayen ul-ik tugiḍ aț-țbeddleḍ tikli, tețheggiḍ i yiman-ik lɛiqab ameqqran i wass n lḥisab, ass i deg ara d-ibin wurrif akk-d lḥeqq n Sidi Ṛebbi
2.6: ara yerren i mkul yiwen ayen yexdem .
2.7: ad yefk tudert n dayem i wid ixeddmen lxiṛ s ṣṣbeṛ, yețnadin ɣef lɛezz d lḥeṛma akk-d tudert n dayem.
2.8: Ma d wid yellan d imcumen, ikeṛhen tideț, ixeddmen lbaṭel, a d-isseɣli fell-asen urrif ț-țwaɣit ;
2.9: a d-isseɣli daɣen ccedda ț-țwaɣit ɣef yal amdan ixeddmen cceṛ, di tazwara ɣef wat Isṛail, a d-ḍefṛen leǧnas nniḍen.
2.10: Meɛna a d-ițțunefk lɛezz d lḥeṛma akk-d lehna i kra n win ixeddmen lxiṛ, i wat Isṛail uqbel, a d-ḍefṛen leǧnas nniḍen.
2.11: ?er Sidi Ṛebbi ulac lxilaf ger yemdanen.
2.12: Kra n wid ara idenben, ur nessin ara ccariɛa n Musa, asm'ara mmten ur tḥekkem ara fell-asen ; ma d win ara idenben yili yessen ccariɛa, d ccariɛa ara t-iḥasben.
2.13: Mačči d wid ismeḥsisen kan i ccariɛa i gețwaḥesben d iḥeqqiyen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, meɛna d wid i gxeddmen ayen i d-tenna.
2.14: Leǧnas ur nessin ara ccariɛa, i gxeddmen s nneya-nsen ayen i d-tenna, uɣalen d ccariɛa i yiman-nsen ɣas akken ur ț-sɛin ara.
2.15: Beggnen-d s tikli-nsen belli ayen i d-tenna ccariɛa, deg ulawen-nsen i gura. D ulawen-nsen i d-ițbegginen annect-a axaṭer axemmem nsen tikwal ițḥasab-iten, tikwal yețḥuddu fell-asen.
2.16: D annect-agi ara d-ibanen asm'ara iḥaseb Sidi Ṛebbi s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, ayen akk xeddmen yemdanen s tuffra am akken yella di lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i țbecciṛeɣ.
2.17: Kečč iḥesben iman-ik si dderya n wat Isṛail, tețțekleḍ ɣef ccariɛa n Musa, tețzuxxuḍ s Ṛebbi ;
2.18: kečč yessnen lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi, teẓriḍ d acu i gelhan imi tesneḍ ccariɛa ;
2.19: kečč i gɣilen tzemreḍ aț-țeṭṭfeḍ afus i iderɣalen, aț-țiliḍ ț-țafat n wid yellan di ṭṭlam ;
2.20: kečč iḥesben iman-ik tzemreḍ aț-țesfehmeḍ wid ur nessin, neɣ aț-țiliḍ d ccix n warrac axaṭer tufiḍ di ccariɛa n Musa tamusni akk-d țideț !
2.21: Tesselmadeḍ wiyaḍ, meɛna ur tesselmadeḍ ara iman-ik ;
2.22: tnehhuḍ wiyaḍ ur țțakren ara, kečč s yiman-ik tețțakreḍ ; tnehhuḍ wiyaḍ ur zennun ara, kečč s yiman-ik tzennuḍ ! Tkeṛheḍ ssadaț, tețțakreḍ lemqamat-nsen !
2.23: Tețzuxxuḍ s ccariɛa, meɛna tesseɣlayeḍ lqima n yisem n Sidi Ṛebbi imi ur txeddmeḍ ara ayen i d-teqqaṛ !
2.24: Axaṭer akken yura di tira iqedsen : ?ef ddemma-nwen i gețwargem yisem n Sidi Ṛebbi ger leǧnas.
2.25: ?-țideț, ṭṭhaṛa tenfeɛ ma yella tettabaɛeḍ ccariɛa, meɛna ma yella ur txeddmeḍ ara ayen i d-tenna ccariɛa, am akken ur teḍhiṛeḍ ara.
2.26: Win ur neḍhiṛ ara, itebɛen ccariɛa, eɛni ur ițwaḥsab ara ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi am akken yeḍheṛ ?
2.27: Nețta ur neḍhiṛ ara di lǧețța-s, ixeddmen ayen i d-tenna ccariɛa, izmer a k-iḥaseb kečč iḍehṛen, yesnen ccariɛa meɛna ur txeddmeḍ ara ayen i d-teqqaṛ.
2.28: Win yellan s țideț n wat Isṛail, mačči s uqemmuc kan, neɣ s ṭṭhaṛa i d-ițbanen deg weglim-ines ;
2.29: meɛna mmi-s n wat Isṛail n tideț, d win i t-yellan deg ul-ines, ṭṭhaṛa n ṣṣeḥ d ayen ixeddem Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen deg ul n wemdan, mačči ț-țin ixeddem wemdan s ccariɛa. Amdan am-agi, d Sidi Ṛebbi i t-ițɛuzzun mačči d imdanen.

3.1: Ihi d acu i sɛan n wat Isṛail sennig wiyaḍ ? D acu n nnfeɛ yellan di ṭṭhaṛa ?
3.2: Lfayda tella yerna ț-țameqqrant di mkul tama, axaṭer d nutni iwumi d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi awal-is d imezwura.
3.3: Ma yella ihi kra deg-sen ɛuṣan awal-is, eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi a ten-inkeṛ meṛṛa i lmend-nsen ?
3.4: D lmuḥal ! Sidi Ṛebbi d aḥeqqi, d imdanen kan i geskiddiben ; am akken yura di tektabt n ?abur : Iwakken a d-iban lḥeqq n wawal-ik, yerna m'ara tețḥasabeḍ, d kečč i gesɛan lḥeqq.
3.5: Ma yella lbaṭel i nxeddem isban-ed lḥeqq n Sidi Ṛebbi, d acu ara d-nini ? Eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi ur yesɛi ara lḥeqq m'ara ɣ-iɛaqeb ? ( Nniɣ-ed ayagi s lɛeqliya n wemdan. )
3.6: ?-țideț yesɛa lḥeqq ! Neɣ m'ulac amek ara iḥaseb ddunit ?
3.7: Ma yella lekdeb-iw ițbeggin-ed tideț n Sidi Ṛebbi yerna isnernay di lɛaḍima-s, acuɣer ihi mazal-iyi țwaḥesbeɣ d amednub ?
3.8: Llan kra n yemdanen heddṛen fell-aɣ s ẓẓuṛ, qqaṛen belli nenna-d : « Acuɣeṛ ur nxeddem ara cceṛ iwakken a d-yeffeɣ lxiṛ ? » Imdanen am wigi uklalen lɛiqab n Sidi Ṛebbi.
3.9: Amek ihi ? Eɛni Nukni s wat Isṛail axiṛ n wiyaḍ ? Xaṭi ! Nniɣ-ed yakan belli am wat Isṛail am leǧnas nniḍen, d aklan n ddnub meṛṛa.
3.10: Akken yura di tektabt iqedsen : Ulac amdan aḥeqqi, ulac ula d yiwen,
3.11: Yiwen ur ifhim, yiwen ur yețqellib ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi, ffɣen akk i webrid, uɣalen d imejhal ;
3.12: ulac win ixeddmen lxiṛ, ulac ula d yiwen.
3.13: Imawen-nsen ldin am iẓekwan, Ilsawen-nsen d ixeddaɛen. ?čuṛen d ssem am izerman.
3.14: Imawen-nsen ččuṛen d ddeɛwat n cceṛ ț-țeṛzeg.
3.15: Iḍaṛṛen-nsen țɣawalen iwakken ad ssizlen idammen ;
3.16: ansi ɛeddan ad ǧǧen axeṣṣar d nnger di lateṛ-nsen.
3.17: Ur ssinen ara abrid n lehna ;
3.18: ur sɛin ara deg ul-nsen tugdi n Sidi Ṛebbi.
3.19: Neẓra belli ayen akk i d-tenna ccariɛa, tenna-t-id i wid yellan seddaw leḥkum n ccariɛa iwakken imdanen meṛṛa ad zemmemen yimawen-nsen, ad ẓren belli d imednuben i llan zdat Sidi Ṛebbi.
3.20: Ur yezmir yiwen ad yili d aḥeqqi ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi imi i gexdem ayen i d-teqqaṛ ccariɛa ; axaṭer ccariɛa tețbeggin-ed kan i wemdan belli d amednub i gella.
3.21: Tura Sidi Ṛebbi isbeggen-aɣ-d amek ara nuɣal d iḥeqqiyen zdat-es mbla ccariɛa. Ayagi yella di ccariɛa n Musa akk-d tektabin n lenbiya.
3.22: Sidi Ṛebbi iḥseb-aɣ d iḥeqqiyen imi numen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ,
3.23: axaṭer ulac lxilaf ger yemdanen imi denben meṛṛa, țwaḥeṛmen si lɛaḍima n Sidi Ṛebbi.
3.24: Lameɛna s ṛṛeḥma-ines, yerra-ten d iḥeqqiyen mbla lexlaṣ, s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ i ten-id-icufeɛ.
3.25: D nețța i d-ifka Sidi Ṛebbi d asfel fell-aɣ iwakken s idammen-is yuzzlen, a d-yawi leɛfu n ddnub i yemdanen meṛṛa ara yamnen yis. Akka i d-ibeggen Sidi Ṛebbi lḥeqq-ines ; axaṭer zik-nni, asm'akken i sen-iṣbeṛ, ur iɛuqeb ara imdanen ɣef ddnubat-nsen ;
3.26: ma ț-țura isken-ed amek i ten-yerra d iḥeqqiyen zdat-es, axaṭer yebɣa a d-ibeggen belli nețța d aḥeqqi yerna ad yerr d iḥeqqiyen wid akk ara yamnen s Ɛisa.
3.27: Anda-ț sebba n zzux ? Ulac ! Axaṭer mačči s lefɛayel ara nzux meɛna s liman.
3.28: Nukni neẓra amdan ad yuɣal d aḥeqqi zdat Ṛebbi s liman-ines mačči s wayen i d-tenna ccariɛa.
3.29: Eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi, d Illu n wat Isṛail kan ? Ur yelli ara d Illu n leǧnas nniḍen ? Ula d nutni d Illu-nsen
3.30: imi yiwen n Ṛebbi kan i gellan ; ad yerr d iḥeqqiyen zdat-es wid akk yumnen, am wid iḍehṛen am wid ur neḍhiṛ.
3.31: Ma nenna-d akka, mačči d lqima n ccariɛa i nebɣa a nesseɣli, meɛna d lqima-ines n ṣṣeḥ i s-nefka.

4.1: D acu ara d-nini ihi ɣef Sidna Ibṛahim, jeddi-tneɣ ? Amek i tedṛa yid-es ?
4.2: Lemmer yețwaḥseb d aḥeqqi s lxiṛ yexdem, tili yesɛa sebba s wayes ara izuxx, meɛna ur yezmir ara ad izuxx zdat Sidi Ṛebbi.
4.3: Akken yura di tira iqedsen : Sidna Ibṛahim yețkel ɣef Ṛebbi, daymi i gețwaḥseb d aḥeqqi .
4.4: Axeddam yuklal lexlaṣ-is, lexlaṣ ines ur s-ițwaḥseb ara d lemziya meɛna d lḥeqq-is.
4.5: Akken daɣen win ur nețkil ara ɣef lxiṛ i gxeddem, meɛna yețkel ɣef Ṛebbi i gețțarran amednub d aḥeqqi, ad yețwaḥseb d aḥeqqi ɣef ddemma n liman-is.
4.6: Akka i gessefra Sidna Dawed ɣef wemdan i gḥețțeb Sidi Ṛebbi d aḥeqqi mbla ma yemmuqel ɣer lefɛayel-is :
4.7: D iseɛdiyen wid iwumi țwasemḥent seyyat-nsen, iwumi țwamḥan ddnubat -nsen !
4.8: D aseɛdi wemdan iwumi ur iḥsib ara Sidi Ṛebbi ddnub-is !
4.9: Lfeṛḥ-agi, yella i wid iḍehṛen kan neɣ yella daɣen i wid ur neḍhiṛ-ara ? Nenna-d belli : Ṛebbi iḥseb Sidna Ibṛahim d aḥeqqi ɣef ddemma n liman-ines.
4.10: Melmi ițwaḥseb Sidna Ibṛahim d aḥeqqi, uqbel ad yeḍheṛ neɣ armi geḍheṛ ? Mačči armi geḍheṛ meɛna uqbel !
4.11: ?ṭhaṛa tusa-yas-ed d țbut, d ccama i d-isbeggnen belli Sidi Ṛebbi yerra-t d aḥeqqi ɣef ddemma n liman-ines uqbel ad yeḍheṛ. S wakka Sidna Ibṛahim yuɣal d jedd n wid akk yumnen, i gețwaḥesben d iḥeqqiyen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi ɣas ur ḍhiṛen ara.
4.12: Yella daɣen d jedd n wid akk iḍehṛen, ur nețkil ara ɣef ṭṭhaṛa-nsen kan meɛna tebɛen lateṛ-is, sɛan liman i gesɛa uqbel ad yeḍheṛ.
4.13: Ayen akk i gewɛed Sidi Ṛebbi d lweṛt di ddunit i Sidna Ibṛahim akk-d dderya n dderya-s, ur s-t-iwɛid ara imi i getbeɛ ccariɛa, meɛna imi i gețkel fell-as. Daymi i t-yeḥseb Sidi Ṛebbi d aḥeqqi.
4.14: Lemmer d wid ittabaɛen ccariɛa ara iweṛten, iwumi ihi liman, iwumi lweɛd n Sidi Ṛebbi.
4.15: Axaṭer d ccariɛa i d-ițawin urrif n Ṛebbi, lemmer ulac ccariɛa ur d-tețțili ara tṛuẓi n ccariɛa.
4.16: Lweɛd i d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi i Sidna Ibṛahim, yebna ɣef liman iwakken ad yili d lemziya, ad țekkin deg-s dderya n dderya-s mačči d wid kan yessnen ccariɛa lameɛna wid akk yumnen am nețța, yuɣal d jeddi-tneɣ nukni akk s wid yumnen.
4.17: Am akken yura di Tawṛat n Sidna Musa : Sbeddeɣ-k iwakken aț-țiliḍ d jedd n waṭas n leǧnas. Yuɣal d jeddi-tneɣ zdat Ṛebbi s wayes i gumen, i d-iḥeggun lmegtin, i d-ixelqen ayen ur nelli ara.
4.18: ?as akken ur d-iqqim usirem, Sidna Ibṛahim yuṛǧa s lețkal d ameqqran armi yuɣal d jedd n waṭas n yegduden akken i s-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi : Akka ara tili dderya n dderya-k.
4.19: Liman n Sidna Ibṛahim ur yenqis ara ɣas akken qṛib ad issiweḍ meyya iseggasen, iwala iman-is dayen ur yezmir ara ad isɛu dderya, yerna tameṭṭut-is Saṛa teǧǧa-ț dderya.
4.20: Yețkel ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi, ur t-yekcim ara ccekk ɣef wayen i s-yewɛed. D liman yesɛa i t-isǧehden, s wakka i gețḥemmid Sidi Ṛebbi Bab n tezmert.
4.21: Yețkel belli Sidi Ṛebbi yezmer a s-d-yefk ayen i s-yewɛed.
4.22: ?ef wannect-agi i t-yeḥseb Sidi Ṛebbi d aḥeqqi.
4.23: Mačči fell-as kan i gura di tira iqedsen : Yețwaḥseb d aḥeqqi,
4.24: lameɛna fell-aɣ ula d nukni, imi numen s win i d-isseḥyan Ɛisa Ssid nneɣ si ger lmegtin.
4.25: Yețțunefk ad immet ɣef ddemma n ddnubat nneɣ, isseḥya-t-id Sidi Ṛebbi si ger lmegtin iwakken a nuɣal d iḥeqqiyen.

5.1: Tura imi nuɣal d iḥeqqiyen s liman, ters-ed lehna gar-aɣ d Ṛebbi s Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
5.2: Yis daɣen i nufa abrid s liman ɣer ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi i deg nella tura. Lfeṛḥ-nneɣ, d asirem nesɛa belli a nțekki di lɛaḍima n Sidi Ṛebbi.
5.3: Ula di lmeḥnat, nețțili di lfeṛḥ axaṭer neẓra lmeḥna tețțawi-d ṣṣbeṛ,
5.4: ṣṣbeṛ isseǧhad deg ujeṛṛeb, lǧehd deg ujeṛṛeb ițțawi-d asirem.
5.5: Asirem-agi ulac deg-s lexdeɛ, axaṭer leḥmala n Sidi Ṛebbi teẓẓa deg ulawen-nneɣ s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i ɣ-d-yețțunefken ;
5.6: asm'akken i ɣ-iɣleb ddnub ur s-nezmir ara, Lmasiḥ yemmut ɣef ddemma n imednuben di lweqt ilaqen.
5.7: Iwɛeṛ i wemdan ad iqbel ad immet ɣef ddemma n uḥeqqi ; ahat ad yili win ara iqeblen ad immet ɣef ddemma n wemdan yelhan ;
5.8: ma d Lmasiḥ, nețța yemmut fell-aɣ m'akken nella d imednuben ; s wakka i ɣ-d-ibeggen Sidi Ṛebbi leḥmala-ines.
5.9: Imi nuɣal tura d iḥeqqiyen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi s idammen n Lmasiḥ yuzzlen fell-aɣ, yis daɣen ara nețțusellek seg urrif n Sidi Ṛebbi.
5.10: Asm'akken nella d iɛdawen-is, yefka-d Mmi-s iwakken s lmut-is a ɣ-issemṣaleḥ yid-es. Tura imi nemṣalaḥ d Sidi Ṛebbi, a nețțusellek daɣen s tudert n Mmi-s.
5.11: Mačči d ayagi kan, lameɛna tura lfeṛḥ-nneɣ atan di Sidi Ṛebbi, s Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ i ɣ-issemṣalaḥen yid-es.
5.12: S wakka ihi, ddnub ikcem-ed ɣer ddunit s yiwen wemdan, amdan agi d Adem ; ddnub-agi yewwi-d lmut, lmut tețțawi akk imdanen, axaṭer imdanen meṛṛa denben.
5.13: Uqbel a d-yefk Sidi Ṛebbi ccariɛa i Musa, ddnub yella yakan di ddunit ; meɛna imdanen ur țțuḥasben ara s ccariɛa imi urɛad i d-tusi.
5.14: ?as akka, si zzman n Adem armi d zzman n Sidna Musa lmut teḥkem ula ɣef yemdanen ur nɛuṣa ara Ṛebbi am akken i t-iɛuṣa Adem, nețța yellan d lemtel n win ara d-yasen.
5.15: Ur nezmir ara a nmettel ddnub n Adem ɣer lemziya d ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi ; Adem iɛuṣa Sidi Ṛebbi yiwet n tikkelt yewwi-d lmut i yemdanen meṛṛa, acḥal ihi meqqṛet ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi i d-yețțunefken i yemdanen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
5.16: Ṛṛeḥma-agi n Sidi Ṛebbi mačči am ddnub n yiwen wemdan. Axaṭer yiwen n ddnub yewwi-d lḥisab d lɛiqab, ma d ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi, tețțekkes lḥisab d lɛiqab ɣef waṭas n ddnubat.
5.17: Ma yella lmut teḥkem ɣef yemdanen meṛṛa s ddnub n yiwen wemdan, ihi wid iwumi d-tețțunefk ṛṛeḥma d lḥeqq, ad ḥekmen yerna ad idiren s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
5.18: S wakka, ddnub n yiwen wemdan yesseɣli-d lɛiqab ɣef yemdanen meṛṛa, akken daɣen lḥeqq i gexdem yiwen wemdan, yewwi-d leslak i gessidiren imdanen meṛṛa.
5.19: Ihi am akken ɛeṣṣu n yiwen wemdan, yerra aṭas n yemdanen d imednuben, akken daɣen ṭṭaɛa n yiwen wemdan terra aṭas n yemdanen d iḥeqqiyen.
5.20: Ccariɛa tger-ed iman-is iwakken a d-tbeggen acḥal meqqeṛ ddnub, lameɛna anda yekteṛ ddnub, ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi meqqṛet akteṛ.
5.21: S wakka ddnub yeḥkem s lmut, ma d ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi teḥkem s lḥeqq, tețțawi ɣer tudert n dayem s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ.

6.1: Acu ara d-nini ihi ? A nkemmel a nețɛici di ddnub iwakken ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi aț-țimɣuṛ ?
6.2: Ala ! Nukni i gemmuten ɣef ddemma n ddnub, amek ara nkemmel a nețɛici deg-s ?
6.3: Neɣ ur teẓrim ara belli nukni akk i gețwaɣeḍsen iwakken a neddukel d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, nețwaɣḍeṣ yid-es di lmut-is ?
6.4: S weɣḍas, nețwamḍel yid-es iwakken, nukni daɣen a d-neḥyu akken i d-yeḥya Lmasiḥ si ger lmegtin s tezmert n Ṛebbi, a nekcem di tudert tajḍiṭ.
6.5: Axaṭer ma necrek yid-es di lmut-is, a necrek daɣen yid-es di ḥeggu-ines.
6.6: Ilaq-aɣ a nẓer belli amdan-nni i nella zik, yemmut, ițwasemmeṛ akk-d Lmasiḥ iwakken aț-țemmet lǧețța yeččuṛen d ddnub, ur nețțili ara d aklan n ddnub.
6.7: Axaṭer win yemmuten islek si ddnub,
6.8: imi nemmut akk-d Lmasiḥ, numen daɣen belli a nidir yid-es.
6.9: Neẓra belli Lmasiḥ seg wasmi i d-yeḥya si ger lmegtin, ur yețțuɣal ara ad immet, lmut ur tezmir ara aț-țeḥkem fell-as.
6.10: Axaṭer taluft n ddnub yefra-ț ɣef yiwet n tikkelt i dayem, s lmut-is. Tura atan d lḥey, idder i Sidi Ṛebbi.
6.11: Ula d kunwi ḥesbet iman-nwen am akken temmutem ɣef wayen yeɛnan ddnub. Ɛicet i Ṛebbi di tdukkli akk-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
6.12: Tura ur țțaǧat ara ddnub ad iḥkem fell-awen, ur xeddmet ara ccehwat n tnefsit-nwen am zik.
6.13: Ur țțaǧat ara lemfaṣel n lǧețțat-nwen ad ɣlint di ddnub, iwakken ad ixdem yis-sen cceṛ ; lameɛna qeddmet iman-nwen i Ṛebbi am win i d-iḥyan si lmut iwakken aț-țqeddcem fell-as a ț-țxeddmem anagar lxiṛ.
6.14: Ddnub ur yețțuɣal ara ad iḥkem fell-awen axaṭer ur tellim ara seddaw n ccariɛa lameɛna seddaw n ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi.
6.15: Acu ara d-nini ihi ? A neǧǧ ddnub ad idebbeṛ fell-aɣ tura imi nella seddaw n ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi mačči seddaw n ccariɛa ? A ɣ-imneɛ Ṛebbi deg wannect-agi !
6.16: Ur teẓrim ara belli ma tuɣalem d aklan n yiwen iwakken ad idebbeṛ fell-awen, ilaq a s-taɣem awal ama d ddnub yețțawin ɣer lmut neɣ d ṭṭaɛa n Ṛebbi yețțawin ɣer tudert taḥeqqit.
6.17: Lameɛna a neḥmed Ṛebbi imi zik tellam d aklan n ddnub, ma tura tḍuɛem s wulawen-nwen awal i tlemdem.
6.18: Tețțusellkem-d si ddnub tuɣalem d aklan n lḥeqq.
6.19: Tura a wen-d-hedṛeɣ s lɛeqliya nwen iwakken aț-țfehmem axaṭer annect-agi yewɛeṛ i lefhama. Am akken tsellmem iman-nwen zik d aklan i lɛaṛ iwakken aț-țxedmem lɛaṛ, tura sellmet iman-nwen d aklan i lḥeqq d ṣṣwab iwakken aț-țeṣfu tudert-nwen.
6.20: Asmi tellam d aklan n ddnub texḍam i lḥeqq.
6.21: Acu i trebḥem s lecɣal-nni s wayes tessetḥam tura, lecɣal-nni i gețțawin ɣer lmut.
6.22: Tura tețwaselkem si ddnub, tuɣalem d iqeddacen n Ṛebbi, lfayda nwen ț-țikli deg webrid yeṣfan akk-d tudert n dayem.
6.23: Ddnub yețțawi ɣer lmut, ma d ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi tewwi-yaɣ-d tudert n dayem di tikli-nneɣ akk-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ.

7.1: Ay atmaten ur teẓrim ara belli ccariɛa teḥkem ɣef wemdan skud mazal-it idder ? Heddṛeɣ-ed akka i wid yessnen ccariɛa.
7.2: A wen-d-fkeɣ yiwen n lemtel : tameṭṭut tețwarez ɣer wergaz-is s ccariɛa skud mazal-it yedder, meɛna ma yemmut wergaz-is tserreḥ-as ccariɛa ma tebɣa aț-țɛiwed zzwaǧ ;
7.3: ma tuɣ wayeḍ skud mazal argaz-is idder, yețțusemma tezna ; meɛna ma yemmut wergaz-is tserreḥ-as ccariɛa aț-țɛiwed zzwaǧ, ayagi ur yețțusemma ara d leḥṛam.
7.4: Ula d kunwi ay atmaten, temmutem ɣef wayen yeɛnan ccariɛa s lmut n Lmasiḥ, akken aț-țeṭṭfem deg win i d-yeḥyan si ger lmegtin iwakken aț-țxedmem ayen i s-iɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi.
7.5: Axaṭer d ccariɛa i d-isbeggnen amek i nțeddu s lebɣi n tnefsit-nneɣ d ccehwat-nneɣ n diri ; d nețțat daɣen i d-isbeggnen amek yexdem ddnub-agi deg-nneɣ, armi i ɣ-yeṣṣaweḍ ɣer lmut.
7.6: Lameɛna tura nețțusellek si lḥekma n ccariɛa imi nețțusemma nemmut ɣef wayen yeɛnan ccariɛa nni i ɣ-yurzen, s wakka i nezmer tura a nḍuɛ Sidi Ṛebbi s lɛeqliya tajḍiṭ n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, mačči am zik s lɛeqliya-nni taqdimt mi nella seddaw n ccariɛa.
7.7: Acu ara d-nini ihi, eɛni ccariɛa deg-s ddnub ? Xaṭi ! Lameɛna lemmer ulac ccariɛa tili ur țissineɣ ara d acu i d ddnub. Axaṭer lemmer ur d-tenni ara ccariɛa : ur ṭṭamaɛ ara , tilli ur ẓriɣ ara belli ṭṭmeɛ d leḥṛam ?
7.8: Ddnub ifuṛes tagniț s lameṛ n ccariɛa ; yesnulfa-d deg-i mkul ṣṣenf n ṭṭmeɛ n diri ; axaṭer mbla ccariɛa ur d-ițban ara d acu i d ddnub.
7.9: Zik, asmi ulac ccariɛa lliɣ țɛiciɣ s nneya, mi d-iffeɣ lameṛ n ccariɛa, ddnub yuki-d deg-i, yeṣṣaweḍ-iyi ɣer lmut.
7.10: S wakka, lameṛ i glaqen ad iyi-ssiweḍ ɣer tudert, yewwi-yi ɣer lmut
7.11: axaṭer ddnub yufa abrid, s lameṛ-agi n ccariɛa dɣa ixdeɛ-iyi, yewwi-yi ɣer lmut.
7.12: Ihi, ccariɛa s yiman-is teṣfa, lumuṛat yellan deg-s ṣfan, lhan yerna d lḥeqq.
7.13: Eɛni yuɣal-iyi wayen yelhan d sebba n lmut ? Xaṭi ! D ddnub i yi-ṣṣawḍen ɣer lmut s wayen yelhan, iwakken s ccariɛa, a d-tban acḥal meqqṛet tezmert n ddnub.
7.14: Neẓra belli ccariɛa n Musa tețțunefk-ed s Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi. Ma d nekk, d amdan kan i lliɣ yerna imlek-iyi ddnub.
7.15: Ur ẓriɣ ara acu i xeddmeɣ, ayen bɣiɣ a t-xedmeɣ ur t-xeddmeɣ ara lameɛna d ayen akken keṛheɣ i xeddmeɣ.
7.16: Ma yella ayen i xeddmeɣ d ayen akken ur bɣiɣ ara a t-xedmeɣ, tḥeqqeqeɣ belli ccariɛa telha.
7.17: Tura ihi mačči d nekk i gxeddmen ayagi, meɛna d ddnub izedɣen deg-i.
7.18: Axaṭer ẓriɣ belli ayen yelhan ur yezdiɣ ara deg-i nekk yellan d amdan. ?as akken yebɣa wul-iw ad ixdem lxiṛ, nekk ur zmireɣ ara a t-xedmeɣ,
7.19: axaṭer ur xeddmeɣ ara lxiṛ i bɣiɣ, meɛna d cceṛ ur bɣiɣ ara i xeddmeɣ ;
7.20: ma yella xeddmeɣ ayen ur bɣiɣ ara ihi mačči d nekk i t-ixeddmen meɛna d ddnub-nni izedɣen deg-i.
7.21: Ihi atan wayen fehmeɣ deg yiman-iw : mkul m'ara bɣuɣ ad xedmeɣ lxiṛ ad afeɣ d cceṛ kan iwumi zemreɣ.
7.22: Deg ul-iw ḥemmleɣ ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi,
7.23: meɛna țțafeɣ deg yiman-iw yiwet n ṭṭbiɛa yețnaɣen d ccariɛa n Ṛebbi i gḥemmel wul-iw ; ṭṭbiɛa-yagi terra-yi seddaw lḥekma n ddnub yellan deg-i.
7.24: A nnger-iw ! Anwa ara yi sellken si ṭṭbiɛa-agi n wemdan i yi-țțawin ɣer lmut ?
7.25: A neḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi imi s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ i nețțusellek ! S wakka ihi, s lefhama-inu, ḍuɛeɣ ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi, meɛna s ṭṭbiɛa n wemdan yellan deg-i, d akli n ddnub i lliɣ.

8.1: Ihi ass n lḥisab ulac lɛiqab ɣef wid yumnen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
8.2: Axaṭer tazmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, tin i d-ifkan tudert i wid yumnen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, tsellek-iyi-d si tezmert n ddnub akk-d lmut.
8.3: Ccariɛa n Musa ur tezmir ara aț-țeɣleb ddnub axaṭer ṭṭbiɛa-nneɣ tekkes-as tazmert. Ayen akken ur tezmir ara ccariɛa n Musa a t texdem, d ayen i gexdem Sidi Ṛebbi mi d-iceggeɛ Mmi-s s ṣṣifa n wemdan, i d-yusan s lǧețța am tin n yemdanen yellan meṛṛa d imednuben, iwakken ad yefk iman-is d asfel s wayes ara yeḥkem ɣef ddnub i ten-izedɣen.
8.4: S wakka ihi ara yețwakkemmel deg-nneɣ wayen i d-tenna ccariɛa n Musa, nukni yețɛicin s tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen mačči s ṭṭbiɛa-nneɣ.
8.5: Wid yețɛicin s ṭṭbiɛa n wemdan țqelliben kan ɣef wayen yeɛnan lebɣi n wemdan, ma d wid ițɛicin s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen țqelliben ɣef wayen yeɛnan lebɣi n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
8.6: Wid ițɛicin s ṭṭbiɛa n wemdan țeddun ɣer lmut, ma d wid ițɛicin s lebɣi n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen țeddun ɣer tudert d lehna.
8.7: Axaṭer wid ittabaɛen lebɣi n wemdan uɣalen d iɛdawen n Sidi Ṛebbi imi ur ḍuɛen ara ccariɛa-ines, axaṭer ṭṭbiɛa n wemdan ur tezmir ara aț-țḍuɛ ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi.
8.8: Wid temlek ṭṭbiɛa-nsen ulamek ara ɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi.
8.9: Ma d kunwi mačči s ṭṭbiɛa n wemdan i tețțeddum lameɛna tețțeddum s lebɣi n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen axaṭer Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi izdeɣ deg-wen. Win deg ur yezdiɣ ara Ṛṛuḥ n Lmasiḥ ur yelli ara d ayla-s.
8.10: Ma yella Ṛṛuḥ n Lmasiḥ deg-wen, ɣas akken lǧețța-nwen aț-țemmet ɣef ddemma n ddnub, ṛṛuḥ-nwen ad yidir ɣef ddemma n lḥeqq n Sidi Ṛebbi.
8.11: Ma yezdeɣ deg-wen Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi i d-yesseḥyan Sidna Ɛisa si ger lmegtin, win i d-yesseḥyan Sidna Ɛisa si ger lmegtin, yezmer daɣen s Ṛṛuḥ-is izedɣen deg-wen, a d-yerr tudert i lǧețța-nwen ara yemten.
8.12: S wakka ihi ay atmaten lebɣi n ṭṭbiɛa-nneɣ ur yeṭebbiṛ ara fell-aɣ tura iwakken a nexdem lebɣi-ines.
8.13: Ma yella tɛacem s lebɣi n ṭṭbiɛa nwen atan aț-țemtem, lameɛna ma tɣelbem lebɣi n ṭṭbiɛa-nwen s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, aț-țidirem.
8.14: Axaṭer wid ițeddun s Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi, d nutni i d arraw n Ṛebbi.
8.15: Ṛṛuḥ i wen-d-ițțunefken mačči d Ṛṛuḥ ara kkun-irren d aklan iwakken aț-țɛicem di tugdi, meɛna d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i kkun-irran d arraw n Ṛebbi, yis i nezmer a nessiwel i Sidi Ṛebbi : « A baba-tneɣ ! »
8.16: D Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi s yiman-is i d-iḥeqqeqen deg wulawen-nneɣ belli nuɣal d arraw n Sidi Ṛebbi.
8.17: Ihi ma yella d arraw-is i nella, d nukni daɣen ara iweṛten : a newṛet ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi nukni akk-d Lmasiḥ, axaṭer ma nenɛețțab yid-es, a nili daɣen yid-es di lɛaḍima-ines.
8.18: Ihi leɛtab i nesɛedday tura, ur nezmir ara a t-nmettel ɣer lɛaḍima ara d-ibeggen Sidi Ṛebbi deg-nneɣ.
8.19: Taxelqit meṛṛa tḥar melmi ara d-banen warraw n Sidi Ṛebbi.
8.20: Axaṭer taxelqit teɣli seddaw leḥkum n lbaṭel, mačči s lebɣi-ines, lameɛna s lebɣi n win i ț-yesseɣlin.
8.21: Meɛna taxelqit-agi tessaram aț-țețwasellek si twaɣit i ț-isfesden, iwakken aț-țekki di lɛaḍima n tlelli n warraw n Sidi Ṛebbi.
8.22: Neẓra tura belli taxelqit meṛṛa tenɛețțab, tețnazaɛ am tmeṭṭut yeṭṭfen addud.
8.23: Mačči ț-țaxelqit kan, meɛna ula d nukni yesɛan Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, yellan d amur amezwaru n tikciwin i ɣ-d-iwɛed Sidi Ṛebbi, nețnazaɛ deg iman-nneɣ, nețṛaǧu a nban s tideț d arraw n Ṛebbi i nella m'ara icafeɛ deg-nneɣ s lekmal.
8.24: Axaṭer leslak nneɣ d ayen i nessaram ; ma yella nesɛa ayen i nessaram, ayagi mačči d asirem : anwa ara yessirmen ayen yesɛa ?
8.25: Meɛna ma nessaram ayen ur nesɛi, nețṛaǧu-t s ṣṣbeṛ.
8.26: Akken daɣen Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ițțas-ed a ɣ iɛiwen nukni ixuṣṣen di tezmert, axaṭer ur nessin ara a neẓẓal akken ilaq ; lameɛna Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen s yiman-is ideɛɛu ɣer Ṛebbi ɣef ddemma-nneɣ, s nnehtat iwumi ur yezmir yimi a tent-id-yini s imeslayen ;
8.27: imiren Sidi Ṛebbi yessnen ulawen, yeẓra d acu i gessutur Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, imi s lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi i gdeɛɛu ɣef wid yextaṛ.
8.28: Neẓra belli Sidi Ṛebbi issufuɣ ɣer lxiṛ ayen akk i d-ideṛṛun d wid i t-iḥemmlen, wid yextaṛ s lebɣi-ines.
8.29: Axaṭer wid akk i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi si zik, iqsed si tazwara a ten-yerr am Mmi-s iwakken Mmi-s agi ad yili d amenzu n waṭas n watmaten.
8.30: Wid i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi si zik, d wid iwumi i d-issawel ; wid-nni iwumi yessawel yerra-ten d iḥeqqiyen zdat-es, wid yerra d iḥeqqiyen yefka-yasen amkan di lɛaḍima-s.
8.31: Acu ara d-nernu ihi ? Anwa ara ɣ-izemren ma yella Sidi Ṛebbi yid-nneɣ ?
8.32: Nețța iqeblen ad isebbel Mmi-s eɛzizen, yefka-t d asfel fell-aɣ meṛṛa, amek ur ɣ-d-yețțak ara daɣen kullec yid-es ?
8.33: Anwa ara icetkin ɣef wid yextaṛ Ṛebbi ? D Sidi Ṛebbi s yiman-is i ten-iḥesben d iḥeqqiyen !
8.34: Anwa i gzemren ad iḥkem fell asen ? Ɛisa Lmasiḥ d win yemmuten yerna iḥya-d si ger lmegtin, yuli ɣer tama tayeffust n Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken ad icafeɛ fell-aɣ !
8.35: Anwa i gzemren a ɣ-ifṛeq ɣef leḥmala n Lmasiḥ ? Eɛni d ddiq neɣ d ccedda, d leqheṛ neɣ d laẓ, d leɛra neɣ d ayen yessaggaden neɣ d ajenwi ?
8.36: Am akken yura di tektabt n ?abur : ?ef ddemma-inek a Sidi Ṛebbi i nețqabal lmut mkul ass, ḥesben-aɣ am ulli i țțawin ɣer tmezliwt.
8.37: Meɛna deg wannect-agi meṛṛa d nukni i gɣelben s Lmasiḥ i ɣ- iḥemmlen.
8.38: Axaṭer țekleɣ belli ulac d acu i gzemren a ɣ-ifṛeq ɣef leḥmala n Sidi Ṛebbi s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ : ama d lmut neɣ ț-țudert, ama d lmalayekkat, ama ț-țigeldiwin, ama d leḥwayeǧ n tura neɣ ț-țid ara d-yasen, ama d ayen ɛlayen, ama d ayen lqayen, ama ț-țizmar n igenwan neɣ ț-țid n lqaɛa neɣ ayen akk yellan di txelqit.

9.1: A wen-d-iniɣ tideț, nekk iteddun deg ubrid n Lmasiḥ, ur skiddibeɣ ara ; lxaṭer-iw icehhed-d ɣef wayagi s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i yi-sedduyen :
9.2: leḥzen d uɣilif zgan deg ul-iw.
9.3: Zemreɣ ad qebleɣ ad țțuneɛleɣ neɣ ad țțuḥeṛṛmeɣ ɣef Lmasiḥ ɣef ddemma n watmaten-iw akk-d lumma-inu ;
9.4: nutni at Isṛail i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi d agdud-is yefka-yasen-d lɛaḍima, yexdem yid-sen leɛqud, yefka-yasen-d ccariɛa d wamek ara t-ɛebden, yerna-yasen-d lemɛahdat.
9.5: Seg-sen i d-ffɣen lejdud-nneɣ i gellan d iqeddacen imezwura n Sidi Ṛebbi, ula d Lmasiḥ seg-sen i d-iffeɣ mi d-ilul s ṣṣifa n wemdan, nețța i gellan sennig kra yellan, d Illu yețwaḥemden i dayem. Amin !
9.6: Acu ara d-nini ? Sidi Ṛebbi yendem deg wawal-is ? Xaṭi ! Meɛna mačči d wid meṛṛa i d-ilulen seg jeddi-tneɣ Isṛail i gellan n wat Isṛail i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
9.7: Daɣen mačči d wid meṛṛa i d-yeǧǧa Sidna Ibṛahim i gellan d arraw-is n tideț, axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi inna-yas-d : Seg Isḥaq ara d-teffeɣ dderya i k-weɛdeɣ.
9.8: S wakka ihi nezmer ad ini mačči d dderya i d ilulen s lebɣi n wemdan ara ițțusemmin d arraw n Sidi Ṛebbi meɛna anagar wid i d-ilulen s lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi akken i t-id-yewɛed.
9.9: Axaṭer atnan imeslayen s wayes i gɛuhed Sidi Ṛebbi : A d-uɣaleɣ aseggas i d-iteddun di lweqt-agi, ?ara a d-tesɛu aqcic.
9.10: Mačči d ayagi kan : arraw n Rbiḥa daɣen i gellan d akniwen, sɛan yiwen n baba-tsen yellan d jeddi-tneɣ Isḥaq.
9.11: Meɛna imi Sidi Ṛebbi ițextiri imdanen mačči ɣef ddemma n lecɣal-nsen meɛna akken yella lebɣi-s d usiwel-ines ; mazal urɛad i d-lulen warraw n Rbiḥa, ur xdimen cceṛ, ur xdimen lxiṛ, mi s-d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi : Amenzu deg warraw-im ad yuɣal d aqeddac ɣef wumecṭuḥ.
9.13: Akken i gura daɣen deg umkan nniḍen n tira iqedsen : ?emmleɣ Yeɛqub, keṛheɣ Icaw.
9.14: D acu ara d-nini deg wannect-a ? Eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi ixeddem lbaṭel ? D lmuḥal !
9.15: Axaṭer yenna-yas i Sidna Musa : A d-sserseɣ ṛṛeḥma-inu ɣef win i bɣiɣ, ad ḥunneɣ daɣen ɣef win i bɣiɣ.
9.16: Lbaṛaka n Sidi Ṛebbi ur d-tețțas ara s lefɛayel n wemdan ama yuzzel ama yeqqim meɛna kullec yețțas-ed s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi i d-yețțaken ṛṛeḥma ines akken yebɣa.
9.17: Anda nniḍen di tira iqedsen Sidi Ṛebbi yenna i Ferɛun agellid n Maṣer : Sbeddeɣ-k d agellid ameqqran iwakken a d-sbeggneɣ tazmert-iw deg-ek, s wakka di ddunit meṛṛa ad issinen belli d nekk i d Illu.
9.18: Akka ihi, Sidi Ṛebbi yesrusu-d ṛṛeḥma-s ɣef win yebɣa, isɣaṛay daɣen ul n win yebɣa.
9.19: Ahat ad yili win ara d-yinin : imi akka i gella lḥal, acu i mazal ițlumu deg-nneɣ ? Anwa i gzemren a t-iɛaṣi ?
9.20: I kečč ay amdan ur nesɛi azal, d acu i tḥesbeḍ iman-ik iwakken aț-țḥasbeḍ Sidi Ṛebbi ? Eɛni tacmuxt ițwameslen s wakal tezmer aț-țini i win i ț-imeslen acuɣer i yi-tmesleḍ s ṣṣifa-yagi ?
9.21: Win imesslen afexxaṛ yezmer ad ixdem ayen i s-ihwan s wakal ; seg wakal-nni yezmer ad imsel tacmuxt izewqen neɣ tin i sseqdacen kull ass.
9.22: Eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi ur yezmir ara a d-ibeggen urrif-is akk-d tezmert-is ? Iɣaḍ-ik lḥal ma yella yeṣber s ṣṣber ameqqran i wid yuklalen urrif-is yerna teddun ɣer nnger ?
9.23: Deg wannect-agi, Sidi Ṛebbi yebɣa a d-isbeggen acḥal meqqṛet tmanegt-is i nukni i ɣef iḥunn, i ghegga si zik iwakken a nili yid-es di tmanegt-is ;
9.24: nukni iwumi i d-yessawel Sidi Ṛebbi mačči seg wat Isṛail kan, meɛna ula si ger leǧnas nniḍen ;
9.25: akken i t-id-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi di tektabt n nnbi Hucaɛ : Lǧens-nni ur nelli ara d agdud-iw a s-semmiɣ agdud-iw, win akken ur nețwaḥemmel ara a s-semmiɣ win eɛzizen fell-i.
9.26: Anda akken i sen-qqaṛen : « Ur tellim ara d agdud n Sidi Ṛebbi», dinna ara țțusemmin d arraw n Sidi Ṛebbi yeddren.
9.27: Si lǧiha-s, nnbi Iceɛya icar-ed ɣef wayen yeɛnan agdud n wat Isṛail : ?as ad ketṛen wat Isṛail am ṛṛmel ɣef yiri n lebḥeṛ, kra deg-sen kan ara yețțuselken.
9.28: Axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi ur ițɛeṭṭil ara ad ixdem di ddunit ayen akken i d-yenna deg wawal-is.
9.29: Yura di tira iqedsen : Lemmer Sidi Ṛebbi Bab n tezmert ur aɣ-d yeǧǧi ara kra seg wegdud-nneɣ, tili nuɣal am temdint n Sudum, aț-țeḍru yid-nneɣ am temdint n Gumuṛ inegren. Ayagi yenna-t-id nnbi Iceɛya uqbel a d-yedṛu.
9.30: D acu ara d-nini ihi ? Igduden nniḍen ur nețnadi ara ɣef lḥeqq uɣalen d iḥeqqiyen zdat Sidi Ṛebbi, uɣalen d iḥeqqiyen imi umnen yis.
9.31: Ma d at Isṛail yețnadin ad uɣalen d iḥeqqiyen s ccariɛa, ur wwiḍen ara ɣer lmeqṣud-nsen s ccariɛa.
9.32: Acuɣer ? Axaṭer ur qellben ara ad ɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi s liman, meɛna nutni ɣilen ad uɣalen d iḥeqqiyen s lefɛayel-nsen. Mmugren-d adɣaɣ i sen-yellan d ugur, isseɣli-ten.
9.33: Am akken yura di tektabt iqedsen : Atan ad sserseɣ ɣef wedrar n Siyun adɣaɣ, d adɣaɣ i ɣef yekkat wugur, d azṛu yesseɣlayen, meɛna win yumnen yis weṛǧin ad yenneḥcam.

10.1: Ay atmaten, ayen i țmenniɣ deg ul-iw, d leslak n wat Isṛail meṛṛa, acḥal i ssutreɣ di Ṛebbi ɣef ddemma-nsen iwakken ad țțuselken.
10.2: Axaṭer zemreɣ ad cehdeɣ fell-asen belli ẓewṛen, bɣan ad ɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi meɛna txuṣṣ-iten tmusni.
10.3: Imi ur ḥsiben ara lḥeqq i d yețțasen s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi yerna țnadin ad sbedden lḥeqq-nsen iman-nsen, ur ḍuɛen ara lḥeqq i d-yețțasen s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi ;
10.4: axaṭer Lmasiḥ, d nețța i ț-țaggara n ccariɛa, i d lḥeqq n wid yumnen meṛṛa.
10.5: Atah wayen yura Sidna Musa ɣef lḥeqq i d-ițekken si ccariɛa : Amdan ara ixedmen ayen i d-tenna ccariɛa, ad yidir yis.
10.6: Lameɛna atah wamek ițmeslay lḥeqq i d-ițasen si liman : ur qqaṛ ara deg ul-inek anwa ara yalin ɣer igenni ; amakken Lmasiḥ ur d-iṣubb ara syenna
10.7: Neɣ anwa ara iṣubben ɣer laxeṛt ? amakken ur d-yeḥyi ara Lmasiḥ si ger lmegtin .
10.8: Acu i d teqqaṛ ihi ? Awal n tudert atan ɣuṛ-ek, deg imi-k d wul-ik . Awal-agi d awal n liman, d awal i nețbecciṛ.
10.9: Ma tcehdeḍ s yimi-k belli Sidna Ɛisa d Ssid-ik, ma tumneḍ deg wul-ik belli Sidi Ṛebbi isseḥya-t-id si ger lmegtin, atan aț-țețțuselkeḍ.
10.10: Axaṭer ma yella tumneḍ seg wul, Sidi Ṛebbi a k-iḥseb d aḥeqqi ; ma tcehdeḍ s yimi-k aț-țețțuselkeḍ.
10.11: Akken i t-id-nnant tira iqedsen : Kra n win yumnen yis weṛǧin ad inneḥcam.
10.12: Ihi ulac lxilaf ger wat Isṛail akk-d wid ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail ; imi yiwen n Ṛebbi i gellan, ṭṭfen meṛṛa deg-s, nețța i d-yețțaken mbla ceḥḥa i wid akk ineddhen ɣuṛ-es.
10.13: Akken yura : Kra win ara yedɛun s yisem-is ad ițțusellek.
10.14: Amek ara dɛun ɣuṛ-es ma yella ur uminen ara yis ? Amek ara amnen ma yella ur slin ara yis ? Amek daɣen ara slen yis ma ulac win i sen-ihedṛen fell-as ?
10.15: Amek ara yilin wid ara d-ihedṛen fell-as ma yella ur țțuceggɛen ara ? Akken yura di tira iqedsen : Acḥal yelha m'ara nwali teddun-d ɣuṛ-nneɣ wid ițbecciṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
10.16: Lameɛna ur qbilen ara meṛṛa lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ. Nnbi Iceɛya yenna daɣen : A Sidi, anwa i gumnen s wayen i nberreḥ ?
10.17: S wakka liman ițțas-ed seg wayen i nsell yeɛnan awal n Lmasiḥ.
10.18: Lameɛna ma nenna-d : ahat ur slin ara ? Atah wayen yuran : ?ṣut-nsen inuda ddunit meṛṛa, lehduṛ-nsen wwḍen ɣer ixfawen n ddunit.
10.19: Nezmer a d-nini : ahat ur ẓrin ara wat Isṛail ? Lameɛna d Musa i d-ixebbṛen d amezwaru s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi mi d-yenna : A wen-d-ssekkreɣ tismin ɣef win ur nelli ara d agdud ; a kkun-id-yas wurrif ɣef wegdud ur nesɛi lefhama.
10.20: Nnbi Iceɛya yessaweḍ armi genna : Ufan-iyi wid ur nennuda ara fell-i, sbeggneɣ-d iman-iw i wid ur nqelleb ara ad iyi-ssinen.
10.21: Meɛna ɣef wat Isṛail yenna : ?elqeɣ ifassen-iw ṭul n wass ɣer wegdud i yi-ixulfen, i yi-iɛuṣan.

11.1: Ad iniɣ : eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi inkeṛ agdud-is ? Xaṭi ! Imi nekk s yiman-iw n wat Isṛail, si dderya n Sidna Ibṛahim, seg wedrum n Benyamin.
11.2: Sidi Ṛebbi ur yenkiṛ ara agdud-is i gextaṛ si zik. Ur teẓrim ara d acu i d-qqaṛent tira iqedsen, asmi i geccetka nnbi Ilyas i Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef wat Isṛail ? Yenna :
11.3: A Sidi Ṛebbi ! Nɣan lenbiya i d ceggɛeḍ, hudden idekkanen anda i k-d-țqeddimen lɣaci iseflawen, anagar nekk i d yeqqimen yerna țnadin a yi-nɣen !
11.4: Lameɛna atah wamek i s-d-yerra Sidi Ṛebbi : Xtaṛ-aɣ-ed i yiman-iw sebɛa alaf n yergazen ur nseǧǧed ara zdat lmeṣnuɛ Baɛl.
11.5: Akka daɣen, di lweqt-agi i deg nella tura, llan kra seg wat Isṛail i geṭṭfen deg-s, d wid i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, s ṛṛeḥma-ines.
11.6: Mačči ɣef ddemma n lefɛayel-nsen i ten-yextaṛ meɛna s ṛṛeḥma-ines. Neɣ m'ulac ma yella s lefɛayel i gțextiṛi Sidi Ṛebbi, ṛṛeḥma-ines ur tețțusemma ara d ṛṛeḥma.
11.7: Amek ihi ? Ayen i nudan wat Isṛail ur t-wwiḍen ara, anagar wid i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi i t-yewwḍen ; ma d wiyaḍ qquṛen wulawen-nsen.
11.8: Akken yura di tektabt iqedsen : Sidi Ṛebbi yeqfel lɛeqliya-nsen, allen-nsen ur țwalint ara, i meẓẓuɣen-nsen ur sellen ara, ar ass-agi.
11.9: Ula d Sidna Dawed yenna : Imensi n tmeɣṛiwin-nsen a sen-yuɣal ț-țasraft anda ara ɣlin, d acebbak ara d-yesseɣlin. fell-asen lɛiqab uklalen
11.10: A d-yeɣli ṭṭlam ɣef wallen-nsen iwakken ur țwalin ara, lqedd-nsen ad yeknu i dayem !
11.11: Acu ara d-iniɣ ihi ? Eɛni at Isṛail ɣlin iwakken ur țțuɣalen ara a d kkren ? Xaṭi ! Lameɛna s tuccḍa-nsen i wwḍen leǧnas nniḍen ɣer leslak. D annect-agi i d-issekkren tismin i wat Isṛail.
11.12: Ma yella tuccḍa-nsen tesserbeḥ at ddunit, teṣṣaweḍ-iten ɣer leslak, ma yella lexsaṛa-nsen tewwi-d rrbeḥ i yegduden nniḍen, ihi acḥal meqqṛet lbaṛaka ara d-iffɣen seg-sen m'ara d-uɣalen ɣer webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, iwakken ad țțuselken.
11.13: Nekk i d-ițwaceggɛen d ṛṛasul i leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, fkiɣ aṭas n lqima i ccɣel-agi i yi-d ițțunefken
11.14: iwakken ma yella wamek, a d ssekkreɣ tismin i watmaten-iw n wat Isṛail, ahat ad țțuselken kra deg-sen.
11.15: Axaṭer ma yella aɛzal n wat Isṛail isemṣalaḥ leǧnas nniḍen akk-d Sidi Ṛebbi, acu ara yedṛun ihi m'ara d-uɣalen nutni ɣer webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi ? Ad yili am akken d ḥeggu i d-ḥyan si ger lmegtin !
11.16: Ma yella awren i tețqeddimem i Sidi Ṛebbi yeṣfa, ula d arukti yeṣfa ; ma yella izuṛan n ttejṛa ṣeḥḥan, ifurkawen daɣen ad ilin ṣeḥḥan.
11.17: Akka i tedṛa d wat Isṛail : kra n tṣedwa țwagezment si tzemmurt, kečč a win ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, yellan d aḥeccad, tețwaleqmeḍ deg umkan-nsent ; ma yella tețțekkiḍ deg izuṛan n tzemmurt d zzit-is,
11.18: ur ilaq ara aț-țḥeqṛeḍ tiseḍwa-nni yețwagezmen. ?ader iman-ik ɣef zzux, axaṭer mačči d kečč i geṭṭfen aẓar meɛna d aẓar i k-iṭṭfen.
11.19: A d-tiniḍ ihi : « țwagezment kra n tṣedwa iwakken ad țțuleqmeɣ nekkini ».
11.20: Ayagi ț-țideț ; nutni țwagezmen axaṭer ur uminen ara, ma d kečč teṭṭfeḍ amkan-nsen imi tumneḍ. ?ader iman-ik ɣef zzux, aggad Sidi Ṛebbi axiṛ-ik !
11.21: Axaṭer akken i gegzem tiseḍwa n laṣel n tzemmurt iwakken a k-ileqqem fell-as, i gezmer a k-igzem ula d kečč.
11.22: Meyyez ihi acḥal ḥnin Sidi Ṛebbi, acḥal daɣen yewɛeṛ : yewɛeṛ ɣer wid yeɣlin, ma d kečč d aḥnin ɣuṛ-ek ma teṭṭfeḍ di leḥnana-ines, neɣ m'ulac aț-țețwagezmeḍ ula d kečč.
11.23: Ula d at Isṛail m'ur kemmlen ara di leǧhel-nsen, zemren ad țțuleqmen, axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yezmer a ten ileqqem, a ten-yerr ɣer tzemmurt nsen.
11.24: Ma yella kečč i d-ițwagezmen seg uḥeccad, tețțuleqmeḍ ɣef tzemmurt n lɛali ɣas akken d aḥeccad i telliḍ, acḥal ihi i sen-ishel i nutni yellan ț-țiṣeḍwa n tzemmurt iwakken ad uɣalen ad țțuleqmen ɣef tzemmurt-nsen.
11.25: Ur bɣiɣ ara ay atmaten aț țețwaffer fell-awen lbaḍna-agi, iwakken ur tḥețțbem ara iman-nwen d wid yessnen. Kra seg wat Isṛail, sseɣṛen ulawen-nsen ɣef wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi yerna akka ara kemmlen di taɣaṛt-nsen alamma yewweḍ leslak i leǧnas meṛṛa.
11.26: Imiren ad țțuselken wat Isṛail irkul asmi ara d-yedṛu wayen i d-nnant tira iqedsen : A d-iffeɣ umsellek seg wedrar n Siyun, a sen-yekkes i warraw n Yeɛqub lekfeṛ-nsen ;
11.27: ț-țagi i d lemɛahda ara xedmeɣ yid-sen m'ara sen-kkseɣ ddnubat-nsen .
11.28: ?ef wayen yeɛnan lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, at Isṛail uɣalen d iɛdawen n Ṛebbi, ma d kunwi tesfaydim-d deg wayagi. Meɛna ma nemmuqel ɣer lxetyaṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi, iḥemmel-iten ɣef ddemma n lejdud-nsen.
11.29: Axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi ur ineddem ara ɣef wid yextaṛ neɣ deg wayen i d-yețțak.
11.30: Zik-nni tellam tɛuṣam Sidi Ṛebbi, lameɛna tețțunefk-awen-d ṛṛeḥma-ines i kunwi imi i t-ɛuṣan wat Isṛail,
11.31: akken daɣen ara sen-d tețțunefk ula i nutni i t-iɛuṣan tura, ṛṛeḥma i wen-d-ițțunefken i kunwi.
11.32: Axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yeǧǧa imdanen meṛṛa a t-ɛaṣin iwakken a sen-d-yefk daɣen meṛṛa ṛṛeḥma-ines.
11.33: Acḥal lqayit, acḥal meqqṛit leɛqel ț-țmusni n Sidi Ṛebbi ! Anwa i gzemren ad yissin lḥekmat-ines neɣ ad ifhem iberdan-is ?
11.34: Akken yura di tira iqedsen : Anwa i geṣṣawḍen ad yissin ixemmimen n Sidi Ṛebbi neɣ anwa i gzemren ad idebbeṛ fell-as ?
11.35: Anwa i s-yefkan kra d amezwaru iwakken ad yeṛǧu a s-t-id-yerr ?
11.36: Kullec yekka-d s ɣuṛ-es, kullec yella-d yis, kullec d ayla-s. I nețța lɛaḍima si lǧil ɣer lǧil, amin !

12.1: A kkun-nhuɣ ihi ay atmaten s ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken aț-țsebblem lǧețțat-nwen d leɛqliya nwen am wesfel yeddren, zeddigen, yeṣfan ara iɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi ; ț-țagi i d ṭṭaɛa i gețṛaǧu deg-wen Sidi Ṛebbi.
12.2: Ur țɛanadet ara lǧil-agi n tura, meɛna ǧǧet Sidi Ṛebbi ad ibeddel ixemmimen-nwen d lɛeqliya-nwen iwakken aț-țissinem lebɣi-ines : ayen yelhan, ayen yeṣfan ur nesɛi lɛib, d wayen akk i t-iɛeǧben.
12.3: S ṛṛeḥma i yi-d-ițțunefken, a d iniɣ i mkul yiwen deg-wen : ur ssimɣuṛet ara iman-nwen, sqenɛet s wakken tellam, ddut s neyya ɣef leḥsab n liman i wen-d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi.
12.4: Am akken nesɛa aṭas n lemfaṣel di lǧețța-nneɣ, meɛna mkul yiwen si lemfaṣel-nni s lxedma-ines,
12.5: akken daɣen nukni, ɣas deg waṭas yid-nneɣ i nella, s tdukli-nneɣ nețțili d yiwet n lǧețța di Lmasiḥ, aql-aɣ meṛṛa d lemfaṣel wway gar-aneɣ, wa yeḥwaǧ wayeḍ.
12.6: Lameɛna di ṛṛeḥma-ines, Sidi Ṛebbi yefka-yaɣ-d tukciwin yemxalafen : ilaq yal yiwen ad ixdem ayen i s-d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi, akken ilaq, s wul d liman :
12.7: ama d axebbeṛ s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, ama d leqdic,
12.8: ama d aselmed, neɣ d nehhu. Ilaq daɣen win ițseddiqen, ad iseddeq mbla ṭṭmeɛ, win ițdebbiṛen ad idebbeṛ s ṣṣwab, win ițḥunnun ɣef yimeɣban ilaq ad iḥunn fell-asen s wul-is.
12.9: Ur seɛɛut ara sin wudmawen, ḥemmlet s wul yeṣfan, keṛhet cceṛ, ṭṭfet deg wayen yelhan.
12.10: Sɛut daymen leqdeṛ wway gar-awen ; sɛut leḥnana, myeḥmalet s leḥmala n tegmaț.
12.11: Qedcet ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi s wulawen-nwen d wayen yellan di tezmert-nwen, ẓewṛet, ur țțilit ara d imeɛdazen.
12.12: Feṛḥet ɣef ddemma n usirem i tesɛam, sɛut ṣṣbeṛ di tegniț n ccedda, deɛɛut dayem ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, ur ḥebbset ara.
12.13: Ɛiwnet atmaten-nwen di liman deg wayen uḥwaǧen, sṭerḥbet s lfeṛḥ s wid i d-yețțasen ɣuṛ-wen.
12.14: Dɛut s lxiṛ i wid i kkun ițqehhiṛen, deɛɛut s lxiṛ, ur deɛɛut ara s cceṛ ;
12.15: feṛḥet d wid ifeṛḥen, țrut d win yețrun.
12.16: Ur xeddmet ara lxilaf wway-gar awen, ur ssimɣuṛet ara iman-nwen meɛna ddut s wannuz, ur ḥețbet ara iman-nwen d wid yesnen.
12.17: Ur țțarrat ara țțaṛ seg wid i kkun-iḍuṛṛen, nadit ɣef wayen yelhan zdat yemdanen meṛṛa.
12.18: Ma yella wamek ara d-tekk s ɣuṛ-wen lehna, ilit di lehna akk-d yemdanen meṛṛa.
12.19: Ur țțarrat ara țțaṛ ay imeɛzuzen, lameɛna ǧǧet kullec ger ifassen n Sidi Ṛebbi, d nețța ara ixedmen ccɣel-is. Atah wayen yuran di tira iqedsen : D nekk ara yerren țțaṛ, ara yerren i mkul yiwen ayen yukla l, i d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi .
12.20: Yura daɣen : Ma yelluẓ weɛdaw-ik efk-as ad yečč, ma yeffud efk-as ad isew, axaṭer ma txedmeḍ akka , am akken ț-țirgin iṛeqqen ara tesserseḍ ɣef wuqeṛṛuy-is.
12.21: Ur țțaǧa ara cceṛ ad iṭṭef amkan deg ul-ik iwakken ad ixdem lebɣi-s, lameɛna eɣleb cceṛ s lxiṛ.

13.1: Mkul amdan, ilaq ad iqadeṛ imdebbṛen i gḥekkmen tamurt i deg yețɛici, axaṭer d Sidi Ṛebbi i d-iǧǧan lḥekma di ddunit, d nețța daɣen i gebɣan aț-țuɣal lḥekma-agi ɣer yifassen n yemdanen.
13.2: S wakka ihi, win ara ixalfen lḥekma i gesbedd Sidi Ṛebbi, d lameṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi i gɛuṣa, d lɛiqab kan ara d-isseɣli ɣef yiman-is.
13.3: Mačči d wid ixeddmen lxiṛ ara yaggaden imdebbṛen n lḥukuma meɛna d wid ixeddmen cceṛ. M'ur tebɣiḍ ara aț-țaggaḍeḍ lḥukuma, xdem ayen yelhan, a k-fken lehna.
13.4: Axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yefka-d lḥukuma i nnfeɛ-inek, meɛna ma txedmeḍ cceṛ, ɣas aggad-iț axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yefka i lḥukkam tazmert s wayes ara k-ɛaqben s lmut. Lḥukkam agi qeddcen ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken a d-sbanen urrif-is m'ara ɛaqben wid ixeddmen cceṛ.
13.5: ?ef wayagi, ilaq-aɣ a nḍuɛ imdebbṛen n lḥukuma, mačči ɣef ddemma n lɛiqab kan meɛna i lmend n lxaṭer-nneɣ.
13.6: Daymi daɣen i glaq aț-țxelṣem tabzert i lḥukuma, axaṭer wid ițdebbiṛen deg wannect-agi, xeddmen ccɣel-nsen akken i t-id yenna Sidi Ṛebbi.
13.7: Rret i mkul yiwen ayen i wen-ițțalas : xellṣet tabzert i kra win i wen-ițțalasen, aggadet win i glaq a t-taggadem, qadṛet win i glaq a t-tqadṛem.
13.8: ?uṛ-wat a wen-ițalas yiwen lḥaǧa anagar leḥmala n wway gar-awen, axaṭer win iḥemmlen wiyaḍ, ixdem ayen akk i d-tenna ccariɛa.
13.9: Axaṭer lumuṛat n ccariɛa i d yeqqaṛen : Ur txeddmeḍ ara lɛaṛ, ur tneqqeḍ ara, ur tețțakreḍ ara, ur teṭṭamaɛeḍ ara , akk-d lumuṛ nniḍen meṛṛa nnejmaɛen deg yiwen n lameṛ-agi : Ilaq aț-țḥemleḍ wiyaḍ am yiman-ik .
13.10: Win yesɛan leḥmala deg wul-is ur ițḍuṛṛu ara wiyaḍ, ihi win iḥemmlen wiyaḍ, yexdem ayen akk i d-tenna ccariɛa.
13.11: Imi teẓram d acu n lweqt i deg nella, tura yewweḍ-ed lawan i deg ara d-akim si nuddam axaṭer ass n leslak iqeṛṛeb-ed ɣuṛ-nneɣ akteṛ n wass amezwaru i deg numen.
13.12: Qṛib ad yekfu yiḍ, ițeddu ad yali wass, a ndeggeṛ akkin ɣef yiman-nneɣ lexdayem n ṭṭlam, a nerfed leslaḥ s wayes ara neddu di tafat.
13.13: A nelḥu ɛinani s tezdeg akk-d ṣṣfa, di tafat n wass ; xḍut i ssikṛan d ccehwat, i leɛdez d lexdayem icemten, i čaqlalat ț-țismin.
13.14: Meɛna elset tudert tajḍiṭ i gellan di Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, ur țțaǧat ara iman-nwen a kkun-yawi ṭṭmeɛ n lebɣi n tnefsit-nwen.

14.1: Qeblet gar-awen win ur neǧhid ara di liman, ur kkatet ara deg-s ma ixuṣṣ di lefhama.
14.2: Axaṭer yiwen yumen belli yezmer ad yečč kullec, wayeḍ ixuṣṣen di liman ițkukru, itețț kan lxedṛa.
14.3: Win itețțen kullec ur ilaq ara ad iḥqeṛ win ur ntețț ara, win ur ntețț ara ur ilaq ara daɣen ad iḥaseb win itețțen, axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi iqbel-it akken yella.
14.4: D acu-k kečč iwakken aț-țḥasbeḍ aqeddac n wayeḍ ? Ma yella ixdem ccɣel-is neɣ yeqqim, ayagi d ccɣel n umɛellem-is ! Meɛna ad ibedd ɣer ccɣel-is, axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yesɛa tazmert iwakken a t-iṭṭef ur iɣelli ara.
14.5: Yella yiwen yeqqaṛ llan wussan yesɛan azal akteṛ n wiyaḍ, ma ɣer wayeḍ ussan akk ɛedlen ur mxalafen ara. Mkul yiwen ilaq ad itḥeqqeq deg wayen ițxemmim.
14.6: Win yețțaken azal i wussan akteṛ n wiyaḍ, ixeddem ayagi i Sidi Ṛebbi, win itețțen kullec, itețț s wul yeṣfan axaṭer yețḥemmid Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef wayen itețț ; win ur ntețț ara kullec, yexdem ayagi s wul yeṣfan imi ula d nețța ițḥemmid Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef wayen itețț.
14.7: Ihi ulac win yețɛicin i yiman-is, ulac daɣen win yemmuten i yiman-is.
14.8: Axaṭer ma nedder, nedder i Ṛebbi, ma nemmut, nemmut i Ṛebbi. Ihi ama nedder ama nemmut, nukni d ayla n Sidi Ṛebbi.
14.9: Axaṭer Lmasiḥ yemmut, yerna yeḥya-d iwakken ad yili d Aḥkim n wid yemmuten akk-d wid yeddren.
14.10: Ma d kečč acuɣeṛ i tețḥasabeḍ gma-k ? Acuɣer i t-tḥeqṛeḍ ? Eɛni ur nețɛeddi ara akk di ccṛeɛ zdat Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken a ɣ-iḥaseb ?
14.11: Axaṭer yura di tektabt iqedsen : Nekk Illu, Ṛebbi yeddren, a d-iniɣ : yal tagecrirt aț-țeknu zdat-i , yal imi ad icehhed yis-i belli d nekk i d Ṛebbi .
14.12: Axaṭer yal yiwen deg-nneɣ ad ițțuḥaseb zdat Ṛebbi ɣef wayen yexdem.
14.13: Ur țemḥasabet ara ihi wway-gar awen, meɛna ḥadret iman-nwen iwakken ur txeddmem ara ayen ara yesseɣlin atmaten-nwen di ddnub.
14.14: ?riɣ yerna țekleɣ ɣef wayen i d-yenna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ belli ulac ayen yețțuḥeṛmen di lmakla ; win iḥesben kra yețțuḥeṛṛem meɛna yečča-t, d leḥṛam fell-as.
14.15: Ma yella tesḥezneḍ gma-k ɣef ddemma n wayen i tțețțeḍ ur tesɛiḍ ara lmaḥibba. ?ader ihi aț-țiliḍ s lmakla-inek, d sebba n uɣelluy i gma-k i ɣef yemmut Lmasiḥ.
14.16: Ayen tḥesbem kunwi d ayen yelhan, ur ilaq ara ad yili d sebba s wayes ara wten deg-wen wiyaḍ.
14.17: Axaṭer tagelda n Sidi Ṛebbi mačči d lmakla neɣ ț-țissit meɛna d lḥeqq, d lehna akk-d lfeṛḥ s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
14.18: Win iteddun akka deg webrid n Lmasiḥ, ad yeɛǧeb i Ṛebbi, yerna ad yeɛziz ɣer yemdanen.
14.19: S wakka ihi, a nennadit ɣef wayen ara ɣ-d-yawin lehna, d wayen ara ɣ-isnernin di liman.
14.20: Ur ssexṛab ara ccɣel n Sidi Ṛebbi deg wul n gma-k ɣef ddemma n lmakla. S tideț, ayen akk yețmaččan d leḥlal, lameɛna d leḥṛam fell-ak ma telliḍ d sebba n uɣelluy n gma-k ɣef ddemma n wayen i tțețțeḍ.
14.21: Iwakken ur tețțiliḍ ara d sebba n uɣelluy n gma-k, xḍu i lmakla n weksum immezlen i ssadaț neɣ tissit n ccṛab, d wayen akk izemren ad yesseɣli gma-k di ddnub.
14.22: Ayen s wayes tumneḍ keččini, eǧǧ-it i yiman-ik gar-ak d Sidi Ṛebbi. D aseɛdi win ur nesseḍlam ara iman-is deg wayen i gxeddem.
14.23: Meɛna win yețcukkun deg wayen itețț, d leḥṛam fell-as, axaṭer ur itețț ara s nneya. Kra n wayen ur nețwaxdam ara s liman d nneya, d leḥṛam.

15.1: Nukni s wid iǧehden di liman, ilaq a neṣbeṛ i wid ur neǧhid ara, ur nețnadi ara ɣef wayen kan i ɣ-iɛeǧben i nukni.
15.2: Ilaq yal yiwen deg-nneɣ ad inadi ɣef nnfeɛ n wiyaḍ iwakken ad nnernin di liman.
15.3: Axaṭer Lmasiḥ ur inuda ara ɣef wayen i t-iɛeǧǧben, akken yura di tektabt n ?abur : Rregmat n wid i k-ikeṛhen ɣlint-ed fell-i.
15.4: Ayen akk yuran si zik, yura iwakken a nelmed amek ara nesɛu asirem s ṣṣbeṛ akk-d țmeṛǧiwt i d-țakent tira iqedsen.
15.5: Sidi Ṛebbi i d-ițakken lǧehd d ṣṣbeṛ, a wen-d-yefk aț-țesɛum yiwen uxemmem wway gar-awen akken i t-id-isselmed Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ,
15.6: iwakken s yiwen n ṛṛay, s yiwet n taɣect aț-țḥemdem Ṛebbi, baba-s n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
15.7: ?emyeqbalet wway gar-awen akken i kkun-iqbel Lmasiḥ i lɛaḍima n Sidi Ṛebbi.
15.8: Nniɣ-ed belli Ɛisa Lmasiḥ yusa-d d aqeddac n wat Isṛail iwakken ad ixdem ayen akken i gewɛed Sidi Ṛebbi i lejdud-nsen, yerna a d-isban s wakka belli Sidi Ṛebbi ur yețțuɣal ara deg wawal-is.
15.9: Yusa-d daɣen iwakken leǧnas nniḍen ad ḥemden Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef ṛṛeḥma-s akken yura di tektabt n ?abur : Daymi ara k-ḥemdeɣ ger leǧnas, yerna ad cnuɣ lɛaḍima n yisem-ik .
15.10: Yenna daɣen : A leǧnas feṛḥet akk-d wegdud n Sidi Ṛebbi !
15.11: Yura daɣen di tektabt n ?abur : ?emmdet Sidi Ṛebbi kunwi akk ay igduden,ḥemmdet Sidi Ṛebbi a leǧnas meṛṛa !
15.12: Nnbi Iceɛya yenna : A d-iffeɣ yiwen uxalaf seg uẓaṛ n Yassa , a d-ikker iwakken ad iḥkem ɣef yegduden ; l eǧnas meṛṛa ad ssirmen deg-s .
15.13: Sidi Ṛebbi yellan d Bab n usirem a d-issers fell-awen lfeṛḥ d lehna s liman i tesɛam deg-s, iwakken ul-nwen ad iččaṛ d asirem s tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
15.14: ?ef wayen i kkun-yeɛnan ay atmaten, tḥeqqeqeɣ belli teččuṛem d leḥnana akk-d lefhama yerna tzemrem aț-țemyenhum wway gar awen.
15.15: Ɛemdeɣ ɣef yimeslayen-agi i wen-uriɣ di tebṛaț-agi iwakken a wen-d-smektiɣ ayen akk i tlemdem. S ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi i yi-d ițțunefken,
15.16: i lliɣ d aqeddac n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ɣef leǧnas nniḍen. Tura ccɣel-iw, d abecceṛ n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi i leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, iwakken igduden meṛṛa ad uɣalen d lweɛda yeṣfan s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, d lweɛda ara iɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi.
15.17: S wakka, di tikli-inu akk-d Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, zemreɣ a d-iniɣ : feṛḥeɣ s lxedma i yi-d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi.
15.18: Axaṭer ma yella wayen i ɣef ara d-ḥkuɣ, a d-ḥkuɣ kan ɣef wayen i gexdem Sidna Ɛisa yis-i, ama s imeslayen ama s lecɣal iwakken igduden ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail ad ḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi.
15.19: S licaṛat d lbeṛhanat i d-ideṛṛun s tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, i beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Lmasiḥ si temdint n Lquds armi ț-țamurt n Illirya di mkul amkan.
15.20: Xedmeɣ meǧhud-iw iwakken ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ anagar anda ur yețwassen ara Lmasiḥ iwakken ur bennuɣ ara ɣef lsas sbedden wiyaḍ, xedmeɣ am akken yura di tektabt n nnbi Iceɛya :
15.21: Wid iwumi ur yețwabecceṛ ara, ad walin ;wid ur nesli ara yis, ad fehmen.
15.22: D annect-a i yi-ṭṭfen acḥal d abrid ur n-usiɣ ara ɣuṛ-wen.
15.23: Tura imi kfiɣ lxedma-w di tmura-agi, yerna acḥal iseggasen aya i țmenniɣ a kkun-ẓreɣ, ssarmeɣ a n-ɛeddiɣ ɣuṛ-wen m'ara ṛuḥeɣ ɣer tmurt n Spenyul. Ur țṛuḥuɣ ara alamma sɛeddaɣ kra wussan yid-wen iwakken a nemyussan ; yerna ma yella wamek, a yi-tɛiwnem ad kemleɣ abrid-iw.
15.25: Ma ț-țura ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer temdint n Lquds, ad awiɣ ayen ara iɛawnen iqeddacen n Sidi Ṛebbi yellan dinna.
15.26: Axaṭer atmaten-nneɣ n Masidunya akk-d wid n Akaya jemɛen-d ayen ara fken i watmaten-nneɣ imasiḥiyen n temdint n Lquds, i gellan d igellilen.
15.27: ?-țideț ayagi xedmen-t s lebɣi nsen, lameɛna imasiḥiyen n temdint n Lquds uklalen lemɛawna-yagi. Axaṭer akken i weṛten yid-sen lbaṛakat i sen-d-yefka Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, akken daɣen nutni tura yewwi-d lḥal fell-asen a ten-ɛiwnen di tugniț n lexṣaṣ.
15.28: M'ara sen-fkeɣ ayen akk i sen-d jemɛen, ad ikfu ccɣel-agi, imiren ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer tmurt n Sbanya, a n-ɛeddiɣ ɣuṛ-wen.
15.29: ?riɣ belli m'ara n-ṛuḥeɣ ɣuṛ wen, s lbaṛaka tameqqrant n Lmasiḥ ara n-aseɣ.
15.30: Di leɛnaya-nwen ay atmaten, s yisem n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ d leḥmala i d-yețțak Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, a wen-ssutreɣ a yi-tɛiwnem aț-țdeɛɛum ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi fell-i
15.31: iwakken a yi-ssemneɛ seg ifassen n wid yugin ad amnen di tmurt n Yahuda ; yerna ayen akka ara yawiɣ i watmaten n temdint n Lquds a ten-yaweḍ di laman iwakken ad feṛḥen yis.
15.32: S wakka ma yebɣa Sidi Ṛebbi, a n-awḍeɣ s lfeṛḥ, ad steɛfuɣ dinna ɣuṛ-wen.
15.33: Sidi Ṛebbi yellan d Bab n lehna ad yili yid-wen meṛṛa ! Amin !

16.1: A kkun-weṣṣiɣ ɣef weltma tneɣ Fibya, nețțat illan ț-țaqeddact n Sidi Ṛebbi di tejmaɛt n temdint n Senkriya.
16.2: Sṭerḥbet yis s leqdeṛ, s yisem n Sidna Ɛisa, akken i glaq aț-țesṭeṛḥebem s watmaten. Ɛiwnet-eț deg wayen akk i teḥwaǧ, axaṭer aṭas n watmaten i tɛawen ; ula d nekk tɛawen-iyi.
16.3: ?ṣiwḍet sslam i gma-tneɣ Akilas akk-d Briska, wid akken iqeddcen yid-i ɣef Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ,
16.4: wid akken i gqeblen ad sebblen tudert-nsen fell-i ; mačči d nekkini kan i ten icekkṛen meɛna ula ț-țijmuyaɛ n imasiḥiyen n mkul amkan cekkṛent ten.
16.5: ?sellimet daɣen ɣef wid yețnejmaɛen deg wexxam-nsen, țsellimet ɣef gma-tneɣ Ibantus aḥbib eɛzizen fell-i, i gellan d amenzu yumnen s Lmasiḥ di tmurt n Asya.
16.6: ?sellimet ɣef Meryem i genneɛtaben aṭas fell-awen.
16.7: ?sellimet ɣef Andrunikus akk-d Yunya i yi-ițțilin yerna llan yid-i di lḥebs, wid eɛzizen ger ṛṛusul, nutni yumnen s Sidna Ɛisa uqbel ad amneɣ nekkini.
16.8: ?sellimet ɣef Ambliyatus gma tneɣ, win eɛzizen fell-i di Lmasiḥ.
16.9: ?sellimet ɣef gma-tneɣ Urban, win iqeddcen yid-nneɣ ɣef Lmasiḥ ; țsellimet daɣen ɣef Stakyis aḥbib-iw.
16.10: ?sellimet ɣef Abalis, win i nwala amek i geṭṭef di Lmasiḥ. ?sellimet ɣef wat wexxam n gma tneɣ Aristubul.
16.11: ?sellimet ɣef Hiṛudiɛun win i yi-ițțilin, țsellimet ɣef wat wexxam n Narsisus, wid yumnen s Lmasiḥ.
16.12: ?sellimet ɣef tyessetmatin Trifina akk-d Trifusa i genneɛtaben ɣef lecɣal n Ṛebbi, țsellimet ɣef Bersidya eɛzizen, tin yenneɛtaben aṭas ɣef Lecɣal n Lmasiḥ.
16.13: ?sellimet ɣef Rufus win yextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi akk-d yemma-s i yi iḥesben am mmi-s.
16.14: ?sellimet ɣef Asinkritus, Flegun, Hermis, Batrubas, Hermas akk-d watmaten nniḍen yellan yid-sen.
16.15: ?sellimet ɣef Filulugus akk-d Julya, Niryus akk-d weltma-s, Ulimbas akk-d wid yumnen s Lmasiḥ yellan yid-sen.
16.16: Msalamet wway-gar-awen s sslam yeṣfan. Tijmuyaɛ akk n Lmasiḥ țselliment-ed fell-awen.
16.17: A kkun-weṣṣiɣ ay atmaten : ḥadret iman-nwen ɣef wid i d-ițțawin beṭṭu yerna skarayen ccwal, bɣan a wen-sɛeṛqen ayen i tlemdem, sbeɛdet iman-nwen fell-asen.
16.18: Axaṭer imdanen am wigi ur qeddcen ara ɣef Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ meɛna ɣef yiɛebbaḍ-nsen kan i qeddcen ; s ukellex akk-d imeslayen ẓiden, țseḥḥiren ulawen n wid yesɛan neyya.
16.19: Ma d kunwi, medden meṛṛa ẓran tḍuɛem Sidi Ṛebbi, d ayen i yi-sfeṛḥen. ?menniɣ aț-țxedmem ayen yelhan s ṣṣwab, ur s-țaǧǧat ara abrid i cceṛ.
16.20: Sidi Ṛebbi yellan d Bab n lehna, ur yețɛeṭṭil ara ad yemḥeq Cciṭan yerna a t-yerr seddaw iḍaṛṛen nwen. Ṛṛeḥma n Ɛisa Ssid-nneɣ aț-țili yid-wen !
16.21: Gma-tneɣ Timuti win iqeddcen yid-i akk-d Lusyus, Yazun, Susibatrus i yi-ițțilin țsellimen-d fell-awen.
16.22: Nekk Tertius i guran tabṛaț-agi țsellimeɣ daɣen fell-awen s yisem n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
16.23: Yețsellim-ed fell-awen Gayus win i ɣer țțiliɣ anda țnejmaɛen daɣen watmaten meṛṛa. Erastus, win yeṭṭfen asenduq n yedrimen n temdint akk-d gma-tneɣ Kartus țsellimen-d fell-awen.
16.24: Ṛṛeḥma n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ aț-țili yid-wen meṛṛa ! Amin !
16.25: Yețțubarek Sidi Ṛebbi yesɛan tazmert a ɣ-yesseǧhed di liman, akken i t-țbecciṛeɣ di lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i d yewwi Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, iwakken a d-isban lbaḍna n Sidi Ṛebbi yețwaffren seg wasmi tebda ddunit,
16.26: meɛna sḍehṛent-ț-id lenbiya s wayen uran akken i sen-t-id-yumeṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, Illu n dayem. Tura leǧnas meṛṛa slan i lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ iwakken a ten-id-yawi ɣer ṭṭaɛa-ines s liman.
16.27: Lɛaḍima i Sidi Ṛebbi awḥid, Bab n tmusni d leɛqel, s Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ si lǧil ɣer lǧil ! Amin !

1.1: Nekk Bulus, iwumi i d-issawel Sidi Ṛebbi s lebɣi-ines iwakken ad iliɣ d amceggeɛ n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ akk-d gma-tneɣ Sustin,
1.2: i tejmaɛt n Sidi Ṛebbi i gellan di temdint n Kurintus, i wid i d-yextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ad ilin d imqedsen, d wid akk yellan di mkul amkan ineddhen s yisem n Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, i gellan d Ssid-nsen d Ssid nneɣ :
1.3: ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a wen-d țțunefkent s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi Baba-tneɣ akk-d Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
1.4: Zgiɣ țḥemmideɣ Sidi Ṛebbi fell-awen ɣef ṛṛeḥma i wen-d-yefka s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ,
1.5: axaṭer yis i kkun-id yeṛzeq s mkul lxiṛ, ama s wawal-is ama s tmusni-ines,
1.6: imi cchada ɣef Lmasiḥ tṛeṣṣa nezzeh deg-wen.
1.7: Daymi ur kkun-ixuṣṣ wacemma n lxiṛ s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi, kunwi yețṛaǧun ass i deg ara d-yuɣal Ssid-nneɣ.
1.8: A kkun isseǧhed alamma ț-țaggara iwakken a d-tbanem mbla lɛib ass n tuɣalin n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
1.9: Sidi Ṛebbi yețțaṭaf deg wawal-is ; d nețța i wen-d-issawlen iwakken aț-țɛicem s tdukli akk-d Mmi-s, Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ.
1.10: Ay atmaten, a kkun-nhuɣ s yisem n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ : msefhamet wway gar-awen, ur ilaq ara a d-yili beṭṭu gar-awen, ddukklet, sɛut yiwen uxemmem d yiwen n ṛṛay.
1.11: Axaṭer ay atmaten, irgazen n wexxam n Kluwi ṣṣawḍen-iyi-d lexbaṛ belli ițțili-d umennuɣ gar-awen.
1.12: Ayen bɣiɣ a d-iniɣ : sliɣ belli llan gar-awen wid yeqqaṛen :« nekk ddiɣ d Bulus », ma d wayeḍ yeqqaṛ : « nekk țekkiɣ d Abulus », wayeḍ daɣen : « nekk ddiɣ d Buṭrus », llan daɣen wid yeqqaṛen : « nekk țekkiɣ di Lmasiḥ ».
1.13: Amek akka, tɣilem Lmasiḥ yebḍa ? Eɛni d Bulus i gețwasemmṛen fell-awen neɣ s yisem n Bulus i tețwaɣeḍsem ?
1.14: Ad ḥemmdeɣ Ṛebbi imi ur sɣeḍseɣ ula d yiwen deg-wen anagar Krisbus d Gayus.
1.15: Akka, yiwen deg-wen ur izmir a d-yini belli yețwaɣḍes s yisem-iw.
1.16: Tella daɣen twacult n Stifanas, d nekk i ț-isɣeḍsen meɛna ur ḥsiɣ ara sɣeḍseɣ yiwen nniḍen dinna.
1.17: Lmasiḥ ur iyi-d-iceggeɛ ara iwakken ad sɣeḍseɣ meɛna iceggeɛ iyi-d ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ ; mačči s yimeslayen i d-yekkan si lefhama n wemdan iwakken ur tekkseɣ ara lqima i lmut n Lmasiḥ ɣef wumidag.
1.18: Ț-țideț, abecceṛ n lmut n Lmasiḥ ɣef wumidag ț-țidderwect i wid iḍaɛen ; meɛna ɣuṛ-nneɣ nukni yellan deg webrid n leslak, ț-țazmert n Ṛebbi.
1.19: Atan wayen i d-nnant tira iqedsen : Ad snegreɣ tamusni n imusnawen, ad rreɣ d ula+ c lefhama n wid ifehmen+ .
1.20: Anda-t uɛeqli ? Anda-t umusnaw ? Anda-t uḥṛic ara d-isfehmen ayen ideṛṛun di lǧil-agi ? Ur d-isbeggen ara Sidi Ṛebbi belli tamusni n ddunit-agi d lehbala ?
1.21: Imi at ddunit s lefhama-nsen ur ɛqilen ara tamusni n Sidi Ṛebbi, nețța yebɣa ad isellek wid yumnen yis s lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ i ḥesben wiyaḍ d lehbala.
1.22: At Isṛail ssuturen lbeṛhanat, iyunaniyen țnadin tamusni ;
1.23: ma d nukni nețbecciṛ Lmasiḥ, win akken yețțusemmṛen ɣef wumidag, yellan d țbehdila i wat Isṛail, d lehbala ɣer iyunaniyen.
1.24: Meɛna wid iwumi i d-yessawel Sidi Ṛebbi, ama d at Isṛail ama d iyunaniyen, umnen belli d nețța i d Lmasiḥ, i ț-țazmert n Ṛebbi akk-d tmusni-ines.
1.25: Axaṭer ayen akken ḥesben yemdanen d lehbala n Sidi Ṛebbi, ț-țamusni iṣeḥḥan akteṛ n tmusni n yemdanen, ayen ḥesben daɣen d feccal n Sidi Ṛebbi, yeɣleb lǧehd n yemdanen.
1.26: Walit ay atmaten, kunwi iwumi d-yessawel Sidi Ṛebbi : ur llin gar-awen aṭas n wid yesɛan tamusni n ddunit, ur llin aṭas n wid yesɛan imukan ɛlayen, ur llin daɣen aṭas inaṣliyen yesɛan lqima tameqqrant ;
1.27: meɛna Sidi Ṛebbi yextaṛ ayen yellan d lehbala ɣer wemdan iwakken ad isneḥcam imusnawen, yextaṛ ayen ur nesɛi tazmert di ddunit iwakken ad isneḥcam wid iǧehden.
1.28: Sidi Ṛebbi yextaṛ ayen ur nesɛi azal, yețwaḥeqṛen di ddunit akk-d wayen yețwaḥesben d ulac, iwakken ad isseɣli lqima n wayen yesɛan azal ɣer yemdanen.
1.29: Akka, yiwen ur izmir ad izuxx zdat Sidi Ṛebbi.
1.30: Imi d Sidi Ṛebbi i kkun-isdukklen d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, d nețța i ɣ-yuɣalen d lefhama i d yekkan s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi. Yis i ɣ yerra Sidi Ṛebbi d iḥeqqiyen, iṣeffa tikli-nneɣ, yefda-yaɣ-d si ddnub.
1.31: Am akken yura di tira iqedsen : Win yebɣan ad izuxx, ad izuxx s lecɣal n Ṛebbi.

2.1: Daymi ay atmaten mi n-ṛuḥeɣ ɣuṛ wen iwakken a wen mmeslayeɣ ɣef lbaḍna n Sidi Ṛebbi, ur a wen mmeslayeɣ ara s yimeslayen yeččuṛen d zzux neɣ s tmusni yessewhamen.
2.2: Axaṭer ur nudaɣ ara a d mmeslayeɣ gar-awen ɣef wayen nniḍen anagar ɣef Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ; Ɛisa Lmasiḥ i gețwaṣemmṛen ɣef wumidag.
2.3: Ula d nekk asmi lliɣ ɣuṛ-wen, lliɣ fecleɣ, kukraɣ yerna tekcem-iyi tugdi.
2.4: Ayen i wen-slemdeɣ d wayen i wen-beccṛeɣ ur yebni ara ɣef tmusni n wemdan, lameɛna d ayen yebnan ɣef tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
2.5: Akka, liman-nwen ur yețrus ara ɣef tmusni n yemdanen, meɛna ɣef tezmert n Sidi Ṛebbi.
2.6: Nesselmad tamusni-agi i wid yesɛan liman iǧehden ; tamusni-agi, mačči ț-țamusni n ddunit-agi neɣ ț-țin n tezmar n igelliden n ddunit-agi iteddun ɣer nnger.
2.7: Nețbecciṛ tamusni n Sidi Ṛebbi yellan d lbaḍna yeffren ɣef yemdanen, i ghegga si zik i lɛezz-nneɣ.
2.8: Ula d yiwen deg igelliden n zzman-agi ur ț-yessin, lemmer ssnen-ț tili ur semmṛen ara Bab n tmanegt ɣef wumidag.
2.9: Am akken i t-id-nnant tira iqedsen : Ayen ur twala tiṭ, ayen ur yesli umeẓẓuɣ+ , ayen ɣef ur ixemmem ara wemdan,+ d ayen i ghegga Sidi Ṛebbi i wid i t-iḥemmlen+ .
2.10: Sidi Ṛebbi ibeggen-aɣ-t-id i nukni s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen. Axaṭer Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yezmer ad iẓer ulamma d lecɣal yeffren n Sidi Ṛebbi.
2.11: Anwa i geẓran ayen yellan deg wul n wemdan ? Anagar ṛṛuḥ-ines i geẓran ayen yellan deg wul-is. Yiwen ur yessin daɣen ixemmimen n Ṛebbi anagar Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi.
2.12: Nukni mačči d ṛṛuḥ n ddunit i neqbel, meɛna d Ṛṛuḥ i d-yekkan s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, iwakken a nissin ayen akk i ɣ-d-yefka s ṛṛeḥma-ines.
2.13: Nukni ur nețmeslay ara s yimeslayen i tesselmad tmusni n wemdan, meɛna nețmeslay s yimeslayen i ɣ-isselmad Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi. Akka i nessefham tideț n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i wid yesɛan Ṛṛuḥ-agi.
2.14: Amdan ițeddun s lɛeqliya n ddunit ur iqebbel ara ayen i d-ițțasen s ɣuṛ Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi imi ɣuṛ-es ayagi d lehbala ; ur yezmir ara a t-yissin axaṭer s Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi i nezmer a t-nefhem.
2.15: Amdan yesɛan Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen n Sidi Ṛebbi yezmer ad ifhem kullec, ma d nețța, yiwen ur izmir a t-iḥaseb.
2.16: Akken yura di tira iqedsen : Anwa i gessnen ixemmimen n+ Sidi Ṛebbi,+ anwa i gzemren a t-yenhu + ? Ma d nukni, nesɛa axemmem n Lmasiḥ.

3.1: Ay atmaten, ur ufiɣ ara amek ara wen-mmeslayeɣ am akken țmeslayeɣ i yemdanen yesɛan Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, meɛna mmeslayeɣ-awen am yemdanen n ddunit, am wid yellan d arrac deg ubrid n Lmasiḥ.
3.2: Fkiɣ-awen ayefki mačči d aɣṛum axaṭer aɣṛum ur as-tezmirem ara, yerna ar tura ur as-tezmirem ara, mazal-ikkun tețɛicim s lebɣi n tnefsit nwen.
3.3: Imi mazal gar-awen tismin d umceččew, tbeggnem-d belli mazal ikkun tețɛicim s lɛeqliya-nwen yerna tleḥḥum am yemdanen n ddunit.
3.4: M'ara yini yiwen deg-wen : « nekk ddiɣ d Bulus », wayeḍ ad yini : « Nekk țekkiɣ d Abulus » ; eɛni ayagi mačči d lɛeqliya n ddunit ?
3.5: D acu-t Abulus, d acu-t Bulus ? D iqeddacen kan i kkun-id-yewwin aț-țamnem s Lmasiḥ ! Yal yiwen deg-nneɣ ixeddem ayen i s-d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi a t-yexdem.
3.6: Nekk ẓẓiɣ imɣi, Abulus issew-it, meɛna d Sidi Ṛebbi i t-issegman.
3.7: Ihi mačči d win ițeẓẓun neɣ d win yesswayen i gesɛan azal meɛna d Sidi Ṛebbi yessegmuyen.
3.8: Win ițeẓẓun d win yesswayen ɛedlen ; mkul yiwen a s-yerr Sidi Ṛebbi s wakken yuklal di lxedma-s.
3.9: Axaṭer aql-aɣ neddukkel d iqeddacen ɣef lecɣal n Sidi Ṛebbi. Kunwi d iger i gxeddem Sidi Ṛebbi, d axxam i gbennu.
3.10: S ṛṛeḥma i yi-d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi, am umusnaw n lebni, nekk sserseɣ lsas, wayeḍ yebna fell-as ; meɛna yal yiwen ad iḥader amek ara yebnu.
3.11: Yiwen ur izmir ad issers lsas nniḍen deg wemkan n win yersen yakan : Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
3.12: Ma yella win yebnan ɣef lsas-agi ama s ddheb, ama s lfeṭṭa, ama s yeẓra ɣlayen, ama s wesɣaṛ neɣ s wusaɣuṛ d walim,
3.13: mkul yiwen a d-iban ccɣel-is ass n lḥisab, axaṭer mkul ccɣel ad iɛeddi di tmes ; ț-țimes ara d-ibeggnen lecɣal n yal yiwen ma seḥḥan neɣ ur ṣeḥḥan ara.
3.14: Win yebnan ɣef lsas, ur t-tečči ara tmes wayen akken yebna, a t-id-yaweḍ lxiṛ ameqqran ;
3.15: ma d win iwumi tečča tmes wayen yexdem, a s-iṛuḥ lxiṛ-is ; ma d nețța ad ițțusellek, am win izegren times imneɛ.
3.16: Ur teẓrim ara belli kunwi d lǧameɛ n Sidi Ṛebbi i tellam ? Ur teẓrim ara belli Ṛṛuḥ-is yezdeɣ deg-wen ?
3.17: Ihi win yesseɣlin axxam n Sidi Ṛebbi, Sidi Ṛebbi a t-isseɣli axaṭer axxam n Sidi Ṛebbi d imqeddes, d kunwi i d axxam-is.
3.18: Ḥadret ad yili win ara iɣuṛṛen iman-is ! Ma yella gar-awen win iḥesben iman-is d aɛeqli di ddunit-a, ilaq ad yuɣal d amehbul iwakken ad yili d aɛeqli.
3.19: Axaṭer tamusni n ddunit-agi, ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi d lehbala. Tira iqedsen nnant-ed : Sidi Ṛebbi yețțeṭṭef imusnawen di tḥila-nsen.
3.20: Yura daɣen : Sidi Ṛebbi yessen ixemmimen n imusnawen, yeẓra belli d ixemmimen ur nesɛi azal.
3.21: Ḥadret ad yili win ara izuxxen s yemdanen, axaṭer kullec d ayla nwen ;
3.22: Bulus, Abulus neɣ Buṭrus, ddunit, tudert, lmut, lweqt-a d lweqt i d-iteddun, kullec d ayla-nwen ;
3.23: kunwi d ayla n Lmasiḥ, Lmasiḥ d ayla n Sidi Ṛebbi.

4.1: Ilaq a ɣ-ḥesben yemdanen belli d iqeddacen kan n Lmasiḥ i nella, d wid i gwekkel Sidi Ṛebbi i wessefhem n lbaḍna-ines.
4.2: Acu i nețṛaǧu deg win i nwekkel ɣef lḥaǧa ? Nețṛaǧu a nețkel fell-as !
4.3: Nekk, ur iyi-d-tewqiɛ ara ma yella tesḍelmem-iyi kunwi neɣ ma isseḍlem-iyi ccṛeɛ n yemdanen ; nekk daɣen ur sḍelmeɣ ara iman-iw,
4.4: ɣas akken ur iyi-isseḍlem ara wul-iw, mačči d ayagi ara d-isbeggnen belli d aḥeqqi i lliɣ, axaṭer d Sidi Ṛebbi ara yi-ḥasben.
4.5: Daymi ur țḥasabet ara uqbel lweqt, uqbel tuɣalin n Ssid-nneɣ ; d nețța ara d-isbeggnen s tafat-is ayen yeffren di ṭṭlam, ara d-ibeggnen daɣen ayen yeffren deg wulawen. Imiren yal yiwen ad isɛu ccan yuklal ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
4.6: Ay atmaten, ayen akka i d-nniɣ fell-i akk-d Abulus nniɣ-t-id iwakken aț-țfehmem lmeɛna n lemtel-agi : « Ur țɛeddit ara akkin i tilas n wayen yuran » ; ilaq yiwen ur ixeddem lxilaf ger yemdanen, iwakken ad izuxx s yiwen deg-sen.
4.7: Ihi anwa i k-yessulin ccan sennig wiyaḍ ? Acu ur k-d-nekki ara s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi deg wayen akk tesɛiḍ ? Imi d nețța i k-d-yefkan, acuɣeṛ i tețcekkiṛeḍ iman-ik am akken mačči s ɣuṛ-es i k-d-yekka ?
4.8: Atan teṛwam yakan, tuɣalem d imeṛkantiyen ! Tuɣalem d imḍebbṛen mbla nukni, acḥal bɣiɣ lemmer ț-țideț tzemrem i yiman-nwen iwakken a nḍebbeṛ s tdukli !
4.9: Nukni yellan d imceggɛen n Lmasiḥ, yefka-yaɣ Ṛebbi imukan ineggura ; aql-aɣ am wid ibuṣan, am wid i tețɛassa lmut, tfeṛṛeǧ deg-nneɣ ddunit meṛṛa, am lmalayekkat, am yemdanen.
4.10: Nukni d imehbal ɣef ddemma n Lmasiḥ, ma d kunwi d iɛeqliyen di tikli-nwen akk-d Lmasiḥ ! Nukni nefcel, kunwi tesɛam tazmert ; nukni nețwaḥqeṛ ma d kunwi tesɛam ccan !
4.11: Ar tura, aql-aɣ neqqim i laẓ d fad, neɛra, nețwet, nețmenṭar si tama ɣer tayeḍ ;
4.12: nețɛețțib iman nneɣ a nexdem iwakken a d-nawi aɣṛum-nneɣ s ifassen-nneɣ. M'ara ɣ-reggmen nukni nețbarak-iten, m'ara ɣ-țqehhiṛen nukni nețțawi-yasen,
4.13: m'ara d-inin ayen n diri fell-aneɣ nenehhu-ten. Ar tura ḥesben-aɣ am iḍumman n ddunit, am ineggura n yemdanen.
4.14: Ur wen-d-uriɣ ara ayagi iwakken a kkun-sneḥcameɣ, meɛna iwakken a kkun-sfehmeɣ am arraw iw i ḥemmleɣ.
4.15: Ɣas ma llan ɛecṛa alaf yemdanen i kkun isselmaden deg webrid n Lmasiḥ, yiwen n baba-twen kan i tesɛam di Lmasiḥ, imi d nekk i kkun-id-yewwin ɣer webrid n Lmasiḥ s Lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
4.16: A kkun-weṣṣiɣ ihi aț-țeddum am akken ddiɣ nekkini.
4.17: Ɣef wayagi i wen-ceggɛeɣ Timuti, mmi eɛzizen di Lmasiḥ, iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken a wen-d-yesmekti amek i leḥḥuɣ deg webrid n Lmasiḥ, akken i t-sselmadeɣ di mkul tajmaɛt n watmaten.
4.18: Kra deg-wen ikcem-iten zzux, ɣilen ur n-țṛuḥuɣ ara a kkun-ẓreɣ ?
4.19: Meɛna ma yebɣa Sidi Ṛebbi, qṛib a n-aseɣ ɣuṛ-wen. Ad ẓreɣ widak-agi yețzuxxun, mačči d imeslayen-nsen kan iwumi ara ḥesseɣ meɛna ad waliɣ ayen iwumi izemren.
4.20: Axaṭer tazmert n tgeldit n Sidi Ṛebbi mačči d imeslayen kan ara ț-id-isbeggnen, meɛna d lecɣal.
4.21: D acu i tebɣam ? A n-aseɣ ɣuṛ wen s uɛekkaz, neɣ s wul yeččuṛen d leḥmala akk-d leḥnana ?

5.1: Di mkul amkan nesla yedṛa leḥṛam d ameqqran gar-awen, d ayen ur nețțaf ara ulamma ger leǧnas nniḍen, tessawḍem armi yiwen deg-wen yețɛic di leḥṛam akk ț-țmeṭṭut n baba-s !
5.2: Yerna mazal-ikkun tețzuxxum ! Ilaq-awen aț-țilim di leḥzen, argaz i gxeddmen annect-agi ilaq a t tessufɣem si gar-awen ;
5.3: ma d nekk, ɣas beɛdeɣ fell-awen leɛqel-iw yella yid-wen ; atan sḍelmeɣ win ixedmen lɛaṛ-agi am akken lliɣ yid-wen.
5.4: S yisem n Sidna Ɛisa, s tezmert is, nnejmaɛet aql-i yid-wen :
5.5: ssufɣet akkin argaz am wagi, sellmet-eț i tezmert n Cciṭan ad issenger lǧețța-s iwakken ṛṛuḥ-is ad ițwasellek ass n tuɣalin n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa.
5.6: A wen-d-iniɣ : zzux-agi-nwen ur imɛin ara ! Eɛni ur tessinem ara lemtel i d-yeqqaṛen belli cwiṭ n yiɣes n temtunt yessalay arukti meṛṛa ?
5.7: Ssizdeget iman-nwen, kkset si gar-awen tamtunt ( iɣes ) taqdimt n ddnub iwakken aț-țilim d arukti ajdid yeṣfan. Ț-țideț d arukti ajdid yeṣfan i tellam, axaṭer Tafaska-nneɣ tebda, imi Lmasiḥ yellan d izimer nneɣ n leslak yefka iman-is d asfel.
5.8: Tura ihi a nkemmel lɛid weɣṛum mbla tamtunt ( iɣes ), mačči s temtunt-nni ixesṛen yellan d ddnub akk-d cceṛ, meɛna s weɣṛum ur nesɛi tamtunt ( iɣes ) yellan d ṣṣfa akk-d tideț.
5.9: Di tebṛaț-nni i wen-n-uriɣ, nniɣ awen-d ur țeddut ara d wid yețɛicin di leḥṛam.
5.10: Ur wen-d-nniɣ ara annect-agi ɣef wat ddunit yețɛicin di leḥṛam, yeččuṛen d ṭṭmeɛ, d lexdeɛ ț-țukeṛda, yețɛebbiden lmeṣnuɛat am Ṛebbi, neɣ m'ulac ilaq-awen aț-țeffɣem si ddunit-agi.
5.11: Meɛna nniɣ-awen-d : ur țemxalaḍet ara d win yețțarran iman-is d amasiḥi yili nețța yețɛici di leḥṛam, yeččuṛ d ṭṭmeɛ, d lexdeɛ, iheddeṛ ɣef wiyaḍ, iɛebbed lmeṣnuɛat, d asekṛan, d amakar. Ur țɣimit ara d wergaz am agi ulamma ɣer lqut.
5.12: Acu ara ɣ-yawin a nḥaseb wid n beṛṛa ? Eɛni mačči d wid yellan gar-awen i glaq aț-țḥasbem ?
5.13: Wid n beṛṛa d Ṛebbi ara ten-iḥasben. Meɛna akken yura di tira iqedsen : Stixṛet amcum si gar-awen.

6.1: Ma yella yiwen deg-wen yebɣa ad iccetki ɣef gma-s, amek ara iṛuḥ a t-icaṛeɛ zdat wid ur numin ara s Lmasiḥ, mačči zdat wid yumnen am nețța ?
6.2: Eɛni ur teẓrim ara d wid yumnen s Lmasiḥ ara iḥasben at ddunit ? Ma yella ihi d kunwi ara iḥasben at ddunit, amek ur tețțizmirem ara aț-țefrum timsalin timecṭuḥin ?
6.3: Ur teẓrim ara belli a nḥaseb lmalayekkat ? Anda ara d-banent temsalin n ddunit-agi !
6.4: Ma d kunwi m'ara yili lxilaf gar-awen, tețṛuḥum ɣer wid ur numin ara s Lmasiḥ iwakken ad frun tilufa-nwen !
6.5: Ur tețneḥcamem ara ! Eɛni ulac ula d yiwen n wergaz ifehmen gar awen, i gzemren ad ifru timsalin ger watmaten ?
6.6: Meɛna kunwi atan wa yețcetki ɣef wa, yerna ɣer wid ur numin ara s Lmasiḥ !
6.7: Ihi amennuɣ i d-yețțilin gar awen, ițbeggin-ed lɛib-nwen. Acuɣeṛ ur tṣebbṛem ara axiṛ ad iɛeddi fell-awen lbaṭel, acuɣeṛ ur tețțaǧǧam ara iman-nwen aț-țețțuɛerrim ?
6.8: Meɛna d kunwi i d imesbaṭliyen, tețɛerrim wiyaḍ ɣas akken d atmaten-nwen !
6.9: Eɛni ur teẓrim ara belli wid ixeddmen lbaṭel ur keččmen ara ɣer tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi ? Ur țɣuṛṛut ara iman-nwen axaṭer kra n win yețɛicin di leḥṛam neɣ wid iɛebbden lmeṣnuɛat, wid ixeddmen zzna, at leɛṛuṛ,
6.10: wid yețțakren, wid itețțen ayla n medden, wid ireggmen, ixeddaɛen akk-d isekṛanen, ur keččmen ara tagelda n Sidi Ṛebbi.
